translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage.
translations.reference: Kichocho (Bilharzia) Muhtasari: Kichocho ni ugonjwa wa umaskini unaosababisha magonjwa sugu. Maambukizi hupatikana wakati watu wanagusana na maji safi yaliyoathiriwa na aina za mabuu (cercariae) ya mafua ya vimelea ya damu, inayojulikana kama schistosomes. Minyoo wadogo wadogo wazee huishi katika mishipa inayounda njia ya mkojo na utumbo. Mayai mengi wanayotaga yananaswa kwenye tishu na majibu ya mwili kwao yanaweza kusababisha uharibifu mkubwa.
translations.hypothesis: Umgaji wa Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia): Umgaji ni ugonjwa unaoendelea ambao unaathiri afya. Ugonjwa huu huathiri watu ambao wanatumia maji safi ambapo wanaweza kuambukizwa na nauli za Schistosomiasis, ambazo ni nauli za wadudu ambazo hupatikana kwenye maji safi. Nauli hizi hupatikana kwenye mishipa ambayo hutawana kwenye njia ya utumbo na matumbo. Vyakula vyao vya kawaida hupatikana kwenye tishu na, majibu ya mwili kwa vyakula hivyo yanaweza kusababisha uharibifu mkubwa.

translations.source: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.
translations.reference: Kichocho huathiri karibu watu milioni 240 duniani kote, na zaidi ya watu milioni 700 wanaishi katika maeneo ya ugonjwa huo. Maambukizi yameenea katika maeneo ya tropiki na chini ya tropiki, katika jamii maskini bila maji ya kunywa na usafi wa mazingira wa kutosha. Kichocho kwenye urogenital husababishwa na Schistosoma haematobium na schistosomiasis ya matumbo na kiumbe chochote S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, na S. mekongi. Watu milioni kadhaa ulimwenguni kote wanaugua ugonjwa mbaya kama matokeo ya kichocho. Mkakati wa WHO juu ya matumizi ya dawa za anthelminthic sasa unawezesha kudhibiti kichocho katika jamii maskini na zilizotengwa, kwa kushirikiana na hatua dhidi ya filariasis ya limfu, onchocerciasis na helminthiasis inayopitishwa kwenye udongo.
translations.hypothesis: Ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis unaathiri karibu watu milioni 240 duniani, na zaidi ya watu milioni 700 wanaishi katika maeneo ambapo ugonjwa huu ni wa kawaida. Ugonjwa huu ni wa kawaida katika maeneo ya tropiki na sub-tropiki, katika jamii maskini ambazo hazina maji salama na usafi wa kutosha. Ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis wa viungo vya mkojo unaoathiriwa na Schistosoma haematobium, na ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis wa matumbo unaoathiriwa na aina zote za wanyama kama vile S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, na S. mekongi. Milioni kadhaa za watu duniani kote wanaathiriwa na ugonjwa huu, na kupata matatizo kubwa. Stratajia ya WHO kuhusu matumizi ya dawa za kupunguza nyama, sasa inatoa fursa ya kudhibiti ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis katika jamii maskini na zisizo na haki, pamoja na hatua za kupambana na ugonjwa wa lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis, na ugonjwa wa nyama.

translations.source: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.
translations.reference: Katika maeneo ambayo yameenea sana, ugonjwa mbaya wa kichocho unaweza kuzuiwa kwa matibabu ya mara kwa mara ya vikundi vilivyo hatarini vinavyolengwa kulingana na utambuzi wa jamii kulingana na vikundi vya walinzi. Praziquantel imetumiwa kwa usalama pamoja na albendazole na ivermectin, katika maeneo ambayo dawa hizi zimetumika kando kwa ajili ya kuzuia chemotherapy. Dalili: Dalili za kichocho husababishwa na mmenyuko wa mwili kwa mayai ya minyoo. Kichocho cha matumbo kinaweza kusababisha maumivu ya tumbo, kuhara, na damu kwenye kinyesi. Kuongezeka kwa ini ni kawaida katika hali ya juu, na mara nyingi huhusishwa na mkusanyiko wa maji katika cavity ya peritoneal na shinikizo la damu ya mishipa ya damu ya tumbo.
translations.hypothesis: Katika maeneo ambapo ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis ni mkubwa, ugonjwa mkubwa unaweza kuzuwa kwa matibabu za mara kwa mara kwa kundi lililoshughulikiwa, kulingana na utambuzi wa jamii, kwa kutumia kundi la utambuzi. Dawa ya Praziquantel imetumika kwa usalama pamoja na Albendazole na Ivermectin, katika maeneo ambapo dawa hizi zimetumika tofauti kwa matibabu ya kuzuia. Athari: Athari za ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis hutokana na majibu ya mwili kwa mayai ya nyama. Ugonjwa wa schistosomiasis kwenye matumbo unaweza kusababisha maumivu ya tumbo, kutolea taulo, na damu kwenye matumbo. Kuboresha ini ni kawaida katika hatua za juu, na mara nyingi huambatana na ukusanyiko wa maji kwenye tumbo na shinikizo kubwa kwenye mishipa ya damu ya tumbo.

translations.source: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.
translations.reference: Katika kesi kama hizo kunaweza pia kuwa na upanuzi wa wengu. Ishara kuu ya kichocho ya urogenital ni hematuria (damu katika mkojo). Fibrosis ya kibofu na ureta, na uharibifu wa figo wakati mwingine hugunduliwa katika hali ya juu. Saratani ya kibofu ni shida nyingine inayowezekana katika hatua za baadaye. Kwa wanawake, kichocho kwenye urogenital kinaweza kujitokeza na vidonda vya sehemu za siri, kutokwa na damu ukeni, maumivu wakati wa kujamiiana, na vinundu kwenye uke.
translations.hypothesis: Katika kesi hizi, kunaweza pia kuwa na kuongezeka kwa ini. Ishara classic ya ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis katika viungo vya kejani ni utoaji damu (damu katika madai). Ugonjwa wa ini na ureter, pamoja na uharibifu wa ini, wakati mwingine hutambuliwa katika kesi za hatua. Saratani ya ini ni ugonjwa unaweza kutokea katika hatua za baadaye. Kwa wanawake, ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis katika viungo vya kejani unaweza kuonyesha magonjwa katika viungo vya kejani, kutokwa damu katika njia ya kejani, maumivu wakati wa mambo ya karibu, na nyasi katika eneo la vulva.

translations.source: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: Kwa wanaume, kichocho ya urogenital inaweza kusababisha ugonjwa wa vesicles ya seminal, prostate, na viungo vingine. Ugonjwa huu unaweza pia kuwa na matokeo mengine ya muda mrefu yasiyoweza kurekebishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na utasa. Madhara ya kiuchumi na kiafya ya kichocho ni makubwa na ugonjwa huo huzima zaidi kuliko kuua. Kwa watoto, kichocho kinaweza kusababisha upungufu wa damu, kudumaa na uwezo mdogo wa kujifunza, ingawa madhara kwa kawaida huweza kubadilishwa kwa matibabu. Matibabu: Praziquantel ndiyo tiba inayopendekezwa dhidi ya aina zote za kichocho.
translations.hypothesis: Kwa wanaume, ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis unaweza kusababisha matatizo katika vyenye urogenital, pamoja na prostate na vywili vingine. Ugonjwa huu pia unaweza kuwa na matokeo mengine endelevu, pamoja na ugonjwa wa kutuzwa. Madhara ya kiuchumi na kiafya ya ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis ni kubwa, na ugonjwa huu unaathiri zaidi kuliko kusababisha vifo. Kwa watoto, ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis unaweza kusababisha upungufu wa damu, ukubwa hafifu, na uwezo wa kujifunza uliozungukika, licha ya kwamba madhara haya kawaida yanaweza kurekebishwa na matibabu. Matibabu: Praziquantel ni matibabu iliyopendekezwa dhidi ya fomu zote za ugonjwa wa Schistosomiasis.

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.
translations.reference: Ni ya ufanisi, salama, na ya gharama nafuu. Ingawa kuambukizwa tena kunaweza kutokea baada ya matibabu, hatari ya kupata ugonjwa mbaya hupunguzwa na hata kubadilishwa wakati matibabu yanapoanzishwa na kurudiwa katika utoto. Udhibiti wa kichocho umetekelezwa kwa mafanikio katika kipindi cha miaka 40 katika nchi kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na Brazil, Kambodia, China, Misri, Mauritius, Jamhuri ya Kiislamu ya Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, nk. Nchini Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, Jamhuri ya Muungano wa Tanzania, na Yemen, imewezekana kuongeza matibabu ya kichocho hadi ngazi ya kitaifa na kuwa na athari kwa ugonjwa huo katika miaka michache. Tathmini ya hali ya maambukizi inahitajika katika nchi kadhaa.
translations.hypothesis: Ni yenye ufanisi, salama, na bei nafuu. Ingawa ugonjwa unaweza kuenea tena baada ya matibabu, hatari ya kuugua magonjwa hatari imepungika, na hata kuondolewa wakati matibabu huanza na hutendeka katika utoto. Udhibiti wa schistosomiasis umejikusasisha kwa mafanikio katika nchi kadhaa, pamoja na Brazil, Cambodia, China, Misri, Mauritius, Jamhuri ya Kiislamu ya Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudia, Morocco, Tunisia, nk. Nchini Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, Jamhuri ya Maendeleo ya Tanzania, na Yemen, imekuwa inawezekana kuendesha matibabu ya schistosomiasis kwa viwango vya kitaifa na kuathiri ugonjwa katika miaka michache. Tathmini ya hali ya usambazaji inahitajika katika nchi kadhaa.

translations.source: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.reference: Katika kipindi cha miaka 10 iliyopita, kumekuwa na ongezeko la kampeni za matibabu katika nchi kadhaa zilizo kusini mwa jangwa la Sahara, ambapo wengi wa wale walio katika hatari wanaishi.
translations.hypothesis: Katika miaka 10 iliyopita, kuna ongezeko kubwa katika kampeni za matibabu katika nchi kadhaa za Afrika Kusini, ambapo watu wengi wana hatari wanaishi.

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.reference: Hatua za kujitunza kwa afya Muhtasari: Kujitunza ni uwezo wa watu binafsi, familia na jamii kukuza afya, kuzuia magonjwa, kudumisha afya, na kukabiliana na ugonjwa na ulemavu kwa msaada au bila msaada wa mfanyakazi wa afya. Hivi sasa watu bilioni 3.6 - nusu ya dunia - kukosa huduma muhimu za afya. WHO inapendekeza uingiliaji wa huduma za kibinafsi kwa kila nchi na mazingira ya kiuchumi, kama njia muhimu ya kufikia chanjo ya afya kwa wote, kukuza afya, kuweka ulimwengu salama, na kuwahudumia walio hatarini. Kujitunza hutambua watu binafsi kama mawakala hai katika kusimamia huduma zao za afya, katika maeneo ikiwa ni pamoja na kukuza afya; kinga na udhibiti wa magonjwa; kujitibu; kutoa huduma kwa watu tegemezi, na urekebishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na huduma shufaa. Kuingilia uangalizi binafsi ni msingi wa ushahidi, zana za ubora zinazosaidia kujitunza.
translations.hypothesis: Mbinu za kujali afya: Maelezo: Kujali afya ni uwezo wa watu, familia na jamii za kuhimiza afya, kuzuia magonjwa, kudumisha afya, na kushughulikia magonjwa na ulemavu, kwa msaada wa mtaalamu wa afya au bila. Hivi sasa, watu 3.6 bilioni – nusu ya dunia – hawana ufikiaji wa huduma muhimu za afya. Shirika la Afya (WHO) unaendelea kuelekeza mbinu za kujali afya kwa kila nchi na mazingira kiuchumi, kama njia muhimu ya kufikia afya ya kila mtu, kuhimiza afya, kuweka dunia salama, na kutoa huduma kwa wale wanaohitaji. Kujali afya inaangazia watu kama wajumbe wa moja kwa moja katika usimamizi wa afya yao, katika masuala kama vile uenezi wa afya; kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa; matibabu ya moja kwa moja; kutoa huduma kwa watu wanaohitaji, na urekebishaji, pamoja na huduma ya mwisho. Mbinu za kujali afya ni zana bora na za ubora, ambazo zinaunga mkono kujali afya.

translations.source: They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health
translations.reference: Zinajumuisha dawa, ushauri nasaha, uchunguzi na/au teknolojia za kidijitali ambazo zinaweza kufikiwa kikamilifu au kwa kiasi nje ya huduma rasmi za afya. Kulingana na uingiliaji kati, zinaweza kutumika na au bila usimamizi wa moja kwa moja wa wafanyakazi wa afya. Kuingilia utunzaji binafsi kunaweza: kuwawezesha watu binafsi na jamii kusimamia afya na ustawi wao kuimarisha taasisi za kitaifa kwa matumizi bora ya rasilimali za ndani kwa afya
translations.hypothesis: Hizi ni pamoja na dawa, ushauri, utambuzi, na/au teknolojia za kidijitali ambazo zinaweza kupatikana kikamilifu au sehemu nje ya huduma rasmi za afya. Kulingana na mtumiaji, zinaweza kutumika na au bila usimamizi wa moja kwa moja wa wataalamu wa afya. Mbinu za kujali wenyewe zinaweza: kuwezesha watu na jamii kudhibiti afya yao na ustawi, na kuimarisha taasisi za kitaifa kwa matumizi bora ya rasilimali za ndani kwa afya.

translations.source: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.
translations.reference: kuboresha huduma ya afya ya msingi (PHC) na kuchangia katika kufikia UHC Mbinu: Mtazamo unaozingatia watu Uingiliaji kati ya kujitunza unasaidia mahitaji na haki za watu binafsi kupitia mkabala unaozingatia watu ambao umejikita katika haki za binadamu na usawa wa kijinsia. Huu ni mtazamo wa jumla wa afya na ustawi wa kila mtu, kwa kuzingatia hali zao, mahitaji na tamaa katika maisha yote, pamoja na mazingira anamoishi. Kujitunza ni uwezo wa watu binafsi wa kuzuia na kutibu magonjwa wenyewe, katika muktadha wa mazingira wezeshi salama na yanayosaidia. Haichukui nafasi ya mfumo wa utunzaji wa afya, lakini badala yake hutoa chaguzi za ziada na chaguzi za utunzaji wa afya.
translations.hypothesis: imarisha huduma ya afya ya msingi (HSA) na kushiriki katika kufikia Mbinu ya Afya ya Umma: Mbinu inayozingatia watu. Mbinu za kujali afya husaidia mahitaji na haki za watu kupitia mbinu inayozingatia watu, ambayo ina msingi katika haki za binadamu na usawa wa jinsia. Hii ni mbinu kamili kwa afya na ustawi wa kila mtu, na inazingatia hali zao, mahitaji na matakwa katika maisha, pamoja na mazingira ambapo wanaishi. Kujali afya ni uwezo wa watu wa kuzuia na kutibu magonjwa wenyewe, katika mazingira salama na inayosaidia. Hii si badala ya mfumo wa huduma za afya, lakini badala yake, inatoa chaguzi na fursa za ziada za huduma za afya.

translations.source: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context
translations.reference: Afua zinazopatikana, zinazoweza kufikiwa, nafuu, zinazokubalika na bora ni sehemu kuu za kukuza na kulinda haki ya afya ya watu. Hatua za kujihudumia zinaweza kuboresha ufanisi wa utoaji wa huduma za afya, upatikanaji na chanjo. Hili linahitaji sheria na sera zinazounga mkono, ufadhili wa afya, bidhaa na uingiliaji bora uliodhibitiwa, na elimu ambayo inakuza ushiriki wa watu binafsi, pamoja na faragha na usiri. Mazingatio ya haki za binadamu husaidia kupunguza unyanyasaji, shuruti, unyanyapaa na ubaguzi kwa kuboresha utumiaji wa kila mtu haki yake ya afya, habari, na kufanya maamuzi huru. Muktadha wa dharura
translations.hypothesis: تدخل za kujali afya, ambazo ni za kuweza, za urahisi, na za bei nafuu, ni sehemu muhimu za kukuza na kulinda haki ya watu kwa afya. التدخل za kujali afya zinaweza kuboresha ufanisi wa utoaji huduma za afya, upatikanaji, na usafishaji. Hii inahitaji sheria na sera za kusaidia, ufadhili wa afya, bidhaa na التدخل za ubora zilizoragiliwa, na elimu ambayo inakuza ushiriki wa watu, pamoja na faragha na siri. Vigezo vya haki za binadamu husaidia kupunguza uvunjaji, shinikizo, utata, na ubaguzi kwa kuboresha uwezo wa kila mtu katika kujitunza, kupata taarifa, na kufanya maamuzi kwa hiari. Mfumo wa dharura

translations.source: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: Magonjwa na migogoro ya kibinadamuKatika hali ambapo mifumo iliyopo ya afya imeenea, mara nyingi kuna mahitaji ambayo hayajawahi kushuhudiwa kwa watu binafsi na jamii kusimamia afya zao. Mikakati bunifu inayoenda zaidi ya mwitikio wa kawaida wa sekta ya afya inahitajika haraka kutokana na kwamba: rekodi ya watu milioni 274 kwa sasa wanahitaji msaada wa kibinadamu na ulinzi na milipuko ya magonjwa ni tishio la kimataifa. angalau watu milioni 400 duniani kote wanakosa huduma muhimu zaidi za afya. 1 kati ya 5 ya idadi ya watu duniani sasa wanaishi katika majanga ya kibinadamu, ambapo mifumo ya afya ina changamoto kutoa huduma muhimu.
translations.hypothesis: Magonjwa ya hatari na majanga za kiutu: Katika hali ambapo mifumo ya afya iliyopo iko chini ya shinikizo, kuna haja kubwa kwa watu na jamii kudumisha afya zao. Michoro za ubunifu ambazo zinaenda zaidi ya majibu ya kawaida katika sekta ya afya, zinahitajika sana, kwani: watu 274 milioni, ambao ni rekodi, kwa sasa wanahitaji msaada na ulinzi wa kiutu, na mgomvu wa magonjwa ni hatari ya kimataifa, na angalau watu 400 milioni duniani kote hawana ufikiaji wa huduma muhimu za afya. Sasa, watu 1 katika 5 wa idadi ya watu duniani wanaishi katika majanga za kiutu, ambapo mifumo ya afya inakabiliwa na changamoto za kutoa huduma muhimu.

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: Uingiliaji kati wa kujitunza unaweza kutoa chaguzi muhimu, za ziada kwa kituo cha afya cha kawaida- au huduma za wafanyikazi wa afya, kama sehemu ya mfumo wa afya unaounga mkono. Hili linafaa hasa wakati wa janga la UVIKO-19, wakati kujitenga na hatua za umbali wa kimwili hufanya iwe vigumu zaidi kwa watu kupata huduma zao za kawaida za afya na dawa na mifumo ya afya ya kitaifa inaweza kutatizwa. WHO inajumuisha hatua za kujitunza kama hatua za kipaumbele katika mwongozo wa uendeshaji wa kudumisha huduma muhimu za afya kwa muktadha wa UVIKO-19.
translations.hypothesis: تدخل za kujali wenyewe zinaweza kutoa chaguo muhimu, za ziada, ambazo zinaweza kutoa huduma za kawaida za hospitali au kutoka kwa wataalamu wa afya, kama sehemu ya mfumo wa afya unaosaidia. Hii ni muhimu hasa wakati wa janga kama vile COVID-19, ambapo hatua za kujitenga na umbali wa kimwili zinafanya iwe vigumu kwa watu kupata huduma za kawaida za afya na dawa, na mifumo ya afya ya kitaifa zinaweza kupatikia kesi. WHO inaangazia hatua za kujali wenyewe kama hatua muhimu katika mwongozo wa uendeshaji wa kudumisha huduma muhimu za afya katika muktadha wa COVID-19.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.
translations.reference: Sepsis Muhtasari: Sepsis ni hali ya kutishia maisha ambayo hutokea wakati majibu ya mwili kwa maambukizi husababisha kuumia kwa tishu na viungo vyake. Mara nyingi ni njia ya mwisho ya kifo kwa magonjwa mengi ya kuambukiza ulimwenguni. Inahusisha ulemavu wa viungo unaosababishwa na mwitikio usio na udhibiti wa mwenyeji kwa maambukizi na ikiwa haitatambuliwa mapema na kudhibitiwa mara moja, inaweza kusababisha mshtuko wa septic, kushindwa kwa viungo vingi na kifo. Ingawa makadirio sahihi ya mzigo wa kimataifa wa ugonjwa wa sepsis ni vigumu kuthibitishwa, uchapishaji wa hivi karibuni wa kisayansi uliripoti kwamba sepsis huathiri takriban watu milioni 49 na husababisha vifo milioni 11 duniani kote kila mwaka.
translations.hypothesis: Maelezo kuhusu Septicemia: Septicemia ni hali hatari ambayo hutokea wakati mwili humulika kutokana na majeraha, na kusababisha uharibifu kwenye tishu na viungo. Hii mara nyingi ni njia ya mwisho ya kufa kwa magonjwa mengi duniani. Inahusisha uharibifu wa viungo unaosababishwa na majibu ya mwili ambayo hayo, na ikiwa haitambuliwa mapema na kutibwa haraka, inaweza kusababisha mgongano wa septic, uharibifu wa viungo nyingi, na kufa. Ingawa ni vigumu kupata takwimu sahihi kuhusu mzigo wa kimatibabu wa septicemia duniani, utafiti wa hivi majuzi uliripoti kwamba septicemia husababisha watu milioni 49, na kusababisha vifo milioni 11 duniani kila mwaka.

translations.source: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.
translations.reference: Katika mazingira ya jamii, sepsis mara nyingi hujidhihirisha kama kuzorota kwa magonjwa ya kawaida na yanayoweza kuzuilika. Sepsis pia mara nyingi hutokana na maambukizo yanayopatikana katika mazingira ya huduma za afya, ambayo ni mojawapo ya matukio mabaya ya mara kwa mara wakati wa utoaji wa huduma na huathiri mamia ya mamilioni ya wagonjwa duniani kote kila mwaka. Ikiwa sepsis inakua wakati wa ujauzito, wakati au baada ya kuzaa, au baada ya kutoa mimba, inaitwa sepsis ya uzazi. Sepsis katika watoto wachanga huitwa sepsis ya watoto wachanga. Licha ya kuzuilika kwa kiwango cha juu, ugonjwa wa sepsis wa mama na wachanga unaendelea kuwa sababu kuu ya vifo kwa wajawazito na watoto wachanga.
translations.hypothesis: Katika mazingira ya jamii, magonjwa ya sepsis mara nyingi yanaonyeshwa kama ugonjwa wa kawaida na unaoweza kuzuiliwa. Magonjwa ya sepsis pia mara nyingi hutokana na magonjwa yaliyopatikana katika eneo la huduma, ambazo ni mojawapo ya matukio hasi zaidi wakati wa utoaji wa huduma na zinaathiri mamia milioni ya wagonjwa duniani kila mwaka. Ikiwa magonjwa ya sepsis huendeleza wakati wa ujauzito, wakati wa kuzaliwa, au baada ya kupoteza, inaitwa sepsis ya mama. Magonjwa ya sepsis kwa watoto wachanga inaitwa sepsis ya watoto wachanga. Licha ya kuwa yanaweza kuzuiliwa, magonjwa ya sepsis ya mama na watoto wachanga bado ni sababu kubwa ya vifo kwa wanawake wajawazito na watoto wachanga.

translations.source: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.
translations.reference: Dalili: Sepsis ni dharura ya kimatibabu na inahitaji uangalizi wa haraka ili kuzuia matatizo zaidi au kifo. Inaweza kuwasilisha ishara na dalili tofauti tofauti wakati mwingine, ambazo zinaweza kusababisha kutotambuliwa na hali zingine. Maambukizi ya septic yanaweza kusababisha homa, lakini pia inaweza kusababisha joto la chini la mwili, ncha za baridi na kutetemeka. Kunaweza kuwa na ugumu wa kupumua au kupumua kwa haraka, pamoja na kuongezeka kwa kiwango cha moyo, au kinyume chake mapigo dhaifu na shinikizo la chini la damu. Inaweza kusababisha kutokwa kwa mkojo kidogo, pamoja na ngozi yenye rangi ya buluu, madoadoa au iliyopauka isivyo kawaida, na kubadilika kwa hali ya akili.
translations.hypothesis: Dalili: Septisia ni hali hatari na inahitaji usaidizi wa haraka ili kuzuia matatizo zaidi au vifo. Wakati mwingine, inaweza kuonyesha dalili na ishara tofauti, ambazo zinaweza kusababisha ubaguzi na hali nyingine. Septisia inaweza kusababisha jiko, lakini pia inaweza kusababisha joto, miguu na mikono baridi, na kutetemeka. Pia kunaweza kuwa na ugumu wa kupumua au kupumua kwa kasi, pamoja na kasi ya moyo, au kwa upande, moyo dhaifu na shinikizo la damu. Pia inaweza kusababisha uto kidogo, pamoja na ngozi yenye rangi nyeupe, na hali ya akili iliyomibwa.

translations.source: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.reference: Hatimaye, inaweza kusababisha maumivu makali ya mwili au usumbufu, ambayo inafanya kuwa rahisi kuchanganya kwa mafua au sumu ya chakula. Kwa watoto, sepsis inaweza kutokea kwa kupumua kwa haraka sana, degedege, ngozi iliyopauka, uchovu au ugumu wa kuamka au kuhisi baridi isivyo kawaida kwa kuguswa. Kwa watoto chini ya miaka 5, inaweza kusababisha ugumu wa kulisha, kutapika mara kwa mara au ukosefu wa mkojo. Kushuku sepsis na kuchukua hatua haraka ni muhimu kwa utambuzi wa mapema na utambuzi. Matibabu: Utambulisho wa mapema wa dalili na uanzishwaji wa wakati unaofaa wa usimamizi wa kliniki unaofaa ni vipengele muhimu vya kupunguza hatari na athari za sepsis.
translations.hypothesis: Hatimaye, inaweza kusababisha maumivu au ugonjwa mkubwa, ambapo inaweza kuwa rahisi kuchanganywa na ugonjwa wa homa au sumu. Kwa watoto, ugonjwa huu unaweza kuonekana kupitia kupumua kwa kasi, kutetemeka, ngozi nyeupe, kutokuwa na nguvu, au ugumu wa kuamka au hisia zisizo kawaida. Kwa watoto chini ya miaka 5, inaweza kusababisha ugumu katika kunywa, kutemeka mara kwa mara, au kutokuwa na haja ya kupumua. Kutambua ugonjwa huu na kuchukua hatua haraka ni muhimu kwa utambuzi mapema. Matibabu: Kutambua dalili mapema na kuandaa matibabu za kliniki sahihi ni muhimu kwa kupunguza hatari na athari za ugonjwa huu.

translations.source: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: Ugunduzi wa baadhi ya vialama, kama vile protini tendaji ya C na procalcitonin, unaweza kuwa na ufanisi katika kutambua hali hiyo. Baada ya utambuzi wa mapema, uchunguzi wa kusaidia kutambua kisababishi magonjwa ya kuambukiza inayoongoza kwa sepsis ni muhimu ili kuongoza matibabu yaliyolengwa ya antimicrobial. Tiba inayofaa ya antimicrobial (kwa mfano, antibiotiki na antifungal) inapaswa kutolewa ndani ya saa moja baada ya kutambuliwa kwa sepsis. Ukinzani wa viua viini (AMR) unaweza kuhatarisha usimamizi wa kimatibabu wa sepsis kwa sababu matibabu ya majaribio ya viuavijasumu mara nyingi yanahitajika. Ufufuaji wa maji ya mapema ni muhimu katika awamu ya awali na vasopressors zinaweza kuhitajika ili kuboresha na kudumisha upenyezaji wa tishu.
translations.hypothesis: Uaguzi wa aina fulani za ishara, kama vile protini ya C na procalcitonin, unaweza kuwa na ufanisi katika utambuzi wa hali hiyo. Baada ya utambuzi mapema, utambuzi wa zaidi ili kutambua patogeni unaosababisha magonjwa, ambao husababisha sepsis, ni muhimu ili kuongoza matibabu maalumu za mipakani. Matibabu sahihi za mipakani (kama vile dawa za bakteria na dawa za mazo) lazima kutozwa ndani ya saa moja baada ya utambuzi wa sepsis. Uking'amizi wa mipakani (AMR) unaweza kutishia usimamizi wa kliniki wa sepsis kwa sababu matibabu ya bakteria mara nyingi hutakiwa. Urekebishaji wa maji mapema ni muhimu katika hatua ya awali, na pia inaweza kuhitajika dawa za kuboresha na kudumisha utoaji wa maji kwenye tishu.

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: Kuna hatua mbili kuu za kuzuia sepsis: Kuzuia maambukizi ya microbial na maambukizi Kuzuia maambukizi yanayobadilika kuwa sepsis Ndani ya jamii, kuzuia sepsis husaidiwa kwa kutumia njia bora za usafi, kuboresha usafi wa mazingira na ubora wa maji na upatikanaji, kutoa upatikanaji wa chanjo, hasa kwa wale walio katika hatari kubwa, pamoja na lishe sahihi, ikiwa ni pamoja na kunyonyesha kwa watoto wachanga. Kinga katika vituo vya kutolea huduma za afya hutegemea programu za kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi (IPC), kanuni bora za usafi, na vifaa safi vinavyofanya kazi vizuri.
translations.hypothesis: Kuna hatua mbili kuu za kuzuia sepsis: kuzuia usambazaji na magonjwa, na kuzuia magonjwa kuwa sepsis. Katika jamii, kuzuia sepsis inaasa kwa kutumia mbinu za usafi bora, kuboresha usafi na ubora wa maji, kutoa ufikiaji wa chanjo, hasa kwa wale wana hatari kubwa, pamoja na lishe sahihi, ikiwa ni pamoja na upato kwa watoto wapya. Kuzuia katika taasisi za afya inategemea programu za kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa, mbinu za usafi bora, na vifaa safi na zenye uendeshaji.

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.reference: Afya ya ngono Muhtasari: Afya ya ngono ni msingi kwa afya na ustawi wa jumla wa watu binafsi, wanandoa na familia, na kwa maendeleo ya kijamii na kiuchumi ya jumuiya na nchi. Afya ya ngono, inapotazamwa kwa uthibitisho, inahitaji mtazamo chanya na wa heshima kwa ujinsia na mahusiano ya ngono, pamoja na uwezekano wa kuwa na uzoefu wa kijinsia wa kufurahisha na salama, bila kulazimishwa, ubaguzi na unyanyasaji. Uwezo wa wanaume na wanawake kufikia afya ya ngono na ustawi hutegemea: upatikanaji wa taarifa za kina, za ubora mzuri kuhusu ngono na ujinsia;
translations.hypothesis: Maarifa kuhusu afya ya kiume: Afya ya kiume ni muhimu kwa afya na ustawi wa watu, wanandoa na familia, na pia kwa maendeleo ya kijamii na kiuchumi ya jamii na nchi. Afya ya kiume, wakati inazingatiwa kwa mtazamo chanya, inahitaji mbinu chanya na kuelewa kuhusu uhusiano wa kiume na wa kike, pamoja na uwezekano wa kuwa na uzoefu wa kiume na wa kike, ambapo hakuna shinikizo, ubaguzi, na uvunjaji. Uwezo wa wanaume na wanawake kufikia afya na ustawi wa kiume, inategemea: upatikanaji wa taarifa kamili na za ubora kuhusu uhusiano na afya ya kiume.

translations.source: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:
translations.reference: maarifa juu ya hatari wanazoweza kukabiliana nazo na kuathirika kwao kwa matokeo mabaya ya shughuli za ngono zisizo salama; uwezo wa kupata huduma ya afya ya ngono; kuishi katika mazingira ambayo yanathibitisha na kukuza afya ya ngono. Masuala yanayohusiana na afya ya ngono ni mapana, na yanajumuisha mwelekeo wa kijinsia na utambulisho wa kijinsia, kujieleza kingono, mahusiano na furaha. Pia ni pamoja na matokeo mabaya au masharti kama vile:
translations.hypothesis: maelezo kuhusu hatari ambazo wanaweza kukumbana nao, na umuhimu wao katika matokeo hasi ya shughuli za kiafya; uwezo wa kupata huduma za kiafya; kuishi katika mazingira ambayo yanaunga mkono na kukuza afya ya kiafya. Masuala yanayohusiana na afya ya kiafya ni pana, na ni pamoja na: ushirikiano, jinsia, mienendo, mahusiano, na raha. Pia ni pamoja na matokeo hasi au hali kama vile:

translations.source: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.reference: maambukizo ya virusi vya ukimwi (VVU), magonjwa ya zinaa (STIs) na magonjwa ya njia ya uzazi (RTIs) na matokeo yake mabaya (kama vile saratani na utasa); mimba zisizotarajiwa na utoaji mimba; dysfunction ya ngono; ukatili wa kijinsia; na vitendo vyenye madhara (kama vile ukeketaji, FGM).
translations.hypothesis: وانواع الأمراض kama magonjwa yanayosababishwa na virusi vya ugonjwa wa AIDS (HIV), magonjwa yanayosambazwa kupitia ngono (STIs), na magonjwa ya matumbo; matokeo hasi (kama saratani na uwekundu); ujauzito usichoziridhika na upasuaji; ugonjwa wa ngono; na tabia hatari (kama kukata viungo vya kike, FGM).

translations.source: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.
translations.reference: Ufafanuzi: WHO imekuwa ikifanya kazi katika eneo la afya ya ngono tangu angalau 1974, wakati mijadala ya kamati ya wataalamu ilisababisha kuchapishwa kwa ripoti ya kiufundi yenye kichwa "Elimu na matibabu katika ujinsia wa binadamu" (WHO, 1975). Kuanzia mwaka wa 2000, Shirika la Afya la Pan American (PAHO) na WHO waliitisha idadi ya mashauriano ya wataalam ili kukagua istilahi na kutambua chaguzi za programu. Kilele cha mikutano hii kilikuwa Mashauriano ya Kiufundi mwaka 2002, ambapo ufafanuzi wa kazi wa masharti muhimu yanayohusiana na afya ya ngono hapa chini yalitayarishwa. Jinsia: jinsia inarejelea sifa za kibayolojia ambazo hufafanua binadamu kama mwanamke au mwanamume. Ingawa seti hizi za sifa za kibayolojia hazitengani, kwani kuna watu binafsi ambao wana zote mbili, huwa na tabia ya kuwatofautisha wanadamu kama wanaume na wanawake.
translations.hypothesis: Maana: WHO imekuwa ikifanya kazi katika eneo la afya ya kijinsia tangu angalau 1974, wakati majadiliano ya kamati ya wataalamu ilianzisha kuchapishwa kwa ripoti ya kiufundi iliyoitwa "Elimu na matibabu katika kijinsia wanadamu" (WHO, 1975). Kuanzia mwaka 2000, Shirika la Afya la Amerika (PAHO) na WHO zimepanga mashauriano kadhaa za wataalamu ili kukagua lugha na kutambua chaguzi za programu. Matokeo ya mashauriano haya ilikuwa Mashauriano ya Kiufundi mwaka 2002, ambapo maana muhimu za kijinsia zilitengwa. Jinsia: Jinsia ni sifa za kibaolojia ambazo zinaeleza kwamba watu ni wanaume au wanawake. Ingawa seti hizi za sifa za kibaolojia hazidi, kwani kuna watu ambao wana vyote, zinaendelea kutofauti watu kuwa wanaume na wanawake.

translations.source: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Katika matumizi ya jumla katika lugha nyingi, neno ngono au jinsia mara nyingi hutumika kumaanisha "shughuli za ngono", lakini kwa madhumuni ya kiufundi katika muktadha wa mijadala ya ujinsia na afya ya ngono, ufafanuzi ulio hapo juu unapendekezwa. Afya ya ngono Kulingana na ufafanuzi wa sasa wa kufanya kazi, afya ya ngono ni: “…hali ya ustawi wa kimwili, kihisia, kiakili na kijamii kuhusiana na kujamiiana; sio tu kukosekana kwa ugonjwa, kutofanya kazi au udhaifu. Afya ya ngono inahitaji mtazamo chanya na wa heshima kwa ujinsia na uhusiano wa kimapenzi, pamoja na uwezekano wa kuwa na uzoefu wa kijinsia wa kufurahisha na salama, usio na shuruti, ubaguzi na unyanyasaji. Ili afya ya ngono ipatikane na kudumishwa, haki za ngono za watu wote lazima ziheshimiwe, zilindwe na kutimizwa.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis: Katika matumizi ya kawaida katika lugha nyingi, neno "jinsia" mara nyingi hutumiwa kumaanisha "shughuli za kiafya", lakini kwa madhumuni ya kiufundi katika muktadha wa majadiliano kuhusu jinsia na afya ya kiafya, maelezo hapa juu ni mazuri. Afya ya kiafya Kwa maelezo ya sasa, afya ya kiafya ni: "… hali ya afya ya kimwili, kihemko, akili na kijamii katika uhusiano na jinsia; si tu ukosefu wa ugonjwa, utata au ulemavu. Afya ya kiafya inahitaji mbinu chanya na kuelewa kuhusu jinsia na uhusiano, pamoja na uwezekano wa kuwa na uzoefu wa kiafya anathamani na salama, bila shinikizo, ubaguzi na uvunjaji. Ili afya ya kiafya iweze kupatikana na kudumishwa, haki za kiafya za watu wote lazima zisamehe, kulindwa na kutimiza. " (WHO, 2006a)

translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Ujinsia: Afya ya ngono haiwezi kufafanuliwa, kueleweka au kufanywa kufanya kazi bila kuzingatia kwa mapana ujinsia, ambayo ni msingi wa tabia na matokeo muhimu yanayohusiana na afya ya ngono. Ufafanuzi wa kazi wa ujinsia ni: “… kipengele kikuu cha kuwa binadamu katika maisha yote kinajumuisha ngono, utambulisho wa kijinsia na majukumu, mwelekeo wa kijinsia, hisia za kimapenzi, furaha, ukaribu na uzazi. Ujinsia ni uzoefu na kuonyeshwa katika mawazo, fantasia, tamaa, imani, mitazamo, maadili, tabia, mazoea, majukumu na mahusiano. Ingawa kujamiiana kunaweza kujumuisha vipimo hivi vyote, sio vyote vina uzoefu au kuonyeshwa kila wakati. Ujinsia huathiriwa na mwingiliano wa mambo ya kibayolojia, kisaikolojia, kijamii, kiuchumi, kisiasa, kitamaduni, kisheria, kihistoria, kidini na kiroho. (WHO, 2006a)
translations.hypothesis: Uzazi: Afya ya kijinsia haiwezi kufafanuliwa, kufahamika au kutumika bila kuzingatia uzazi, ambayo ni msingi wa tabia na matokeo muhimu zinazohusiana na afya ya kijinsia. Maana ya uzazi ni: "…aina muhimu ya kuwa binadamu katika maisha, ambayo ni pamoja na kijinsia, utambulisho na majukumu, ushirikiano, msisimko, raha, urafiki na uzazi. Uzazi unajishughulika na kutumika katika fikira, matamanio, matakwa, imani, tabia, utamaduni, mahusiano. Ingawa uzazi unaweza kujumuisha yote haya, si kila moja huwa jishughulika au hutumika. Uzazi unaathiriwa na mzozo wa mambo ya kibaolojia, kimaakili, kijamii, kiuchumi, kisiasa, kitamaduni, kisheria, kihistoria, kidini na kiroho." (WHO, 2006a)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.reference: Haki za kujamiiana: Kuna maafikiano yanayokua kwamba afya ya ngono haiwezi kupatikana na kudumishwa bila kuheshimu, na kulindwa, baadhi ya haki za binadamu. Ufafanuzi wa kufanya kazi wa haki za ngono uliotolewa hapa chini ni mchango katika mazungumzo yanayoendelea kuhusu haki za binadamu kuhusiana na afya ya ngono. Utumiaji wa haki za binadamu zilizopo kwa ujinsia na afya ya ngono hujumuisha haki za ngono. Haki za kujamiiana zinalinda haki za watu wote kutimiza na kueleza ujinsia wao na kufurahia afya ya ngono, kwa kuzingatia haki za wengine na ndani ya mfumo wa ulinzi dhidi ya ubaguzi." WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“Utimilifu wa afya ya ngono unafungamana na kiwango ambacho haki za binadamu zinaheshimiwa, kulindwa na kutimizwa.
translations.hypothesis: Haki za kiafya: Kuna maoni yanayoongezeka kwamba afya ya kiafya haziwezi kupatikana na kudumishwa bila kutambua na kulinda haki za binadamu fulani. Maelezo ya sasa kuhusu haki za kiafya, iliyotolewa hapa chini, ni contribution kwa mjadala unaoendelea kuhusu haki za binadamu zinazohusiana na afya ya kiafya. Matumizi ya haki za binadamu za sasa katika masuala ya kiafya na afya ya kiafya, ni haki za kiafya. Haki za kiafya huzuia haki za kila mtu, ili waweze kutoa na kufanya matumizi ya kiafya, na pia kufurahia afya ya kiafya, na kwa uangalifu kwa haki za wengine, na ndani ya mfumo wa ulinzi dhidi ya ubaguzi.

translations.source: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination
translations.reference: Haki za ngono zinajumuisha haki fulani za binadamu ambazo tayari zinatambuliwa katika hati za kimataifa na za kikanda za haki za binadamu na hati nyingine za makubaliano na katika sheria za kitaifa. Haki muhimu kwa utambuzi wa afya ya ngono ni pamoja na: Haki muhimu kwa utambuzi wa afya ya ngono ni pamoja na: Haki muhimu kwa utambuzi wa afya ya ngono ni pamoja na: haki za usawa na kutobaguliwa
translations.hypothesis: Haki za kiafya zinajumuisha haki fulani za binadamu ambazo tayari zimeidhinishwa katika hati za kimataifa na za eneo, na pia katika sheria za kitaifa. Haki muhimu kwa utimilifu wa afya za kiafya ni pamoja na: haki za usawa na la kupuuzwa

translations.source: the right to be free from torture or to cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment the right to privacy the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage with the free and full consent of the intending spouses, and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children
translations.reference: haki ya kuwa huru kutokana na mateso au kutendewa kikatili, kinyama au kudhalilisha au kuadhibiwa haki ya faragha haki za kufikia kiwango cha juu zaidi cha afya (ikiwa ni pamoja na afya ya ngono) na usalama wa kijamii haki ya kuoa na kuanzisha familia na kuingia kwenye ndoa kwa ridhaa ya bure na kamili ya wanaokusudia kuoana, na usawa ndani na katika kuvunjika kwa ndoa. haki ya kuamua idadi na nafasi ya watoto
translations.hypothesis: haki ya kuwa huru kutoka kwa unyanyasaji au matibabu au hukumu ambayo ni brutal, isiyo na adabu, au ambayo huzuia heshima; haki ya faragha; haki ya kiwango cha juu zaidi cha afya (pamoja na afya ya kiafya); haki ya kuoa na kuunda familia, na kuingia kwenye ndoa kwa uhusiano na makubaliano kamili, na haki ya usawa katika utoaji na katika utoaji wa ndoa; haki ya kuamua idadi na nafasi za watoto.

translations.source: the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: “Human rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.” (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.reference: haki ya kupata taarifa, pamoja na elimu haki ya uhuru wa maoni na kujieleza, na haki ya kupata suluhisho la ufanisi kwa ukiukwaji wa haki za kimsingi. Utekelezaji wa uwajibikaji wa haki za binadamu unahitaji kwamba watu wote waheshimu haki za wengine. Masuala: "Haki za binadamu hutoa mfumo wa kisheria wa kimataifa ambamo mahitaji na matarajio ya afya ya ngono na uzazi ya watu wote yanaweza kuzingatiwa." (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.hypothesis: haki za habari, pamoja na haki za elimu, haki za uhuru wa maoni na uandishi, na haki ya kupata suluhisho bora kwa uharibifu wa haki za msingi. Matumizi sahihi ya haki za binadamu inahitaji kwamba kila mtu kutii haki za wengine. Masuala: "Haki za binadamu hutoa mfumo wa kimataifa ambao unaweza kutumia mahitaji na matarajio ya watu wote kuhusu afya ya kijinsia na uzazi." (GRUSKIN, 2005)

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.reference: Katika miaka ya hivi majuzi, sheria za kimataifa za haki za binadamu zimekuwa zikitumika zaidi kuunga mkono na kuendeleza madai ya kisheria ya watu binafsi na jumuiya nzima ili serikali za kitaifa zihakikishe heshima, ulinzi na utimilifu wa haki zao za afya ya ngono na uzazi (Cook et al., 2003). Ufafanuzi wa kazi na mfumo wa utayarishaji uliowasilishwa hapa umejikita katika haki za binadamu zinazotambulika kimataifa na hutoa mkabala unaozingatia haki za upangaji programu katika afya ya ngono. Vipengele muhimu vya dhana ya afya ya ngono vimeorodheshwa hapa chini. Vipengele muhimu vya dhana ya afya ya ngono Ikitazamwa kwa ujumla na chanya:
translations.hypothesis:
Katika miaka الأخيرة, zana za kimataifa za haki za binadamu zimekuwa zikiitumika zaidi ili kuunga mkono na kuendeleza madai za kisheria na kwa jamii nzima, ili vyama vya taifa viweze kuhakikisha upatikanaji, ulinzi na utimilifu wa haki zao za kiafya na uzazi (Cook et al., 2003). Maelezo na mfumo wa utendaji unaeleweka hapa una msingi katika haki za binadamu zinazotambuliwa kimataifa, na hutoa mbinu inayotegemea haki katika programu za afya ya kiafya. Mambo muhimu ya msingi ya afya ya kiafya yameorodheshwa hapa. Mambo muhimu ya msingi ya afya ya kiafya:

*   Wakati wa kutazama kwa ukomavu na mtazamo wa kwanza:

translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.reference: Afya ya ngono inahusu ustawi, sio tu kutokuwepo kwa ugonjwa. Afya ya ngono inahusisha heshima, usalama na uhuru dhidi ya ubaguzi na unyanyasaji. Afya ya ngono inategemea utimilifu wa haki fulani za binadamu. Afya ya ngono ni muhimu katika maisha yote ya mtu binafsi, sio tu kwa wale walio katika miaka ya uzazi, lakini pia kwa vijana na wazee. Afya ya ngono inaonyeshwa kupitia jinsia tofauti na aina za kujieleza kwa ngono.
translations.hypothesis: Afya ya kiume ni kuhusu ustawi, si tu ukosefu wa ugonjwa. Afya ya kiume ni pamoja na heshima, usalama na uhuru kutoka kwa ubaguzi na暴力. Afya ya kiume inategemea utimilifu wa haki za binadamu. Afya ya kiume ni muhimu katika maisha ya mtu, sio tu kwa wale wanaozalisha, lakini pia kwa vijana na wazee. Afya ya kiume inaonyeshwa kupitia aina mbalimbali za uhusiano na njia za kueleza.

translations.source: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.reference: Afya ya ngono inathiriwa sana na kanuni za kijinsia, majukumu, matarajio na mienendo ya nguvu. Afya ya ngono inahitaji kueleweka ndani ya miktadha mahususi ya kijamii, kiuchumi na kisiasa.
translations.hypothesis: Afya ya kiume ni kitu ambacho kinaathiriwa sana na kanuni za kijinsia, majukumu, matarajio na mambo ya nguvu. Afya ya kiume lazima ifahamishwa katika muktadha maalum wa kijamii, kiuchumi na kiutawala.

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: Maambukizi ya zinaa (STIs) Muhtasari: Maambukizi ya zinaa (STIs) huenezwa zaidi na kujamiiana bila kinga. Baadhi ya magonjwa ya zinaa yanaweza pia kuambukizwa wakati wa ujauzito, kujifungua na kunyonyesha na kupitia damu iliyoambukizwa au bidhaa za damu. Magonjwa ya zinaa yana athari kubwa kwa afya. Iwapo haitatibiwa, inaweza kusababisha madhara makubwa ikiwa ni pamoja na ugonjwa wa mishipa ya fahamu na mishipa ya damu, ugumba, mimba nje ya kizazi, kujifungua mtoto mfu, na hatari ya kuongezeka ya Virusi vya Ukimwi (VVU).
translations.hypothesis: Ugonjwa waambukizo za kiafya (STIs): Ugonjwa waambukizo za kiafya (STIs) husambazwa hasa kupitia mzozi usio na kinga. Baadhi ya STIs pia zinaweza kuambukizwa wakati wa ujauzito, kuzaliwa, na matiti, na pia kupitia damu au bidhaa za damu zenye ugonjwa. STIs zina athari kubwa kwenye afya. Ikiwa hazitibuliwa, zinaweza kusababisha matokeo hatari, pamoja na magonjwa ya neva na moyo, uwekundu, ujauzito usiotimua, na hatari kubwa ya virusi vya ugonjwa wa saratani (HIV).

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Pia zinahusishwa na unyanyapaa, unyanyasaji wa nyumbani, na huathiri ubora wa maisha. Magonjwa mengi ya zinaa hayana dalili. Zinapokuwapo dalili za kawaida za magonjwa ya zinaa ni kutokwa na uchafu ukeni au urethra, kidonda sehemu ya siri na maumivu chini ya tumbo. Magonjwa ya zinaa ya kawaida na yanayotibika ni trichomonas, chlamydia, kisonono na kaswende. Kuongezeka kwa kasi kwa upinzani wa antimicrobial ni tishio linalokua kwa kisonono isiyoweza kutibika.
translations.hypothesis: Pia, zinaambatana na utata, uvamizi wa nyumbani, na zinaathiri ubora wa maisha. Kanda nyingi za zaida hazina dalili. Waliko, dalili za kawaida za zaida ni kutokwa kwenye urembo au kwenye njia ya mkojo, michakato kwenye viungo vya karibu, na maumivu kwenye tumbo. Zaida za zaida zinazostahili na zinaweza kutibwa ni trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea, na syphilis. Kuongezeka kwa kasi kwa ulemavu wa bakteria ni hatari inayokua kwa gonorrhoea ambayo haziwezi kutibwa.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Magonjwa ya zinaa yatokanayo na VVU, virusi vya herpes simplex ya sehemu za siri (HSV), virusi vya hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) na virusi vya human T-lymphotropic virus aina 1 (HTLV-1) hayana au yana chaguo chache za matibabu. Chanjo zinapatikana kwa hepatitis B ili kuzuia maambukizi ambayo yanaweza kusababisha saratani ya ini na kwa HPV kuzuia saratani ya shingo ya kizazi. VVU, HSV na HTLV-1 ni maambukizi ya maisha yote: kwa VVU na HSV kuna matibabu ambayo yanaweza kukandamiza virusi, lakini kwa sasa hakuna tiba kwa yoyote ya magonjwa haya ya zinaa ya virusi. Kondomu zinazotumiwa kwa usahihi na mara kwa mara ni njia bora za kujikinga na magonjwa ya zinaa na VVU. Uchunguzi na utambuzi wa mapema wa watu wenye magonjwa ya zinaa na wapenzi wao wa ngono hutoa fursa bora ya matibabu ya ufanisi na kuzuia matatizo na maambukizi zaidi.
translations.hypothesis: Ugonjwa wa zaambukizo vya kejeli kama vile HIV, virusi vya herpes vya kejeli (HSV), hepatitis B, virusi vya papilloma vya binadamu (HPV) na virusi vya T-lymphotropic vya binadamu aina 1 (HTLV-1) hawana au zina chaguo za matibabu. Kuna chanjo za hepatitis B ambazo hutumika kupunguza hatari ya ugonjwa ambao unaweza kusababisha saratani ya ini, na pia kwa HPV kupunguza hatari ya saratani ya paja. HIV, HSV na HTLV-1 ni magonjwa ya muda mrefu: kwa HIV na HSV, kuna matibabu ambazo zinaweza kupunguza athari ya virusi, lakini kwa sasa hakuna tiba za ajili ya magonjwa haya yote. Kutumia kondomu kwa usahihi na kwa mara kwa mara ni njia bora za kujilinda dhidi ya magonjwa ya zaambukizo na HIV. Uchunguzi na utambuzi mapema wa watu wenye magonjwa ya zaambukizo na washiriki wao wa jinsia, hutoa fursa bora kwa matibabu na pia kwa kuzuia matatizo na kuendeleza.

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Dalili: Mtu anaweza kuwa na magonjwa ya zinaa bila kuwa na dalili za wazi za ugonjwa huo. Dalili za kawaida za magonjwa ya zinaa zinapoonekana ni pamoja na: kutokwa na uchafu usio wa kawaida, kutokwa na urethra, vidonda vya sehemu za siri na uvimbe, na maumivu chini ya tumbo. Dalili za magonjwa ya zinaa maalum ni: Kisonono na maambukizi ya chlamydial Magonjwa haya ya zinaa husababisha cervicitis kwa wanawake, urethritis kwa wanaume na maambukizi ya nje ya uzazi, ikiwa ni pamoja na maonyesho ya rectal na oropharyngeal.
translations.hypothesis: Dalili: mtu anaweza kuwa na ugonjwa wa zaidishi (STI) bila kuwa na dalili dhahiri za ugonjwa. Wakati wa dalili za kawaida za STI ni pamoja na: uchafu usio wa kawaida wa vagina, uchafu wa urethra, vidonda na nyufa kwenye viungo, na maumivu ya tumbo. Dalili za STI maalum ni pamoja na: Gonorrhoea na ugonjwa wa chlamydia. STI hizi husababisha cervicitis kwa wanawake, urethritis kwa wanaume, na ugonjwa wa nje ya viungo, pamoja na dalili za rectum na oropharyngeal.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Dalili za kawaida ni pamoja na kutokwa na uchafu ukeni au uume na kuungua kwa kukojoa. Watoto wachanga wa akina mama walioambukizwa wanaweza kuambukizwa kiwambo cha sikio cha mtoto mchanga (macho mekundu) kutokana na kuathiriwa na magonjwa ya zinaa wakati wa kujifungua ukeni. Maambukizi ya rectal na pharyngeal yanaweza kuwa bila dalili. Kaswende: Kaswende mara nyingi haina dalili, dalili zinapotokea, kaswende ya msingi hujidhihirisha kama kidonda cha pekee kisicho na uchungu. Kaswende ya pili inaweza kujidhihirisha kama vidonda vya jumla vinavyoathiri ngozi, utando wa mucous na nodi ya limfu ikijumuisha upele wa kawaida kwenye viganja vya mikono na nyayo za miguu.
translations.hypothesis: Dalili za kawaida ni kutiririka kutoka kwenye vulva au penis, pamoja na maumivu wakati wa mwele. Watoto wa mama walioambukizwa wanaweza kuugua conjunctivitis ya kuzaliwa ( macho nyekundu) kutokana na mzozio wa ugonjwa waambukizo wakati wa kuzaliwa. Ugonjwa katika rectum na pharynx unaweza kuwa bila dalili. Syphilis: Syphilis mara nyingi huwa bila dalili, lakini wakati dalili zinapatikana, syphilis ya kwanza inaonyesha ufaraji, usio na maumivu. Syphilis ya pili inaweza kuonyesha ufaraji unaoathiri ngozi, eneo la mucous, na lymph-node, pamoja na ufaraji wa kawaida kwenye kucha za mkono na kwenye uso wa miguu.

translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: Kaswende iliyojificha haina dalili na ina tabia ya serolojia chanya ya kaswende. Trichomoniasis: Dalili kuu ni pamoja na kutokwa na uchafu usio wa kawaida wa uke na uwekundu wa uke, kuwasha na kujamiiana kwa maumivu. Virusi vya herpes simplex ya sehemu ya siri (HSV) HSV mara nyingi hujidhihirisha kama vidonda vyenye uchungu, vesicles au vidonda kwenye sehemu ya siri ya nje na mdomo. Dalili ya HSV ya sehemu za siri ni hali ya maisha yote ambayo inaweza kuonyeshwa na kujirudia kwa dalili mara kwa mara.
translations.hypothesis: Syphilis isiyoonekana, na si na dalili, na ina sifa ya matokeo chanya katika uchunguzi wa damu. Trichomoniasis: Dalili kuu ni uchafu wa kawaida wa vaginal, pamoja na machororo kwenye eneo la vulva, kuchongwa, na mambo ya kiafya. Virus vya herpes simplex vya viungo (HSV) HSV mara nyingi inaonyeshwa kama majeraha, vipingo, au michakato kwenye viungo vya nje na kwenye kinywa. Syphilis isiyoonekana ya viungo ni hali ambayo inaendelea kwa muda mrefu, na inaweza kuzingatiwa kwa matukio mara kwa mara.

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: Virusi vya T-lymphotropic ya binadamu aina 1 (HTLV-1) Kwa ujumla bila dalili, aina sugu ya HTLV-1 inaweza kusababisha ugonjwa mbaya, ikiwa ni pamoja na T-cell leukemia/lymphoma (ATL) ya watu wazima na hali ya mfumo wa neva inayoendelea inayojulikana kama myelopathy inayohusishwa na HTLV-1 au paraparesis ya kitropiki ya spastic (HAM/TSP). Matibabu: Matibabu madhubuti kwa sasa yanapatikana kwa magonjwa kadhaa ya zinaa STIs. Magonjwa matatu ya zinaa ya kibakteria (klamidia, kisonono na kaswende) na moja ya vimelea vya magonjwa ya zinaa (trichomoniasis) kwa kawaida hutibika kwa kutumia dawa zilizopo, zenye ufanisi za dozi moja au za dozi nyingi regimens ya antibiotiki. Kwa magonjwa ya zinaa ya virusi (VVU, HSV na HTLV-1), dawa zinazofaa zaidi zinazopatikana ni dawa za kuzuia virusi au za saratani (kwa upande wa HTLV-1), ambazo zinaweza kurekebisha mwendo wa magonjwa, ingawa haziwezi kuponya haya matatu.
translations.hypothesis: Virus vya T-lymphotropic vya binadamu aina 1 (HTLV-1) Kwa kawaida, hauna dalili, lakini fomu ya kudumu ya HTLV-1 inaweza kusababisha magonjwa hatari, pamoja na leukaemia/lymphoma ya selu za T kwa watu wazima (ATL) na hali ya kiafya ambayo huendelea, inayojulikana kama myelopathy au tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP) inayohusishwa na HTLV-1. Matibabu: Matibabu bora sasa yanaweza kupatikana kwa magonjwa mengi ya za bakteria. Magonjwa matatu ya bakteria (chlamydia, gonorrhoea na syphilis) na ugonjwa mmoja wa protozoa (trichomoniasis) kwa kawaida yanaweza kutibuliwa kwa matibabu za sasa, za kiwanda, au za matumizi kadhaa za dawa za bakteria. Kwa magonjwa ya virusi (HIV, HSV na HTLV-1), dawa bora zaidi zinapatikana ni dawa za antiviral au dawa za kulema (katika kesi ya HTLV-1), ambazo zinaweza kubadilisha mwelekeo wa magonjwa, lakini hazitozui magonjwa haya tatu.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ukinzani wa viua viini (AMR) kwa viua vijasumu vinavyotumika kutibu magonjwa ya zinaa STIs, hasa kisonono, umeongezeka kwa kasi katika miaka ya hivi karibuni na umepunguza matokeo ya matibabu yaliyofaulu. Matokeo kutoka kwa Mpango wa sasa wa Ufuatiliaji wa Gonococcal AMR (GASP) yanaonyesha mwelekeo wa viwango vya juu vya ukinzani wa kwinoloni, kuongezeka kwa upinzani wa azithromycin na kuibuka kwa upinzani wa cephalosporins za wigo uliopanuliwa. Kujitokeza kwa kupungua kwa unyeti wa kisonono kwa cephalosporins ya wigo mpana, pamoja na viwango vya juu vya upinzani dhidi ya penicillins, sulfonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones na macrolides hufanya kisonono kuwa kiumbe sugu kwa dawa nyingi. AMR kwa magonjwa mengine ya zinaa STIs, ingawa si ya kawaida, pia ipo, na hivyo kufanya kuzuia na matibabu ya haraka kuwa muhimu. Ili kutibu ipasavyo magonjwa ya zinaa ni muhimu kuchukua dawa zinazofaa za kuua viini, pamoja na kipimo sahihi na muda wa magonjwa ya zinaa ili kuhakikisha matibabu au tiba ya kutosha, na kuzuia ukuzaji wa ukinzani wa viini.
translations.hypothesis: Muamsho wa bakteria (AMR) kwa dawa za matibabu za magonohoria, haswa, umeongezeka kwa kasi katika miaka الأخيرة, na umepelekea matokeo ya matibabu ambayo hayakuwa na mafanikio. Matokeo kutoka kwa Programu ya Kutathmini ya AMR ya Gonohoria (GASP) zinaonyesha mwenendo wa viwango vya juu vya muamsho wa quinolone, kuongezeka kwa muamsho wa azithromycin, na kuibuka kwa muamsho wa cephalosporins za spektru pana. Kuibuka kwa muamsho wa gonohoria kwa cephalosporins za spektru pana, pamoja na viwango vya juu vya muamsho kwa penicillin, sulfonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones na macrolides, hufanya gonohoria kuwa kiumbe ambacho kina muamsho kwa dawa nyingi. AMR kwa magonohoria nyingine, ingawa ni nadra, pia inapatikana, na hivyo kuifanya usalama na matibabu ya haraka kuwa muhimu. Ili kutibua magonohoria kwa usahihi, ni muhimu kutumia dawa za kuzuia bakteria, na dozi na muda sahihi kwa aina maalum ya magonohoria, ili kuhakikisha matibabu bora au tiba, na ili kuzuia kuibuka kwa muamsho wa dawa.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Ndui Muhtasari: Ndui ni ugonjwa wa kuambukiza kwa papo hapo unaosababishwa na virusi vya variola, mwanachama wa familia ya orthopoxvirus. Ilikuwa ni moja ya magonjwa mabaya zaidi yanayojulikana kwa wanadamu na kusababisha mamilioni ya vifo kabla ya kutokomezwa. Inaaminika kuwa imekuwepo kwa angalau miaka 3000. Chanjo ya ndui, iliyoundwa na Edward Jenner mnamo 1796, ilikuwa chanjo ya kwanza iliyofanikiwa kutengenezwa.
translations.hypothesis: Maelezo kuhusu Polio: Polio ni ugonjwa mgumu unaosambaa, unaoathiriwa na virusi vya variola, ambacho ni sehemu ya familia ya orthopoxvirus. Ilikuwa moja ya magonjwa hatari zaidi ambayo watuume walijua, na ilisababisha vifo milioni kabla ya kuondolewa. Kimeelezwa kuwa ilipo kwa angalau miaka 3000. Chanjo ya polio, iliyoundwa na Edward Jenner mwaka wa 1796, ilikuwa chanjo ya kwanza inayofanikiwa.

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Aliona kuwa wahudumu wa maziwa ambao hapo awali walishika ndui hawakupata ugonjwa wa ndui na alionyesha kuwa chanjo kama hiyo inaweza kutumika kuzuia ugonjwa wa ndui kwa watu wengine. Shirika la Afya Ulimwenguni lilizindua mpango ulioimarishwa wa kutokomeza ugonjwa wa ndui mnamo 1967. Chanjo iliyoenea na ufuatiliaji ulifanyika duniani kote kwa miaka kadhaa. Kisa cha mwisho kilichojulikana kilikuwa Somalia mnamo 1977. Mnamo 1980 WHO ilitangaza kutokomeza ugonjwa wa ndui - ugonjwa pekee wa kuambukiza kufikia tofauti hii.
translations.hypothesis: Aligundua kwamba, wanawake walioambukizwa na cowpox, ambao awali walikuwa na ugonjwa huo, hawakuambukizwa na ugonjwa wa smallpox, na kuonyesha kwamba, njia sawa za kupunguza ugonjwa inaweza kutumika ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa smallpox katika watu wengine. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kilianzisha mpango wa kuondoa ugonjwa wa smallpox mwaka wa 1967. Uendeshaji wa chanjo nawachungisho ulifanyika duniani kote kwa miaka kadhaa. Kazi ya mwisho iliyojulikana ya ugonjwa wa smallpox ilitokea nchini Somalia mwaka wa 1977. Mnamo 1980, WHO ilitangaza kwamba ugonjwa wa smallpox umedepo – ndiyo ugonjwa pekee wa kuambukiza ambao umepata heshima hii.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Hii inasalia kuwa miongoni mwa mafanikio mashuhuri na makubwa ya afya ya umma katika historia. Dalili: Dalili za awali za ndui ni pamoja na homa kali, uchovu na maumivu makali ya mgongo, na mara chache zaidi, maumivu ya tumbo na kutapika. Siku mbili hadi 3 baadaye virusi hutoa upele wenye tabia ya matuta yaliyojaa kioevu wazi, ambayo baadaye hujaa na usaha na hatimaye kuendeleza ukoko ambao hukauka na kumomonyoka. Upele huanza kwenye uso na mikono, kisha huenea kwa mwili wote. Vidonda vinakua kwenye utando wa mucous wa pua na mdomo na vidonda mara baada ya kuundwa.
translations.hypothesis: Hii bado ni mojawapo ya mafanikio muhimu na kubwa katika afya ya umma, katika historia. Athari: Athari za awali za maradhi ya majer, ni joto kali, uchovu, na maumivu makali ya nyuma, na wakati mwingine, maumivu ya tumbo na kutojua. Kila baada ya siku mbili hadi tatu, virusi huunda ngozi ya kawaida, ambayo ina vipingo vya maji safi, ambapo baadaye hufullwa na maji, na hatimaye huunda ngozi ambayo hushuka. Ngozi huanza kwenye uso na mikono, na kisha huenea kwenye sehemu nyingine za mwili. Athari huunda kwenye ngozi kwenye pua na kinywa, na hufikia kwenye majer baada ya kuunda.

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ndui huambukizwa kutoka kwa mtu hadi kwa mtu kupitia matone ya kuambukiza wakati wa kuwasiliana kwa karibu na watu walioambukizwa ambao wana dalili za ugonjwa huo, au katika visa vingine kupitia nguo zilizochafuliwa na matandiko. Ina kipindi cha incubation cha siku 7-17 baada ya kuambukizwa na huambukiza mara tu homa inapoanza. Watu hubakia kuambukizwa hadi vipele vya mwisho vitoke.
