Vurugu za vijana huongeza kwa kiasi kikubwa gharama za afya, ustawi na haki ya jinai; hupunguza tija; na kwa ujumla hudhoofisha muundo wa jamii. Zaidi ya vifo, majeraha na madhara ya kisaikolojia, unyanyasaji wa vijana unaweza kusababisha kuongezeka kwa tabia hatari za kiafya kama vile kuvuta sigara, matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya, ngono isiyo salama na vurugu zaidi. Haya nayo yanahusishwa na magonjwa sugu ya kupumua, saratani, magonjwa ya moyo na mishipa, kisukari, mimba za utotoni na magonjwa ya zinaa. Mikakati madhubuti ya kuzuia na kukabiliana nayo ni pamoja na ile inayokuza uzazi na maendeleo ya utotoni;
translations.hypothesis: Hii ni pamoja na aina mbalimbali za vitendo, kuanzia udanganyifu na mashindano, hadi mauaji na uvamizi wa kijinsia na kimwili. Vitendo vya vijana huongeza sana gharama za afya, ustawi, na utoaji haki, husababisha kupungua kwa uzalishaji, na kwa ujumla huathiri utamaduni wa jamii. Mbali na vifo, majeraha, na uharibifu kiakili, vitendo vya vijana vinaweza kusababisha tabia hatari za afya, kama vile, kutumia sigara, matumizi ya dawa, mahusiano hatari, na vitendo zaidi. Hii kwa kweli inaambatana na magonjwa ya kiafya, saratani, magonjwa ya moyo, ugonjwa wa sukari, ujauzito mapema, na magonjwa yanayotokana na mahusiano. Mikakati bora za kuzuia na kujibu ni pamoja na hizo ambazo zinaendeleza utoto na maendeleo ya utoto;

translations.source: school-based bullying prevention, academic, and life and social skills development programmes; therapeutic approaches with high-risk individuals, and community- and society-level approaches like reducing access to and misuse of alcohol and firearms, hotspots and problem-oriented policing, urban upgrading, and poverty de-concentration. WHO and partners decrease youth violence through initiatives that help to identify, quantify and respond to the problem, these include: developing a package for schools-based violence prevention programmes; drawing attention to the magnitude of youth violence and the need for prevention;
translations.reference: programu za kuzuia uonevu shuleni, kitaaluma, na maisha na ujuzi wa kijamii; mbinu za kimatibabu na watu walio katika hatari kubwa, na mbinu za ngazi ya jamii na jamii kama vile kupunguza ufikiaji na matumizi mabaya ya pombe na silaha za moto, maeneo yenye matatizo makubwa na polisi wenye matatizo, uboreshaji wa miji na kupunguza umaskini. WHO na washirika hupunguza unyanyasaji wa vijana kupitia mipango inayosaidia kutambua, kuhesabu na kukabiliana na tatizo, hizi ni pamoja na: kuandaa kifurushi cha programu za kuzuia unyanyasaji shuleni; kuzingatia ukubwa wa vurugu za vijana na haja ya kuzuia;
translations.hypothesis: programu za kupunguza unyanyasaji shuleni, maendeleo ya kielimu na ujuzi wa maisha na kijamii; njia za matibabu kwa watu wenye hatari kubwa, na njia za kimaudhui na jamii kama vile kupunguza upatikanaji na matumizi mabaya ya pombe na silaha, eneo za hatari na utekelezaji wa polisi unaolenga masuala, uimarishaji wa miji, na kupunguza umaskini. WHO na washiriki wanapunguza uvunjaji wa amani kati ya vijana kupitia mashinani ambazo husaidia kutambua, kuhesabu, na kujibu tatizo hilo, pamoja na: kuunda paketi kwa programu za kupunguza uvunjaji wa amani shuleni; kuwezesha umuhimu wa uvunjaji wa amani kati ya vijana na uhitaji wa kupunguza;

translations.source: building evidence on the scope and types of violence in different settings; developing guidance for Member States and all relevant sectors to prevent youth violence and strengthen responses to it; supporting national efforts to prevent youth violence; and collaborating with international agencies and organizations to prevent youth violence globally.
translations.reference: kujenga ushahidi juu ya upeo na aina za vurugu katika mazingira tofauti; kuendeleza miongozo kwa Nchi Wanachama na sekta zote zinazohusika ili kuzuia vurugu za vijana na kuimarisha majibu yake; kuunga mkono juhudi za kitaifa za kuzuia ghasia za vijana; na kushirikiana na mashirika na mashirika ya kimataifa ili kuzuia unyanyasaji wa vijana duniani kote.
translations.hypothesis: kuandaa ushahidi kuhusu ukubwa na aina za uvamizi katika mazingira tofauti; kuendeleza mwongozo kwa mataifa na sekta husika ili kuzuia uvamizi wa vijana na kuimarisha majibu yake; kuunga mkono juhudi za kitaifa za kuzuia uvamizi wa vijana; na kushirikiana na mashirika na mashirika za kimataifa ili kuzuia uvamizi wa vijana kote ulimwenguni.

translations.source: Violence against women Overview: Violence against women – particularly intimate partner violence and sexual violence – is a major public and clinical health problem and a violation of women's human rights. It is rooted in and perpetuates gender inequalities.Globally 1 in 3 women experience physical and/or sexual violence in their lifetime, mostly by an intimate partner. This is a stark reminder of the scale of gender inequality and discrimination against women. The United Nations defines violence against women as "any act of gender-based violence that results in, or is likely to result in, physical, sexual, or mental harm or suffering to women, including threats of such acts, coercion or arbitrary deprivation of liberty, whether occurring in public or in private life.
translations.reference: Ukatili dhidi ya wanawake Muhtasari: Ukatili dhidi ya wanawake - hasa unyanyasaji wa mpenzi wa karibu na unyanyasaji wa kijinsia - ni tatizo kubwa la afya ya umma na kiafya na ukiukaji wa haki za binadamu za wanawake. Umejikita katika na kuendeleza ukosefu wa usawa wa kijinsia.Ulimwenguni 1 kati ya wanawake 3 hupata unyanyasaji wa kimwili na/au kingono maishani mwao, hasa na mwenzi wa karibu. Hiki ni ukumbusho kamili wa ukubwa wa usawa wa kijinsia na ubaguzi dhidi ya wanawake. Umoja wa Mataifa unafafanua unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kama "kitendo chochote cha unyanyasaji wa kijinsia ambacho husababisha, au kinaweza kusababisha madhara ya kimwili, kingono, au kiakili au mateso kwa wanawake, ikiwa ni pamoja na vitisho vya vitendo kama hivyo, kulazimishwa au kunyimwa uhuru kiholela, iwe unafanyika hadharani au katika maisha ya kibinafsi.
translations.hypothesis: Uharamu dhidi ya wanawake: Maelezo: Uharamu dhidi ya wanawake – haswa uharamu wa mshirika na uharamu wa kijinsia – ni tatizo kubwa la afya za umma na za kliniki, na ni ukiukaji wa haki za binadamu za wanawake. Linalo, na lilo. Kimsingi, 1 kati ya 3 wanawake wanatumbukia katika uharamu wa kimwili na/au kijinsia katika maisha yao, haswa na mshirika. Hii ni tahadhari kali kuhusu ukubwa wa usawa na ukiukaji wa haki za wanawake. Jumuiya ya Mataifa inafafanua uharamu dhidi ya wanawake kama "kingine chochote cha uharamu linalotokana na jinsia, linalosababisha, au linaloweza kusababisha, uharamu wa kimwili, kijinsia, au kiakili kwa wanawake, pamoja na hatari za kingine, shinikizo, au upigaji vibaya wa uhuru, iwe katika maisha ya umma au ya faragha.

translations.source: Intimate partner violence refers to behaviour by an intimate partner or ex-partner that causes physical, sexual or psychological harm, including physical aggression, sexual coercion, psychological abuse and controlling behaviours. Sexual violence is "any sexual act, attempt to obtain a sexual act, or other act directed against a person’s sexuality using coercion, by any person regardless of their relationship to the victim, in any setting. It includes rape, defined as the physically forced or otherwise coerced penetration of the vulva or anus with a penis, other body part or object." Impact: Violence against women is a global problem of pandemic proportions. It causes devastating, harm to women’s lives and that of their children.
translations.reference: Vurugu za mpenzi wa karibu hurejelea tabia ya mshirika wa karibu au mpenzi wa zamani ambayo husababisha madhara ya kimwili, kingono au kisaikolojia, ikiwa ni pamoja na unyanyasaji wa kimwili, kulazimishwa kingono, unyanyasaji wa kisaikolojia na kudhibiti tabia. Unyanyasaji wa kijinsia ni "tendo lolote la ngono, jaribio la kupata tendo la ngono, au kitendo kingine kinachoelekezwa dhidi ya ujinsia wa mtu kwa kulazimishwa, na mtu yeyote bila kujali uhusiano wake na mwathiriwa, katika mazingira yoyote. Inajumuisha ubakaji, unaofafanuliwa kama kupenya kwa kulazimishwa au vinginevyo kwa lazima kwa uke au mkundu kwa kutumia uume, sehemu nyingine ya mwili au kitu." Athari: Unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake ni tatizo la kimataifa la uwiano wa janga. Inasababisha uharibifu, madhara kwa maisha ya wanawake na ya watoto wao.
translations.hypothesis: Vitendo vya uvunjaji la uhusiano vinaeleza matendo ya mtu anayewahi kuwa mpenzi au mtu aliyekuwa mpenzi, ambayo husababisha uharibifu wa kimwili, kejeli, au kiakili, pamoja na uvamizi, upiguzi, unyonyaji kiakili, na matendo ya kudhibiti. Uharibifu wa kejeli ni "lolote la shughuli za kejeli, jaribio la kupata shughuli za kejeli, au shughuli nyingine iliyokusudiwa dhidi ya kejeli ya mtu, kwa kutumia upiguzi, na mtu yeyote, bila kujali uhusiano wake na shida, katika mazingira yoyote. Hii ni pamoja na uvamizi, ambalo linagawanywa kama uvamizi wa kimwili au kwa njia nyingine, wa vidole, au sehemu nyingine ya mwili, au kitu." Athari: Vitendo vya uvunjaji la uhusiano ni tatizo la kimataifa, na linaathiri wanawake na watoto wao.

translations.source: It also hurts the economic and social health of their families, communities, and countries. While some women are more at risk than others, violence can happen to any woman, in any country – regardless of culture, religion or economic status. Gender inequality including harmful gender norms are key drivers of violence against women. Violence can negatively affect women’s physical, mental, sexual, and reproductive health. It is associated with increased risk of injuries, depression, anxiety disorders, unplanned pregnancies, sexually transmitted infections, HIV and many other health problems.
translations.reference: Pia inadhuru afya ya kiuchumi na kijamii ya familia, jumuiya na nchi zao. Wakati baadhi ya wanawake wako katika hatari zaidi kuliko wengine, unyanyasaji unaweza kutokea kwa mwanamke yeyote, katika nchi yoyote - bila kujali tamaduni, dini au hali ya kiuchumi. Ukosefu wa usawa wa kijinsia ikiwa ni pamoja na kanuni hatari za kijinsia ni vichochezi muhimu vya unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake. Ukatili unaweza kuathiri vibaya afya ya wanawake kimwili, kiakili, kingono na uzazi. Inahusishwa na hatari kubwa ya majeraha, huzuni, matatizo ya wasiwasi, mimba zisizopangwa, magonjwa ya zinaa, VVU na matatizo mengine mengi ya afya.
translations.hypothesis: Pia, athari hizi zinaathiri afya kiuchumi na kijamii ya familia zao, jamii, na nchi. Ingawa baadhi ya wanawake wana hatari kubwa zaidi, uvamizi unaweza kutokea kwa wanawake yeyote, katika nchi yoyote – bila kujali utamaduni, dini, au hali ya kiuchumi. Uingiliano katika jinsia, pamoja na kanuni mbaya za jinsia, ni sababu kuu za uvamizi dhidi ya wanawake. Uvamizi unaweza kuathiri afya ya wanawake, ikiwa ni kiafya, kiakili, kiromatiki, na uzazi. Pia, unaambatana na hatari kubwa ya majeraha, huzuni, matatizo ya akili, ujauzito usichozidishwa, magonjwa yanayotokana na ngono, ugonjwa wa HIV, na matatizo mengine mengi ya afya.

translations.source: Children who grow up in families where there is violence may suffer a range of behavioural and emotional disturbances. These can lead to mental and development problems and also be associated with perpetrating or experiencing violence later in life. WHO response: WHO plays a key role in bringing attention to and responding to violenceagainst women as a public health and gender equality issue through: Research and evidence-building to highlight the magnitude of violence against women, its risk factors and consequences, and to identify effective interventions for prevention and response. Developing guidelines and tools, setting norms and standards for an effective health response to violence against women.
translations.reference: Watoto wanaolelewa katika familia ambazo kuna jeuri wanaweza kukumbwa na misukosuko mbalimbali ya kitabia na kihisia. Haya yanaweza kusababisha matatizo ya kiakili na ukuaji na pia kuhusishwa na kufanya au kukumbana na ukatili baadaye maishani. Jibu la WHO: WHO ina jukumu muhimu katika kuleta umakini na kujibu unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kama suala la afya ya umma na usawa wa kijinsia kupitia: Utafiti na kujenga ushahidi ili kuangazia ukubwa wa unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake, sababu zake za hatari na matokeo yake, na kutambua afua madhubuti za kuzuia na kukabiliana nazo. Kutengeneza miongozo na zana, kuweka kanuni na viwango vya mwitikio madhubuti wa kiafya kwa ukatili dhidi ya wanawake.
translations.hypothesis: Watoto ambao huulizwa katika familia ambapo kuna uvunjaji, wanaweza kukumbana na matatizo mbalimbali ya tabia na kihemko. Hizi zinaweza kusababisha matatizo ya akili na maendeleo, na pia zinaweza kuhusishwa na kuendesha au kukumbana na uvunjaji baadaye katika maisha. Majibu ya WHO: WHO ina jukumu muhimu katika kuchunguza na kujibu uvunjaji dhidi ya wanawake kama suala la afya na usawa wa jinsia kupitia: Utafiti na kujenga ushahidi ili kuonyesha ukubwa wa uvunjaji dhidi ya wanawake, hatari zake na matokeo, na ili kutambua hatua za uokoaji na kujibu. Kutayarisha miongozo na zana, kuweka kanuni na viwango vya majibu bora ya afya dhidi ya uvunjaji dhidi ya wanawake.

translations.source: Strengthening country capacity of health systems and providers to prevent and respond to violence against women. Encouraging leadership in health systems and building political will to address violence against women through advocacy and partnerships. The WHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW) includes violence against women as part of its contribution to Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 5 on gender equality and women’s empowerment (specifically, SDG 5.2 on the elimination of violence against women and girls). At the World Health Assembly in May 2016, Member States endorsed a global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health systems in addressing interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls and against children.
translations.reference: Kuimarisha uwezo wa nchi wa mifumo ya afya na watoa huduma ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake. Kuhimiza uongozi katika mifumo ya afya na kujenga utashi wa kisiasa wa kushughulikia unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kupitia utetezi na ushirikiano. Mpango Kazi Mkuu wa 13 wa WHO (GPW) unajumuisha unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kama sehemu ya mchango wake katika Lengo la Maendeleo Endelevu (SDG) 5 kuhusu usawa wa kijinsia na uwezeshaji wa wanawake (haswa, SDG 5.2 juu ya kutokomeza unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake na wasichana). Katika Mkutano wa Afya Ulimwenguni mnamo Mei 2016, Nchi Wanachama ziliidhinisha mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa juu ya kuimarisha jukumu la mifumo ya afya katika kushughulikia unyanyasaji wa watu binafsi, haswa dhidi ya wanawake na wasichana na dhidi ya watoto.
translations.hypothesis: Kuimarisha uwezo wa mifumo ya afya na watoa huduma katika nchi ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake. Kushawishi uongozi katika mifumo ya afya na kujenga nia ya kisiasa ili kushughulikia unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kupitia ushawishi na ushirikiano. Mpango wa 13 wa Jumla wa WHO (GPW) una jumuisha unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake kama sehemu ya contribution yake kwa Lengo la Maendeleo endelevu (SDG) 5 kuhusu usawa wa jinsia na uwezeshaji wa wanawake (hasa, SDG 5.2 kuhusu kuondoa unyanyasaji dhidi ya wanawake na wasichana). Katika Mkutano wa Jumla wa Afya ya Dunia mnamo Mei 2016, Mataifa ya Mshiriki walithibitisha mpango wa kimataifa wa hatua za kuimarisha jukumu la mifumo ya afya katika kushughulikia unyanyasaji wa mtu kwa mtu, haswa dhidi ya wanawake, wasichana na watoto.

translations.source: Wildfires Overview: Wildfires are increasing around the globe in frequency, severity and duration, heightening the need to understand the health effects of wildfire exposure. The risk of wildfires grows in extremely dry conditions, such as drought, heat waves and during high winds.Wildfire smoke is a mixture of hazardous air pollutants, such PM2.5, NO2, ozone, aromatic hydrocarbons, or lead. In addition to contaminating the air with toxic pollutants, wildfires also simultaneously impact the climate by releasing large quantities of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases into the atmosphere. With climate change leading to warmer temperatures and drier conditions and the increasing urbanization of rural areas, the fire season is starting earlier and ending later.
translations.reference: Moto wa nyika Muhtasari: Moto wa nyika unaongezeka kote ulimwenguni katika mzunguko, ukali na muda, na hivyo kuongeza hitaji la kuelewa athari za kiafya za mfiduo wa moto wa nyikani. Hatari ya moto wa nyikani hukua katika hali ya ukame sana, kama vile ukame, mawimbi ya joto na wakati wa upepo mkali. Moshi wa moto wa mwituni ni mchanganyiko wa vichafuzi hatari vya hewa, kama vile PM2.5, NO2, ozoni, hidrokaboni zenye kunukia, au risasi. Mbali na kuchafua hewa kwa vichafuzi vyenye sumu, moto wa mwituni pia huathiri hali ya hewa wakati huo huo kwa kutoa kiasi kikubwa cha kaboni dioksidi na gesi zingine chafu kwenye angahewa. Huku mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa yakisababisha hali ya joto na ukame na kuongezeka kwa miji ya maeneo ya vijijini, msimu wa moto unaanza mapema na kumalizika kwa kuchelewa.
translations.hypothesis: Maombolea kuhusu moto: Moto wa wanyama unaongezeka kimfuo, kiwango, na muda duniani kote, na hivyo kuongeza uhitaji wa kuelewa madhara ya moto wa wanyama. Hatari ya moto wa wanyama inazidi katika hali hatari, kama vile ukame, mawaka, na wakati wa upepo mkali.  Hang'aa ya moto ni mchanganyiko wa hatari za hewa, kama vile PM2.5, NO2, ozoni, hydrocarbons, au zinki.  Pamoja na kuhatarisha hewa na hatari, moto wa wanyama pia unaathiri hali ya hewa kwa kuachilia tani kubwa za dioksidi ya kaboni na gesi zingine za mitishio.  Kutokana na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, ambayo yanapelekea joto na ukame, na ongezeko la uwekezaji katika maeneo ya vijijini, msimu wa moto unaanza mapema na kumalizika baadaye.

translations.source: Wildfire events are getting more extreme in terms of acres burned, duration and intensity, and they can disrupt transportation, communications, water supply, and power and gas services. Impact: Wildfires that burn near populated areas can have significant impact on the environment, property, livestock and human mortality and morbidity depending on the size, speed and proximity to the fire, and whether the population has advanced warning to evacuate. Wildfire smoke is a mixture of air pollutants of which particulate matter (PM) is the principal public health threat. PM2.5 from wildfire smoke is associated with premature deaths in the general population, and can cause and exacerbate diseases of the lungs, heart, brain/nervous system, skin, gut, kidney, eyes, nose and liver. It has also been shown to lead to cognitive impairment and memory loss.
translations.reference: Matukio ya moto wa porini yanazidi kukithiri katika suala la ekari kuteketezwa, muda na ukubwa, na yanaweza kutatiza usafiri, mawasiliano, usambazaji wa maji, na huduma za umeme na gesi. Athari: Moto wa nyika unaowaka karibu na maeneo yenye watu wengi unaweza kuwa na athari kubwa kwa mazingira, mali, mifugo na vifo vya binadamu na maradhi kulingana na ukubwa, kasi na ukaribu wa moto huo, na kama idadi ya watu ina onyo la juu la kuhama. Moshi wa moto wa nyikani ni mchanganyiko wa vichafuzi vya hewa ambavyo chembechembe zake (PM) ndio tishio kuu la afya ya umma. PM2.5 kutoka kwa moshi wa moto wa mwituni huhusishwa na vifo vya mapema kwa idadi ya watu, na inaweza kusababisha na kuzidisha magonjwa ya mapafu, moyo, ubongo/mfumo wa neva, ngozi, utumbo, figo, macho, pua na ini. Pia imeonyeshwa kusababisha uharibifu wa utambuzi na kupoteza kumbukumbu.
translations.hypothesis: Hali za moto la asili zinaendelea kuwa zaidi katika masafa inayotowaka, muda, na nguvu, na zinaweza kuathiri usafirishaji, mawasiliano, upatikanaji wa maji, na huduma za umeme na gesi. Athari: Moto la asili ambao unaweza kuwaka karibu na maeneo wenye watu unaweza kuwa na athari kubwa kwa mazingira, mali, wanyama, na vifo na magonjwa kwa watu, kulingana na ukubwa, kasi, na umbali kutoka kwa moto, na iwapo idadi ya watu ina tangazo la tahadhari la kuondoka. Anga la moto ni mchanganyiko wa mbadala za hewa, ambapo jukumu kuu ni vumbi (PM). Vumbi (PM2.5) kutoka kwa anga la moto limeelezwa kuwa na uhusiano na vifo mapema katika idadi kubwa ya watu, na vinaweza kusababisha na kuongeza magonjwa ya pneuma, moyo, ubongo/mfumo wa neva, ngozi, matumbo, ubongo, macho, pua na ini. Pia, imeshathibitika kuwa husababisha upungufu wa akili na upotezaji wa kumbukumbu.

translations.source: Firefighters and emergency response workers are also greatly impacted by injuries, burns and smoke inhalation, particularly at high concentrations. More interdisciplinary research is warranted to understand the latent and long-term health effects of wildfire exposure on vulnerable populations (children, older people, pregnant people, chronically ill people), particularly for geographic areas enduring repeated and cyclical exposure to these wildﬁre events. WHO Response: The magnitude of the physical and human costs from wildfires can be reduced if adequate emergency prevention, preparedness, response and recovery measures are implemented in a sustainable and timely manner. Working with Member States, WHO helps to build resilient and proactive health systems that can anticipate the needs and challenges during emergencies, so that we can be more likely to reduce risks and respond effectively when needed. WHO works with partners in preparing, preventing, detecting, responding and recovering from emergencies and disasters, including environmental exposures, such asimplementing early warning systems and issuing health and air quality advisories;
translations.reference: Wazima moto na wafanyakazi wa kukabiliana na dharura pia huathiriwa sana na majeraha, moto na kuvuta pumzi ya moshi, hasa katika viwango vya juu. Utafiti zaidi wa taaluma mbalimbali unathibitishwa ili kuelewa madhara ya kiafya yaliyofichika na ya muda mrefu ya mfiduo wa moto wa nyikani kwa watu walio hatarini (watoto, wazee, wajawazito, wagonjwa sugu), haswa kwa maeneo ya kijiografia yanayostahimili mfiduo wa mara kwa mara na wa mzunguko kwa matukio haya ya moto wa porini. Majibu ya WHO: Ukubwa wa gharama halisi za kibinadamu kutokana na moto wa nyika unaweza kupunguzwa ikiwa hatua za kutosha za kuzuia dharura, kujiandaa, kukabiliana na uokoaji zitatekelezwa kwa njia endelevu na kwa wakati. Kwa kufanya kazi na Nchi Wanachama, WHO husaidia kujenga mifumo ya afya thabiti na tendaji ambayo inaweza kutarajia mahitaji na changamoto wakati wa dharura, ili tuweze kuwa na uwezekano mkubwa wa kupunguza hatari na kujibu kwa ufanisi inapohitajika. WHO inafanya kazi na washirika katika kuandaa, kuzuia, kugundua, kujibu na kupona kutokana na dharura na majanga, ikiwa ni pamoja na kufichua mazingira, kama vile kuwezesha mifumo ya tahadhari ya mapema na kutoa ushauri wa afya na ubora wa hewa;
translations.hypothesis: Wafanyakazi wa maji na waokoaji pia hufikishwa sana na majeraha, majeraha, na pua ya moshi, hasa katika viwango vya juu. Utafiti zaidi wa kisayansi unahitajika ili kutambua madhara ya kiafya ya muda mrefu na muda wa mienendo kutokana na moto, kwa idadi kubwa ya watu (watoto, watu wazee, wanemama, watu wenye magonjwa ya kudumu), hasa katika maeneo ambayo mara kwa mara wanatumbuliwa na matukio haya ya moto. Majibu ya WHO: Ukubwa wa gharama za kimwili na za binadamu kutokana na moto vinaweza kupunguzwa ikiwa hatua za kutosha za kuzuia, kupanga, kujibu na kupona zinaendeshwa kwa njia endelevu na kwa wakati. Kwa kushirikiana na mataifa wanachama, WHO inaunga mkono uundaji wa mifumo endelevu na pro-aktivi za afya ambazo zinaweza kutarajia mahitaji na changamoto wakati wa dharura, ili tunawezekana kupunguza hatari na kujibu kwa ufanisi wakati inahitajika. WHO inaunga mkono washiriki katika kupanga, kuzuia, kugundua, kujibu na kupona kutoka kwenye dharura na majanga, pamoja na mazingira, kama vile kutumia mifumo ya tahadhari mapema na kuwasilisha tahadhari za afya na ubora wa hewa;

translations.source: containing the release of hazardous materials; assessing health needs of the community and infrastructure damage; restoring primary care services, like immunization, child and maternal health, and mental health; strengthening human resources for disaster management; collecting, analysing and disseminating information related to emergencies and disasters that are likely to occur in a region; establishing and managing stocks of relief supplies and equipment;
translations.reference: zenye kutolewa kwa vifaa vya hatari; kutathmini mahitaji ya afya ya jamii na uharibifu wa miundombinu; kurejesha huduma za msingi, kama vile chanjo, afya ya mtoto na uzazi, na afya ya akili; kuimarisha rasilimali watu kwa ajili ya usimamizi wa maafa; kukusanya, kuchambua na kusambaza taarifa zinazohusiana na dharura na maafa yanayoweza kutokea katika eneo; kuanzisha na kusimamia hifadhi ya vifaa vya misaada;
translations.hypothesis: ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa vitu hatari; tathmini mahitaji ya afya ya jamii na uharibifu wa miundombinu; kuendeleza huduma za msingi, kama vile chanjo, afya ya watoto na mama, na afya ya akili; kuimarisha rasilimali za binadamu kwa utulivu; kukusanya, kupima na kusambaza taarifa kuhusu majanga na majeruhi zinazotarajiwa katika eneo; kuanzisha na kudhibiti hazina za vifaa na vifaa vya msaada;

translations.source: calling for emergency funding to support health action; and developing national policies, recommendations and national emergency response plans.
translations.reference: wito wa ufadhili wa dharura kusaidia hatua za afya; na kuandaa sera za kitaifa, mapendekezo na mipango ya kitaifa ya kukabiliana na dharura.
translations.hypothesis: kuomba fedha za dharura ili kuunga mkono hatua za afya; na kuendeleza sera za kitaifa, mapendekezo, na mipango ya dharura za kitaifa.

translations.source: Women's health Overview: Being a man or a woman has a significant impact on health, as a result of both biological and gender-related differences. The health of women and girls is of particular concern because, in many societies, they are disadvantaged by discrimination rooted in sociocultural factors. For example, women and girls face increased vulnerability to HIV/AIDS. Some of the sociocultural factors that prevent women and girls to benefit from quality health services and attaining the best possible level of health include:
translations.reference: Afya ya wanawake Muhtasari: Kuwa mwanamume au mwanamke kuna athari kubwa kwa afya, kama matokeo ya tofauti za kibayolojia na zinazohusiana na jinsia. Afya ya wanawake na wasichana inatia wasiwasi hasa kwa sababu, katika jamii nyingi, wanatatizwa na ubaguzi unaotokana na mambo ya kitamaduni. Kwa mfano, wanawake na wasichana wanakabiliwa na ongezeko la hatari ya VVU/UKIMWI. Baadhi ya mambo ya kitamaduni yanayozuia wanawake na wasichana kufaidika na huduma bora za afya na kufikia kiwango bora zaidi cha afya ni pamoja na:
translations.hypothesis: Maarifa kuhusu afya ya wanawake: Kujitokea kama mwanamume au mwanamke una athari kubwa kwenye afya, kwa sababu ya tofauti za za kibaolojia na za kijinsia. Afya ya wanawake na wasichana ni suala muhimu, kwa sababu katika jamii nyingi, wanawake na wasichana wanatishia na ubaguzi unaotokana na mambo ya jamii. Kwa mfano, wanawake na wasichana wana hatari kubwa ya kuambukizwa na ugonjwa wa AIDS. Baadhi ya mambo ya jamii ambayo zinaathiri wanawake na wasichana kutumia huduma bora za afya na kufikia kiwango bora cha afya ni pamoja na:

translations.source: unequal power relationships between men and women; social norms that decrease education and paid employment opportunities; an exclusive focus on women’s reproductive roles; and potential or actual experience of physical, sexual and emotional violence. While poverty is an important barrier to positive health outcomes for both men and women, poverty tends to yield a higher burden on women and girls’ health due to, for example, feeding practices (malnutrition) and use of unsafe cooking fuels (COPD).
translations.reference: uhusiano usio sawa wa uwezo kati ya wanaume na wanawake; kanuni za kijamii zinazopunguza elimu na fursa za ajira za kulipwa; mtazamo wa kipekee juu ya majukumu ya uzazi ya wanawake; na uwezekano au uzoefu halisi wa unyanyasaji wa kimwili, kingono na kihisia. Ingawa umaskini ni kikwazo muhimu kwa matokeo chanya ya afya kwa wanaume na wanawake, umaskini unaelekea kutoa mzigo mkubwa kwa afya ya wanawake na wasichana kutokana na, kwa mfano, mazoea ya kulisha (utapiamlo) na matumizi ya nishati zisizo salama za kupikia (COPD).
translations.hypothesis: uwiano usowa wa nguvu kati ya wanaume na wanawake; kanuni za kijamii ambazo zinapunguza fursa za elimu na ajira; umahaba wa kuelekea kwenye majukumu ya uzazi kwa wanawake; na uzoefu wa moja kwa moja au potesho wa uhalifu wa kimwili, vyao, na kihemko. Ingawa umaskini ni kikwazo muhimu kwa matokeo chanya ya afya kwa wanaume na wanawake, umaskini huwa na athari kubwa zaidi kwa afya ya wanawake na wasichana, kwa mfano, kwa sababu ya mbinu za kula (utovu wa afya) na matumizi ya vifaa vya kupika hatari (COPD).

translations.source: Yaws (Endemic treponematoses) Overview: Yaws is a chronic skin infection characterized by papillomas (noncancerous lumps) and ulcers. It is caused by the bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, which belongs to the same group of bacteria that causes venereal syphilis. Yaws primarily affects children aged under 15 years who live in poor communities in warm, humid and tropical forested areas of Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Pacific islands. The majority of affected populations live rural areas, far from health services.
translations.reference: Yaws (Endemic treponematoses) Muhtasari: Miyao ni ugonjwa sugu wa ngozi unaojulikana na papillomas (uvimbe usio na kansa) na vidonda. Husababishwa na bakteria aina ndogo ya Treponema pallidum pertenue, ambayo ni ya kundi moja la bakteria wanaosababisha kaswende ya venereal. Miayo kimsingi huathiri hasa watoto walio na umri wa chini ya miaka 15 ambao wanaishi katika jamii maskini katika maeneo ya misitu yenye joto, unyevu na ya kitropiki ya Afrika, Asia, Amerika ya Kusini na visiwa vya Pasifiki. Idadi kubwa ya watu walioathirika wanaishi vijijini, mbali na huduma za afya.
translations.hypothesis: Yaws (uambukizo wa treponematoses ambao ni wa eneo): Yaws ni ugonjwa wa kudumu wa ngozi, ambao una dalili za papilomas (nzogo zisizo kuwa saratani) na michakato. Ni sababu ya bakteria Treponema pallidum, aina pertenue, ambayo ni sehemu ya makundi sawa ya bakteria ambavyo husababisha syphilis ya kijinsia. Yaws husababisha hasa watoto wenye umri wa chini ya miaka 15, ambao wanaishi katika jamii za wasomi katika maeneo ya Afrika, Asia, Amerika de Kusini na kisiwa cha Pasifiki, ambapo hali ni joto, kavu na ya misitu. Watu wengi waliathiri wanaishi katika maeneo ya vijijini, mbali na huduma za afya.

translations.source: Poverty, low socio-economic conditions and poor personal hygiene facilitate the spread of yaws. Although there are over 80 000 cases of yaws each year, experts believe the disease can be controlled and ultimately eradicated for several reasons. First, it only occurs in humans, not animals, making control much easier. It is also easy to treat with readily available drugs and has already been eliminated in some countries, including India. The remaining pockets of yaws infection, although usually in remote places, means further spread is less likely with proper surveillance and control measures.
translations.reference: Umaskini, hali duni za kijamii na kiuchumi na usafi duni wa kibinafsi huwezesha kuenea kwa miayo. Ingawa kuna visa zaidi ya 80,000 vya miayo kila mwaka, wataalam wanaamini ugonjwa huo unaweza kudhibitiwa na hatimaye kutokomezwa kwa sababu kadhaa. Kwanza, hutokea tu kwa wanadamu, si wanyama, na kufanya udhibiti iwe rahisi zaidi. Pia ni rahisi kutibu kwa dawa zinazopatikana kwa urahisi na tayari imeondolewa katika baadhi ya nchi, ikiwa ni pamoja na India. Mifuko iliyobaki ya miayoyanayoweza kuathiri, ingawa kwa kawaida katika maeneo ya mbali, inamaanisha uwezekano wa kuenea zaidi kuna uwezekano mdogo kwa ufuatiliaji na udhibiti sahihi.
translations.hypothesis: Umaskini, hali ya kiuchumi na kijamii ndogo, na usafi wa kibinafsi mbaya, husababisha kuenea kwa magonjwa ya yaws. Ingawa kuna zaidi ya kesi 80,000 za magonjwa ya yaws kila mwaka, wataalamu wanaamini kwamba magonjwa haya yanaweza kudhibitiwa na hatimaye kuondolewa kwa sababu kadhaa. Kwanza, magonjwa haya yanaendelea tu kwa wanadamu, si kwa wanyama, na hivyo kuwezesha udhibiti. Pia, yanaweza kutibwa kwa tiba za rahisi, na tayari yameondolewa katika nchi kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na India. Magonjwa ya yaws ambayo bado yanaendelea, licha ya kwamba mara nyingi yana katika maeneo gumu, ina maana kwamba kuenea zaidi ni chini kwa hatari, ikiwa kunawachungulizia na hatua za udhibiti.

translations.source: Symptoms: There are two stages of yaws infection. The early stage is when the patient is infectious and can spread the disease to others. In this stage, a papule (a noncancerous, outward-growing lump) develops at the site of infection. This papule is full of the organisms and may persist for 3–6 months followed by natural healing. Without treatment, this is followed by disseminated skin lesions over the body.
translations.reference: Dalili: Kuna hatua mbili za maambukizi ya yaws. Hatua ya awali ni wakati mgonjwa anaambukiza na anaweza kusambaza ugonjwa huo kwa wengine. Katika hatua hii, papule (uvimbe usio na kansa, unaokua nje) hukua kwenye sehemu ya maambukizi. Papuli hii imejaa viumbe na inaweza kudumu kwa miezi 3-6 ikifuatiwa na uponyaji wa asili. Matibabu isipokuwepo, hii inafuatiwa na vidonda vya ngozi vinavyoenea juu ya mwili.
translations.hypothesis: Dalili: Kuna hatua mbili za ugonjwa wa yaws. Hatua ya kwanza ni wakati mgonjwa ana ugonjwa na anaweza kueneza ugonjwa kwa wengine. Katika hatua hii, tumbo (nzito isiyo kali, inayokua nje) huunda katika eneo la ugonjwa. Tumbo hili lina vijinsimbi na inaweza kuendelea kwa miezi 3-6, na kisha kuridhika. Bila matibabu, hii inaambatana na magonjwa ya ngozi kwenye mwili.

translations.source: Bone pain and bone lesions may also occur. The second stage is noninfectious and typically appears five years after infection. It is characterized by disabling consequences of the nose, bones and palmar/plantar hyperkeratosis (thickening). After a field diagnosis based on these symptoms, the disease can be confirmed by examining a sample from a skin legion under a special type of microscope (darkfield examination). Blood tests are not typically used because yaws is closely related to the bacterium that causes syphilis and the two diseases will show the same result.
translations.reference: Maumivu ya mifupa na vidonda vya mfupa vinaweza pia kutokea. Hatua ya pili sio ya kuambukiza na kawaida huonekana miaka mitano baada ya kuambukizwa. Imetawaliwa na sifa ya ulemavu wa pua, mifupa na hyperkeratosis ya mitende / mimea (unene). Baada ya uchunguzi wa eneo kulingana na dalili hizi, ugonjwa huo unaweza kuthibitishwa kwa kuchunguza sampuli kutoka kwa kikosi cha ngozi chini ya aina maalum ya darubini (uchunguzi wa giza). Vipimo vya damu havitumiwi kwa kawaida kwa sababu miayo inahusiana kwa karibu na bakteria inayosababisha kaswende na magonjwa hayo mawili yataonyesha matokeo sawa.
translations.hypothesis: Also, maumivu ya misuli na magonjwa ya misuli yanaweza kutokea. Awamu ya pili ni isiyoambukiza na kwa kawaida inaonekana baada ya miaka mitano baada ya ugonjwa. Inaelezwa na matokeo hatari za pua, misuli, na hyperkeratosis (kuenea) kwenye kucha/kucha. Baada ya uchunguzi wa eneo kulingana na dalili hizi, ugonjwa unaweza kuthibitishwa kwa ukaguzi wa sampuli kutoka kwenye ngozi kwa kutumia aina maalum ya mikroskopi (ukaguzi wa aina ya giza). Mtihani wa damu kwa kawaida hutumika, kwani ugonjwa wa yaws ni karibu na bakteria inayosaidia ugonjwa wa syphilis, na ugonjwa huu mbili utoe matokeo sawa.

translations.source: Treatment: There is currently no vaccine for yaws. Health education and improved personal hygiene are the most important tactics for prevention. Two antibiotics can be used to treat yaws. A single oral dose of azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g) is the recommended treatment. Benzathine penicillin (single intramuscular dose) at 0.6 million units (children aged under 10 years) and 1.2 million units (people aged over 10 years) can be used for patients with suspected clinical treatment failure after azithromycin, or patients who cannot be treated with azithromycin.
translations.reference: Matibabu: Kwa sasa hakuna chanjo ya miayo. Elimu ya afya na uboreshaji wa usafi wa kibinafsi ni mbinu muhimu zaidi za kuzuia. Antibiotiki mbili zinaweza kutumika kutibu miayo. Dozi moja ya mdomo ya azithromycin (30 mg/kg, upeo wa 2 g) ndiyo tiba inayopendekezwa. Benzathine penicillin (dozi moja ya ndani ya misuli) yenye vitengo milioni 0.6 (watoto chini ya miaka 10) na vitengo milioni 1.2 (watu walio na umri wa zaidi ya miaka 10) inaweza kutumika kwa wagonjwa wanaoshukiwa kushindwa kwa matibabu baada ya azithromycin, au wagonjwa ambao hawawezi kutibiwa na azithromycin.
translations.hypothesis: Matibabu: Hapo sasa, hakuna chanjo inayotumika kwa magonjwa ya yaws. Elimu ya afya na usafi wa kibinafsi ni hatua muhimu zaidi katika kuzuia. Dawa mbili za bakteria zinaweza kutumika kutibu magonjwa ya yaws. Matibabu iliyopendekezwa ni dozo moja ya azithromycin (30 mg/kg, kiwango cha juu 2 g) kupitia njia ya mdomo. Benzathine penicillin (dozo moja kupitia ndani ya picha) kwa wingi wa 0.6 milioni (watoto chini ya umri wa 10) na 1.2 milioni (watu wenye umri wa zaidi ya 10) zinaweza kutumika kwa wagonjwa ambao wana uwezekano wa kutowatibika baada ya kutumia azithromycin, au wagonjwa ambao hawawezi kutibuliwa kwa kutumia azithromycin.

translations.source: This treatment will result in complete clinical healing in 95% of cases but patients should be re-examined 4 weeks after receiving the antibiotics. A review of the historic documents from 1950s shows that over 90 countries and territories were endemic for yaws. Only 14 out of the 90 countries and territories have recent data on yaws based on the routine surveillance system; however, these figures may just be an indication of the presence of the disease and not its full extent. Ghana, Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands report over 10 000 cases per year. Ecuador and India appear to have interrupted transmission.
translations.reference: Matibabu haya yatasababisha uponyaji kamili wa kliniki katika 95% ya kesi lakini wagonjwa wanapaswa kuchunguzwa tena wiki 4 baada ya kupokea antibiotiki. Mapitio ya hati za kihistoria za miaka ya 1950 yanaonyesha kuwa zaidi ya nchi na wilaya 90 zilipatikana kwa miayo. Nchi na maeneo 14 pekee kati ya 90 ndizo zilizo na data ya hivi majuzi kuhusu miayo kulingana na mfumo wa kawaida wa ufuatiliaji; hata hivyo, takwimu hizi zinaweza tu kuwa dalili ya kuwepo kwa ugonjwa huo na sio kiwango chake kamili. Ghana, Papua New Guinea na Visiwa vya Solomon huripoti zaidi ya kesi 10,000 kwa mwaka. Ecuador na India zinaonekana kuwa zimekatiza usambazaji.
translations.hypothesis: Mchakato huu utakufanya tiba kikamilifu katika 95% ya kesi, lakini wagonjwa wanapaswa kufanyiwa uchunguzi tena baada ya miezi 4 baada ya kupokea dawa za bakteria. Tathmini ya hati za kihistoria kutoka miaka ya 1950 inaonyesha kwamba zaidi ya nchi na eneo 90 zilikuwa na magonjwa ya yaws. Tu nchi 14 kati ya hizo 90 zina data za hivi karibuni kuhusu magonjwa ya yaws kulingana na mfumo wawachungaji; hata hivyo, takwimu hizi zinaweza kuwa dalili tu ya uwepo wa ugonjwa, si kwa ukubwa kamili. Ghana, Papua New Guinea na kisiwa cha Solomon zina taarifa kuhusu zaidi ya kesi 10,000 kwa mwaka. Ecuador na India zinaonekana kuwa wamepunguza maambukizi.

translations.source: Yellow fever Overview: Yellow fever is a viral disease that is transmitted to humans by the bites of infected mosquitoes. It is prone to epidemics and is preventable with a vaccine. These day-biting mosquitoes breed around houses (domestic), in forests or jungles (wild), or in both habitats (semi-domestic). Yellow fever is a high-impact, high-threat disease, with a risk of international spread, representing a potential threat to global health security.
translations.reference: Homa ya manjano Muhtasari: Homa ya manjano ni ugonjwa wa virusi ambao hupitishwa kwa wanadamu kwa kuumwa na mbu walioambukizwa. Inakabiliwa na magonjwa ya milipuko na inaweza kuzuilika kwa chanjo. Mbu hawa wanaong'ata mchana huzaliana karibu na nyumba (ndani), katika misitu au (mwituni), au katika makazi yote mawili (nusu-ndani). Homa ya manjano ni ugonjwa wenye athari kubwa, hatari kubwa, na hatari ya kuenea kimataifa, ikiwakilisha tishio linalowezekana kwa usalama wa afya ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: Maelezo kuhusu magonjwa ya manjano: Magonjwa ya manjano ni ugonjwa wa virusi ambao huenezwa kwa binadamu kupitia uchimbaji wa nyadi za nyadi za vimelea. Huwaathiri kwa wingi na yanaweza kuzuwa kwa chanjo. Nyadi hizi, ambazo huchimbwa wakati wa mchana, hupanda karibu na nyumba (za ndani), katika pori au misitu (asli), au katika vyote hivyo (ya kati). Magonjwa ya manjano ni ugonjwa wa hatari kubwa, na kuna hatari ya kuenea kimataifa, na inaweza kuwa hatari kwa usalama wa afya ya dunia.

translations.source: There are 3 types of transmission cycles: Sylvatic (or jungle) yellow fever spreads when monkeys are bitten by wild mosquitoes that pass the virus on to other monkeys and humans. Intermediate yellow fever spreads when semi-domestic mosquitoes infect both monkeys and people. This is the most common type of outbreak in Africa. Urban yellow fever can cause large epidemics when infected people introduce the virus into heavily populated areas with high mosquito density and where people have little immunity. Occasionally, infected travellers have exported cases to countries that are free of yellow fever.
translations.reference: Kuna aina 3 za mizunguko ya maambukizi: Homa ya manjano ya Sylvatic (au jungle) huenea nyani wanapoumwa na mbu wa mwituni ambao hupitisha virusi kwa nyani wengine na wanadamu. Homa ya manjano ya kati huenea wakati mbu wa nusu-fuge wanaambukiza nyani na watu. Hii ndiyo aina ya mlipuko wa kawaida zaidi barani Afrika. Homa ya manjano ya mijini inaweza kusababisha magonjwa makubwa ya milipuko wakati watu walioambukizwa wanapoanzisha virusi katika maeneo yenye wakazi wengi wenye msongamano mkubwa wa mbu na ambapo watu wana kinga kidogo. Mara kwa mara, wasafiri walioambukizwa wamesafirisha kesi kwa nchi ambazo hazina homa ya manjano.
translations.hypothesis: Kuna aina tatu za hatua za usambazaji: "Sylvatic" (au "jungle") ambayo hutokea wakati nyani hupigwa na nyasi, ambapo nyasi hupenyeza virusi na kueneza kwenye nyani wengine na wanadamu. Hatua ya "intermediate" hutokea wakati nyasi ambazo hupigwa na wanadamu hupenyeza nyani na watu. Hii ndiyo aina ya kawaida ya mgomao katika Afrika. Hatua ya "urban" inaweza kusababisha mgomao mkubwa wakati watu wenye virusi hupenyeza virusi katika maeneo yenye idadi kubwa ya watu na nyasi, ambapo watu hawana kinga. Wakati mwingine, watu walioambukizwa wameuweza kueneza mgomao hadi nchi ambazo hazina mgomao wa "yellow fever".

translations.source: However, the disease can only spread easily to a new country if there are mosquito species able to transmit it, specific climatic conditions, and the animal reservoir needed to maintain it. Symptoms: Yellow fever can present with a wide range of symptoms and severity. Once contracted, the yellow fever virus incubates in the body for 3–6 days. Many people do not experience symptoms, but when these do occur, the most common are fever, muscle pain with prominent backache, headache, loss of appetite, and nausea or vomiting. In most cases, symptoms disappear after 3–4 days.
translations.reference: Hata hivyo, ugonjwa huo unaweza kuenea kwa urahisi katika nchi mpya ikiwa kuna spishi za mbu wanaoweza kuusambaza, hali mahususi ya hali ya hewa, na hifadhi ya wanyama inayohitajika kuutunza. Dalili: Homa ya manjano inaweza kujitokeza ikiwa na dalili mbalimbali na ukali. Mara baada ya kuambukizwa, virusi vya homa ya manjano huingia ndani ya mwili kwa siku 3-6. Watu wengi hawaoni dalili, lakini dalili hizi zinapotokea, zinazojulikana zaidi ni homa, maumivu ya misuli na maumivu ya mgongo, maumivu ya kichwa, kukosa hamu ya kula, na kichefuchefu au kutapika. Katika hali nyingi, dalili hupotea baada ya siku 3-4.
translations.hypothesis: Hata hivyo, ugonjwa huu unaweza kuenea kwa urahisi kwenda nchi nyingine ikiwa kuna aina za nyuki ambazo vinaweza kueneza, hali za hali halali, na chanzo cha wanyama ambacho kinahitajika kudumisha. Athari: Ugonjwa wa manjano unaweza kuonyesha athari mbalimbali na kiwango. Baada ya kuambukizwa, virusi vya manjano hupatikana katika mwili kwa siku 3-6. Watu wengi hawapata athari, lakini wakati athari hufanyika, athari za kawaida ni jiko, maumivu ya misuli yenye maumivu kubwa, maumivu ya kichwa, upungufu wa chombo, na maumivu au kutojihusika. Katika kesi nyingi, athari hupotea baada ya siku 3-4.

translations.source: A small percentage of patients enter a second, more toxic phase within 24 hours of recovering from initial symptoms. High fever returns and several body systems are affected, usually the liver and kidneys. In this phase, people are likely to develop jaundice (yellowing of the skin and eyes, hence the name yellow fever), dark urine, and abdominal pain with vomiting. Bleeding can occur from the mouth, nose, eyes, or stomach. Half of these patients die within 7–10 days.Yellow fever is difficult to diagnose, especially during the early stages.
translations.reference: Asilimia ndogo ya wagonjwa huingia katika awamu ya pili, yenye sumu zaidi ndani ya saa 24 baada ya kupona dalili za awali. Homa kali inarudi na mifumo kadhaa ya mwili huathiriwa, kwa kawaida ini na figo. Katika awamu hii, watu wanaweza kupata homa ya manjano (njano ya ngozi na macho, hivyo basi kuitwa homa ya manjano), mkojo mweusi, na maumivu ya tumbo na kutapika. Kutokwa na damu kunaweza kutokea kwa mdomo, pua, macho au tumbo. Nusu ya wagonjwa hawa hufa ndani ya siku 7-10. Homa ya njano ni vigumu kutambua, hasa wakati wa hatua za mwanzo.
translations.hypothesis: Asilimia ndogo ya wagonjwa huingia katika hatua ya pili, ambayo ni kali zaidi, ndani ya saa 24 baada ya kupona kutoka kwa dalili za awali. Jiko kali linarejelea, na mifumo mingi ya mwili huliathirika, kwa kawaida ini na vidai. Katika hatua hii, watu wana uwezekano wa kupata vidonda (kupungua kwa ngozi na macho, kwa hiyo jina "vidonda"), urina nyeusi, na maumivu ya tumbo pamoja na kutowa. Majeraha yanaweza kutokea kutoka kwenye midaha, macho, au tumbo. Asilimia nusu ya wagonjwa hawa kufa ndani ya siku 7-10. Vidonda ni vigumu kutambua, hasa katika hatua za awali.

translations.source: More severe cases can be confused with severe malaria, leptospirosis, viral hepatitis (especially fulminant forms), other haemorrhagic fevers, infection with other flaviviruses (such as dengue haemorrhagic fever) and poisoning. Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) testing in blood and urine can sometimes detect the virus in early stages of the disease. In later stages, testing to identify antibodies is needed (IgM). Treatment: Yellow fever infections can cause serious illness and can be fatal in severe cases. Early supportive treatment in hospitals improves survival rates.
translations.reference: Kesi kali zaidi zinaweza kuchanganyikiwa na malaria kali, leptospirosis, homa ya ini ya virusi (hasa aina za fulminant), homa nyingine za kutokwa na damu, kuambukizwa na flavivirusi zingine (kama vile homa ya dengue haemorrhagic) na sumu. Uchunguzi wa mnyororo wa polymerase (PCR) katika damu na mkojo wakati mwingine unaweza kugundua virusi katika hatua za mwanzo za ugonjwa. Katika hatua za baadaye, uchunguzi wa kutambua kingamwili unahitajika (IgM). Matibabu: Maambukizi ya homa ya manjano yanaweza kusababisha ugonjwa mbaya na inaweza kusababisha kifo katika hali mbaya. Matibabu ya mapema katika hospitali husaidia huboresha viwango vya maisha.
translations.hypothesis: Matukio zaidi yanaweza kuchanganywa na malaria kali, leptospirosis, hepatitis virusi (hasa aina kali), fever zingine, na ugonjwa unaoambukiza na virusi vingine (kama fever ya dengue kali) na sumu. Mtihani wa polymerase chain reaction (PCR) katika damu na urina wakati mwingine unaweza kugundua virusi katika hatua za awali za ugonjwa. Katika hatua za baadaye, inahitajika mtihani wa kupata antibodies (IgM). Matibabu: Ugonjwa wa yellow fever unaweza kusababisha magonjwa kali na inaweza kuwa hatari katika matukio kali. Matibabu za mapema katika hospitali zinaimarisha nafasi za kupona.

translations.source: There is currently no specific anti-viral drug for yellow fever, but specific care to treat dehydration, fever, and liver and kidney failure improves outcomes. Associated bacterial infections can be treated with antibiotics. Patients need to stay under mosquito nets during the day to limit the risk of spreading to others through mosquito bites. Vaccination is the single most important measure for preventing yellow fever. The prevention of outbreaks can only be achieved if the majority of the population is immunized.
translations.reference: Kwa sasa hakuna dawa maalum ya kuzuia virusi kwa homa ya manjano, lakini utunzaji maalum wa kutibu upungufu wa maji mwilini, homa, na kushindwa kwa ini na figo huboresha matokeo. Maambukizi ya bakteria yanayohusiana yanaweza kutibiwa na antibiotiki. Wagonjwa wanahitaji kukaa chini ya vyandarua wakati wa mchana ili kupunguza hatari ya kuenea kwa wengine kwa kuumwa na mbu. Chanjo ni kipimo muhimu zaidi cha kuzuia homa ya manjano. Uzuiaji wa milipuko unaweza kupatikana tu ikiwa idadi kubwa ya watu wamechanjwa.
translations.hypothesis: Hapo sasa, hakuna dawa maalum ya kupambana na virusi vya ugonjwa wa kutokwa, lakini tiba maalum ya kupunguza ugonjwa, joto, na kushindwa kwa ini na ubongo, inaweza kuboresha matokeo. Ugonjwa wa bakteria unaohusika unaweza kutibwa na dawa za bakteria. Wagonjwa wanahitaji kuwa chini ya mada za kupunguza ugonjwa wakati wa siku ili kupunguza hatari ya kuambukiza wengine kupitia uchimbaji. Tiba ni hatua muhimu sana katika kuzuia ugonjwa wa kutokwa. Kuzuia hatua za ugonjwa, inaweza kufanikiwa ikiwa idadi kubwa ya watu wamepokea tiba.

translations.source: The yellow fever vaccine is safe and affordable, and a single dose provides life-long immunity against the disease. People who recover from yellow fever infection are also protected for life. Read more about the yellow fever vaccine. Mosquito control can also help to prevent yellow fever and is vital in situations where vaccination coverage is low or the vaccine is not immediately available. Mosquito control includes eliminating sites where mosquitoes can breed and killing adult mosquitoes and larvae by using insecticides in areas with high mosquito density.
translations.reference: Chanjo ya homa ya manjano ni salama na ya bei nafuu, na dozi moja hutoa kinga ya maisha dhidi ya ugonjwa huo. Watu wanaopona kutokana na maambukizi ya homa ya manjano pia wanalindwa maisha yote. Soma zaidi kuhusu chanjo ya homa ya manjano. Udhibiti wa mbu pia unaweza kusaidia kuzuia homa ya manjano na ni muhimu katika hali ambapo chanjo ni ndogo au chanjo haipatikani mara moja. Udhibiti wa mbu ni pamoja na kuondoa maeneo ambayo mbu wanaweza kuzaliana na kuua mbu na mabuu wakubwa kwa kutumia dawa za kuua wadudu katika maeneo yenye msongamano mkubwa wa mbu.
translations.hypothesis: Chanjo ya mafua ni salama na na bei nafuu, na dozo moja hutoa kinga ya kudumu dhidi ya ugonjwa. Watu ambao wamepona kutoka kwenye ugonjwa wa mafua pia wana kinga ya kudumu. Soma zaidi kuhusu chanjo ya mafua. Udhibiti wa nyasi pia unaweza kusaidia kuzuia mafua na ni muhimu katika hali ambapo umwagaji wa chanjo ni mgumu au chanjo si inapatikana mara moja. Udhibiti wa nyasi una ni kuondoa maeneo ambapo nyasi wanaweza kuota na kuua nyasi na larva kwa kutumia mawakala wa kupunguza idadi ya nyasi katika maeneo ambapo idadi ya nyasi ni kubwa.

translations.source: Community involvement through activities, such as cleaning household drains and covering water containers where mosquitoes can breed is an important and effective way to control mosquitoes.
translations.reference: Ushiriki wa jamii kupitia shughuli, kama vile kusafisha mifereji ya maji ya kaya na kufunika vyombo vya maji ambapo mbu wanaweza kuzaliana ni njia muhimu na nzuri ya kudhibiti mbu.
translations.hypothesis: Ushiriki wa jamii kupitia shughuli, kama vile kusafisha maji kwenye bomba na kufunika chombo za maji ambapo nyenyezi wanaweza kuzaa, ni njia muhimu na yenye ufanisi ya kudhibiti nyenyezi.

translations.source: People with medical needs are “left behind in pain” reveals new report The World Health Organization (WHO) has published a new report on access to morphine for medical use, which describes how the global distribution of morphine, as a vital pain medicine, is unequal and does not fulfil the medical need. The report, titled “Left behind in pain”, highlights the problems in access to this essential medicine and offers actions to improve safe access through balanced policy. Despite morphine being an effective and relatively low-cost medicine for relieving strong pain, listed since 1977 in the first edition of the WHO Model list of Essential Medicines, the disparity in access across countries is stark. There is a 5- to 63-fold difference in the estimated median consumption of morphine between high-income countries and lower income countries.
translations.reference: Watu wenye mahitaji ya matibabu "wameachwa nyuma katika maumivu" inaonyesha ripoti mpya. Shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) limechapisha ripoti mpya kuhusu upatikanaji wa Morphine kwa ajili ya matumizi ya matibabu, ambayo inaeleza jinsi mgawanyo wa kimataifa wa Morphine, kama dawa muhimu ya maumivu, si sawa na haki dhidi ya mahitaji ya matibabu. Ripoti yenye anuwani "Kuachwa nyuma katika maumivu", inaonyesha matatizo katika upatikanaji wa dawa hii muhimu na inatoa hatua za kuboresha upatikanaji salama kupitia sera ya dawa. Licha ya maombi ya Morphine kuwa dawa yenye ufanisi na ya gharama nafuu ya kupunguza maumivu makali, iliyoorodheshwa tangu 1977 katika toleo la kwanza la orodha ya Dawa muhimu ya mfano ya WHO, tofauti ya upatikanaji wa Dawa katika nchi mbalimbali ni mkubwa. Kuna tofauti ya mara 5 hadi 63 katika makadirio ya wastani ya matumizi ya Mofine kati ya nchi za kipato cha juu na nchi za kipato cha chini.
translations.hypothesis: Watu wenye mahitaji ya matibabu "wanatishiwa" – inaonyesha ripoti mpya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) imetoa ripoti mpya kuhusu upatikanaji wa morphine kwa matibabu, ambayo inatoa maelezo kuhusu usambazaji wa morphine, kama dawa muhimu ya kupunguza maumivu, ni usawa na haufikia mahitaji ya matibabu. Ripoti, iliyo na jina "Wanatishiwa", inaangazia matatizo katika upatikanaji wa dawa hii muhimu na inatoa hatua za kuboresha upatikanaji salama kupitia sera inayofaa. Licha ya morphine kuwa dawa yenye ufanisi na bei nafuu, ambayo imejumuishwa katika orodha ya kwanza ya dawa muhimu za WHO tangu 1977, tofauti katika upatikanaji kati ya nchi ni kubwa. Kuna tofauti ya 5 hadi 63 katika wastani wa matumizi ya morphine kati ya nchi zilizo na uchumi wa juu na nchi zilizo na uchumi wa chini.

translations.source: Consumption pattern varies significantly across countries of similar wealth; it does not correspond to medical need, as indicated by the estimated number of days people are in pain or suffer with severe shortness of breath for people with a terminal illness. This data echoes that of the 2018 Lancet Commission which described the lack of access to pain relief medication as ‘one of the most heinous, hidden inequities in global health’ with the richest 10% of countries possessing 90% of distributed morphine-equivalent opioids. “Leaving people in pain when effective medicines are available for pain management, especially in the context of end-of-life care, should be a cause of serious concern for policy-makers,” says Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General for Medicines and Health Products. “We must urgently advocate for safe and timely access to morphine for those in medical need through balanced policy, everywhere.”
translations.reference: Mtindo wa matumizi hutofautiana kwa kiasi kibwa katika nchi nzenye utajiri sawa. Hailingani na hitaji la matibabu, kama inavyoonyeshwa na idadi inayokadiriwa ya siku ambazo watu wana maumivu au wanashida ya kupumua kwa watu walio na ugonjwa mbaya. Takwimu hii inalingana na ile ya Tume ya Lancet ya 2018 ambayo ilieleza ukosefu wa upatikanaji wa dawa za kutuliza maumivu kama 'moja wapo ya ukosefu wa usawa mbaya zaidi, uliofichwa katika afya ya kimataifa' huku nchi tajiri zaidi zikiwa na Morphine 10% na 90% ya Opioid sawa na Morphine. "Kuwaacha watu katika maumivu wakati Dawa zinazofaa zinapatikana kwa ajili ya kudhibiti maumivu, hasa katika muktadha wa huduma ya mwisho wa maisha, inapaswa kuwa sababu ya wasiwasi mkubwa kwa watunga sera", alisema Dk Yukiko Nakatani, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO Dawa na Bidhaa za afya. "Lazima tutee kwa haraka upatikanaji salama na kwa wakati wa Morphine kwa wale walio na mahitaji ya matibabu kupitia sera iliyosasishwa, kila mahali"
translations.hypothesis: Dhambi katika matumizi ya bidhaa zinabadilika sana katika nchi zilizo na viwango sawa vya uchumi; hazizingati na mahitaji ya matibabu, kama inavyoonyeshwa na idadi takwimu ya siku ambazo watu wanaugua au kupata shida kubwa kutokwa na hewa kwa watu wenye magonjwa hatari. البيانات hii inaelekea na ripoti ya 2018 ya Lancet, ambayo ilionyesha ukosefu wa ufikiaji wa dawa za kupunguza magonjwa kama "moja ya ukiolojio adimu na zisizojulikana katika afya ya dunia", ambapo nchi 10 bora zina 90% ya dawa sawa na morphine. "Kutoka watu katika magonjwa wakati dawa za ufanisi zinapatikana, hasa katika muktadha wa huduma za mwisho, lazima iwe sababu ya ushuhuda mkubwa kwa wajumbe wa sera," anasema Dkt. Yukiko Nakatani, Mshiriki Mkuu wa WHO katika dawa na bidhaa za afya. "Lazima tuhimiza haraka ufikiaji salama na wa wakati wa dawa za morphine kwa wale ambao wanahitaji, kupitia sera inayofaa, kila mahali."

translations.source: Reasons for the disparity Access to morphine for medical use is influenced by many interacting factors including enablers related to good governance, reliable/efficient procurement and supply processes, resource availability and capacity-building activities, along with barriers related to overly restrictive legislation and policies, inadequate service provision, and misinformed attitudes and perception. Given different country contexts, enablers, barriers and priorities for action vary; a stakeholder survey presented in this report, with respondents from 105 WHO Member States, confirms this variation. For example, irregular supply of morphine and other strong opioids at health facilities due to limited financing were commonly noted as a barrier in low- and middle-income countries compared to high-income countries. More than a third of respondents across all regions also noted barriers arising from legislative and regulatory factors while recognizing the importance of a legislative and regulatory framework in achieving safe access.
translations.reference: Sababu za kutofautiana. Upatikanaji wa Morphine kwa matumizi ya matibabu huathiriwa na mambo mengi yanayoingiliana ikiwemo viwezeshaji vinavyohusiana na utawala bora, michakato ya kuaminika/ufanisi ya ununuzi na ugavi, upatikanaji wa rasilimali na shughuli za kujenga uwezo, pamoja na vikwazo vinavyohusiana na sheria na sera zenye vikwazo, utoaji wa huduma duni, na mitazamo na muono usio sahihi. Kutokana na miuktadha tofauti ya nchi, viwezeshaji, vikwazo na vipaumbele vya utekelezaji vinatofautiana; uchunguzi wa wadau uliowasilishwa katika ripoti hii, na wahojiwa kutoka nchi 105 wanachama wa WHO, unathibitisha tofauti hii. Kwa mfano, utoaji usio wa kawaida wa Morphine na Opioids nyingine bora katika vituo vya afya kutokana na ufadhili mdogo ulibainishwa kama kikwazo katika nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati ikilinganishwa na nchi za kipato cha juu. Zaidi ya theluthi moja ya waliohojiwa katika kanda zote na pia walibainisha vikwazo vinavyotokana na vipengele vya sheria na udhibiti huku wakitambua umuhimu wa mfumo wa kisheria na udhibiti katika kufikia ufikiaji salama.
translations.hypothesis:
Sababu za tofauti:

Upatikanaji wa morfin kwa matumizi ya matibabu unaathiriwa na sababu nyingi zinazohusiana, pamoja na mambo yanayosaidia kama sheria na utawala bora, mchakato wa ununuzi na utoaji wa bidhaa unaostahiki, vifurushi, na shughuli za uendelezaji, pamoja na vizuizi kama sheria na sera ambazo ni kali sana, utoaji wa huduma usiofaa, na mitazamo na uelewa usio sahihi. Kwa kuzingatia mazingira tofauti za nchi, mambo yanayosaidia, vizuizi, na kipaumbele vina mabadiliko; suruhai iliyopatikana katika ripoti hii, na washiriki kutoka 105 mataifa ya WHO, inaonyesha mabadiliko haya. Kwa mfano, ununuzi usio wa kawaida wa morfin na dawa nyingine ngumu katika hospitali, kwa sababu ya ufadhili mdogo, mara nyingi kulikuwa na vizuizi katika mataifa yenye uchumi mdogo na katikati, ikilinganishwa na mataifa yenye uchumi mkubwa. Zaidi ya nusu ya washiriki katika kila eneo pia walichunguza vizuizi vinavyotokana na mambo ya sheria na sera, wakati wakitambua umuhimu wa mfumo wa sheria na sera katika kufikia upatikanaji salama.

translations.source: Unduly restrictive requirements could hamper patient access because they impede the flow of supply or make prescribing and dispensing difficult for health-care professionals. It is important to note that concerns about the potential harmful effects of opioids are valid, such as their potential to lead to opioid use disorder. For this reason, a certain amount of caution about the potential harms of opioid use (e.g. use in chronic non-cancer pain) is important for public health insofar as its use is well-informed and proportionate to risks. Such concerns should not undermine the benefits of opioid use when clinically indicated and when used safely by trained professionals. Opportunities for actionThe report presents a complementary set of areas for action that aim to improve safe access to morphine.
translations.reference: Mahitaji ya vikwazo visivyofaa vinaweza kuzuia ufikiaji wa magonjwa kwa sababu yanazuia mtiririko wa usambazaji au kufanya kuagiza na kutoa kuwa ngumu kwa wataalamu wa afya. Ni muhimu kutambua kwamba wasiwasi kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kusababishwa na afyuni ni halali, kama vile uwezo wao wa kusababisha matatizo ya matumizi ya Opioid. Kwa sababu hii, kiakisi fulani cha tahadhari kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kutokea kutokana na matumizi ya Opioid (m.f. hutumika katika maumivu ya muda mrefu yasiyo ya kansa) ni muhimu kwa afya ya umma kwa vile matumizi yake yana taarifa za kutosha na yanalingana na hatari. Wasiwasi kama huo haupaswi kudhoofisha manufaa ya matumizi ya Opioid inapoonyeshwa kimatibabu na inapotumiwa kwa usalama na inapotumiwa kwa usalama na wataalamu waliofunzwa. Fursa za kuchukua hatua ripoti inawasilisha seti inayosaidiana ya maeneo ya kuchukuliwa hatua ambayo yanalenga kuboresha ufikiaji salama wa Morphine.
translations.hypothesis: Mahitaji ambayo ni magumu sana yanaweza kupunguza ufikiaji wa wagonjwa kwa sababu huathiri utoaji wa vifaa au kuifanya vigumu kwa wataalamu wa afya. Ni muhimu kuzingatia kuwa, wasiwasi kuhusu madhara potojeni yanaweza, kama vile uwezekano wa kupelekea matumizi ya potojeni. Kwa hiyo, ni muhimu kuwa na tahadhari fulani kuhusu madhara potojeni (kwa mfano, matumizi katika maumivu ya kudumu ambayo si saratani) katika afya ya umma, kwa kuwa matumizi yake ni sahihi na inalingana na hatari. Wasiwasi huu haipaswi kupunguza faida za matumizi ya potojeni wakati inatumika kwa ushauri na wakati inatumika kwa usalama na wataalamu waliohitimu. Fursa za kuchukua hatua: Ripoti ina seti ya eneo ambazo ina lengo la kuboresha ufikiaji salama wa morphine.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: Haya ni pamoja na kutekeleza programu ndogo ndogo za kikanda au nchi nzima juu ya kuboresha upatikanaji wa Morphine kwa matumizi ya matibabu na kifurushi cha huduma muhimu na bidhaa kwa ajili ya matibabu shufaa ambayo imeundwa kulingana na orodha ya Dawa muhimu ya WHO na kifurushi muhimu cha WHO cha Palliative Care. pia ni pamoja na kuboresha usimamizi, kurahisisha michakato ya ununuzi na ugavi ili kushughulikia uzembe wowote, kuboresha rasilimali kama vile ufadhili thabiti, kuimarisha seti za ujuzi wa wahudumu wa afya, na kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu manufaa na madhara yanaweza kusababishwa na matumizi ya Opioid. Mafanikio ya hatua hizi yanategemea ushirikiano na mshikamano miongoni mwa wadau wote katika ngazi ya kitaifa, kikanda na kimataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Hizi ni pamoja na kutekeleza programu ndogo za kimaeneo au za kitaifa kuhusu kuboresha ufikiaji wa morphine kwa matumizi ya matibabu, pamoja na vifaa na huduma muhimu za matibabu, ambazo zimeundwa kulingana na Orodha ya Vifaa Muhimu ya WHO na "Kalamu Muhimu ya Matibabu" ya WHO. Pia ni pamoja na kuboresha utawala, kupunguza hatua za ununuzi na utoaji, ili kushughulikia ufanisi, kuboresha rasilimali kama vile ufadhili stahili, kuimarisha ujuzi wa afya, na kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu faida na hatari za matumizi ya dawa za opioid. Mafanikio ya hatua hizi yatategemea ushirikiano na ushirikishwaji kati ya wadau wote katika viwango vya kitaifa, kimaeneo, na kimataifa.

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the world’s deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs – which cause 74% of all deaths globally – due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS.
translations.reference: Visiwa vidogo vinakubali mpango shupavu wa utekelezaji kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza na afya ya akili. Leo, Azimio la Bridgetown la 2023 kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza (NCDs) na afya ya akili lilizinduliwa, kushughulikia baadhi ya magonjwa hatari Duniani katika nchi zinazoendelea za visiwa vidogo (SIDS), ambavyo vipo hatarini zaidi. Azimio hilo ni matokeo muhimu ya mkutano wa mawaziri wa SIDS wa magonjwa yasiyo ambukiza (NCDs) na afya ya akili, unaoanza tarehe 14 hadi 16 Juni, ulioandaliwa kwa pamoja na shirika la afya Duniani (WHO), shirika la afya la Pan Amerika (PAHO) na serikali ya Barbados. SIDS zinaathiriwa kwa kiasi kikubwa na NCDs- ambayo husababisha 74% ya vifo vyote Ulimwenguni- kutokana na kutegemea chakula kutoka nje, athari za kibiashara na mgogoro wa hali ya hewa. Ripoti mpya ya WHO inaonyesha kuwa nchi 8 kati ya 15 zilizo na hatari zaidi ya 30% ya vifo vya mapema kutokana na magonjwa ya moyo na mishipa, saratani, kisukari, au ugonjwa wa kupumua kwa muda mrefu ni SIDS.
translations.hypothesis: Visiwa vidogo wamekubaliana kuhusu mpango wa hatua mkakati kuhusu magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa na afya ya akili. Leo, "Declaración de Bridgetown ya 2023 kuhusu Magonjwa Isiyoweza Kuambukizwa na Afya ya Akili" ilianzishwa, ili kushughulikia baadhi ya magonjwa hatari zaidi duniani katika Visiwa vya Kiganja Vinavyoendelea (SIDS), ambavyo ni hatarini sana. "Declaración" ni matokeo muhimu ya Mkutano wa Wizara wa SIDS kuhusu Magonjwa Isiyoweza Kuambukizwa na Afya ya Akili, ambapo ilifanyika kutoka Juni 14 hadi 16, na ilishughulikiwa na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), Shirika la Afya la Amerika (PAHO) na Serikali ya Barbados. Visiwa vya Kiganja Vinavyoendelea (SIDS) huchukuliwa hasa na magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa – ambavyo husababisha 74% ya vifo vyote duniani – kwa sababu ya uharaji wao kwa vyakula vya kigeni, athari za kibiashara, na mzozo wa hali ya hewa. Ripoti mpya ya WHO inaonyesha kwamba 8 kati ya nchi 15 ambazo zina hatari zaidi ya 30% ya vifo mapema kutokana na magonjwa ya moyo, saratani, ugonjwa wa sukari, au magonjwa ya kupumua, ni Visiwa vya Kiganja Vinavyoendelea.

translations.source: The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Nchi 10 zilizo na viwango vya juu vya unene wa kupindukia Duniani zote ni SIDS katika pasifiki, ambapo zaidi ya 45% ya watu wazima wanaishi na unene uliokithiri. Hali ya afya ya akili ni ya kawaida katika nchi za SIDS, na kuathiri wastani wa 15.2% ya wakazi huko Karibiani na 11.2% ya wakazi katika Pasifiki. Watu walio na afya ya akili wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa ya vifo vya mapema, ikiwemo kutokana na hali ya afya ya kimwili ambayo haijashughulikiwa na kutokana na kujiua. Unyanyapaa, uhaba wa wafanyakazi maalumu na athari za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa huchangia hali yenye changamoto katika SIDS ambayo inahitaji uangalizi wa haraka. Azimio la Bridgetown la 2023 linaonyesha hatua thabiti za kushughulikia masuala mbalimbali ya kijamii, kimazingira, kiuchumi na kibiashara ambayo husababisha NCDs na hali ya afya ya akili.
translations.hypothesis: Nafasi 10 za mataifa ulimwenguni zenye viwango vya juu vya uzito, zote ni mataifa ya SIDS katika Pasifiki, ambapo zaidi ya 45% ya watu wanazidisha uzito. Masharti ya afya ya akili ni ya kawaida katika mataifa ya SIDS, ambayo yanaathiri takribani 15.2% ya wakazi wa Caribbean na 11.2% ya wakazi wa Pasifiki. Watu wenye masharti ya afya ya akili wana hatari kubwa ya kufariki mapema, pamoja na kutokwa na matatizo ya afya ya kimwili na upande wa kifo. Tabibu, ukosefu wa wafanyakazi maalumu, na athari za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, husababisha hali ngumu katika mataifa ya SIDS ambayo inahitaji umakini wa haraka. Kamili ya Bridgetown ya 2023 inaangazia hatua kubwa za kushughulikia masuala mbalimbali ya kijamii, mazingira, kiuchumi na biashara ambayo husababisha magonjwa ya saratani na masharti ya afya ya akili.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led ‘for’ and ‘by’ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. “Bold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,” said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. “Funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.” "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Kuendelezwa kupitia mchakato jumuishi unaoongozwa 'kwa' na 'na' SIDs, tamko hilo linaangazia kwamba NCDs na hali ya Afya ya akili haiwezi kushughulikiwa ipasavyo bila kukabiliana na mgogoro wa hali ya hewa. "Hatua ya ujasiri kwa hali ya hewa, afya njema, na ustawi wetu inategemea kurekebisha na kupanga upya ufadhili wa kimataifa ili kufungua mabilioni ya uwekezaji, na kuifanya iwe chini ya adhabu kwa nchi zinazoendelea kulipa madeni yao", alisema Mheshimiwa Mia Amor Mottley, waziri mkuu wa Barbados. "Ufadhili wa kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya Tabianchi zilizo hatarini zaidi pia ni muhimu, huku magonjwa yasiyo ambukiza na afya ya akili yakichangia" "Changamoto zinazokabili nchi zinazoendelea za visiwa vidogo zimeunganishwa na zina pande nyingi. Mabadiliko ya Tabianchi, uharibifu wa mazingira, kukosekana kwa usawa wa kijamii na kiuchuni, na vigezo vya kibiashara vya afya vinazidisha mzigo wa NCDs na hali ya afya ya akili", alisema DK Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Ilianzishwa kupitia mchakato wa uwiano, ambapo SIDS walishiriki, taadhiri hilo linaeleza kwamba magonjwa ya saratani na hali za afya, haziweza kutatuliwa vizuri bila kutumikia krisis ya hali ya hewa. "Hatua kubwa kwa hali ya hewa, afya, na ustawi, inategemea kuimarisha na kuweka tena ufadhili wa kimataifa ili kufungua mabilioni za uwekezaji, huku ukifanya kuwa rahisi kwa nchi zinazopatikana kulipa mikataba yao," alisema Mwenyekiti Mia Amor Mottley, Waziri Mkuu wa Barbados. "Ufadhili kwa kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na kupunguza athari katika nchi zinazogharamia zaidi, pia ni muhimu, na magonjwa isiyoweza kutatuliwa na afya, pia zinaangaliwa." "Tiazo zinazokumbana na Majirani ndogo wanaendelea, na ni tata. Mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, uharibifu wa mazingira, usawa wa kijamii na kiuchumi, na mambo ya kibiashara ya afya, huongeza mzigo wa magonjwa ya saratani na hali za afya," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO.

translations.source: "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for ‘loss and damage’ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: "Licha ya rasilimali zao chache na vikwazo vya kijografia, mataifa haya yameonyesha ujasiri wa ajabu katika kikabiliana na shida. Kwa pamoja, lazima tutengeneze njia mbayo msingi wake ni usawa, uthabiti na uendelevu. Ni lazima tuimarishe mifumo ya afya, tuimarishe hatua za kuzuia na kugundua mapema, na kuweka kipaumbele katika ujumuishaji wa NCD na huduma ya afya ya akili katika huduma ya afya ya msingi. "Mkurugenzi mkuu pia aliahidi kwamba WHO itafanya kazi kuhamasisha rasilimali za kifedha ili kuendeleza vituo vya afya vinavyostahimili hali ya hewa, mazingira endelevu ndani ya SIDS. WHO pia itaendelea kutetea 'hasara na uharibifu' ufadhili wa kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya Tabianchi na uwekezaji wa kupunguza katika nchi za kipato cha chini.
translations.hypothesis: "Ingawa nchi hizi zina rasilimali na vikwazo geofisiki, zimeonyesha nguvu kubwa katika mukabiliano na changamoto. Pamoja, tunapaswa kuunda njia inayotegemeka, yenye nguvu, na endelevu. Tunapaswa kuimarisha mifumo ya afya, kuongeza hatua za kuzuia na kugundua mapema, na kutoa umuhimu wa kuunganisha huduma za magonjwa ya kawaida na afya ya akili katika huduma za afya ya msingi. "Mkurugenzi Mkuu pia aliahidi kwamba WHO itafanya kazi ya kukusanya rasilimali za kifedha ili kuendeleza vituo vya afya ambavyo vinaweza kustahimili mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na zinaendelevu, katika nchi za kidunia. WHO pia itazcontinue kutetea fedha za "kufariki na hasara" kwa ajili ya adapta na kupunguza athari za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa katika nchi na mshtaka wa chini.

translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populations’ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHO’s ‘best buys’ – a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. “SIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs.
translations.reference: Kama sehemu ya kukabiliana na Azimio, SIDS ilijidhatiti kuchukua hatua kadhaa, ikijumuisha maeneo kama vile kushirikisha jamii yote, kuharakisha utekelezaji, kupata uwekezaji, kuoanisha serikali zote na uhasibu kwa maendeleo. Pia mkutano huo ulionyesha ahadi maalumu za SIDS kuhusu NCDs na afya ya akili, ikiwemo kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya akili katika vituo vya huduma za msingi, kusasisha sheria ya udhibiti wa Tumbaku ili kufidia sigara za kielektroniki na mvuke, na kupunguza ulaji wa chumvi na sukari. Ahadi hizi zinapatana na 'manunuzi bora' ya WHO- seti ya afua za gharama nafuu, zenye msingi wa ushahidi ili kukabiliana na NCDs. Orodha ya manunuzi bora ilisasishwa hivi karibuni katika Mkutano wa afya Ulimwenguni mnamo Mei ili kujumuisha kinga ya pili ya Homa ya Rheumatic, udhibiti wa papo hapo na wa muda mrefu wa ugonjwa wa pumu na ugonjwa sugu wa mapafu vile vile afua kadhaa za mlango wa kizazi, matiti, utumbo mpana na Ini, Saratani ya watoto, na matibabu ya kina ya saratani kwa wale wanaoishi na VVU. "SIDS katika bara la Amerika inasalia kuwa hatarini kwa NCDs.
