translations.hypothesis: Bwana Jorge Francisco Meneses, ambaye amehimiza ushiriki wa jamii katika huduma za hospitali kwa zaidi ya 20, alianzisha komiti za jamii zenye umuhimu, ambazo ziliangazia usalama na kuridhika kwa wagonjwa, familia zao na jamii. Kwa kuzingatia athari chanya ya kazi yake katika kuboresha ubora wa huduma za wagonjwa, mfumo wa huduma za kitaalamu na za wagenjwa ambao alounda, uliongozwa katika viwango vya kitaifa. Hivi sasa, kama mshauri wa kitaifa kwa hospitali za Guatemala, ameweka mpango wa kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa na familia zao. Bwana Meneses hivi majuzi ameshiriki katika mradi wa kipekee katika eneo la afya la kusini mwa Guatemala, ili kujenga mtandao wa huduma za afya wa kitaifa, na umuhimu unaoangazia jamii zisizo na huduma. Kazi yake ilianzisha matumizi ya mkakati wa kitaifa wa mtandao wa huduma za afya, ambao ni wa kwanza katika Afrika Mashariki.

translations.source: Nelson Mandela Award for Health Promotion 2023 award laureate: Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma from Bahrain In addition to being the Chief Executive Officer of the National Health Regulatory Authority of Bahrain, Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma has held various leadership positions in government and academic institutions in her country. Dr Al Jalahma has played a major role in the development of numerous national and region-wide strategies and plans in the field of primary healthcare, child and adolescent health, chronic diseases and antismoking. In her current role, Dr Al Jalahma has led major successful initiatives, such as the national accreditation system for health institutions, the digital transformation of the National Health Regulatory Authority, and several initiatives leading to increased efficiency and excellence in the health sector.
translations.reference: Tuzo ya Nelson mandela ya kukuza afya Mshindi wa tuzo ya 2023: Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahrain Pamoja na kuwa afisa mtendaji mkuu wa mamlaka ya kitaifa ya udhibiti wa afya ya Bahrain, Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma ameshika nyadhifa mbalimbali za uongozi katika serikali na taasisi za kitaaluma nchini mwake. Dk Al Jalahma amekuwa na mchango mkubwa katika ukuzaji wa mikakati na mipango mingi ya kitaifa na kikanda katika nyanja ya afya ya msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa sugu na uachaji wa uvutaji sigara. Katika nafasi yake ya sasa, Dk A Jalahma ameongoza mipango mikuu yenye mafanikio, kama vile mfumo wa kitaifa wa ithibati kwa taasisi za afya, na mipango kadhaa inayosababisha kuongezeka kwa fursa na ubora katika sekta ya afya.
translations.hypothesis: Tuzo ya Nelson Mandela kwa Uendelezaji wa Afya 2023: Dkt. Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahari. Zaidi ya kuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Taasisi ya Sheria za Afya ya Taifa ya Bahari, Dkt. Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma amekuwa na nafasi mbalimbali za uongozi katika taasisi za serikali na za elimu nchini. Dkt. Al Jalahma amechukua jukumu muhimu katika uendelezaji wa maeneo mengi ya sera na mipango za kitaifa na za eneo katika masuala ya huduma ya afya ya msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa ya kudumu, na kupinga tabibu. Katika jukumu lake sasa, Dkt. Al Jalahma amefanya maendeleo muhimu, kama vile mfumo wa uthibitisho wa kitaifa kwa taasisi za afya, mabadiliko ya dijitali ya Taasisi ya Sheria za Afya ya Taifa, na maeneo mengine yanayozingatia ufanisi na ubora katika sekta ya afya.

translations.source: She is also a prominent voice for health promotion across various channels throughout all countries of the Gulf Cooperation Council.
translations.reference: Pia yeye ni mtu maarufu kwa ajili kukuza afya katika njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Baraza la ushirikiano la Ghuba.
translations.hypothesis: Pia, yeye ni sauti muhimu katika uenezi wa afya katika njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Baraza la Ushirikiano la Ghuba.

translations.source: WHO and Republic of Korea sign landmark agreement to boost biomanufacturing capacity WHO and the Republic of Korea have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to establish a global training hub in biomanufacturing. This global training centre will serve all low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) to produce biologicals, such as vaccines, insulin, monoclonal antibodies, and cancer medicines. The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the need to expand the local and regional production of vaccines and other essential health products in LMICs to ensure equitable access. To provide countries with the know-how to rapidly produce mRNA vaccines, WHO, in collaboration with partners, established the mRNA Technology Transfer programme, with the formal inauguration of the Hub facility in South Africa in April 2023.
translations.reference: WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa Korea zatia saini makubaliano ya kihistoria ili kuongeza uwezo wa utengenezaji wa Viumbe hai WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa korea zimetia saini mkataba wa maelewano ili kuanzisha kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. Kituo hiki cha mafunzo cha kimataifa kitahudumia nchi zote za kipato cha chini na cha kati (LMICs) kuzalisha Biolojia kama vile Insulin, kinga za monokloni na dawa za saratani. Janga la UVIKO-19 liliangazia hitaji la kupanua uzalishaji wa ndani na wa kikanda wa chanjo na bidhaa nyingine muhimu za afya katika LMICs ili kuhakikisha ufikiaji sawa. Ili kuzipa nchi ujuzi wa kuzalisha Chanjo za mRNA kwa haraka, WHO, kwa kushirikiana na washirika, ilianzisha mpango wa uhawilishaji Teknolojia wa mRNA, na uzinduzi rasmi wa kituo cha Hub nchini Afrika Kusini mwezi Aprili 2023.
translations.hypothesis: WHO na Jamhuri ya Korea zinaunga mkono mkataba muhimu ili kuongeza uwezo wa uzalishaji wa biolojia. Mkataba huu una lengo la kuanzisha kituo cha mafunzo kimataifa katika uzalishaji wa biolojia. Kituo hiki kitatoa huduma kwa nchi za kiuchumi cha chini na katikati (LMICs) ili kuzalisha bidhaa za biolojia, kama vile chanjo, insuli, antibodies, na dawa za saratani. Janga la COVID-19 liliweka alama umuhimu wa kuongeza uzalishaji wa chanjo na bidhaa muhimu za afya katika nchi za LMICs ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji sawa. Ili kutoa nchi maarifa ya haraka za uzalishaji wa chanjo za mRNA, WHO, kwa ushirikiano na washiriki, imanzisha programu ya Uhamishaji wa Teknolojia za mRNA, na uanzishaji rasmi wa kituo hicho nchini Afrika Kusini mnamo Aprili 2023.

translations.source: This multilateral effort and other recent local production initiatives call for ambitious workforce development strategies to recruit, upskill and retain the staff working at these facilities, with unique competencies required in bioproduction. To address this gap, WHO and the Republic of Korea have engaged in closed collaboration for over a year and are now formalizing their commitment towards the establishment of a global training hub in biomanufacturing. “We are delighted to sign this Memorandum of Understanding to elevate our partnership to the next level and collaborate in the development of a comprehensive training curriculum. We hope this world-class training hub will help to build a skilled workforce and ensure quality health products can be manufactured around the world,” said Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General, Access to Medicines and Health Products. The Government of the Republic of Korea is offering a large range of national training facilities and programmes covering the full spectrum of biological manufacturing and is expanding its operations to accommodate more trainees from other countries with the construction of a Global Bio Education Campus to be launched in 2025.
translations.reference: Juhudi hizi za kimataifa na mipango mingine ya hivi karibuni ya uzalishaji wa ndani inataka mikakati kabambe ya maendeleo ya wafanyakazi ili kuajiri, kuongeza ujuzi na kuhifadhi wafanyakazi wanaofanya kazi katia vituo hivi,na umahiri wa kipekee unaohitajika katika uzalishaji wa viumbe hai. Ili kukabiliana na pengo hili, WHO na Jamhuri ya korea zimeshirikiana kwa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka mmoja na sasa zinarasimisha dhamira yao ya kuanzishwa kwa kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. "Tunayo furaha kutia saini mkataba huu wa makubaliano ili kuinua ushirikiano wetu hadi ngazi nyengine na kushirikiana katika utayarishaji wa mtaala mpana wa mafunzo. Tunatarajia kitovu hiki cha mafunzo cha hadhi ya kimataifa kitasaidia kujenga nguvu kazi yenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha bidhaa bora za afya zinaweza kutengenezwa Duniani kote", alisema DK Yukiko Nakatani, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO, upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa anuwai kubwa ya vifaa vya mafunzo ya kitaifa na programu zinazohusu wigo kamili wa utengenezaji wa kibiolojia na inapanua shughuli zake ili kuchukua wanafunzi zaidi kutoka nchi nyingine kwa ujenzi wa kampasi ya elimu ya viumbe hai ya kimataifa itakayozinduliwa mnamo 2025.
translations.hypothesis: Jihad hii ya kimataifa na matarajio ya hivi majuzi ya ndani yanahitaji mikakati yenye nguvu za utume, kuendeleza, na kudumisha wafanyakazi katika viwanda hizi, ambapo kuna mahali pa muhimu katika uzalishaji wa biolojia. Ili kutibu tatizo hili, WHO na Jamhuri ya Korea wameanzisha ushirikiano wa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka, na sasa wanaweka uhusiano wao rasmi kuhusu kuanzisha kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika uzalishaji wa biolojia. "Tuna furaha kusaini Mkataba huu ili kuimarisha ushirikiano wetu na kushirikiana katika kuendeleza curriculum kamili ya mafunzo. Tunatumai kwamba kitovu hiki cha kitaifa kitasaidia kujenga wafanyakazi wenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha kuwa bidhaa bora za afya zinaweza kuzalishwa duniani kote," alisema Dkt. Yukiko Nakatani, Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa WHO, kuhusu Upatikanaji wa Madawa na Bidhaa za Afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa anuwai kubwa ya viwanda na programu za mafunzo za kitaifa, ambazo zinaangalizwa, na inaendeleza shughuli zake ili kukaa na wanafunzi zaidi kutoka nchi nyingine, kupitia uanzishaji wa Kampasi ya Kimataifa ya Elimu ya Bio, ambayo itafunguliwa mwaka wa 2025.

translations.source: “I hope this Memorandum of Understanding will enhance cooperation between the Republic of Korea and WHO to strengthen biomanufacturing capacities of LMICs,” said Mr Hwang Seunghyun Director General, Global Vaccine Hub Office at the Ministry of Health and Welfare from Republic of Korea. In parallel, WHO is intensifying regulatory system strengthening to ensure the quality and safety of health products. Stronger regulatory agencies will also enhance confidence in locally produced products and counter misinformation and the availability of unsafe substandard or falsified medicines.
translations.reference: "Ninatumai mkataba huu wa maelewano utaimarisha ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo na utengenezaji wa viumbe hai wa LMICs", alisema Bw Hwang Seunghyun mkurugenzi mkuu, ofisi za kitovu cha chanjo cha kimataifa katika wizara ya afya na ustawi kutoka Jamhuri ya Korea. Sambamba na hilo, WHO inaimarisha uimarishaji wa mfumo wa udhibiti ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Mashirika yenye nguvu zaidi ya udhibiti pia yataongeza imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa nchini na kukabiliana na taarifa potofu na upatikanaji wa dawa zisizo na viwango, zisizo salama au zilizoghushiwa.
translations.hypothesis: “Natumai kwamba Mkataba huu utasaidia ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo wa uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia katika nchi za Daraja Ndogo,” alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Ofisi ya Global Vaccine Hub, Wizara ya Afya na Utulivu kutoka Jamhuri ya Korea, Bi Hwang Seunghyun. Pamoja na hayo, WHO inaendelea kuimarisha mfumo wa uthibitishaji ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Wazuaji wa uthibitishaji wenye nguvu pia wataimarisha imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa ndani, na kupunguza taarifa za uongo na upatikanaji wa dawa zisizo salama au bandia.

translations.source: WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing life-threatening tobacco crops On World No Tobacco Day, WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing tobacco farming and support more sustainable crops that could feed millions. “Tobacco is responsible for 8 million deaths a year, yet governments across the world spend millions supporting tobacco farms,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and strengthen food security for all.” More than 300 million people globally are faced with acute food insecurity.
translations.reference: WHO yazitaka serikali kuacha kutoa ruzuku kwa mazao ya Tumbaku yanayohatarisha maisha Katika siku ya kuzuia Tumbaku Duniani, WHO inazitaka serikali kuacha kutoa ruzuku kwa kilimo cha Tumbaku na kuunga mkono mazao endelevu ambayo yanaweza kulisha mamilioni ya watu. "Tumbaku inahusika na vifo milioni 8 kwa mwaka, serikali kote ulimwenguni hutumia mamilioni kusaidia mashamba ya Tumbaku", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Kwa kuchagua kulima mazao ya chakula badala ya Tumbaku, tunatanguliza afya, kuhifadhi mifumo ya ikolojia, na kuimarisha usalama wa chakula kwa wote" Zaidi ya watu milioni 300 Duniani wanakabiliwa na uhaba wa chakula.
translations.hypothesis: WHO inatoa rai kwa serikali kuacha kutoa rishati kwa kilimo cha sigara ambacho kinaweza kutishia maisha. Kwenye Siku ya Umoja wa Dunia dhidi ya Sigara, WHO inatoa rai kwa serikali kuacha kutoa rishati kwa kilimo cha sigara na kuelezea msaada kwa mazao mengine endelevu ambayo yanaweza kuwezesha mamilioni. "Sigara ni sababu ya vifo milioni 8 kila mwaka, lakini serikali duniani kote zinatumia mamilioni kuunga mkono kilimo cha sigara," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO. "Kwa kuchagua kilima chakula badala ya sigara, tunaweka umakini kwenye afya, tunalinda mazingira, na tunaimarisha usalama wa chakula kwa wote." Zaidi ya watu milioni 300 duniani kote wanakabiliana na ukosefu mkubwa wa chakula.

translations.source: Meanwhile more than 3 million hectares of land across more than 120 countries are being used to grow deadly tobacco, even in countries where people are starving. A new WHO report, “Grow food, not tobacco,” highlights the ills of tobacco growing and the benefits of switching to more sustainable food crops for farmers, communities, economies, the environment, and the world at large. The report also exposes the tobacco industry for trapping farmers in a vicious cycle of debt, propagating tobacco growing by exaggerating its economic benefits and lobbying through farming front groups. Tobacco farming causes diseases to the farmers themselves and more than 1 million child laborers are estimated to be working on tobacco farms, missing their opportunity for an education. “Tobacco is not only a massive threat to food insecurity, but health overall, including the health of tobacco farmers.
translations.reference: Wakati huohuo zaidi ya hekta milioni 3 za ardhi katika zaidi ya 120 zinatumiwa kulima Tumbaku hatari, hata nchi ambazo watu wana njaa. Ripoti mpya ya WHO, "Lima chakula, si Tumbaku", inaangazia matatizo ya ukuzaji wa Tumbaku na faida za kubadili mazao ya chakula endelevu kwa wakulima, jamii, uchumi, mazingira na Dunia kwa ujumla. Pia ripoti hiyo ilifichua sekta ya Tumbaku kwa kuwanasa wakulima katika msululu mbaya wa madeni, kueneza kilimo cha Tumbaku kwa kuzidisha faida zake za kiuchumi na ushawishi kupitia vikundi vya mwanzo vya wakulima. Kilimo cha Tumbaku kinasababisha magonjwa kwa wakulima wenyewe na zaidi ya vibarua milioni 1 wanakadiriwa kufanya kazi kwenye mashamba ya Tumbaku, wakikosa fursa ya kupata elimu. "Tumbaku sio tu ni tishio kwa uhaba wa chakula, lakini afya kwa ujumla, ikiwa ni pamoja na afya ya wakulima wa Tumbaku.
translations.hypothesis: Hivyo, zaidi ya 3 milioni hekta za ardhi katika zaidi ya 120 nchi zinatumika katika kilimo cha tumbaku hatari, hata katika nchi ambapo watu wanaogwa. Taarifa mpya ya WHO, "Uzalisha chakula, si tumbaku," inaangazia athari mbaya za kilimo cha tumbaku na faida za kubadilisha kwa mazao endelevu kwa wakulima, jamii, uchumi, mazingira, na ulimwengu kwa ujumla. Taarifa hiyo pia inaonyesha sekta ya tumbaku kwa kuwa hatua katika mzunguko mbaya wa utajiri, kwa kuendeleza kilimo cha tumbaku kwa kuongeza faida zake za kiuchumi na kupigania kupitia vyama vya kilimo. Kilimo cha tumbaku linapelekea magonjwa kwa wakulima wenyewe, na takribani milioni 1 ya watumwa wana idadi, ambapo wamepoteza fursa ya elimu. "Tumbaku si tu hatari kubwa kwa usalama wa chakula, lakini pia afya kwa ujumla, pamoja na afya ya wakulima wa tumbaku.

translations.source: Farmers are exposed to chemical pesticides, tobacco smoke and as much nicotine as found in 50 cigarettes – leading to illnesses like chronic lung conditions and nicotine poisoning,” said Dr Ruediger Krech, Director of Health Promotion at WHO. Tobacco growing is a global problem. The focus has so far been in Asia and South America, but the latest data show tobacco companies are expanding to Africa. Since 2005, there has been a nearly 20% increase in tobacco farming land across Africa. WHO, the Food and Agriculture Organization and the World Food Programme support the Tobacco Free Farms initiative that will provide help to more than 5000 farmers in Kenya and Zambia to grow sustainable food crops instead of tobacco.
translations.reference: Wakulima wanakabiliwa na viuatilifu vya kemikali, moshi wa Tumbaku na nikotini nyingi kama zinavyopatikana katika sigara 50 na kusababisha magonjwa kama vile hali ya mapafu sugu na sumu ya nikotini", alisema Dk Ruediger Krech, mkurugenzi wa ukuzaji afya katika WHO. Ulimaji wa Tumbaku ni tatizo la kimataifa. Lengo hadi sasa limekuwa barani Asia na Amerika kusini, lakini takwimu za hivi karibuni zinaonyesha makampuni ya Tumbaku yanaenea hadi Afrika. Tangu 2005, kumekuwa na ongezeko la karibu 20% katika ardhi ya kilimo cha Tumbaku kote barani Afrika. WHO, shirika la chakula na kilimo na mpango wa chakula Duniani wanaunga mkono mpango wa mashamba yasiyolipishwa ya Tumbaku ambao utatoa msaada kwa zaidi ya wakulima 5000 nchini Kenya na Zambia kulima mazaoya chakula endelevu badala ya Tumbaku.
translations.hypothesis: Kuzalisha mazao kunaweza kuleta hatari kwa wakulima, kama vile mdalio, sigara, na viwango vya nikotini sawa na vya sigare 50 – ambazo zinaweza kusababisha magonjwa kama vile magonjwa ya maradhi na ugonjwa wa nikotini. "Hii imesemwa na Dkt. Ruediger Krech, Mkurugenzi wa Uenezi wa Afya katika WHO. Uzalishaji wa sigara ni tatizo la kimataifa. Hivi sasa, umekuwa na umbo katika Asia na Amerika ya Kusini, lakini data za hivi karibuni zinaonyesha kuwa kampuni za sigara zinaendelea kupanua katika Afrika. Tangu 2005, kuna ongezeko la zaidi ya 20% katika eneo la uzalishaji wa sigara katika Afrika. WHO, Shirika la Chakula na Kilimo, na Shirika la Chakula cha Dunia, zinaunga mkono mpango wa "Mazao Asilia," ambao utasaidia zaidi ya wakulima 5000 nchini Kenya na Zambia, ili waweze kuzaa mazao endelevu badala ya sigara.

translations.source: Every year World No Tobacco Day honours those making a difference in tobacco control. This year one of the Awardees, Ms Sprina Robi Chacha, a female farmer from Kenya, is being recognized for not only switching from growing tobacco to high protein beans, but also training hundreds of other farmers on how to do this to create a healthier community. 182 Parties to the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control have committed to “...promote economically viable alternatives for tobacco workers and growers”. A crucial way that countries can fulfill this obligation is by ending subsidies for tobacco growing and supporting healthier crops. By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and increase food security.
translations.reference: Kila mwaka siku ya kutotumia Tumbaku Duniani huwaenzi wale wanaoleta mabadiliko katika udhibiti wa Tumbaku. Mwaka huu mmoja wa waliotunukiwa tuzo hiyo, Bi Sprina Robi chacha, mkulima wa kike kutoka Kenya, anatambulika tu kwa kuhama kutoka kilimo cha Tumbaku kwenda kwenye maharage yenye protini nyingi, lakini pia hutoa mafunzo kwa mamia ya wakulima wengine jinsi ya kufanya hivyo ilikujenga jamii yenye afya bora. Wanachama 182 katika mkataba wa mfumo wa WHO wa kudhibiti Tumbaku wajitolea "...kukuza njia mbadala za kiuchumi kwa wafanyakazi na wakulima wa Tumbaku". Njia bora ambazo nchi zinaweza kutimiza wajibu huu ni kwa kukomesha ruzuku kwa kilimo cha Tumbaku na kuunga mkono mazao yenye afya. Kwa kuchagua kulima chakula badala ya Tumbaku, tunatanguliza afya, kuhifadhi mifumo ya ikolojia, na kuongeza usalama wa chakula.
translations.hypothesis: Kila mwaka, Siku ya Dunia dhidi ya Tabako, huadhimisha wale ambao wana athari katika kudhibiti matumizi ya tabako. mwaka huu, moja ya washawishi, Bi. Sprina Robi Chacha, mwanamke kutoka Kenya, anashangazwa sio tu kwa kubadilisha kilimo cha tabako kuwa mbegu za protini, lakini pia kwa kutoa mafunzo kwa wakulima wengine kuhusu jinsi ya kufanya hivyo ili kuunda jamii yenye afya. 182 mataifa ambazo ni washiriki katika Mkataba wa WHO kuhusu Kudhibiti Matumizi ya Tabako, wameahidi "…kuendeleza njia za kiuchumi kwa wafanyikazi na wakulima wa tabako". Njia muhimu ambayo mataifa yanaweza kutimiza wajibu huu ni kwa kuacha misaada kwa kilimo cha tabako na kusaidia mazao yenye afya. Kwa kuchagua kilimo cha chakula badala ya tabako, tunaweka umakini kwenye afya, kuhifadhi mifumo ya ekosistemi, na kuongeza usalama wa chakula.

translations.source: Landmark report charts route for reorienting economies to deliver health for all In the first-ever report of its kind, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has outlined a bold new path to reorient economies to deliver what matters - health for all. The Council, created by WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus in November 2020 in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, and chaired by Professor Mariana Mazzucato, has spent that last two years rethinking the economy from a health for all perspective, and pushing forcefully the principle that human and planetary health must be at the heart of how we design our social, health and economic systems and policies. The Council has put forward a bold new narrative grounded in new economic wisdom to reorient economies to deliver health for all across four interrelated themes:
translations.reference: Njia muhimu za Chati kwa kuelekeza upya uchumi Kutoa afya kwa wote Katika ripoti ya kwanza kabisa ya aina yake, Baraza la WHO kuhusu uchumi wa afya kwa wote limeelezea njia mpya ya kijasiri ya kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kutoa mambo muhimu- afya kwa wote. Baraza, liliundwa na mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus mnamo Novemba 2020 ili kukabiliana na janga la UVIKO-19, na chini ya uenyekiti wa profesa Mariana Mazzucato, limetumia miaka miwili iliyopita kutafakari upya uchumi kwa afya kwa mtazamo wote, na kusukuma kwa nguvu kanuni kwamba afya ya binadamu na sayari lazima iwe kiini cha jinsi tunavyobuni mifumo na sera zetu za kijamii, kiafya na kiuchumi. Baraza limetoa masimulizi mapya ya ujasiri yanayokitwa katika hekima mpya ya kiuchumi ili kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kutoa afya kwa mada zote nne zinazohusiana:
translations.hypothesis: Taarifa muhimu inaonyesha njia ya kuanzisha upya uchumi ili kuleta afya kwa wote. Katika taarifa ya kwanza ya aina yake, Baraza la WHO kuhusu Uchumi wa Afya kwa Wote, limeeleza njia mpya na yenye nguvu ya kuanzisha upya uchumi ili kuleta kile kinachohitajika - afya kwa wote. Baraza, ambalo linaombwa na Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus mnamo Novemba 2020, katika majibu ya janga la COVID-19, na lililoongozwa na Profesa Mariana Mazzucato, limegeuza uchumi kwa zaidi ya miaka miwili, na kuendeleza kikamilifu mbinu kwamba afya ya binadamu na ya dunia lazima iwe katika moyo wa jinsi tunavyoandaa mifumo na sera za jamii, afya na uchumi. Baraza limeleta wazo mpya na yenye nguvu, ambalo lina msingi katika akili mpya ya uchumi, ili kuanzisha upya uchumi ili kuleta afya kwa wote katika mada nne zinazohusiana:

translations.source: Value - valuing and measuring what matters through new economic metrics; Finance - how to finance health for all as a long-term investment, not a short-term cost; Innovation - how to advance health innovation for the common good; Capacity - how to strengthen dynamic public sector capacity to achieve health for all. “Two years ago, I asked a team of the world’s leading economists and public health experts – all women – to create a paradigm shift.
translations.reference: Thamani - Kuthamini na kupima mambo muhimu kupitia vipimo vipya vya kiuchumi; Fedha - Jinsi ya kufadhili afya kwa wote kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu, sio gharama ya muda mfupi; Uvumbuzi - Jinsi ya kuendeleza uvumbuzi wa afya kwa manufaa ya wote; Uwezo - Jinsi ya kuimarisha uwezo madhubuti wa sekta ya umma kufikia afya kwa wote. "Miaka miwili iliyopita, niliiomba timu ya wanauchumi wakuu Duniani na wataalamu wa afya ya umma - wote wanawake- kuunda mabadiliko ya dhana.
translations.hypothesis: Tuna - kutathmini na kuhesabu kile kinachozingatiwa kupitia vigezo mpya za kiuchumi; Fedha - jinsi ya kuwezesha afya kwa wote kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu, si matarajio ya muda mfupi; Utabiri - jinsi ya kuendeleza utabiri wa afya kwa ajili ya umma; Uwezo - jinsi ya kuimarisha uwezo wa serikali ili kufikia afya kwa wote. "Miaka miwili iliyopita, nilomba timu ya wataalamu wa kiuchumi na afya kutoka duniani – ambao ni wanawake – kuunda mabadiliko.

translations.source: Now, instead of health for all being seen as the servant of economic growth, we have a roadmap for structuring economic activity in a way that will allow us to reach the goal of seeing all people with access to essential health services faster with better results,” said Dr Tedros. “Over the past two years, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has worked to craft a new economic narrative – one that transforms financing for health from an expenditure to an investment,” said the Council’s Chair, Professor Mariana Mazzucato. “We have examined the changes needed – including to the structure of patents, public-private partnerships, and budgets – to design an economy that delivers Health for All. In our final report, we call for new economic policy that is not about market fixing but about proactively and collaboratively shaping markets that prioritize human and planetary health.” Launched today in conjunction with the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly, the report, entitled Health for All: Transforming economies to deliver what matters (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), provides a new framework built on the above four pillars, with specific recommendations under each – drawing from the Council’s previous work.
translations.reference: Sasa, badala ya afya kwa wote kuonekana kama mtumishi wa ukuaji wa uchumi, tunao muongozo wa kupanga shughuli za kiuchumi kwa namna ambayo itatuwezesha kufikia lengo la kuona watu wote wanapata huduma muhimu za afya kwa haraka na matokeo bora zaidi", alisema Dk Tedros. "Katika kipindi cha miaka miwili iliyopita, Baraza la WHO la uchumi wa afya kwa wote limefanya kazi kutengeneza simulizi mpya ya kiuchumi- ambayo inabadilisha ufadhili wa afya kutoka kwa matumizi hadi uwekezaji",alisema mwenyekiti wa baraza hilo, profesa Mariana Mazzucato. "Tumechunguza mabadiliko yanayohitajika- ikiwa ni pamoja na muundo wa hati miliki, ushirikiano wa umma na binafsi, na bajeti- kubuni uchumi unaotoa afya kwa wote. Katika ripoti yetu ya mwisho, tunatoa wito wa kuwepo kwa sera mpya ya kiuchumi ambayo si kuhusu urekebishaji wa soko lakini kuhusu kuunda masoko kwa vitendo na kwa ushirikiano ambayo yanatanguliza afya ya binadamu na sayari" Iliyozinduliwa leo kwa ushirikiano na Mkutano wa Sabini na Sita wa Afya Duniani, ripoti hiyo, yenye jina la Afya kwa wote: Kubadilish uchumi ili kutoa mambo muhimu (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), inatoa mfumo mpya uliojengwa juu ya nguzo nne zilizo hapo juu, na mapendekezo mahususi chini ya kila - kutokana na kazi ya awali ya Baraza.
translations.hypothesis: "Sasa, badala ya kuona afya kwa wote kama ni huduma ya maendeleo, tuna mpango wa kuweka shughuli za kiuchumi katika njia ambayo itatusaidia kufikia lengo la kuona watu wote wanaweza kupata huduma muhimu za afya kwa haraka na matokeo bora," alisema Dkt. Tedros. "Katika miaka miwili iliyopita, Baraza la WHO kuhusu Kiuchumi cha Afya kwa Wote, kimekuwa na kazi ya kuunda hadithi mpya ya kiuchumi – ambayo itabadilisha ufadhili wa afya kutoka kwa gharama hadi kwa uwekezaji," alisema Mwenyekaji wa Baraza, Profesa Mariana Mazzucato. "Tumeangalia mabadiliko zinazohitajika – pamoja na mabadiliko katika muundo wa leseni, ushirikiano kati ya sekta za umma na binafsi, na bajeti – ili kuunda uchumi ambao utatoa afya kwa wote. Katika ripoti yetu ya mwisho, tunatoa ombi la sera mpya ya kiuchumi ambayo si kuhusu kurekebisha soko, bali ni kuhusu kuunda soko kwa ushirikiano na kwa utulivu, ambapo afya ya binadamu na ya dunia ni kipaumbele." Ripoti, inayotolewa leo kwa ajili ya Mkutano wa 76 wa Jumuiya ya Afya ya Dunia, inayoelewa "Afya kwa Wote: Kubadilisha uchumi ili kutimiza kipaumbele" (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), inatoa mfumo mpya unaotegemea mitindo minne hapo juu, na mapendekezo maalum kwa kila moja – kwa kutumia kazi iliyopitia na Baraza.

translations.source: Key recommendations include: We need to value and measure the things that truly matter - human and planetary flourishing - rather than pursuing economic growth and GDP maximization regardless of the consequences. To achieve health for all, governments must rethink value and reshape and redirect the economy based on social and planetary well-being, guided by new metrics. A fundamental overhaul of national and international systems for financing health is needed, so that spending on health is treated as a long-term investment. Delivering Health for All will require both more money, and higher quality financing.Innovation requires collective intelligence—it is never the fruit of just one company or government agency. But unless innovation is governed for the common good, many people remain excluded from its benefits.
translations.reference: Mapendekezo muhimu ni pamoja na: Tunahitaji kuthamini na kupima mambo ambayo kweli ni muhimu- binadamu na sayari kustawi- badala ya kutafuta ukuaji wa uchumi na kuongeza pato la taifa bila kujali matokeo. Ili kufikia afya kwa wote, serikali lazima zifikirie upya thamani na kuunda upya na kutekeleza uchumi upya kwa kuzingatia ustawi wa kijamii na sayari, zikiongozwa na metriki mpya. Marekebisho ya kimsingi ya mifumo ya kitaifa na kimataifa ya kufadhili afya inahitajika, ili matumizi ya afya yachukuliwe kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu. Kutoa afya kwa wote kutahitaji pesa zaidi, na ufadhili wa hali ya juu zaidi, uvumbuvi unahitaji akili ya pamoja- kamwe si zao la kampuni moja au wakala wa serikali. Lakini uvumbuzi usipotawaliwa kwa manufaa ya wote, watu wengi husalia kutengwa na manufaa yake.
translations.hypothesis: Mambo muhimu yanayojumuisha: Tunahitaji kuangalia na kuhesabu vitu ambavyo ni muhimu sana - ukuaji wa binadamu na wa dunia - badala ya kuendelea na ukuaji wa kiuchumi na kuongeza الناتج المحلي الإجمالي, bila kujali matokeo. Ili kufikia afya kwa wote, vyama vya serikali lazima kubadilisha mtazamo na kuleta mabadiliko katika uchumi, kwa kuzingatia ustawi wa jamii na wa dunia, kwa kutumia vigezo mpya. Inahitaji mabadiliko makubwa katika mifumo ya kimaisha, ili matumizi ya afya iwe kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu. Kutoa Afya kwa Wote itahitaji fedha zaidi, na pia, ufadhili wa hali ya juu. Uwezo wa ubunifu unahitaji akili ya pamoja - si aina ya kampuni au taasisi ya serikali. Lakini, isipokuwa ubunifu utatumika kwa ajili ya ustawi wa pamoja, watu wengi bado hawapati faida zake.

translations.source: A new end-to-end health innovation ecosystem that prioritises the common good is needed. As the COVID-19 pandemic has made clear, the quality and capacity of government matters. Effective governments are not the smallest, but those that are well-designed and properly resourced, both financially and in terms of their people and infrastructure. Re-investing in government capacity is crucial to delivering Health for All. The report also provides suggestions on what can be done in practice to implement the changes needed to reorient measures of economic value, the financing of health, innovation and building public sector capacity in the service of health for all.
translations.reference: Mfumo mpya wa uvumbuzi wa afya ya mwisho hadi mwisho ambao unatanguliza manufaa ya wote unahitajika. Kama janga la UVIKO-19 limeweka wazi, ubora na uwezo wa mambo ya serikali. Serikali zenye ufanisi zaidi sio ndogo zaidi, lakini zile ambazo zimeundwa vizuri na zenye rasilimali ipasavyo, kifedha na kwa watu wake na miundombinu. Kuwekeza upya katika uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu katika kutoa afya kwa wote. Pia ripoti inatoa mapendekeo juu ya nini kifanyike kwa vitendo ili kutekeleza mabadiliko yanayohitajika ili kutekeleza upya hatua za thamani ya kiuchumi, ufadhili wa afya, uvumbuzi na kujenga uwezo wa sekta ya umma katika huduma ya afya kwa wote.
translations.hypothesis: Mazingira mpya ya ubunifu wa afya, ambayo inaangazia maslahi ya pamoja, ni muhimu. Kama janga la COVID-19 limeonyesha, ubora na uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu. Serikali za ufanisi si ndogo, lakini ndo hizo ambazo zimeundwa vizuri na zina rasilimali, kando na fedha, na pia katika masuala ya watu na miundombinu. Kuwekeza tena katika uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu ili kuhakikisha afya kwa kila mtu. Ripoti hiyo pia inatoa mapendekezo kuhusu jinsi ya kutekeleza mabadiliko zinazohitajika, ili kuboresha uamuzi wa thamani za kiuchumi, ufadhili wa afya, ubunifu, na uendelezaji wa uwezo wa sekta ya umma kwa ajili ya afya kwa kila mtu.

translations.source: Among these, the report mentions several examples, including: The mRNA technology hub facility in South Africa: a values-driven system that tries to get the innovation, financing and capacity right ex-ante; Brazil’s public investment in a health-industrial complex that serves the common good; Regional development banks as enablers of change in the Global South; The Wellbeing Economy Alliance – an alliance of several governments and over 600 other organizations working together to transform economic systems in the service of life;
translations.reference: Kati ya hiyo, ripoti inataja mifano kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na: Kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA nchini Afrika Kusini: Mfumo unaoendeshwa na maadili unaojaribu kupata uvumbuzi, ufadhili na uwezo wa zamani; Uwekezaji wa umma wa Brazili katika sekta ya afya jumuishi inayohudumia manufaa ya wote; Benki za maendeleo za Kikanda kama wawezeshaji wa mabadiliko katika Global South; Muungano wa uchumi wa ustawi- muungano wa serikali kadhaa na zaidi ya mashirika mengine 600 yanayofanya kazi pamoja kubadilisha mifumo ya kiuchumi katika huduma ya maisha;
translations.hypothesis: Miongoni mwa hizi, ripoti zinaeleza mifano kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na: Kitengo cha teknolojia ya mRNA nchini Afrika Kusini: mfumo unaotumia maadili, ambao una juhudi za kuhakikisha ubunifu, ufadhili na uwezo mapema; Uwekezaji wa umma wa Brazil katika complex ya viwanda ya afya, ambayo huendeshwa kwa ajili ya maslahi ya pamoja; Benki za maendeleo za eneo kama viongozi wa mabadiliko katika Jukumu Kusini; Chama cha Maendeleo cha Afya – chama la serikali kadhaa na zaidi ya 600 mashirika, ambazo zinafanya kazi pamoja ili kubadilisha mifumo ya kiuchumi kwa ajili ya maisha.

translations.source: Approaches to financing national action plans (NAPs) on antimicrobial resistance through multi sector joint budgeting, given that most NAPs remain unfunded. The recommendations included in the report could change the way countries view and finance health. WHO calls on policy-makers, civil society, and members of the health and economics communities to give full consideration to the recommendations and use them as a compass to develop new economic policies and structures that can move us along the road to making health for all a reality.
translations.reference: Mbinu za kufadhili mipango ya kitaifa ya utekelezaji (NAPs) juu ya ukinzani wa antimicrobial kupitia bajeti ya pamoja ya sekta nyingi, ikizingatiwa kuwa NAP nyingi bado hazijafadhiliwa. Mapendekezo yaliyojumuishwa katika ripoti yanaweza kubadilisha mtazamo wa nchi na kufadhili afya. WHO inatoa wito kwa watunga sera, jumuia za kirai, na wanachama wa jumuia za afya na uchumi kuzingatia kikamilifu mapendekezo na kuyatumia kama dira kuunda sera mpya za kiuchumi na miundo ambayo inaweza kutusogeza kwenye njia ya kufanya afya kwa wote ni ukweli.
translations.hypothesis: Mbinu za kutoa fedha kwa mipango ya taifa kuhusu uking'wanaji wa dawa, kupitia upangaji wa pamoja wa sekta mbalimbali, kwani mipango nyingi bado hazipatikani fedha. Mapendekezo zilizopo katika ripoti zinaweza kubadilisha jinsi nchi zinavyoona na kutoa fedha kwa afya. Shirika la Afya (WHO) inatoa rai kwa wataalamu wa sera, jamii, na wanachama wa jamii za afya na uchumi, kuwa na umakini kamili kwa mapendekezo na kutumia kama dira katika kuunda sera na miundo mipya ya kiuchumi ambayo yanaweza kutuwezesha kufikia lengo la afya kwa wote.

translations.source: Renowned artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende appointed as WHO Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health WHO is delighted to announce the appointment of internationally acclaimed artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. This prestigious announcement was made as part of WHO's 75th Anniversary commemoration during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly on 22 May 2023. Renée Fleming, one of the most celebrated singers of our time, and Pretty Yende, an extraordinary soprano known for her dazzling performances, have been selected for their artistic achievement and advocacy for improved health outcomes through creative means. On 8 April 2023, Fleming and Yende performed for a special concert titled Healing Arts, dedicated to WHO's 75th anniversary in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Wasanii mashuhuri Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende waliteuliwa kuwa mabalozi wa Nia njema wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya WHO inafuraha kutangaza kuteuliwa kwa wasanii wanaotambulika kimataifa Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende kuwa mabalozi wa Nia njema kwa sanaa na afya. Tangazo hili la kifahari lilitolewa kama sehemu ya maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO wakati wa mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Duniani tarehe 22 Mei 2023. Renee Fleming, mmoja wa waimbaji mashuhuri zaidi wa kizazi kipya, na Pretty Yende, mwanasoprano wa ajabu anaejulikana kwa uimbaji wake wa kuvutia, wamechaguliwa kwa mafanikio yao ya kisanii na utetezi wa matokeo bora ya afya kupitia mbinu za kibunifu. Tarehe 8 Aprili 2023, Fleming na Yende walitumbuiza katika tamasha maalumu lililoitwa Sanaa ya uponyaji, lililoadhimishwa kwa maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO huko Jeniva, Uswizi.
translations.hypothesis: Rivali za sanaa, Renée Fleming na Pretty Yende, wameitwa kuwa Mwakilishi wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya. WHO ina furaha ya kutangaza kuwa, rivali za sanaa Renée Fleming na Pretty Yende, ambao wana utambuli wa kimataifa, wameitwa kuwa Mwakilishi wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya. Tangazo hili muhimu lilitolewa kama sehemu ya maadhimisho ya 75 za WHO wakati wa Mkutano wa Sita wa Dunia wa Afya, tarehe 22 Mei 2023. Renée Fleming, mmoja wa waimbaji maarufu zaidi, na Pretty Yende, soprano mtaalamu anayejulikana kwa uigaji wake, wamechaguliwa kwa ufanisi wao wa sanaa na juhudi zao za kukuza afya kupitia njia za ubunifu. Mnamo 8 Aprili 2023, Fleming na Yende walifanya katika tamasha maalum lililoitwa "Sanaa za Shifa," ambalo lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa lilikuwa translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, said, "WHO is honoured to have Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende join as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. Their unparalleled talent, dedication to the arts, and commitment to advancing health and well-being make them ideal ambassadors for this important cause. Their involvement will inspire individuals, communities and policy-makers to recognize and harness the transformative power of the arts in the pursuit of better health for all. "Fleming brings a wealth of expertise to her new role. She has captivated audiences worldwide with her luminous soprano voice and compelling artistry.
translations.reference: Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO, alisema, "WHO ina heshima kubwa kuwa na Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende kujiunga kama mabalozi wa Nia Njema kwa sanaa na afya. Vipaji vyao visivyo na kifani, kujitolea kwa sanaa, na kujitolea katika kuendeleza afya na ustawi huwafanya kuwa mabalozi bora kwa ajili ya kazi hii muhimu. Ushiriki wao utawatia moyo watu binafsi, jamii na watunga sera kutambua na kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa katika kutafuta afya bora kwa wote. "Fleming analeta ujuzi mwingi kwa jukumu lake jipya. Amevutia hadhira Dunuani kote kwa sauti yake nyororo ya soprano na usanii wa kuvutia.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO, alisema, "WHO ni fahamu kuwa Renée Fleming na Pretty Yende wamejiunga kama Mwakilishi wa Kibali katika sanaa na afya. Talent zao, kujitolea katika sanaa, na dhamira yao ya kuendeleza afya na ustawi, huwafanya kuwa waalikili bora kwa jukumu hili muhimu. Ushiriki wao utawashawishi watu, jamii, na wataalamu kuona na kutumia nguvu ya ubunifu ya sanaa katika kutafuta afya bora kwa wote." Fleming ana utaalamu mkubwa katika jukumu lake jipya. Amewafanya hadhira duniani kote kuwa tayari na sauti yake nzuri na sanaa yake.

translations.source: Beyond her remarkable vocal talent, Fleming has been a fervent advocate for research at the intersection of the arts and health. Her presentations worldwide with scientists and practitioners, her leading role in major initiatives, and her association with WHO demonstrate her commitment to harnessing the transformative power of the arts to better society. "I am elated that the preeminent global health agency is recognizing the powerful impact of the arts in health, and I am deeply honoured to be entrusted to share this message," said Fleming. “Every day, advances in neuroscience and clinical research reveal more about the benefits of arts therapies, experiences, and education, with implications for well-being throughout the human life span. However, we have only just begun to realize the amazing potential of this work, and I look forward to expanding awareness and access as a WHO Goodwill Ambassador.
translations.reference: Zaidi ya kipaji chake cha ajabu cha sauti, Fleming amekuwa mtetezi wa bidii wa utafiti katika makutano wa sanaa na afya. Mawasilisho yake Duniani kote na wanasayansi na watendaji, jukumu lake kuu katika mipango mikuu na ushirikiano wake na WHO unaonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa kwa jamii bora. "Nimefurahi kwamba wakala mkuu wa afya Duniani unatambua athari kubwa ya sanaa katika afya, na nina heshima kubwa kukabidhiwa kushiriki ujumbe huu", Fleming alisema. "Kila siku, maendeleo katika sayansi ya Neva na utafiti wa kimatibabu yanaonyesha zaidi kuhusu manufaa ya matibabu ya sanaa, uzoefu, na elimu, na athari kwa ustawi katika muda wote wa maisha ya Binadamu. Hata hivyo, ndio tumeanza kutambua uwezo wa ajabu wa kazi hii, na nina tazamia kupanua ufahamu na ufikiaji kama balozi wa Nia Njema wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Zaidi ya uwezo wake wa kiakili, Fleming amekuwa mshauri mkakati kuhusu utafiti katika eneo la sanaa na afya. Maonyesho yake duniani kote na wataalamu, jukumu lake muhimu katika mipango kubwa, na uhusiano wake na WHO zinaonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia nguvu za ubunifu za sanaa ili kuboresha jamii. "Najivunia kwamba taasisi muhimu ya afya duniani inagambatia athari kubwa za sanaa katika afya, na najivunia sana kuwa na jukumu la kueneza ujumbe huu," alisema Fleming. "Kila siku, matokeo katika neurosayansi na utafiti wa kliniki zinaonyesha zaidi kuhusu faida za tiba, uzoefu, na elimu za sanaa, na zina maana kwa ustawi katika maisha yote. Hata hivyo, tumeanza kutambua uwezo wa ajabu wa kazi hii, na natarajia kuendeleza ufahamu na ufikiaji kama Mwakilishi wa WHO.

translations.source: "Pretty Yende has mesmerized audiences with her exquisite voice and stunning performances. As a soprano with a deep understanding of the power of music, she has demonstrated her commitment to using her talent to improve society. Yende's passion for sharing the healing aspects of music and her dedication to social causes align perfectly with WHO’s Arts and Health agenda. Yende said, "I am delighted to be appointed a WHO Goodwill Ambassador for Arts and Health. I hope to help establish a foundation for continued investigation into the arts being a fundamental ingredient in improving our physical, mental, and social well-being.
translations.reference: "Pretty Yende ameshangaza watazamaji kwa sauti yake ya kupendeza na maonyesho ya kupendeza. Kama mwanasoprano mwenye uelewa wa kina wa nguvu ya muziki, ameonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia kipaji chake kuboresha jamii. Shauku ya Yende ya kushiriki vipengele vya uponyaji vya muziki na kujitolea kwake kwa masuala ya kijamii yanaendana kikamilifu na ajenda ya sanaa na afya ya WHO. Yende alisema, "Nimefurahi kuteuliwa kuwa balozi wa nia njema wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya. Natumai kusaidia kuanzisha msingi wa uchunguzi unaoendelea kuhusu sanaa kuwa kiungo muhimu katika kuboresha ustawi wetu wa kimwili, kiakili na kijamii.
translations.hypothesis: "Pretty Yende amewafanya hadhiri hadhiri kwa sauti yake nzuri na maonyesho yake. Kama soprano mwenye uelewa wa kina kuhusu nguvu ya muziki, ameweka alama kuhusu kutumia uwezo wake ili kuboresha jamii. Shauku ya Yende ya kushiriki vipengele vinavyorefusha za muziki, na kujitolea kwa masuala ya kijamii, zinalingana kikamilifu na mpango wa WHO kuhusu sanaa na afya. Yende alisema, "Najivunia kuwa msemaji maalumu wa WHO kuhusu sanaa na afya. Natumai kuwa nitasaidia kuanzisha taasisi ambayo itasaidia katika utafiti unaoendelea kuhusu sanaa, ambayo ni mstatili katika kuboresha afya yetu, kimwili, akili, na kijamii."

translations.source: I am grateful to WHO for paving the way for new research and providing their global platform to spread the word and generate research on the connection of arts and health. "I look forward to all the possibilities to do essential work in my native South Africa and globally for a better and healthier tomorrow," added Yende. The appointments of Fleming and Yende underscore the profound link between arts and health. Engagement in creative activities, such as music, art, and dance, positively impacts physical, mental health, social well-being, and overall quality of life. Through their roles as Goodwill Ambassadors, Fleming and Yende will promote the integration of arts into health-care systems, advocate for access to creative arts therapies, and champion the importance of artistic expression in improving health outcomes globally.
translations.reference: Ninaishukuru WHo kwa kuandaa njia ya utafiti mpya na kutoa jukwaa lao la kimataifa la kueneza ujumbe na kuendesha utafiti kuhusu uhusiano wa sanaa na afya. "Nina tazamia uwezekano wote wa kufanya kazi muhimu katika nchi yangu ya asili ya Afrika Kusini na Duniani kote kwa kesho iliyobora na yenye afya", aliongezea Yende. Uteuzi wa Flemingo na Yende unasisitiza uhusiano kati ya sanaa na afya. Kujihusisha katika shughuli za ubunifu, kama vile muziki, sanaa, na densi, huathiri vyema afya ya mwili, akili, ustawi wa jamii na ubora wa maisha kwa ujumla. Kupitia majukumu yao kama mabalozi wa nia njema, Fleming na Yende wanatukuza ujumuishaji wa sanaa katika mifumo ya utunzaji wa afya, kutetea ufikiaji wa matibabu ya sanaa ya ubunifu, na kutetea umuhimu wa kujieleza kwa kisanii katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: Natumai sana WHO kwa kuwaongoza katika utafiti mpya na kutoa jukwaa lao la kimataifa ili kueneza habari na kuendeleza utafiti kuhusu uhusiano kati ya sanaa na afya. "Natarajia fursa nyingi za kufanya kazi muhimu katika nchi yangu, Afrika Kusini, na kimataifa, ili kuwa na maisha bora na afya," aliongeza Yende. Uteuzi wa Fleming na Yende unaonyesha uhusiano wa kina kati ya sanaa na afya. Ushiriki katika shughuli za ubunifu, kama vile muziki, sanaa, na dansi, unaathiri afya ya kimwili, akili, na ustawi wa kijamii, na ujuzi wa kiujumla. Kwa njia zao kama Mwakilishi wa Amali, Fleming na Yende wataendeleza ushirikiano wa sanaa katika mifumo ya huduma za afya, kuunga mkono ufikiaji wa tiba za sanaa, na kuendeleza umuhimu wa uandishi wa sanaa katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya kimataifa.

translations.source: WHO launches global network to detect and prevent infectious disease threats WHO and partners are launching a global network to help protect people from infectious disease threats through the power of pathogen genomics. The International Pathogen Surveillance Network (IPSN) will provide a platform to connect countries and regions, improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples, using these data to drive public health decision-making, and sharing that information more broadly. Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of viruses, bacteria and other disease-causing organisms to understand how infectious they are, how deadly they are, and how they spread.
translations.reference: WHO inazindua mtandao wa kimataifa kwa Kugundua na kuzuia vitisho vya magonjwa ya kuambukiza WHO na washirika wanazindua mtandao wa kimataifa ili kusaidia kulinda watu dhidi ya vitisho vya magonjwa ya Pathogen genomics. Mtandao wa kimataifa wa ufuatiliaji wa pathogen (IPSN) utatoa jukwaa la kuunganisha nchi na kanda, kuboresha mifumo ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli, kwa kutumia data hizi kuendesha maamuzi ya afya ya umma, na kushiriki taarifa hiyo kwa upana zaidi. Pathogen genomics huchanganua kanuni za kijeni za virusi, bakteria, na viumbe vingine vinavyosababisha magonjwa ili kuelewa jinsi vinavyoambukiza, ni hatari kiasi gani, na jinsi gani wanavyoenea.
translations.hypothesis: WHO inaanzisha mtandao wa kimataifa ili kutambua na kuzuia hatari za magonjwa hatari WHO na washiriki wanaanzisha mtandao wa kimataifa ili kusaidia kulinda watu kutoka hatari za magonjwa hatari kupitia nguvu za geneti za vijini. Mtandao wa Kimataifa wa Ufuatiliaji wa Vijini (IPSN) utatoa jukwaa la kuunganisha nchi na maeneo, kuboresha mifumo ya kukusanya na kupima sampuli, kutumia data hii kuendesha maamuzi ya afya, na kushiriki taarifa hizo kwa ujumla. Geneti za vijini huanalisiswa ili kutambua jinsi magonjwa yanavyoambukiza, jinsi yanavyo, na jinsi yanavyoenea.

translations.source: With this information, scientists and public health officials can identify and track diseases to prevent and respond to outbreaks as part of a broader disease surveillance system, and to develop treatments and vaccines. The IPSN, with a Secretariat hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, brings together experts worldwide at the cutting-edge of genomics and data analytics, from governments, philanthropic foundations, multilateral organizations, civil society, academia and the private sector. All share a common goal: to detect and respond to disease threats before they become epidemics and pandemics, and to optimize routine disease surveillance. The goal of this new network is ambitious, but it can also play a vital role in health security: to give every country access to pathogen genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health system,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “As was so clearly demonstrated to us during the COVID-19 pandemic, the world is stronger when it stands together to fight shared health threats.”
translations.reference: Kwa taarifa hii, wanasayansina maafisa wa afya ya umma wanaweza kutambua na kufuatilia magonjwa ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na milipuko kama sehemu ya mfumo mpana wa ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa, na kutengeneza matibabu na chanjo. IPSN, pamoja na sekretarieti inayosimamiwa na kitovu cha WHO cha ufuatiliaji wa majanga na magonjwa ya mlipuko, inaleta pamoja wataalamu Duniani kote katika makali ya genomics ya uchunguzi wa Data, kutoka serikalini, taasisi za wahisani, mashirika ya kimataifa, mashirika ya kiraia, wasomi na sekta binafsi. Wote wana lengo moja: Kugundua na kukabiliana na matishio ya magonjwa kabla hayajawa majanga na magonjwa ya mlipuko, na kuboresha ufuatiliaji wa mara kwa mara wa magonjwa. Lengo la mtandao huu mpya ni dhabiti, lakini pia linaweza kuchukua jukumu muhimu katika usalama wa afya: kutoa kila nchi ufikiaji wa mpangilio na uchanganuzi wa Pathogen genomic kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa afya ya umma", alisema mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO DK Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Kama ilivyonyeshwa wazi kwetu wakati wa janga la UVIKO-19, ulimwengu unakuwa na nguvu wakati unasimama pamoja kupigana na matishio ya kiafya pamoja"
translations.hypothesis: Pamoja na taarifa hizi, wataalamu na maafisa wa afya za umma wanaweza kutambua na kufuatilia magonjwa ili kuzuia na kujibu hatua, kama sehemu ya mfumo wa kina wawachungaji magonjwa, na kuendeleza matibabu na chanjo. IPSN, ambayo ina mamlaka inayoshughulikiwa na Kitengo cha WHO cha Utafiti wa Janga na Magonjwa, inaunganisha wataalamu kutoka duniani kote katika eneo la genomics na uchambuzi wa data, kutoka vyama vya serikali, mashirika ya kiraia, mashirika ya kimataifa, taasisi za kitaaluma na sekta binafsi. Wote wana lengo moja: kutambua na kujibu hatari za magonjwa kabla ya kuwa magonjwa na janga, na kuboreshawachungaji wa magonjwa. Lengo la mtandao huu mpya ni kubwa, lakini pia linaweza kucheza jukumu muhimu katika usalama wa afya: "Kutoa kila nchi ufikiaji wa utambuzi wa genomic na uchambuzi wa pathogens kama sehemu ya mfumo wao wa afya," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Kama ilivyoelezeka wazi wakati wa janga la COVID-19, dunia ni nguvu zaidi wakati inashirikiana kupigana na hatari za afya za pamoja."

translations.source: COVID-19 highlighted the critical role pathogen genomics plays in responding to pandemic threats. Without the rapid sequencing of the SARS-COV-2 genome, vaccines would not have been as effective, or have been made available so quickly. New, more transmissible variants of the virus would not have been as quickly identified. Genomics lies at the heart of effective epidemic and pandemic preparedness and response, as well as part of the ongoing surveillance of a vast range of diseases, from foodborne diseases and influenza to tuberculosis and HIV. Its use in monitoring the spread of HIV drug resistance, for example, has led to antiretroviral regimes that have saved countless lives.
translations.reference: UVIKO-19 ilionyesha jukumu muhimu la Pathogen genomics katika kukabiliana na vitisho vya janga. Bila mpangilio wa haraka wa jenomu ya SARS-COV-2, chanjo hazingekuwa na ufanisi, au zingepatikana kwa haraka sana. Aina mpya, zinaweza kuambukizwa zaidi za virusi haingetambuliwa haraka. Genomics iko katika kiini cha janaga na utayari wa janga na muitikio mzuri, vilevile sehemu ya ufuatiliaji unaoendelea wa anuwai ya magonjwa, kutoka kwa magonjwa yanayosababishwa na chakula na mafua na kifua kikuu na VVU. Matumizi yake katika kufuatilia ueneaji wa ukinzani wa dawa za VVU, kwa mfano, imesababisha muda wa kurefusha maisha ambazo zimeokoa maisha mengi.
translations.hypothesis: COVID-19 ilionyesha umuhimu wa geneti ya patogeni katika kujibu hatari za janga. Bila utambuzi wa haraka wa genome la SARS-COV-2, chanjo hazingeweza kuwa na ufanisi, au kuwezekana kuzalishwa kwa haraka. Mabadiliko mapya na hatari zaidi ya virusi hazingeweza kutambuliwa kwa haraka. Geneti ni muhimu katika maandalizi na majibu ya ugonjwa, pamoja na ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa mengi, kuanzia magonjwa yanayosababishwa na chakula hadi mafua na ugonjwa wa HIV. Matumizi yake katika kufuatilia ulemavu wa dawa za HIV, kwa mfano, imeongoza kwenye tiba za dawa ambazo zimekuwa na maisha mengi.

translations.source: “Global collaboration in pathogen genomic surveillance has been critical as the world fights COVID-19 together,” said Dr Rajiv J. Shah, President of The Rockefeller Foundation. “IPSN builds upon this experience by creating a strong platform for partners across sectors and borders to share knowledge, tools, and practices to ensure that pandemic prevention and response is innovative and robust in the future.” Despite recent scale-up in genomics capacity in countries as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, many still lack effective systems for collecting and analyzing samples or using those data to drive public health decision-making. There is not enough sharing of data, practices, and innovations to build a robust global health surveillance architecture. Budgets that soared during the pandemic, allowing a rapid build-up of capabilities, are now being slashed, even in the wealthiest countries.
translations.reference: "Ushirikiano wa kimataifa katika uchunguzi wa Pathogen genomics umekuwa muhimu wakati ulimwengu unapambana na UVIKO-19 pamoja", alisema Dk Rajiv J. Shah, Rais wa wakfu wa Rockefeller. "IPSN inajenga juu ya uzoefu huu kwa kuunda jukwaa thabiti kwa washirika katika sekta na mipaka ili kubadilishana maarifa, zana na mazoea ili kuhakikisha kuwa kuzuia na kukabiliana na janga ni ubunifu na thabiti katika siku zijazo". Licha ya kuongezeka kwa hivi karibuni kwa uwezo wa jeni katika nchi kutokana na janga la UVIKO-19, nyingi bado hazina mifumo madhubuti ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli au kutumi data hizo kuendesha maamuzi ya afya ya umma. Hakuna ushiriki wa kutosha wa data, mazoea, na ubunifu ili kujenga usanifu thabiti wa ufuatiliaji wa afya Duniani. Bajeti ambazo zilipanda wakati wa janga hilo, na kuruhusu ujanibishaji wa haraka wa uwezo, sasa zinapunguzwa, hata katika nchi tajiri zaidi.
translations.hypothesis: “Ushirikiano wa kimataifa katika utunzaji wa jeni za pathogens umekuwa muhimu, kwani dunia inajitahidi pamoja dhidi ya COVID-19,” alisema Dkt. Rajiv J. Shah, Rais wa Taasisi ya Rockefeller. “IPSN inaendeleza uzo huu kwa kuunda jukwaa imara kwa washiriki katika sekta mbalimbali na mipaka, ili kushiriki maarifa, zana, na mbinu, ili kuhakikisha kuwa usalama na majibu ya janga yanakuwa yenye ubunifu na imara katika siku zijazo.” Ingawa kuna ongezeko la hivi majuzi katika uwezo wa genomics katika nchi, matokeo ya janga la COVID-19, bado wengi bado hawana mifumo bora za kukusanya na kupima sampuli, au kutumia data hiyo ili kuendesha maamuzi ya afya ya umma. Hakuna ushirikiano wa kutosha wa data, mbinu, na ubunifu ili kujenga mfumo imara wa utunzaji wa kimataifa. Bajeti ambazo ziliongezeka wakati wa janga, na ziliwapa uwezo wa haraka, sasa zinaangamia, hata katika nchi za kaya.

translations.source: “Argentina is deeply invested in building our own country capacity in pathogen genomics and the capacity of other countries,” said Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. “Diseases do not respect borders: a disease threat in one country is also a threat to others. We look forward to collaborating with IPSN members to achieve our common goal of preventing illness and saving lives.” The IPSN will tackle these challenges through a global network, connecting geographies and disease-specific networks, to build a collaborative system to better detect, prevent and respond to disease threats. Members will work together in dedicated groups focusing on specific challenges, supported by funding through the IPSN to scale-up ideas and projects in pathogen genomics.
translations.reference: "Argentina imewekeza sana katika kujenga uwezo wa nchi yetu katika Pathogen genomics na uwezo wa nchi nyingine", alisema Josefina Campos, mkurugenzi wa kituo cha kitaifa cha Genomics na Bioinformatics katika ANLIS Malbr, Argentina. "Magonjwa hayaheshimu mipaka: Tishio la ugonjwa katika nchi moja pia ni tishio kwa nchi nyingine. Tunatazamia kushirikiana na wanchama wa IPSN kufikia lengo letu la pamoja la kuzuia magonjwa na kuokoa maisha" IPSN itakabiliana na changamoto hizi kupitia mtandao wa kimataifa, unaounganisha jografia na mitandao mahususi ya magonjwa, ili kujenga mfumo shirikishi wa kutambua vyema, kuzuia na kukabiliana na vitisho vya magonjwa. Wanachama watafanya kazi pamoja katika vikundi vilivyojitolea vinavyozingatia changamoto maalumu, zinazoungwa mkono na ufadhili kupitia IPSN ili kuongeza mawazo na miradi katika Pathogen genomics.
translations.hypothesis: “Argentina ina umakini mkubwa katika kujenga uwezo wa nchi yetu katika genomics ya pathogens na uwezo wa nchi zingine,” alisema Josefina Campos, Mkurugenzi wa Kituo cha Kimataifa cha Genomics na Bioinformatiki (ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina). “Ugonjwa hawazui mipaka: hatari ya ugonjwa katika nchi moja ni hatari pia kwa nchi zingine. Tunatarajia kushirikiana na wanachama wa IPSN ili kufikia lengo letu la pamoja la kuzuia magonjwa na kuokoa maisha.” IPSN itashughulikia changamoto hizi kupitia mtandao wa kimataifa, kwa kuunganisha maeneo na mitandao maalum ya magonjwa, ili kujenga mfumo wa ushirikiano wa bora zaidi katika utambuzi, kuzuia, na majibu ya hatari za magonjwa. Wanachama watashirikiana katika makundi maalum, kwa kuzingatia changamoto maalum, na kupata usaidizi kupitia IPSN ili kuendeleza mawazo na miradi katika genomics ya pathogens.

translations.source: By connecting countries, regions, and wider stakeholders, the IPSN will help to increase critical capacity, amplify regional and country-level voices, and strengthen their priorities. About the IPSN launch The IPSN will be formally launched on the sidelines of the World Health Assembly in Geneva. The launch event takes place on 20 May 2023, 17:00 – 19:30h (CET) in the InterContinental Geneva, and is open to media. It includes keynote speeches from:
translations.reference: Kwa kuunganisha nchi, kanda, na washikadau wengi zaidi, IPSN itasaidia kuongeza uwezo muhimu, kukuza sauti za kikanda na ngazi ya nchi, na kuimarisha vipaumbele vyao. Kuhusu uzinduzi wa IPSN IPSN itazinduliwa rasmi kando ya mkutano wa afya Duniani huko Jeniva. Tukio la uzinduzi litafanyika tarehe 20 Mei 2023, 17:00 - 19:00 (CET) katika intakontinento Jeniva, na upo wazi kwa vyombo vya havbari. Inajumuisha hotuba kuu kutoka:
translations.hypothesis: Kwa kuunganisha nchi,eneo, na wadau wengine, IPSN itasaidia kuongeza uwezo muhimu, kuongeza sauti za eneo na nchi, na kuimarisha kipaumbele zao. kuhusu uzinduzi wa IPSN IPSN itazinduliwa rasmi wakati wa Mkutano wa Dunia wa Afya katika Geneva. Tukio la uzinduzi litafanyika tarehe 20 Mei 2023, saa 17:00 – 19:30 (CET) katika InterContinental Geneva, na ni wazi kwa vyombo vya habari. Inajumuisha hotuba muhimu kutoka:

translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General, World Health Organization; Dr Mike Ryan, Executive Director, WHO Health Emergencies Programme; and Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu, Assistant Director-General, World Health Organization, Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence. There will also be a panel with high-level speakers from Member State and IPSN funders, including; Dame Jenny Harries, Chief Executive, UK Health Security Agency;
translations.reference: Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugeni mkuu, shirika la afya Duniani; DK Mike Ryan, mkurugenzi mtendaji, mpango wa dharura wa afya wa WHO; na Dk Chikwe Ihekweazu, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi, shirika la afya Duniani, kitovu cha ujsusi wa majanga na magonjwa. Pia kutakuwa na jopo lenye wazungumzaji wa ngazi ya juu kutoka kwa wafadhili wa nchi wanachama na IPSN, wakiwemo; Dame Jenny Harries, mkurugenzi mtendaji, shirika la usalama wa afya la Uingereza;
translations.hypothesis: Dato Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu, Shirika la Afya Duniani; Dk Mike Ryan, Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Programu ya Majilizi ya Afya ya WHO; na Dk Chikwe Ihekweazu, Mshiriki wa Katibu Mkuu, Shirika la Afya Duniani, Kitengo cha Habari kuhusu Janga na Tiba. Pia, kuna tume ambayo itajumuisha wataalamu kutoka kwa mataifa wanachama na wadau wa IPSN, pamoja na; Dame Jenny Harries, Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Shirika la Usalama wa Afya la Uingereza;

translations.source: Dr Jean Kaseya, Director-General, Africa Centers for Disease Control and Prevention; Dr Naveen Rao, Senior Vice President, Rockefeller Foundation; Dr Alexander Pym, Director of Infectious Disease, Wellcome Trust; Professor Tulio de Oliveira, Director, Centre for Epidemiology at Stellenbosch University, South Africa; Björn Kümmel, Deputy Head of Unit, Global Health, Federal Ministry of Health, Germany;
translations.reference: Dk Jean Kaseya, mkurugenzi mkuu, vituo vya Afrika vya kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa; Dk Naveen Rao, makamu wa Rais muandamizi,wakfu wa Rockefeller Dk Alexander Pym, mkurugenzi wa magonjwa ya kuambukiza, Wellcome Trust; Profesa Tulio de Oliveira, mkurugenzi, kitivo cha Epidemiolojia katika chuo kikuu cha Stellenbosch, Afrika Kusini; Bjorn Kummel, naibu mkuu wa kitengo, afya ulimwenguni, wizara ya afya ya ushirikiano, Ujerumani;
translations.hypothesis: Dato Jean Kaseya, Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Taasisi za Afya za Afrika; Dk Naveen Rao, Afisa Mkuu, Foundation ya Rockefeller; Dk Alexander Pym, Mkurugenzi wa Tiba za Vimbe, Trust ya Wellcome; Profesa Tulio de Oliveira, Mkurugenzi, Kituo cha Ugonjwa katika Chuo Kikuu cha Stellenbosch, Afrika Kusini; Björn Kümmel, Mshiriki Mkuu, Kitengo cha Afya ya Kimataifa, Wizara ya Afya ya Kitaifa, Ujerumani;

translations.source: Professor Leo Yee Sin, Executive Director of the National Centre for Infectious Diseases; Singapore; Dr Mario Moreira, President, Fiocruz, Brazil; and Dr Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. The event will take place in a hybrid format, providing an opportunity for IPSN members and broader audiences to engage with the IPSN and its activities. About the IPSNThe IPSN is a new global network of pathogen genomic actors, hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, to accelerate progress on the deployment of pathogen genomics and improve public health decision-making.
translations.reference: Profesa Leo Yee Sin, mkurugenzi mtendaji wa kituo cha kitaifa cha magonjwa ya kuambukiza; Singapore; Dk Mario Moreira, Rais, Fiocruz, Brazili; na Dk Josefina Campos, mkurugenzi wa kituo cha kitaifa cha Genomics na Bioinformatics katika ANLIS Malbr, Argentina. Tukio litafanyika katika umbo la mseto, likitoa fursa kwa wanachama wa IPSN na hadhira kubwa zaidi kujihusisha na IPSN na shughuli zake. Kuhusu IPSN, IPSN ni mtandao mpya wa kimataifa wa wahusika wa Pathogen genomis, unaoandaliwa na kituo cha ujasusi cha WHO cha magonjwa na milipuko, ili kuharakisha maendeleo ya uwekaji wa Pathogen genomics na kuboresha maamuzi ya afya ya umma.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Leo Yee Sin, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Kituo Maarufu cha Ugonjwa, Singapori; Dkt. Mario Moreira, Rais wa Fiocruz, Brazil; na Dkt. Josefina Campos, Mkurugenzi wa Kituo Maarufu cha Genomiki na Bioinformatiki katika ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina.  Tukio litafanyika katika mtindo wa pamoja, ambao utatoa fursa kwa wanachama wa IPSN na hadhira kubwa kushiriki na IPSN na shughuli zake.  Kuhusu IPSN IPSN ni mtandao mpya wa kimataifa wa wataalamu wa genomiki ya pathogens, ambapo WHO Hub kwa Ujuzi wa Dini na Tiba, ili kuharakisha maendeleo katika matumizi ya genomiki ya pathogens na kuboresha uamuzi wa afya ya umma.

translations.source: The IPSN envisions a world where every country has equitable access to sustained capacity for genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health surveillance system. It sets out to create a mutually supportive global network of genomic surveillance actors that amplifies and accelerates the work of its members to improve access and equity. The IPSN consists of three main operational bodies that bring together different sets of stakeholders, supported by a Secretariat at the WHO Pandemic Hub. Partners collaborate in Communities of Practice (COPs) to solve common challenges, aiming to increase harmonization and innovation in pathogen genomics. In the Country Scale-Up Accelerator (CSUA), stakeholders work together to align efforts and enable South-South exchange to scale-up country capacity building.
translations.reference: IPSN inatazamia ulimwengu ambapo kila nchi ina ufikiaji sawa na uwezo endelevu wa mpangilio wa jeni na uchanganuzi kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa ufuatiliaji wa afya ya umma. Inasaidia kuunda mtandao wa kimataifa unaosaidia na watendaji wa ufuatiliaji wa jeni ambao huongeza na kuharakisha kazi ya wanachama wake ili kuboresha ufikiaji na usawa. IPSN ina mashirika makuu matatu ya utendaji mbayo yanaleta pamoja seti tofauti za washikadau, wakiungwa mkono na sekretarieti katika kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO. Washirika hushirikiana katika jumuia za mazoezi (COPs) kutatua changamoto zinazofanana, zinazolenga kuongeza upatanishi na uvumbuzi katika Pathogen genomis. Katika kiharakisha cha kuongeza kasi ya nchi (CSUA), Wadau wanafanya kazi pamoja ili kuoanisha juhudi na kuwezesha ubadilishanaji wa kusini-kusini ili kuongeza uwezo wa nchi.
translations.hypothesis: IPSN ina lengo la dunia ambapo kila nchi ina ufikiaji sawa wa uwezo wa kuandalia na uchambuzi wa genome kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wawachungaji wa afya. Lengo lake ni kuunda mtandao wa kimataifa ambao unaunga mkono, ambao unaunga mkono na haraka kazi za wanachama wake ili kuboresha ufikiaji na usawa. IPSN ina vyombo vyote tatu vya utendaji, ambavyo huunganisha wadau mbalimbali, na ina usaidizi wa Sekreteria katika Kituo cha Janga la WHO. Washiriki wanaunga mkono katika Kundi la Mazoezi (COPs) ili kutatua changamoto za kawaida, na lengo lao ni kuongeza usawazishaji na ubunifu katika genomics ya pathogens. Katika Accelerator ya Kanda (CSUA), wadau wanaunga mkono ili kuwezesha ubadilishi kati ya nchi, ili kuboresha uwezo wa nchi.

translations.source: The COP and CSUA bring together organizations from across sectors, income levels, and geographies, with a commitment to international cooperation and equity, and deep expertise in either genomics or country scale-up of surveillance systems. The third body is the Funders Forum to coordinate philanthropic, multi-lateral and governmental donors around increased political attention and financing efficiency of pathogen genomic surveillance. The Funders Forum also catalyses additional grant funding for projects of IPSN members. The establishment of the IPSN has been supported by German government funding to the WHO Pandemic Hub. About the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence
translations.reference: COP na CSUA huleta pamoja mashirika kutoka sekta mbalimbali, viwango vya mapato, na jografia, kwa kujitolea kwa ushirikiano wa kimataifa na usawa, na utaalamu wa kina katika aidha genomics au upanuzi wa mifumo ya ufuatiliaji wa nchi. Chombo cha tatu ni jukwaa la wafadhili kuratibu wafadhili wahisani, wa pande nyingi na wa kiserikali kuhusu kuongezeka kwa umakini wa kisiasa na ufanisi wa ufadhili wa uchunguzi wa Pathogen genomics. Pia jukwaa la wafadhili huchochea ufadhili wa ziada wa ruzuku kwa miradi ya wanachama wa IPSN. Uanzishaji wa IPSN umeungwa mkono na ufadhili wa serikali ya Ujerumani kwa kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO. Kuhusu kituo cha WHO cha ujasusi wa ugonjwa na mlipuko
translations.hypothesis: COP na CSUA huunganisha mashirika kutoka katika sekta mbalimbali, viwango vya kipato, na maeneo, na dhamira ya ushirikiano wa kimataifa na usawa, pamoja na utaalam wa kina katika au uboreshaji wa mfumo wa utambuzi kwa viwango vya taifa. Mfumo wa tatu ni Forum la Wadau, ambapo watoaji fedha, wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa, na vyombo vya serikali wanaunganishwa ili kuendeleza ushirikiano na ufanisi wa fedha katika utambuzi wa jeni wa pathogens. Forum la Wadau pia husaidia kupata rasilimali za ziada kwa miradi za wanachama wa IPSN. Uanzishaji wa IPSN umepewa msaada na ufadhili wa serikali ya Ujerumani kwa Kitengo cha WHO kuhusu Janga na Utafutaji wa Tiba. kuhusu Kitengo cha WHO kuhusu Janga na Utafutaji wa Tiba

translations.source: Forming part of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence (the WHO Pandemic Hub), facilitates a global collaboration of partners from multiple sectors that supports countries and stakeholders to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, better analytical capacities, and better tools and insights for decision-making. With support from the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, the WHO Pandemic Hub was established in September 2021 in Berlin, in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, which demonstrated weaknesses around the world in how countries detect, monitor and manage public health threats. The WHO Pandemic Hub works closely with Member States and WHO regional and country offices to strengthen their data-sharing capacities and enable partners from around the world to collaborate and co-create tools to gather and analyse data for early warning surveillance. With a presence in more than 150 countries, six regional offices, and its Geneva headquarters, WHO’s reach gives us the ability to treat pandemic, epidemic and public health risks with equal urgency and diligence around the globe. By linking local, regional, and global initiatives, the WHO Pandemic Hub fosters a collaborative environment for innovators, scientists and experts from across a wide spectrum of disciplines, allowing us to leverage and share cutting-edge technology and anchoring our work in the needs of stakeholders around the world.
translations.reference: Kama sehemu ya mpango wa dharura wa afya wa WHO, kitovu cha ujasusi wa ugonjwa na milipuko (kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO), huwezesha ushirikiano wa kimataifa wa washirika katika sekta nyingi ambazo zinasaidia nchi na wadau kushughulikia hatari za majanga na magonjw ya siku zijazo kwa ufikiaji bora wa data, uwezo bora wa uchanganuzi, na zana bora na maarifa ya kufanya maamuzi. Kw msaada wa serikali ya shirikisho la Ujerumani, kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO kilianzishwa mnamo Septemba 2021 huko Belini, ili kukabiliana na janga la UVIKO-19, ambalo linaonyesha udhaifu kote ulimwenguni katika jinsi nchi hugundua, kufuatilia na kudhibiti vitisho vya afya ya umma. KItuo cha magonjwa cha WHO kinafaya kazi kwa karibu na nchi wanachama na ofisi za WHO za kikanda na nchiili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa kushiriki data na kuwawezesha washirika kutoka kutoka Duniani kote kushirikiana na kuunda zana za kukusanya na kuchambua data kwa ajili ya ufuatiliaji wa onyo la mapema. Ikiwa na uwepo katika zaidi ya nchi 150, ofisi sita za kikanda, na makao yake makuu ya Jeniva, ufikisji wa WHO hutupatia uwezo wa kutibu hatari za janga, mlipuko na afya ya umma kwa haraka na bidii sawa kote ulimwenguni. Kwa kuunganisha mipango ya nchi, kikanda na kimataifa, kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO kinakuza mazingira shirikishi kwa wavumbuzi, wanasayansi na wataalamu kutoka katika nyanja mbalimbali za taaluma, na kuturuhusu kuimarisha na kushiriki teknolojia ya kisasa na kuimarisha kazi yetu katika mahitaji wa wadau Duniani kote.
translations.hypothesis: Ikifanya sehemu ya Programu ya Majeraha ya Afya ya WHO, Kitengo cha WHO cha Utafiti wa Majeraha na Tiba (Kitengo cha WHO cha Majeraha), hurahisisha ushirikiano wa kimataifa wa washiriki kutoka katika sekta mbalimbali, ambapo inaunga mkono nchi na washiriki kushughulikia hatari za baadaye za majeraha na magonjwa, kwa kupata taarifa bora, uwezo bora wa uchambuzi, na zana na ufahamu bora kwa uamuzi. Pamoja na usaidizi kutoka serikali ya Jamhuri ya Kitaifa ya Ujerumani, Kitengo cha WHO cha Majeraha kianzishwa mnamo Septemba 2021 huko Berlin, kama jibu kwa janga la COVID-19, ambalo ilionyesha udhaifu katika nchi kote katika jinsi ambavyo nchi hufuatilia, kufuatilia, na kudhibiti hatari za afya ya umma. Kitengo cha WHO cha Majeraha kinafanya kazi kwa karibu na mataifa wanachama na ofisi za eneo na nchi za WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa ushirikiano na kuwezesha washiriki kutoka kote ulimwenguni kushirikiana na kuunda zana pamoja ili kukusanya na kuchambua taarifa kwa utambuzi mapema. Pamoja na uwepo katika zaidi ya nchi 150, ofisi za eneo sita, na ofisi yake kuu huko Geneva, uwezo wa WHO unaweza kutuwezesha kushughulikia hatari za majeraha, magonjwa, na afya ya umma kwa umuhimu na bidii kote ulimwenguni. Kwa kuunganisha matarajio ya ndani, ya eneo, na ya kimataifa, Kitengo cha WHO cha Majeraha kinaendeleza mazingira ya ushirikiano kwa waundaji, wanasayansi, na wataalamu kutoka katika masafa mbalimbali, na hivyo kutuwezesha kutumia na kushiriki teknolojia ya hali ya juu, na kuweka kazi yetu katika mahitaji ya washiriki kote ulimwenguni.

translations.source: Building on expertise across disciplines, sectors, and regions, it will leverage WHO’s convening power to foster global solutions built on an architecture of global collaboration and trust.
translations.reference: Ikijengwa juu ya utaalamu katika taaluma, sekta, na kanda, itaongeza nguvu ya kuitisha ya WHO kukuza masuluhisho ya kimataifa yaliyojengwa juu ya usanifu wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa na uaminifu.
translations.hypothesis: Kutumia uzoefu katika fani, sekta, naeneo mbalimbali, itatumia nguvu ya WHO kuendeleza suluhisho za kimataifa, ambazo zitobuniwa kwa mbinu za ushirikiano na imani ya kimataifa.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly to focus on “saving lives, driving health for all” as WHO turns 75 As the world faces ongoing health and humanitarian emergencies, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly will focus on driving forward health for all. This year’s session of the World Health Assembly will determine the immediate and longer-term future of WHO, starting with the program budget for the next two years, key decisions about the sustainable financing of the Organization and changes put in place to improve WHO’s processes and accountability. Delegates will also deliberate about the critical role that WHO has in the Global Health Emergency Architecture. The backdrop to these issues is the organization’s 75th anniversary, with the highlights of its collective global health achievements since WHO’s creation in 1948.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Ulimwenguni kuangazia "Kuokoa maisha, kutoa afya kwa wote" wakati WHO inatimiza miaka 75 Wakati Dunia inakabiliwa na dharura zinazoendelea za afya na Kibinadamu, mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Duniani utazingatia kuendeleza afya kwa wote. Kikao cha mwaka huu cha baraza la afya Duniani kitaamua mustakabali wa haraka na wa muda mrefu wa WHO, kuanzia bajeti ya programu kwa miaka miwili ijayo, maamuzi muhimu kuhusu ufadhili endelevu wa shirika hilo na mabadiliko yaliwekwa ili kuboresha michakato ya WHO na uwajibikaji. Pia wajumbe watajadili kuhusu jukumu muhimu ambalo WHO inalo katika usanifu wa dharura wa afya ya Ulimwengu. Msingi wa masuala haya ni maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya shirika hilo, pamoja na mambo muhimu ya mafanikio yake ya pamoja ya afya Duniani tangu kuundwa kwa WHO mwaka 1948.
translations.hypothesis: Kamati ya Sita ya Dunia kuhusu Afya itazingatia "kuokoa maisha, na kuendeleza afya kwa wote" wakati WHO ina maadhimisho ya 75. Katika enzi ambayo dunia inakumbana na majanga ya kiafya na ya kiraia, Kamati ya Sita ya Dunia kuhusu Afya itazingatia kuendeleza afya kwa wote. Mkutano wa mwaka huu wa Kamati ya Dunia kuhusu Afya utamweleza kuhusu maisha na maendeleo ya WHO, kuanzia bajeti ya programu kwa miaka miwili ijayo, maamuzi muhimu kuhusu uendeshaji endelevu wa taasisi, na mabadiliko zilizowekwa ili kuboresha mchakato na uwajibikaji wa WHO. Mwakilishi pia watad fikiria kuhusu jukumu muhimu ambalo WHO ina katika muundo wa majanga ya kiafya ya kimataifa. Mada hizi zimezungukwa na maadhimisho ya 75 za taasisi, pamoja na matumizi yake ya pamoja katika afya ya kimataifa tangu WHO ilianzishwa mwaka wa 1948.
