translations.source: It will review last year’s progress, accomplishments and challenges along with future priorities across the key pillars of WHO’s work: Universal Health Coverage, Emergencies, Promoting Health and Well-being. WHA76 will convene 21-30 May at the Palais des Nations in Geneva. “As we mark WHO’s 75th anniversary, we can be proud of our past achievements, but we must be mindful of lessons learned, as we transition from the emergency phase of COVID-19, and create a future where every person has access to the health services they need,” said Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “This means strengthening the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response and resilience, supporting countries on the road to universal health coverage, and building a stronger, sustainably-funded and accountable WHO. "To kickstart WHA76 on Sunday 21 May, the fourth edition of Walk the Talk: Health for All challenge will start at Place des Nations at 8:30 am CEST (warm-up starts at 7:30 am CEST), to promote physical and mental health and celebrate the importance of partnership during the WHO’s 75th anniversary.
translations.reference: Itakagua maendeleo ya mwaka jana, mafanikio na changamoto pamoja na vipaumbele vya siku zijazo katika nguzo muhimu za kazi za WHO: Huduma ya afya kwa wote, dharura, kukuza afya na ustawi. WHA 76 utafanyika tarehe 21-30 Mei katika Palais des Nations huko Jeniva. "Tunapoadhimisha miaka 75 ya WHO, tunaweza kujivunia mafanikio yetu ya zamani, lakini lazima tuzingatie mafunzo tuliyojifunza, tunapohama kutoka awamu ya dharura ya UVIKO-19, na kuunda mustakabali ambapo kila mtu anaweza kupata huduma za afya wanazostahitaji", alisema mkurugenzi mkuu Dkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Hii ina maanisha kuimarisha usanifu wa kimataifa wa maandalizi ya dharura ya afya, muitikio na ustahimilivu, kusaidia nchi kwenye njia ya kufikia huduma ya afya kwa wote, na kujenga WHO yenye nguvu, inayofadhiliwa na kuwajibika. Ili kuanza WHA 76 siku ya Jumapili 21 Mei, toleo la nne la Walk the Talk: Afya kwa changamoto zote litaanza Place des Nations saa 8:30 asubuhi CEST (maandalizi huanza saa 7:30 asubuhi CEST), ili kukuza afya ya mwili na akili na kusherehekea umuhimu wa ushirikiano wakati wa maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Mtu atafafanua maendeleo, mafanikio na changamoto za mwaka jana, pamoja na mapendere za baadaye katika maslahi muhimu ya kazi ya WHO: Huduma za Afya za Kiafya, Majanga, Uendelezaji wa Afya na Afya. WHA76 itafanyika mnamo 21-30 Mei katika Palais des Nations huko Geneva. "Huku tunafanya maadhimisho ya 75 za WHO, tunaweza kuwa fahamu kwa mafanikio yetu, lakini lazima tuwe na akili kuhusu masomo tuliyosoma, huku tunapopungua kutoka katika hatua ya dharura ya COVID-19, na kuunda mustakabali ambapo kila mtu anaweza kupata huduma za afya ambazo wanahitaji," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Hii inamaanisha kuimarisha muundo wa kimataifa wa tathmini, majibu na uendelevu wa majanga za afya, kusaidia nchi katika njia ya kufikia huduma za afya za kiafya, na kujenga WHO yenye nguvu, inayolipwa, na inayoweza kuhesabika. Ili kuanza WHA76 siku ya Jumamosi, 21 Mei, toleo la nne la "Walk the Talk: Health for All" litaanza katika Place des Nations saa 8:30 asubuhi CEST (mazoezi yanaanza saa 7:30 asubuhi CEST), ili kukuza afya ya kimwili na akili, na kusherehekea umuhimu wa ushirikiano wakati wa maadhimisho ya 75 za WHO.

translations.source: At about 2:00 pm CEST, following a family photo with Heads of Delegations, the Assembly high-level welcome at Palais des Nations will feature speeches from the WHO Director-General, Heads of State and special guests. List of speakers below). During this session, the DG will present life-time achievement awards to two global health leaders. On Monday 22 May, the Director-General will give his main address at approximately 10:00 am. On Friday, 26 May, the WHO Director-General will be joined by representatives of five global foundations, to present five public health awards and prizes to the seven laureates for 2023. They come from Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand and the Philippines.
translations.reference: Saa 2:00 usiku CEST, kufuatia picha ya familia na wakuu wa Wajumbe, Bunge la kukaribishwa kwa kiwango cha juu huko Palais des Nations litakuwa na hotuba kutoka kwa kurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Wakuu wa Nchi na wageni maalum. Orodha ya wasemaji hapa chini). Wakati wa kikao hiki, DG atatoa tuzo za mafanikio ya maisha ya viongozi wawili wa afya Duniani. Jumatatu tarehe 22 Mei, mkurugenzi mkuu atatoa hotuba yake kuu takribani saa 10:00 asubuhi. Mnamo Ijumaa, Mei 26, Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO ataungana na wawakilishi wa taasisi tano za kimataifa, kutoa tuzo tano za afya ya umma na zawadi kwa washindi saba wa 2023. Wanatoka Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanoni, Nepali, Thailand na Ufilipino.
translations.hypothesis: Kuhusu saa 2:00 mchana, baada ya picha ya familia na viongozi wa vikosi, kikao cha juu cha Bunge katika Palais des Nations, zitajumuisha hotuba kutoka kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, viongozi wa serikali, na wageni maalumu. Orodha ya wasemaji hapa chini). Katika kikao hiki, Mkurugenzi Mkuu atatoa tuzo za utambuzi kwa viongozi wawili wa afya ya kimataifa. Jumamosi, Mei 22, Mkurugenzi Mkuu atatoa hotamo yake rasmi kuanzia saa 10:00. Jumamosi, Mei 26, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, atoungana na viongozi wa sita wa mashirika kimataifa, ili kutoa tuzo na heshima za afya za umma kwa watendaji saba wa tuzo za 2023. Wao ni kutoka Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand na Philippines.

translations.source: Key issues Key discussions and decisions are expected on: A review of WHOs work in health emergencies, including the International Health Regulations and strengthening WHO preparedness for and response to health emergencies; Strategies and global action on areas such as women’s, children’s and adolescents’ health, rehabilitation, universal health coverage and primary health care, traditional medicine, infection prevention and control, substandard and falsified medicines, health of refugees and migrants, non-communicable diseases, mental health, social determinants, nutrition and disabilities; Approval of the WHO Programme Budget for 2024-2025, including the decision to increase assessed contributions and other matters emanating from the Working Group on Sustainable Financing.
translations.reference: Masuala muhimu Majadiliano na maamuzi muhimu yanayotarajiwa ni kuhusu: Mapitio ya kazi za WHO katika dharura za afya, ikiwa ni pamoja na kanuni z afya za kimataifa na kuimarisha utayari wa WHO kwa na kukabiliana na dharura za kiafya; Mikakati na hatua za kimataifa kuhusu maeneo kama vile afya ya wanawake, watoto na vijana, ukarabati, huduma ya afya kwa wote na huduma ya msingi ya afya, tiba asilia, kinga na udhibti wa maambukizi, dawa duni na potofu, afya ya wakimbizi na wahamiaji, magonjwa yasiyoambukiza; afya ya akili; viashiria vya kijamii, lishe na Ulemavu; Kupitishwa kwa bajeti ya mpango wa WHO ya 2024-2025, ikijumuisha uamuzi wa kuongeza michango,iliyotathminiwa na masuala mengine yanayotokana na kikundi kazi cha ufadhili endelevu.
translations.hypothesis: Masuala muhimu, majadiliano na maamuzi yanatarajiwa kuhusu: Tathmini ya kazi ya WHO katika dharura za afya, pamoja na Sheria za Afya za Kimataifa na kuimarisha tayari ya WHO na majibu katika dharura za afya; Mikakati na hatua za kimataifa katika masuala kama vile afya ya wanawake, watoto na vijana, urekebishaji, usambazaji wa afya wa kitaifa, huduma ya afya ya msingi, dawa za asili, kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa, dawa za ubora duni na bandia, afya ya wanyaraji na wanyaraji, magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa, afya ya akili, mambo ya kijamii, lishe na ulemavu; Uthibitishaji wa Bajeti ya Programu ya WHO kwa mwaka wa 2024-2025, pamoja na uamuzi wa kuongeza michango zinazothibitishwa na masuala mengine yanayoitokea kutoka kwa Kundi la Kazi kuhusu Finansia endelevu.

translations.source: Daily Strategic roundtables will take place at lunch time from Monday to Saturday in Room XVIII. These events will host discussions among assembly delegates, partner agencies, representatives of civil society and WHO experts on public health priorities. Sessions run from 22-27 May, from 13:00 to 14:15 CEST and can be followed online. As WHO’s highest decision-making body, the Health Assembly sets out the Organization’s policy and approves its budget. WHA is attended by delegations from all WHO 194 Member States.
translations.reference: Meza za duara za kimkakati kila siku zitafanyika wakati wa chakua cha mchana kuanzia Jumatatu hadi Jumamosi katika chumba namba XVIII. Matukio haya yataandaa mijadala, kati ya wajumbe wa mkutano, mashirika washirika, wawakilishi wa Asasi za kiraia na wataalamu wa WHO kuhusu vipaumbele vya afya ya umma. Vipindi vitaanza tarehe 22-27 Mei, 13:00 hdi 14:15 CEST na vinaweza kufuatiliwa mtandaoni. Kama chombo cha juu zaidi cha kufanya maamuzi cha WHO, baraza la afya linaweka sera ya shirika na kuidhinisha bajeti yake. WHA inahudhuriwa na wajumbe kutoka nchi 194 wanachama wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: اجتماعات kiongozi za kila siku zitafanyika wakati wa mchana, kuanzia Jumatana hadi Jumamosi, katika Chumba XVIII. Haadhadhi majadiliano kati ya wajumbe wa kikao, taasisi washiriki, viongozi wa jamii, na wataalamu wa WHO kuhusu masuala muhimu ya afya. Michakato itafanyika kuanzia Mei 22 hadi 27, kuanzia saa 13:00 hadi 14:15 CEST, na yanaweza kufuatwa mtandaoni. Kama mwenza muhimu wa uamuzi katika WHO, Bunge la Afya linaanzisha sera ya Shirika na kuidhinisha bajeti yake. Bunge la Afya linahudhiwa na ujumbe kutoka kwa vyama vyote 194 vya WHO.

translations.source: The Health Assembly’s agenda is preceded by the 30th meeting of the Programme, Budget and Administration Committee of the Executive Board, which will meet on 17-19 May, 2023. After the Assembly, the 153th meeting of the Executive Board will take place from 31 May to 1 June. The Health Assembly is open to registered and accredited Member States, Associate Members, Observers, invited representatives of the UN and other participating inter-governmental organizations and non-State actors. WHA76 will be webcast live from the WHO website. The provisional agenda, preliminary timetable, Assembly documents and daily journal can be accessed here.Media accreditation and updates for the World Health Assembly
translations.reference: Ajenda ya baraza la afya inatanguliwa na mkutano wa 30 wa kamati ya programu, bajeti na utawala ya halmashauri kuu, ambayo itakutana tarehe 17-19 Mei, 2023. Baada ya baraza, mkutano wa 153 wa halmashauri kuu utafanyika kuanzia tarehe 31 Mei hadi tarehe 1 Juni. Baraza la afya liko wazi kwa nchi wanachama zilizosajiliwa na zilizoidhinishwa, wanachama washiriki, waangalizi, wawakilishi walioalikwa wa UN na mashirika mengine ya kiserikali na watendaji wasio wa kiserikali wanashiriki. WHA76 itarushwa moja kwa moja kutoka kwa tovuti ya WHO. Ajenda ya muda, ratiba ya awali, hati za Bunge na jarida la siku zinaweza kupatikana hapa. Uidhinishaji wa vyombo vya habari na masasisho kwa ajili ya Bunge la Afya Duniani
translations.hypothesis: Mada ya Kamati ya Afya yanatarajiwa baada ya kikao cha 30 la Kamati ya Programu, Bajeti na Usimamizi ya Bodi kuu, ambapo kikao kitafanyika mnamo 17-19 Mei, 2023. Baada ya kikao, kikao cha 153 cha Bodi kuu kitafanyika kuanzia Mei 31 hadi Juni 1. Kamati ya Afya inaangaliwa na mataifa iliyoshirikisha, wanachama wa pamoja, watafiti, viongozi wa UN na mashirika mingine ya serikali, pamoja na mashirika ambayo si serikali. WHA76 itakuwa inaishiwa mtandaoni kutoka kwenye tovuti ya WHO. Mada ya mara kwa mara, ratiba ya awali, hati za kamati, na jarida za kila siku zinaweza kupatikana hapa. Uthibitisho wa vyombo vya habari na taarifa za Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia.

translations.source: Media accreditation for WHA76 will be handled by the United Nations of Geneva. Register via Indico. To collect your badge: On Friday 19 May (working hours: 9:00 am to 16:30 pm CEST) at Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations . Details and address : https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge On Saturday 20 May: UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 13:00 to 17:00 CEST. On Sunday 21 May, you shall collect your media badge at the UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 9:00am to 16:00 pm CEST
translations.reference: Idhini ya vyombo vya habari kwa WHA76 itashughulikiwa na Umoja wa mataifa wa Geneva. Kujiandikisha kupitia Indico. Kukusanya beji yako: Ijumaa tarehe 19 Mei (saa za kazi: 9:00 asubuhi hadi 16:30 jioni CEST, katika Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations. Maelezo na anwani: https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge Jumamosi tarehe 20 Mei: UN palais des Nations katika Predny Gate (mkabala na jengo la ICRC) kuanzia saa 13:00 hadi 17:00 CEST. Jumapili tarehe 21 Mei, utajipatia beji yako ya vyombo vya habari katika Umoja wa mataifa palais des Nations kwenye Pregny Gate (mkabala na jengo la ICRC) kuanzia saa 9:00 asubuhi hadi16:00 jioni CEST.
translations.hypothesis: Uthibitisho wa vyombo vya habari kwa WHA76 utawashughulikia Umoja wa Mataifa wa Geneva. Jisajili kupitia Indico. Ili kupata cheo chako: Jumatano, 19 Mei (saa za kazi: 9:00 am hadi 16:30 pm CEST) katika Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations. Maelezo na anwani: https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge Jumamosi, 20 Mei: Umoja wa Mataifa, Palais des Nations katika mlango wa Pregny (kando ya jengo la ICRC) kutoka 13:00 hadi 17:00 CEST. Jumapili, 21 Mei, utapata cheo chako cha vyombo vya habari katika Umoja wa Mataifa, Palais des Nations katika mlango wa Pregny (kando ya jengo la ICRC) kutoka 9:00 am hadi 16:00 pm CEST

translations.source: Next week - 22-26 May- to collect the media badges: Villa Les Feuillantines at Place des Nations. Updates on the Health Assembly will be posted on the WHO website and relevant materials will be sent to the global media list. Register for updates. Photographs and videos WHO photos are available for media use via the WHO photo library.
translations.reference: Wiki ijayo - 22-26 Mei- kukusanya beji za vyombo vya habari: Villa Les Feuillantines katika Place des Nations. Masasisho kwenye baraza la afya yatachapishwa kwenye tovuti ya WHO na nyaraka muhimu zitatumwa kwa orodha ya vyombo vya habari vya kimataifa. Kujiandikishs kwa sasisho. Picha na Video Picha za WHO zinapatikana kwa matumizi ya vyombo vya habari kupitia maktaba ya picha ya WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Wiki ijayo - 22-26 Mei - kukusanya cheti za vyombo vya habari: Villa Les Feuillantines, eneo la Place des Nations. Habari kuhusu Mkutano wa Afya zitatolewa kwenye tovuti ya WHO, na vifaa muhimu zitatumwa kwenye orodha ya vyombo vya habari vya kimataifa. Jisajili kupata habari. Picha na video za WHO zinapatikana kwa matumizi ya vyombo vya habari kupitia maktaba ya picha ya WHO.

translations.source: Register once for media access to the WHO photo library by clicking “media registration” on this page. For questions related to WHO photos email [email protected] Recorded broadcast video material and other press content will be available for media to download on Canto. For any questions related to live video transmission please email [email protected]. Social mediaWHO will provide regular updates from the World Health Assembly via Twitter –follow @WHO and hashtag #WHA76.Follow WHO’s other social media accounts for updates from #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube
translations.reference: Jisajili mara moja kwa ufikiaji wa vyombo vya habari kwa maktaba ya picha ya WHO kwa kubofya "usajili wa vyombo vya habari" kwenye ukurasa huu. Kwa maswali yanayohusiana na barua pepe ya picha za WHO [barua pepe imelindwa] Nyenzo za video zilizorekodiwa na maudhui mengine ya vyombo vya habari yatapatikana kwa vyombo vya habari kupakua kwenye Canto. Kwa maswli yoyote yanayohusiana na utangazaji wa video mbashara tafadhali tuma barua pepe [barua pepe imehifadhiwa]. Mitandao ya kijamii WHO itatoa taarifa za mara kwa mara kutoka kwa Bunge la Afya Ulimwenguni kupitia Twitter- fuata @WHO na alama ya reli #WHA76.Fuata akaunti zingine za mitandao ya kijamii za WHO kwa sasisho kutoka #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube
translations.hypothesis: Jiandike mara moja kupata ufikiaji wa media kwenye maktaba ya picha za WHO kwa kubofya "uliandishi" kwenye ukurasa huu. Kwa maswali kuhusiana na picha za WHO, tuma barua pepe kwa [email protected] Nyenzo za video za matangazo na maudhui mengine ya vyombo vya habari zitapatikana kwa media kupakua kwenye Canto. Kwa maswali yoyote kuhusiana na matangazo ya moja kwa moja, tuma barua pepe kwa [email protected]. Media za kijamii WHO wataotoa taarifa za mara kwa mara kutoka kwenye Mkutano wa Afya Duniani kupitia Twitter – fuata @WHO na hashtag #WHA76. Fuata akaunti zingine za media za kijamii za WHO kwa taarifa kutoka #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube

translations.source: Urgent action needed to tackle stalled progress on health-related Sustainable Development Goals WHO is releasing the 2023 edition of its annual World Health Statistics report with new figures on the impact of COVID-19 pandemic and the latest statistics on progress towards the health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The report with data up to 2022 underscores a stagnation of health progress on key health indicators in recent years compared with trends seen during 2000-2015. It also alerts us to the growing threat of noncommunicable diseases (NCDs) and climate change, and calls for a coordinated and strengthened response. COVID-19 cost in lost lives and health progress The report documents updated statistics on the toll of the pandemic on global health, contributing to the ongoing decline in progress towards the SDGs.
translations.reference: Hatua za haraka zinahitajika ili kukabiliana na maendeleo yaliyokwama kwenye malengo ya maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya. WHO inachapisha toleo la 2023 la ripoti yake ya kila mwaka ya Takwimu za afya Duniani yenye takwimu kuhusu athari za janga la UVIKO-19 na takwimu za hivi karibuni kuhusu malengo ya mendeleo endelevu (SDGs) yanayohusiana na afya. Ripoti iliyo na Data hadi 2022 inasisitiza kudorora kwa maendeleo ya afya kwenye viashiria muhimu vya afya katika miaka ya hivi karibuni ikilinganishwa na mitindo iliyoonekana katika 2000-2015. Pia inatutahadharisha kuhusu tishio linaloongezeka la magonjwa yasiyo yakuambukiza (NCDs) na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, na kutoa wito wa muitikio ulioratibiwa na kuimarishwa. UVIKO-19 imegharimu maisha na maendeleo ya kiafya, ripoti hiyo inaandika takwimu zinazohusishwa kuhusu hali ya janga hili kwenye afya kimataifa, na hivyo kuchangia kupungua kwa maendeleo kuelekea SDGs.
translations.hypothesis: Hatua muhimu inahitajika ili kushughulikia maendeleo iliyostahili katika malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) litatoa toleo la 2023 la ripoti yake ya kila mwaka kuhusu takwimu za afya, na takwimu mpya kuhusu athari za janga la COVID-19 na takwimu za hivi karibuni kuhusu maendeleo katika malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya (SDGs). Ripoti hii, ambayo ina data hadi 2022, inaonyesha kuwa maendeleo katika afya yameathirika katika miaka الأخيرة, ikilinganishwa na mwenendo uliotishika wakati wa 2000-2015. Pia, inatoa tahadhari kuhusu hatari inayoongezeka ya magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa (NCDs) na mabadiliko ya ikolojia, na inatoa wito wa majibu iliyojumuishwa na imara. Gharama ya COVID-19 katika maisha iliyopotea na maendeleo ya afya. Ripoti hii ina takwimu za hivi karibuni kuhusu athari za janga kwenye afya ya dunia, ambazo zinaunga mkono kushurutika katika maendeleo ya SDGs.

translations.source: During 2020-2021, COVID-19 resulted in a staggering 336.8 million years of life lost globally. This equates to an average of 22 years of life lost for every excess death, abruptly and tragically cutting short the lives of millions of people. Since 2000, we saw significant improvements in maternal and child health with deaths falling by one-third and one-half, respectively. The incidence of infectious diseases such as HIV, tuberculosis (TB) and malaria also declined, along with a lowered risk of premature deaths from NCDs and injuries. Together, these contributed to an increase in global life expectancy from 67 years in 2000 to 73 years in 2019.
translations.reference: Katika kipindi cha 2020-2021, UVIKO-19 ilisababisha vifo vya kushangaza vya miaka milioni 336.8 Duniani kote. Hii ni sawa na wastani wa miaka 22 ya maisha kupotea kwa kila kifo kupita kiasi, ghafla na kwa kusikitisha kukatisha maisha ya mamilioni ya watu. Tangu mwaka 2000, tuliona maboresho makubwa katika afya ya uzazi na watoto huku vifo vikishuka kwa theluthi moja na nusu mtawalia. Matukio ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza kama vile VVU, kifua kikuu (TB) na Malaria pia yalipungua, pamoja na kupungua kwa hatari ya vifo vya mapema kutokana na NCDs na majeruhi. Kwa pamoja, haya yalichangia ongezeko la umri wa kuishi Duniani kutoka miaka 67 mwaka 2000 hadi 73 mwaka 2019.
translations.hypothesis: Katika kipindi cha 2020-2021, COVID-19 lilipelekea upotezaji wa maisha wa milioni 336.8 duniani. Hii ni sawa na upotezaji wa wastani wa miaka 22 za maisha kwa kila mtu aliyefariki, na hivyo kusababisha mwisho wa maisha kwa mamilioni ya watu. Tangu mwaka 2000, tumepata michakato muhimu katika afya ya wanawake na watoto, ambapo idadi ya vifo ilipungua kwa kiasi cha nusu na nusu, kwa mtazamo. Pia, idadi ya magonjwa kama vile ugonjwa wa HIV, kuvimbi (TB) na malaria ilipungua, pamoja na hatari iliyopungua ya vifo mapema kutokana na magonjwa ya saratani na majeraha. Pamoja, hizi zilisababisha ongezeko la uongozi wa maisha duniani, kutoka miaka 67 mwaka 2000 hadi miaka 73 mwaka 2019.

translations.source: However, the pandemic has put many health-related indicators further off-track and contributed to inequalities in access to high-quality health care, routine immunizations and financial protection. As a result, improving trends in malaria and TB have been reversed, and fewer people were treated for neglected tropical diseases (NTDs). “The World Health Statistics is WHO’s annual check-up on the state of the world’s health. The report sends a stark message on the threat of noncommunicable diseases, which take an immense and increasing toll on lives, livelihoods, health systems, communities, economies and societies,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “The report calls for a substantial increase in investments in health and health systems to get back on track towards the Sustainable Development Goals.”
translations.reference: Hata hivyo, janga hili limeweka viashiria vingi vinavyohusiana na afya mbali zaidi na kuachangia ukosefu wa usawa katika upatikanaji wa huduma za afya za hali ya juu, chanjo za kawaida na ulinzi wa kifedha. Matokeo yake, uboreshaji wa mwelekeo wa Malaria na TB umebadilishwa, na watu wachache walitibiwa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika (NTDs). "Takwimu za afya ulimwenguni ni ukaguzi wa kila mwaka wa WHO juu ya hali ya afya ya Ulimwenguni. Rioti hiyo inatoa ujumbe mzito kuhusu tishio la magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, ambayo yanaathiri sana maisha, mifumo ya afya, jumuia, uchumi na jamii", alisema Dkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Ripoti hiyo inataka ongezeko kubwa la uwekezaji katika mifumo ya afya na afya ili kurejea katika muelekeo wa malengo ya maendeleo endelevu"
translations.hypothesis: Hata hivyo, janga hilo limeathiri vigezo nyingi za afya, na kusababisha usawa katika upatikanaji wa huduma bora za afya, chanjo za kawaida, na ulinzi wa kifedha. Matokeo yake, mwenendo wa uimarishaji wa magonjwa ya malaria na TB umebadilishwa, na idadi ya watu waliofanyiwa matibabu kwa magonjwa ya kipekee ya Afrika imeongezeka. "Taarifa ya Hali ya Afya ya Dunia ni tathmini ya kila mwaka ya WHO kuhusu hali ya afya duniani. Taarifa hii inaonyesha hatari ya magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa, ambazo zinaathiri maisha, uchumi, mifumo ya afya, jamii, na jamii kwa kiwango kikubwa na kinavyoongezeka," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO. "Taarifa hii inatoa ombi la kuongezeka kwa fedha katika afya na mifumo ya afya ili kurudi kwenye malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu."

translations.source: NCDs ̶ an ever-increasing health threat for future generationsDespite overall health progress, the share of deaths caused annually by NCDs has grown consistently and is now claiming nearly three quarters of all lives lost each year. If this trend continues, NCDs are projected to account for about 86% of the 90 million annual deaths by mid-century; consequently, 77 million of these will be due to NCDs – a nearly 90% increase in absolute numbers since 2019. Stagnating progress calls for acceleration More recent trends show signs of slowdown in the annual rate of reduction (ARR) for many indicators. For example, the global maternal mortality ratio needs to decline by 11.6% per year between 2021 and 2030 to meet the SDG target. Similarly, the net reduction in TB incidence from 2015 to 2021 was only one-fifth of the way to the 2025 milestone of WHO’s End TB Strategy.
translations.reference: NCDs - Tishio la kiafya linaloongezeka kwa vizazi vijavyo licha ya maendeleo ya afya kwa ujumla, sehemu ya vifo vinavyosababishwa na magonjwa yasiyoambukiza kila mwaka imeongezeka mara kwa mara na sasa inadai karibu robo tatu ya maisha yote hupoteza kila mwaka. Kama hali hii itaendelea, NCDs yanakadiriwa kuchangia takribani 86% ya vifo milioni 90 vya kila mwaka kufikia katikati ya karne; kwa hiyo milioni 77 kati ya hivi vinatokea na NCDs- karibu ongezeko la 90% la idadi kamili tangu 2019. Maendeleo yanayodumaa yanahitaji kuongeza kasi Mitindo ya hivi karibuni zaidi inaonyesha dalili za kushuka kwa kiwango cha mwaka cha kupunguza (ARR) kwa viashirio vingi. Kwa mfano, uwiano wa vifo vya uzazi Duniani unahitaji kupungua kwa 11.6% kwa mwaka kati ya 2021 na 2030 ili kufikia lengo la SDG. Vilevile, kupungua kwa jumla kwa matukio ya TB kutoka 2015 hadi 2021 ilikuwa moja ya tano tu ya hatua ya 2025 ya mkakati wa kukomesha kifua kikuu wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Ugonjwa wa saratani na magonjwa mengine – hatari kubwa kwa afya ya vizazi vijavyo. Licha ya maendeleo ya jumla katika afya, idadi ya vifo ambavyo hutokea kila mwaka kutokana na magonjwa haya imekuwa ikiongezeka, na sasa inachukua karibu nusu ya vifo vyote kila mwaka. Ikiwa mtende huu utaendelea, magonjwa haya yanatarajiwa kuwa chanzo cha karibu 86% ya vifo milioni 90 kila mwaka mwishoni mwa karne; kwa hivyo, milioni 77 kati ya vifo hizi itatokana na magonjwa haya – ongezeko la karibu 90% katika idadi za halisi tangu 2019. Maendeleo yasiyobadilika inahitaji kasi zaidi. Mtende wa hivi karibuni unaonyesha dalili za kupungua katika kasi ya kupunguza (ARR) kwa idadi nyingi. Kwa mfano, kiwango cha vifo cha wanawake cha kimataifa lazima kupungua kwa 11.6% kila mwaka kati ya 2021 na 2030 ili kufikia lengo la Mkakati wa SDGs. Pia, kupungua kwa idadi ya magonjwa ya kuvimba (TB) kutoka 2015 hadi 2021 kulikuwa sawa na asatu ya malengo ya mkakati wa WHO wa "Kukomesha Kuvimba".

translations.source: Despite a reduction in exposure to many health risks – such as tobacco use, alcohol consumption, violence, unsafe water and sanitation, and child stunting – progress was inadequate and exposure to some risks such as air pollution remains high. Alarmingly, the prevalence of obesity is rising with no immediate sign of reversal. Furthermore, expanded access to essential health services has slowed compared to pre-2015 gains, coupled with no significant progress in reducing financial hardship due to health-care costs. This drastically limits our ability to achieve Universal Health Coverage by 2030. “The COVID-19 pandemic is an important reminder that progress is neither linear nor guaranteed,” warns Dr Samira Asma, WHO Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact.
translations.reference: Licha ya kupungua kwa uwezekano wa hatari nyingi za kiafya- kama vile matumizi ya Tumbaku, unywaji pombe, Vurugu, na udumavu wa watoto- maendeleo hayakuwa ya kutosha na kukabiliwa na hatari kama vile uchafuzi wa hewa bado upo juu. Cha kutisha, kuenea kwa fetma kuongezeka bila dalili ya haraka ya kubadilika. Zaidi ya hayo, kupanuka kwa upatikanaji wa huduma muhimu za afya kumepungua ikilinganishwa na mafanikio ya kabla ya 2015, pamoja na hakuna maendeleo makubwa katika kupunguza matatizo ya kifedha na gharama za huduma za afya. Hii inapunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa uwezo wetu wa kufikia huduma ya afya kwa wote ifikapo 2030. Janga la UVIKO-19 ni ukumbusho muhimu kwamba maendeleo si ya mstari wala si ya uhakika", anaonya Dkt Samira Asma, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO kwa Data, uchaguzi, na utoaji wa athari.
translations.hypothesis: Licha ya kupungua katika hatari nyingi za afya – kama vile matumizi ya sigara, matumizi ya pombe, uvunjaji, maji na usafi salama, na ukuaji usiofaa wa watoto – maendeleo yalikuwa hafifu, na hatari fulani, kama vile mchaka, bado ni kubwa. Hatari, kasi ya uzito inaongezeka bila dalili za moja kwa moja za kupungua. Zaidi ya hayo, upatikanaji wa huduma muhimu za afya umelemwa zaidi ikilinganishwa na mafanikio kabla ya 2015, pamoja na hakuna maendeleo kubwa katika kupunguza changamoto za kiuchumi kutokana na gharama za huduma za afya. Hii inafungilia uwezo wetu wa kufikia huduma bora za afya kwa mwaka 2030. "Janga la COVID-19 ni kumbukumbu muhimu kwamba maendeleo si mara kwa mara wala ina uhakika," anarangi Dr Samira Asma, Msaidizi Mkuu wa WHO kwa Takwimu, Utafiti na Utendaji kwa Faida.

translations.source: “To stay on track towards the 2030 SDG agenda, we must act decisively and collectively to deliver a measurable impact in all countries.” This year’s report includes for the first time a dedicated section on climate change and health, and we anticipate that this will be of more relevance in the report going forward. For this issue and all other areas timely, reliable and disaggregated data are critical to track progress and improve national and global health policies. Editor’s note: The World Health Statistics report is the World Health Organization’s (WHO) annual compilation of the most recent available data on health and health-related indicators. For inquiries, contact [email protected]
translations.reference: "Ili kukaa kwenye mstari kuelekea ajenda ya 2030 ya SDG, lazima tuchukue hatua madhubuti na kwa pamoja ili kuleta athari inayoweza kupimika kwa nchi zote" Ripoti ya mwaka huu inajumuisha kwa mara ya kwanza sehemu maalumu kuhusu mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na afya, na tunatarajia kwamba hii itakuwa na umuhimu zaidi katika ripoti inayoendelea. Kwa suala hili na maeneo mengine yote kwa wakati, Data ya kuaminika na iliyogawanywa ni muhimu kufuatilia maendeleo na kuboresha sera za afya za kitaifa na kimataifa. Dokezo la mhariri: Ripoti ya takwimu za afya Duniani ni mkusanyo wa kila mwaka wa shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) wa Data zinazopatikana hivi karibuni kuhusu afya na viashirio vinavyohusiana na afya. Kwa maswali, wasiliana na [barua pepe imehifadhiwa]
translations.hypothesis: “Ili kufikia malengo ya 2030 ya Ushirika wa Kimataifa, lazima tuchukue hatua thabiti na pamoja ili kufikia matokeo mazuri katika nchi zote.” Ripoti hii ya mwaka huu ina sehemu maalum kuhusu mabadiliko ya ikolojia na afya, na tunatarajia kwamba hii itakuwa muhimu zaidi katika ripoti zijazo. Kwa masuala haya na yote mengine, data za wakati, za kuaminika na za kina ni muhimu ili kufuatilia maendeleo na kuboresha sera za afya za kitaifa na kimataifa. Maelezo ya mwandishi: Ripoti ya Takwimu za Afya ya Dunia ni tozo ya kila mwaka ya Shirika la Afya ya Dunia (WHO) kuhusu data za hivi majuzi kuhusu vigezo vya afya. Kwa maswali, wasiliana na [email protected]

translations.source: WHO Director-General announces Global Health Leaders Awards Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot awarded for lifelong commitment to health WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus will present two lifetime achievement awards to recognize outstanding contributions to advancing global health during the high-level opening session of the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly. The Director-General’s Global Leaders Awards, which were established in 2019, will go to Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot. Both recipients are distinguished scientists and public health leaders who were closely involved in the discovery of Ebola virus disease before advancing to leadership positions in global health.
translations.reference: Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO ataoangoza tuzo za viongozi wa afya Duniani Jean-Jacques-Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot walitunukiwa tuzo ya kujitolea kwa maisha yote kwa afya Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus atatoa tuzo mbili za mafanikio ya maisha ili kutambua michango bora katika kuendeleza afya Duniani wakati wa ufunguzi wa ngazi ya juu wa mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa afya Duniani. Tuzo za mkurugenzimkuu kwa tuzo za viongozi Duniani, ambazo zilianzishwa mwaka 2019, zitakwenda kwa Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot. Wapokeaji wote ni wanasayansi mashuhuri na viongozi wa afya ya umma ambao walihusika kwa karibu katika ugunduzi wa virusi vya Ebola kabla ya kusonga mbele hadi nyadhifa za uongozi katika afya ya kimataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot, wamepewa Tuzo za Viongozi wa Afya Duniani. Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, atatoa tuzo mbili za utambuzi kwa kutoa tuzo kwa juhudi kubwa katika kuendeleza afya ya dunia katika kikao cha juu cha Majumuisho ya Siasa ya Afya ya Dunia ya sita. Tuzo za Viongozi za WHO, ambazo zapatikana mwaka 2019, zitagawanywa kwa Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot. Waathirika wote ni wanasayansi na viongozi wa afya ambao walikuwa wamehusika sana katika utambuzi wa ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola kabla ya kuwa viongozi katika afya ya dunia.

translations.source: The award honours their lifetime achievements in public health. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is being recognized for his innovation, leadership and ground-breaking contributions to the management and treatment of diseases such as Ebola virus disease. He has played a critical role in improving health outcomes in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the African region, and the global community. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum is the Director General of the DRC’s National Institute of Biomedical Research in Kinshasa, full Professor of Microbiology at the University of Kinshasa Medical School and the inaugural president of the Congolese Academy of Science. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum was part of the team that discovered the Zaïre ebolavirus during the first recorded outbreak in 1976, in Equateur Province, Central DRC.
translations.reference: Tuzo hiyo inaheshimu mafanikio yao ya maisha katika afya ya umma. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum kutoka Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya Kongo (DRC) anatambulika kwa uvumbuzi, uongozi na michango yake ya msingi katika usimamizi na matibabu ya magonjwa kma vile ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya katika Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya kongo, kanda ya Afrika, na jumuia ya kimataifa. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum ni mkurugenzi mkuu wa taasisi ya kitaifa ya utafiti wa Tiba kibiolojia ya DRC huko Kinshasa, profesa kamili wa Biolojia katika chuo kikuu cha Kinshasa shule ya afya na Rais wa kuanzishwa kwa chuo kikuu cha Sayansi cha Kongo. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum alikuwa sehemu ya timu iliyogundua virusi vya Ebola vya Zaire wakati wa mlipuko wa kwanza uliorekodiwa mnmo 1976, katika jimbo la Ikweta, katikati mwa DRC.
translations.hypothesis: Tuzo hii ni kwa juhudi zao za muda wote katika afya ya umma. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum kutoka Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Congo (DRC) anagawanywa tuzo kwa ubunifu, uongozi, na michango muhimu katika usimamizi na matibabu ya magonjwa kama vile ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola. Ameweka jukumu muhimu katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya katika Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Congo, katika eneo la Afrika, na katika jamii ya kimataifa. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum ni Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Taasisi ya Kitaaluma ya Utafiti ya DRC huko Kinshasa, Profesa wa kikamilifu wa Mikrobiolojia katika Shule ya Tiba ya Chuo Kikuu cha Kinshasa, na Rais wa kwanza wa Taasisi ya Sayansi ya Congo. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum alikuwa sehemu ya timu ambayo iligundua virusi vya Zaïre ebolavirus wakati wa mlipuko wa kwanza uliochukuliwa mwaka wa 1976, katika eneo la Equateur, DRC.

translations.source: He later helped design one of the first effective treatments against the virus and the deployment of experimental Ebola virus disease vaccines. He has worked tirelessly to build the Democratic Republic of the Congo’s scientific capacity, establishing multiple research facilities in the country, and has played key roles with WHO in fighting infectious diseases. Professor Piot from Belgium is being recognized for his extraordinary leadership in the response to the HIV/AIDS epidemic and other significant global health challenges. He has played a vital role in launching major global health initiatives such as UNAIDS, the Global Fund, and others that have improved health outcomes around the world. Under his leadership, UNAIDS became the chief advocate for worldwide action against AIDS, also spearheading UN reform by bringing together 10 different UN organizations.
translations.reference: Baadae alisaidia kubuni moja wapo ya matibabu ya kwanza ya ufanisi dhidi ya virusi na kupelekwa kwa chanjo ya majaribio ya ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amefanya kazi bila kuchoka kujenga uwezo wa kisayansi wa Jamhuri ya kidemokraia ya Kongo, kuanzisha vituo vingi vya utafiti nchini humo, na amefanya majukumu muhimu na WHO katika kupambana na magonjwa ya kuambukiza. Profesa Piot kutoka Ubelgiji anatambuliwa kwa uongozi wa ajabu katika kukabiliana na janga la VVU/ UKIMWI na changamoto nyingine muhimu za afya Duniani. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuzindua mipango mikuu ya afya ya kimataifa kama vile UNAIDS, mfuko wa Dunia, na mengineyo ambayo imeboresha matokeo ya afya Duniani kote. Chini ya uongozi wake, UNAIDS imekuwa mtetezi mkuu wa hatua za kimataifa dhidi ya UKIMWI, pia akiongoza mageuzi kwa kuyaleta pamoja mashirika 10 tofauti ya umoja wa mataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Baadaye, alisaidia kubuni mojawapo ya tiba za ufanisi dhidi ya virusi, na pia utumiaji wa chanjo za ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amefanya kazi kwa bidii ili kujenga uwezo wa kisayansi wa Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo, kwa kuanzisha vituo kadhaa vya utafiti nchini, na amechukua jukumu muhimu na WHO katika kupambana na magonjwa hatari. Profesa Piot kutoka Belgium, anagawishiwa tuzo kwa uongozi wake wa kipekee katika majibu dhidi ya janga la HIV/AIDS na matatizo mengine muhimu ya afya duniani. Amewezesha kampeni kubwa za afya duniani, kama vile UNAIDS, The Global Fund, na zingine, ambazo zimeimarisha matokeo ya afya duniani. Chini ya uongozi wake, UNAIDS imekuwa mshauri mkuu katika hatua za dunia dhidi ya AIDS, na pia imekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika ubadilishanaji wa UN, kwa kuunganisha vyombo 10 tofauti vya UN.

translations.source: Professor Piot also played a part in the earlier discovery of the Ebola virus, and the containment of the first known outbreak, participating in field epidemiological investigations. He has chaired a number of high-level initiatives, served in numerous high-level advisory roles, including on COVID-19, and has received multiple awards. Professor Piot is the Special Advisor to the EC President, a Professor of Global Health and former Director of the London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine. “These outstanding individuals embody lifelong dedication, relentless advocacy, a commitment to equity, and selfless service of humanity and people’s health,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “In a time of multiple emergencies, health crises, and conflict, we recognize that leadership in public health and science are more important than ever to advance global health.
translations.reference: Pia profesa Piot alishiriki katika ugunduzi wa awali wa virusi vya Ebola, na kuzuia mlipuko wa kwanza ulipojulikana, alishiriki katika uga wa uchunguzi wa magonjwa. Ameongoza idadi ya mipango ya ngazi ya juu, alihudumu katika majukumu mengi ya ngazi ya juu ya ushauri, ikiwa ni pamoja na UVIKO-19 na amepokea tuzo nyingi. Profesa Piot ni mshauri muhimu wa Rais wa EC, profesa wa afya Ulimwenguni na mkurugenzi wa zamani wa shule ya London ya uafi na tiba ya kitropiki. "Watu hawa mashuhuri wanajumuisha kujitolea kwa maisha yote, utetezi usio na kuchoka, kujitolea kwa usawa, na huduma ya kujitolea kwa Ubinadamu na afya ya watu", alisema Mkurugunzi mkuu wa WHO, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Katika wakati wa dharura nyingi, migogoro ya afya, na migogoro tunatambua kwamba uongozi katika afya ya umma na sayansi ni muhimu zaidi kuliko hapo awali ili kuendeleza afya Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Piot pia alicheza jukumu katika utambuzi wa awali wa virusi vya Ebola, na katika kudhibiti mlolongo wa kwanza ulioonekana, kwa kushiriki katika uchunguzi wa kimatibabu katika eneo. Amewahi kuwa mwenyekiti wa mashirika kadhaa ya kiwango cha juu, ametumikia katika nafasi kadhaa za ushauri, pamoja na COVID-19, na amepokea tuzo nyingi. Profesa Piot ni Mshauri maalumu wa Rais wa Kamati, Profesa wa Afya ya Dunia na alikuwa Mkurugenzi wa Shule ya Afya na Tiba ya London. "Hii ni watu wa kipekee ambao wana kujitolea kwa muda wote, kuendeleza juhudi, kujitolea kwa usawa, na huduma bora kwa jamii na afya ya watu," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Katika wakati wa majanga kadhaa, vishawishi, na migogoro, tunaona kwamba uongozi katika afya na sayansi ni muhimu zaidi kuliko hapo awali ili kuendeleza afya ya dunia.

translations.source: Our awardees today personify that passion.” “Their combined stories and successes show how much the world has progressed in terms of collaboration at the global, regional and country levels to strengthen health emergency preparedness, response and resilience. These outstanding scientists will continue to inspire us every day,” he added The ceremony for the awards form part of the high-level opening session of the 76th World Health Assembly being held on Sunday 21 May 2023 in Geneva.
translations.reference: Washindi wetu leo wanawakilisha shauku hiyo" "Simulizi na mafanikio yao ya pamoja yanaonyesha jinsi ulimwengu umepiga hatua katika suala la ushirikiano katika ngazi ya kimataifa, kikanda na nchi ili kuimarisha maandalizi ya dharura ya afya, majibu na ustahimilivu. Wanasayansi hawa mashuhuri wataendelea kukutia moyo", aliongezea sherehe ya tuzo hizo ni sehemu ya kikao cha ngazi ya juu cha ufunguzi wa mkutano wa 76 wa afya Duniani unaofanyika Jumapili tarehe 21 Mei 2023 huko Jeniva.
translations.hypothesis: Washawishi wetu leo, inaonyesha shauku hiyo.” “Hadithi zao na mafanikio, zinaonyesha kiasi ambacho dunia imeboresha katika ushirikiano katika viwango vya kimataifa, za eneo, na za kitaifa ili kuimarisha tayari, majibu, na uendelevu katika dharura za afya. Wataalamu hawa wa kipekee, wataendelea kuwaeleza kila siku,” aliongeza. Sherehe za tuzo ni sehemu ya kikao cha juu la Mkutano wa 76 wa Jumuiya ya Afya ya Dunia, ambapo haufanyika Jumamosi, Mei 21, 2023, huko Geneva.

translations.source: WHO congratulates Benin and Mali for eliminating trachoma as a public health problem WHO has validated Benin and Mali as having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem, making them the fifth and sixth countries in WHO’s African Region to achieve this significant milestone. Countries that previously received WHO validation for trachoma elimination are Ghana (June 2018), Gambia (April 2021), Togo (May 2022) and Malawi (September 2022). “WHO congratulates the health authorities of Benin and Mali and their network of global and local partners for these milestones”, said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Following Benin’s and Mali’s success, trachoma remains endemic in 23 countries in WHO’s African Region, bringing us a step closer towards the elimination target for trachoma set in the road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030.”
translations.reference: WHO inazipongeza Benini na Mali kwa kutokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. WHO imeziidhinisha Benini na Mali kama zimetokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma, na kuzifanya kuwa nchi za tano na sita katika kanda ya Afrika ya WHO kufikia hatua hii muhimu. Nchi ambazo hapo awali zilipokea uthibitisho wa WHO wa kutokomeza Trakoma ni Ghana (Juni 2018), Gambia (Aprili 2021), Togo(Mei 2022) na Malawi (Septemba 2022). "WHO inazipongeza mamlaka za afya za Benini na Mali na mtandao wao wa washirika wa kimataifana wa ndani kwa hatua hizi muhimu", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Kufuatia mafanikio ya Benini na Mali, Trakoma imesalia kuwa ugonjwa katika nchi 23 katika kanda ya Afrika ya WHO, na kutuletea hatua karibu na lengo la kutokomeza Trakoma lililowekwa katika muongozo wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika 2021-2022".
translations.hypothesis: WHO ina furaha kwa Benin na Mali kwa kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kama tatizo la afya. WHO imethibitisha kwamba Benin na Mali zimeondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kama tatizo la afya, na hivyo kuwa nchi za tano na sita katika eneo la Afrika la WHO kufikia hatua hii muhimu. Nchi ambazo zamani zimepata uthibitisho kutoka kwa WHO kuhusu kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma ni Ghana (Juni 2018), Gambia ( Aprili 2021), Togo (Mei 2022) na Malawi (Septemba 2022). "WHO ina furaha kwa vyombo vya afya vya Benin na Mali, na mtandao wao wa washirika wa kimataifa na wa ndani kwa hatua hizi," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Baada ya mafanikio ya Benin na Mali, ugonjwa wa trachoma bado ni wa kawaida katika 23 nchi katika eneo la Afrika la WHO, na hutoa hatua moja karibu na lengo la kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma ambalo lina katika mpango wa 2021–2030 wa magonjwa ya kawaida."

translations.source: Globally, Benin and Mali join 15 other countries that have been validated by WHO for having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem. These are Cambodia, China, the Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo and Vanuatu. Trachoma elimination using WHO’s SAFE strategy Both Benin and Mali implemented the WHO-recommended SAFE strategy to eliminate trachoma with the support of WHO and partners. The SAFE strategy consists of surgery to treat late trachoma complications; antibiotics to clear infection; facial cleanliness; and environmental improvement, particularly improving access to water and sanitation, to reduce transmission.
translations.reference: Duniani kote, Benini na Mali zinaungana na nchi nyingine 15 ambazo zimethibitishwa na WHO kwa kutokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. Nchi hizo ni, Kambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuri ya Kiislamu ya Irani, Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya watu wa Lao,Malawi, Meksiko, Moroko, Myanmar, Nepali, Omani, Saudi Arabia, Togo na Vanuatu. Utokomezaji wa Trakoma kwa kutumia mkakati SALAMA wa WHO Benini na Mali zote zilitekeleza makakti SAFE uliopendekezwa na WHO ili kuondoa Trakoma kwa msaada wa WHO na washirika. Mkakati SAFE unajumuisha upasuaji wa kutibu matatizo ya Trakoma ya muda mrefu; viuavidudu ili kuondoa maambukizi; usafi wa uso; na uboreshaji wa usafi wa mazingira, hasa kuboresha upatikanaji wa maji na usafi wa mazingira, ili kupunguza maambukizi.
translations.hypothesis: Kikokote, Benin na Mali zinaunga mkono nchi 15 zingine ambazo wameidhinishwa na WHO kuwa zimeufanya matibabu ya trachoma kuwa tatizo la afya. Hizi ni Cambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuri ya Watu wa Iran, Jamhuri ya Watu wa Laos, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo na Vanuatu. Matibabu ya trachoma kwa kutumia mkakati wa WHO (SAFE) Benin na Mali pia zimetumia mkakati wa WHO (SAFE) ili kuondoa matibabu ya trachoma, kwa usaidizi wa WHO na washiriki. Mkakati wa SAFE una shughuli za tiba za matatizo ya trachoma, dawa za kupunguza magonjwa, usafi wa uso, na uboreshaji wa mazingira, haswa kupunguza ufikiaji wa maji na usafi, ili kupunguza maambukizi.

translations.source: Through the International Trachoma Initiative, the antibiotic azithromycin is donated by Pfizer to elimination programmes implementing the SAFE strategy. Benin has integrated trachoma elimination interventions with those implemented against other neglected tropical diseases (NTDs), under the umbrella of the National Programme for Communicable Diseases. Trachoma is the third NTD to be eliminated in Benin, after dracunculiasis (in 2009) and gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (in 2021). Mali has conducted trachoma impact and surveillance surveys and rolled out interventions to achieve elimination targets, despite security challenges in the northern regions of the country and sociopolitical upheavals in recent years. Trachoma is the first NTD to be eliminated in Mali, which therefore now joins a global group of 47 countries that have eliminated at least one NTD.
translations.reference: Kupitia mpango wa kimataifa wa Trakoma, dawa ya Azithromycin inatolewa na Pfizer kwa programu za kutokomeza zinazotekeleza mkakati SALAMA. Benini imeunganisha afua za kutokomeza Trakoma na zile zinazotekelezwa dhidi ya magonjwa mengine ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika (NTDs), chini ya mwamvuli wa mpango wa kitaifa wa magonjwa ya kuambukiza. Trakoma ni NTD ya tatu kuondolewa nchini Benini, baada ya Dracunculiasis (mwak 2009) na Trypanosomiasisi ya Binadamu ya Afrika ya Gambia (mwaka 2021). Mali imefanya tafiti za athari za Trakoma na ufuatiliaji na kuzindua afua ili kufikia malengo ya utomezaji, licha ya changamoto za kiusalama katika mikoa ya kaskazini mwa nchi na misukumo ya kijamii na kisiasa katika miaka ya hivi karibuni. Trakoma ni NTD ya kwanza kutokomezwa nchini Mali, ambayo pia sasa inaungana na kundi la kimataifa la nchi 47 ambazo zimetokomeza angalau NTD moja.
translations.hypothesis: Kupitia Minitaj, azithromycin, ambayo ni dawa ya bakteria, inatozwa na Pfizer kwa programu za kupunguza magonjwa ya trachoma, ambazo zinatumia mkakati wa SAFE. Benini imejumuisha programu za kupunguza magonjwa ya trachoma na programu za kupunguza magonjwa mingine isiyo na umri (NTDs), chini ya utawala wa Programu ya Kitaifa ya Magonjwaambukizwa. Trachoma ni mgonjwa wa tatu ambao umepangwa kupunguza katika Benini, baada ya dracunculiasis (mnamo 2009) na gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (mnamo 2021). Mali imefanya uchunguzi wa athari na ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa ya trachoma, na imeweka matarajio ya kupunguza, licha ya changamoto za usalama katika eneo la kaskazini, na mabadiliko ya kiuchumi na siasa katika miaka الأخيرة. Trachoma ni mgonjwa wa kwanza ambao umepangwa kupunguza katika Mali, na hivyo sasa inaungana na kikundi cha mataifa 47 duniani ambapo mgonjwa mmoja au zaidi umepangwa kupunguza.

translations.source: “These are impressive public health achievements,” said Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall, Director of the WHO Global NTD Programme. “Benin and Mali demonstrate how strong political will, cross-sector integration, surveillance and community engagement can work in concert to achieve disease elimination.” Significant progress has been made in the fight against trachoma over the past few years. The number of people requiring antibiotic treatment for trachoma in the WHO African Region fell by 84 million, from 189 million in 2014 to 105 million as of June 2022. Note to the editor: Trachoma remains a public health problem in 41 countries (as of June 2022) with an estimated 125 million people living in areas requiring interventions against the disease.
translations.reference: "Haya ni mafanikio ya afya ya umma", alisema Dk Ibrahima Soce Fall, mkurugenzi wa mpango wa kimataifa wa NTD wa WHO. "Benini na Mali zinaonyesha jinsi dhamira thabiti ya kisiasa, ushirikiano wa sekta mbalimbali, ufuatiliaji na ushirikishaji wa jamii inayoweza kufanya kazi kwa pamoja ili kufikia utokomezaji wa magonjwa". Mafanikio makubwa yamepatikana katika vita dhidi ya Trakoma katika miaka michache iliyopita. Idadi ya watu wanaohitaji matibabu ya viuavijasumu kwa Trakoma katika kanda ya Afrika ya WHO ilipungua kwa milioni 84, kutoka milioni 189 mwaka 2014 hadi milioni 105 kufikia Juni 2022. Maelezo kwa mhariri: Trakoma bado ni tatizo la afya ya umma katika nchi 41 (hadi Juni 2022) huku takribani watu milioni 125 wakiishi katika maeneo yanayohitaji afua dhidi ya ugonjwa huo.
translations.hypothesis: “Hii ni mafanikio muhimu katika afya ya umma,” alisema Dkt. Ibrahima Socé Fall, Mkurugenzi wa Programu ya Kimataifa ya WHO kuhusu Ugonjwa wa NTD. “Benin na Mali zinaonyesha jinsi nia imara ya serikali, ushirikiano wa sekta,wachungaji na ushirikishwaji wa jamii zinaweza kufanya kazi pamoja ili kufikia kuondoa magonjwa.” Maendeleo muhimu zimepatikana katika vita dhidi ya magonjwa ya mata katika miaka الأخيرة. Idadi ya watu ambao wanahitaji matibabu ya dawa kwa magonjwa ya mata katika eneo la WHO la Afrika imepungua kwa 84 milioni, kutoka 189 milioni mwaka wa 2014 hadi 105 milioni hadi Juni 2022. Noti kwa mhariri: Magonjwa ya mata bado ni tatizo la afya ya umma katika 41 nchi ( hadi Juni 2022), na takriban watu 125 milioni wanaishi katika maeneo ambapo lazima kutumika tiba.

translations.source: Trachoma is found mainly in the poorest and most rural areas of Africa, Central and South America, Asia, the Western Pacific and the Middle East. The WHO African Region is disproportionately affected by trachoma with 105 million people living in at-risk areas, which represents 84% of the global trachoma burden. Trachoma is the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. The disease is caused by infection with the bacterium Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person through contaminated fingers, fomites and flies that have come into contact with discharge from the eyes or nose of an infected person.
translations.reference: Trakoma hupatikana hasa katika maeneo ya maskini zaidi na ya vijijini zaidi ya Afrika, Amerika ya kati na Kusini, Asia, Pasifiki ya Magharibi na Mashariki ya kati. WHO kanda ya Afrika imeathiriwa kwa kiasi kikubwa na Trakoma huku watu milioni 105 wakiishi katika maeneo hatarishi, ambayo inawakilisha 84% ya wingi wa Trakoma Duniani. Trakoma ni chanzo kikuu cha maradhi ya upofu Duniani kote. Ugonjwa husababishwa kwa kuambukizwa na bakteria Clamydia Trachomatis. Maambukizi huama kutoka kwa mtu hadi kwa mtu kupitia vidole vilivyochafuliwa, Fomites na nzi ambao wamegusana na uchafu kutoka katika macho au pua ya mtu aliyeambukizwa.
translations.hypothesis: Trachoma inaenea zaidi katika maeneo maridadi na za kaskazini mwa Afrika, Amerika ya Mashariki na Kusini, Asia, Pasifiki Magharibi, na Mashariki ya Kati. Eneo la Afrika la WHO linaathiriwa sana na trachoma, na watu milioni 105 wanaishi katika maeneo hatarishi, ambayo ni sawa na 84% ya mzigo wa ugonjwa wa trachoma duniani. Trachoma ni sababu kuu ya ugonjwa wa kuona duniani. Ugonjwa huu unaasababishwa na ugonjwa wa bakteria, *Chlamydia trachomatis*. Ugonjwa unaenea kutoka mtu hadi mtu kupitia vidole, vitu vinavyoshirikiwa, na nyuki ambazo vimewasiliana na maji kutoka macho au pua ya mtu aliyepata ugonjwa.

translations.source: Environmental risk factors for trachoma transmission include poor hygiene, overcrowded households, inadequate access to water or use of proper sanitation facilities. In 1996, WHO launched the WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020). With other partners in the Alliance, WHO supports country implementation of the SAFE strategy and strengthening of national capacity through epidemiological assessment, monitoring, surveillance, project evaluation and resource mobilization contributing towards elimination of trachoma as a public health problem. The road map, endorsed by the World Health Assembly in 2020 through its decision 73(33), sets 2030 as the new target date for global elimination.
translations.reference: Mambo hatarishi ya kimazingira kwa maambukizi ya Trakoma ni pamoja na hali duni ya usafi, kaya zenye msongamano mkubwa wa watu, kutopata maji ya kutosha au matumizi ya vifaa vya usafi wa mazingira. Mnamo 1996, WHO ilizindua muungano wa WHO wa kutokomeza Trakoma Duniani kufikia mwaka 2020 (GET 2020). Pamoja na washirika wengine katika muungano, WHO inaunga mkono utekelezaji wa mkakati SAFE nchini na uimarishaji wa uwezo wa kitaifa kupitia tathmini ya magonjwa, usimamiaji, ufuatiliaji, tathmini ya mradi na uhamasishaji wa rasilimali unaochangia kutokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. Muongozo, ulioidhinishwa na baraza la afya Duniani mwaka 2020 kupitia uamuzi wake wa 73(33), inaweka 2030 kama tarehe mpya inayolengwa ya kutokomezwa Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Faktor za hatari za mazingira kwa upenyezi wa matawi ni pamoja na usafi mbaya, makazi yenye watu wengi, upatikanaji mdogo wa maji au matumizi ya vifaa vya usafi, na pia, mwaka wa 1996, Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) ilianzisha "WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020)". Pamoja na washiriki wengine katika umoja, WHO inasaidia utekelezaji wa sera ya SAFE katika nchi na kuimarisha uwezo wa kitaifa kupitia tathmini ya epidemiolojia,wachungaji, utambuzi, tathmini ya miradi na utengenezaji wa rasilimali, ili kuunga mkono kupunguza upenyezi wa matawi kama tatizo la afya. Mendela, iliyoidhinishwa na Kamati ya Afya Duniani mwaka wa 2020 kupitia uamuzi 73(33), inaweka mwaka wa 2030 kama tarehe mpya ya lengo kwa upenyezi wa matawi.

translations.source: 152 million babies born preterm in the last decade Of every 10 babies born, 1 is preterm – and every 40 seconds, 1 of those babies dies Preterm birth rates have not changed in the past decade in any region of the world The impacts of conflict, climate change, COVID-19 are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere Action is needed urgently to improve the prevention of preterm birth, alongside better care for affected babies and their families
translations.reference: Watoto milioni 152 walizaliwa njiti katika muongo uliopita Kati ya watoto 10 wanaozaliwa, 1 ni njiti - na kila sekunde 40, mtoto 1 kati ya hao hufariki Viwango vya kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati havijabadilika katika muongo mmoja uliopita katika eneo lolote la Dunia. Athari za migogoro, mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, UVIKO-19 zinaongeza hatari kwa wanawake na watoto kila mahali. Hatua zinahitajika haraka ili kuboresha uzuiaji wa kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, pamoja na utunzaji bora kwa watoto walioathiriwa na familia zao.
translations.hypothesis: Milioni 152 za watoto zamezaliwa mapema katika miaka ya mwisho. Kwa kila 10 watoto waliozaliwa, 1 ni wa mapema – na kila dakika 40, 1 wa watoto hao anafariki. Kiwango cha kuzaliwa mapema hakijabadilika katika miaka ya mwisho katika kila eneo duniani. Athari za vita, mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, na COVID-19 zinaongeza hatari kwa wanawake na watoto kila mahali. Ni muhimu kuchukua hatua haraka ili kuboresha ulinzi dhidi ya kuzaliwa mapema, pamoja na utunzaji bora kwa watoto na familia zao.

translations.source: An estimated 13.4 million babies were born pre-term in 2020, with nearly 1 million dying from preterm complications, according to a new report released by United Nations agencies and partners today. This is equivalent to around 1 in 10 babies born early (before 37 weeks of pregnancy) worldwide. Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth, produced by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) together with PMNCH -- the world’s largest alliance for women, children, and adolescents, sounds the alarm on a “silent emergency” of preterm birth, long under-recognized in its scale and severity, which is impeding progress in improving children’s health and survival. The report includes updated estimates from WHO and UNICEF, prepared with the London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, on the prevalence of preterm births. Overall, it finds that preterm birth rates have not changed in any region in the world in the past decade, with 152 million vulnerable babies born too soon from 2010 to 2020.
translations.reference: Inakadiriwa watoto milioni 13.4 walizaliwa Njiti mwaka 2020, na karibu milioni 1 wakifa kutokana na matatizo ya unjiti, kulingana na ripoti mpya iliyotolewa leo na mashirika ya umoja wa mataifa. Hii ni sawa na mtoto 1 kati ya 10 aliyezaliwa mapema (kabla ya wiki 37 za ujauzito) Duniani kote. Alizaliwa hivi karibuni: Muongo wa hatua juu ya kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, iliyotolewa na shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) na shirika la Umoja wa mataifa la kuhudumia watoto (UNICEF) pamoja na PMNCH - muungano mkubwa zaidi Duniani wa wanawake, watoto, na vijana, inapiga kengele kwenye "Dharura ya kimya kimya" ya kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, ambayo haijatambuliwa kwa muda mrefu katika kiwango na ukali wake, ambayo inazuia maendeleo katika kuboresha afya na maisha ya watoto. Ripoti hiyo inajumuisha makadirio yaliyosasishwa kutoka WHO na UNICEF, iliyotayarishwa na shule ya London ya usafi na madawa ya kitropiki, kuhusu kuenea kwa watoto wanaozaliwa kabla ya wakati. Kwa ujumla, ripoti inagundua kuwa viwango vya kuzaliwa Njiti havijabadilika katika eneo lolote Duniani katika muongo mmoja uliopita, na watoto milioni 152 walio katika mazingira magumu walizaliwa hivi karibuni kutoka 2010 hadi 2020.
translations.hypothesis: Kulingana na ripoti mpya iliyotolewa na mashirika na washiriki wa Umoja wa Mataifa leo, takriban watoto milioni 13.4 walizaliwa mapema mwaka wa 2020, na takriban milioni 1 wamefariki kutokana na matatizo ya kuzaliwa mapema. Hii ni sawa na takriban 1 katika kila 10 watoto waliozaliwa mapema (kabla ya wiki 37 za ujauzito) duniani. "Kuzaliwa mapema: decada ya hatua katika kuzaliwa mapema," iliyotengenezwa na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) na Mfuko wa Watoto wa Umoja wa Mataifa (UNICEF), pamoja na PMNCH – chama kubwa zaidi duniani kwa wanawake, watoto, na vijana, inaonya kuhusu "dharura isiyo ya kawaida" ya kuzaliwa mapema, ambayo haijulikwa sana katika ukubwa na umuhimu, na inathibitisha maendeleo katika kuboresha afya na maisha ya watoto. Ripoti hiyo ina takwimu za hivi punde kutoka kwa WHO na UNICEF, ambazo zimetayarishwa na Shule ya Afya na Sayari ya London, kuhusu idadi ya kuzaliwa mapema. Katika jumla, ripoti inaonyesha kuwa, kasi za kuzaliwa mapema hazijabadilika katika eneo lolote duniani katika kipindi cha miaka kumi, na takriban watoto milioni 152 wamezaliwa mapema kati ya mwaka wa 2010 na 2020.

translations.source: Preterm birth is now the leading cause of child deaths, accounting for more than 1 in 5 of all deaths of children occurring before their 5th birthday. Preterm survivors can face lifelong health consequences, with an increased likelihood of disability and developmental delays. Survival gaps by region, income, race Building from a landmark report on the topic in 2012, this new Born too soon “decade” report provides a comprehensive overview of the prevalence of preterm birth and its profound impact on women, families, societies and economies. Too often, where babies are born determines if they survive.
translations.reference: Kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati sasa ndio sababu kuu ya vifo vya watoto, ikichukua zaidi ya 1 kati ya vifo 5 vya watoto vinavyotekea kabla ya miaka 5 ya kuzaliwa. Waathirika wa kuzaliwa Njiti hukabiliwa na matokeo ya afya ya maisha yote, na kuongezeka uwezekano wa ulemavu na uchelewaji wa maendeleo. Mapengo ya kuishi kwa kanda, kipato, rangi Kutokana na ripoti ya kihistoria kuhusu mada mnamo 2012, ripoti hii mpya ya "Muongozo" wa kuzaliwa hivi karibuni inatoa muhtasari wa kina wa kuenea kwa kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati na athari zake kwa wanawake, familia, jamii na uchumi. Mara nyingi mno, mahali ambapo watoto huzaliwa huamua kama wataishi.
translations.hypothesis: Kujifungua mapema ni sababu kuu ya vifo vya watoto, na inaathiri zaidi ya 1 katika 5 vya vifo vyote vya watoto kabla ya kumalizika miaka 5. Watoto waliojifungua mapema wanaweza kukabiliana na matokeo ya kiafya kwa muda mrefu, na kuna uwezekano wa juu wa kuwa na ulemavu na kingo katika maendeleo. Fursa za kuishi kulingana na eneo, kipato, na kabila. Kulingana na ripoti muhimu kuhusu suala hilo mwaka wa 2012, ripoti hii mpya kuhusu "kujifungua mapema" inatoa muhtasari kamili kuhusu utawapo wa kujifungua mapema na athari yake kubwa kwa wanawake, familia, jamii, na uchumi. Kawaida, mahali ambapo watoto hujaweza, husababisha ikiwa watakuwa hai.

translations.source: The report notes that only 1 in 10 extremely preterm babies (<28 weeks) survive in low-income countries, compared to more than 9 in 10 in high-income countries. Gaping inequalities related to race, ethnicity, income, and access to quality care determine the likelihood of preterm birth, death, and disability, even in high-income countries. Southern Asia and sub-Saharan Africa have the highest rates of preterm birth, and preterm babies in these regions face the highest mortality risk. Together, these two regions account for more than 65% of preterm births globally. The report also highlights that the impacts of conflict, climate change and environmental damage, COVID-19, and rising living costs are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere.
translations.reference: Ripoti hiyo inabainisha kuwa ni mtoto 1 kati ya 10 wanaozaliwa mapema kabla ya wakati (chini ya wiki 28) wanaishi katika nchi zenye kipato cha chini, ikilinganishwa na zaidi ya 9 kati ya 10 katika nchi zenye kipato cha juu. Pengo la ukosefu wa usawa kuhusiana na rangi, kabila, mapato, ufikiaji wa huduma bora huamua uwezekano wa kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, kifo, na ulemavu, hata katika nchi zenye kipato cha juu. Kusini mwa Asia na Afrika kusini mwa jangwa la Sahara ndizo zinazo viwango vya juu zaidi vya kuzaliwa Njiti, na watoto wachanga katika maeneo haya wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa zaidi ya vifo. Kwa pamoja, maeneo haya mawili yanachaangia zaidi ya 65% ya watoto wanaozaliwa kabla ya wakati wao kukamilika Duniani. Pia ripoti hiyo inaangazia kwamba athari za migogoro, mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, na uharibifu wa mazingira, UVIKO-19, na kupanda kwa gharama za maisha kunaongeza hatari kwa wanawake na watoto kila mahali.
translations.hypothesis: Taarifa hiyo inaonyesha kwamba, katika nchi za chini ya afya, tu watoto 1 kati ya 10 wanaishi, ikilinganishwa na zaidi ya 9 kati ya 10 katika nchi za afya.  Falsafa kubwa zinazohusiana na kabla, lugha, kipato, na upatikanaji wa huduma bora, zinaamua uwezekano wa kuzaliwa mapema, kufariki, na kuwa na ulemavu, hata katika nchi za afya. Asia ya Kusini na Afrika ya Mashariki zina viwango vya juu vya kuzaliwa mapema, na watoto wanaozaliwa mapema katika eneo hili, wana hatari kubwa ya kufariki. Pamoja, eneo hili mbili hutoa zaidi ya 65% ya kuzaliwa mapema duniani. Taarifa hiyo pia inaonyesha kwamba, athari za vita, mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, na uharibifu wa mazingira, COVID-19, na gharama za maisha zinazoongezeka, zinaongeza hatari kwa wanawake na watoto kila mahali.

translations.source: For example, air pollution is estimated to contribute to 6 million preterm births each year. Nearly 1 in 10 preterm babies are born in the 10 most fragile countries affected by humanitarian crises, according to a new analysis in the report. Maternal health risks, such as adolescent pregnancy and pre-eclampsia, are closely linked to preterm births. This underlines the need to ensure access to sexual and reproductive health services, including effective family planning, with high-quality care in pregnancy and around the time of birth. Agenda for action: more country investment and parent-led activism
translations.reference: Kwa mfano, uchafuzi wa hewa unakadiriwa kuchangia watoto milioni 6 wanaozaliwa Njiti kila mwaka. Karibu mtoto 1 kati ya 10 anayezaliwa kabla ya wakati analiwa katika nchi 10 dhaifu zaidi zilizoathiriwa na majanga ya kibinadamu, kulingana na uchambuzi mpya katika ripoti hiyo. Hatari za afya ya Uzazi, kama vile mimba za utotoni na pre-eclampsia, zinahusishwa kwa karibu na kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati. Hii inasisitiza haya ya kuhakikisha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya ngono na uzazi, ikiwa ni pamoja na upangaji uzazi bora, na utunzaji wa hali ya juu wakati wa ujauzito na wakati wa kujifungua. Ajenda ya utekelezaji: uwekezaji zaidi wa nchi na harakati zinazoongozwa na wazazi
translations.hypothesis: Kwa mfano, mchakafu wa hewa unaelezwa kuwa unaunga mkono kuzaliwa mapema kwa milioni 6 kila mwaka. Kitaro, takriban moja kati ya kumi wa watoto waliozaliwa mapema, huzaulwa katika nchi 10 zinazoathiriwa sana na viongozi, kulingana na uchambuzi mpya katika ripoti. Hatari za afya ya mama, kama vile ujauzito wa watoto na ujauzito wa mapema, zinahusishwa sana na kuzaliwa mapema. Hii inaonyesha umuhimu wa kuhakikisha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya kiafamia, pamoja na mpango wa familia, na huduma bora wakati wa ujauzito na wakati wa kuzaliwa. Mpango wa hatua: uwekezaji zaidi wa nchi na utoaji nguvu na familia

translations.source: The past decade has also seen a growth of community activism on preterm birth and stillbirth prevention, driven by networks of parents, health professionals, academia, civil society, and others. Throughout the world, groups for affected families of preterm birth have been at the forefront of advocating for access to better care and policy change and supporting other families. Leading up to the International Maternal Newborn Health Conference, in Cape Town, South Africa from 8-11 May, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA and PMNCH are calling for the following actions to improve care for women and newborns and mitigate risks from preterm births: Increased investments: Mobilizing international and domestic resources to optimize maternal and newborn health, ensuring high quality care is provided when and where it is needed. Accelerated implementation: Meeting country targets for progress through implementing established national policies for maternal and newborn care.
translations.reference: Pia muuongo uliopita umeshuhudia ukuaji wa harakati wa jamii juu ya kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati na kuzuia uzazi, unaoendeshwa na mitandao ya wazazi, wataalamu wa afya, wasomi, Asasi za kiraia, na wengine. Kote ulimwenguni, Makundi ya familia zilizoathiriwa za kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati wao wamekuwa mstari wa mbele kutetea upatikanaji wa matunzo bora na mabadiliko ya sera na kusaidia familia nyingine. Kuelekea kongamano la kimataifa la afya ya mama wajawazito, huko Cape Town, Afrika Kusini, kuanzia tarehe 8-11 Mei, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA na PMMNCH wanatoa wito wa kuchukua hatua zifuatazo ili kuboresha huduma kwa wanawake na watoto wachanga na kupunguza hatari zinazotokana na kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati: Ongezeko la uwekezaji: Kuhamasisha rasilimali za kimataifa na za ndani ili kuboresha afya ya uzazi na watoto wachanga, kuhakikisha utunzaji wa hali ya juu unatolewa wakati na mahali unapohitajika. Kuharakisha utekelezaji: Kufikia malengo ya nchi kwa ajili ya maendeleo kupitia sera zilizowekwa za kitaifa za utunzaji wa uzazi na watoto wachanga.
translations.hypothesis: Miaka ya nyuma pia imewahi kuona ongezeko la shughuli za jamii kuhusu kupunguza kuzaliwa mapema na kuzaliwa bila maisha, ambazo zimevutiwa na mitandao ya wazazi, wataalamu wa afya, taasisi za elimu, jamii, na wengine. Kote ulimwenguni, vikundi vya familia zinazohusika na kuzaliwa mapema vimekuwa katika nafasi ya kwanza katika kuendeleza ufikiaji wa huduma bora na mabadiliko ya sera, na pia kusaidia familia zingine. Kabla ya Kongamano la Kimataifa la Afya ya Mama na Mtoto, katika Cape Town, Afrika Kusini, kutoka Mei 8 hadi Mei 11, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA na PMNCH wanaendelea kuomba hatua zifuatazo ili kuboresha huduma kwa wanawake na watoto, na kupunguza hatari za kuzaliwa mapema: Viwango vya uwekezaji: Kutumia rasilimali za kimataifa na za ndani ili kuboresha afya ya mama na watoto, na kuhakikisha kuwa huduma bora zinatozwa wakati na mahali ambapo zinahitajika. Utekelezaji wa haraka: Kutoa malengo ya taifa kwa maendeleo kupitia utekelezaji wa sera za kitaifa za huduma ya mama na watoto.

translations.source: Integration across sectors: Promoting education through the life cycle; supporting smarter economic investments, with co-financing across sectors; strengthening climate adaptation responses across the life-course; and advancing the coordination and resilience of emergency systems. Locally driven innovation: Investing in locally led innovation and research to support improvements in quality of care and equity in access. Quotes: Prof. Joy Lawn, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine Co-lead, Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023) and Born too soon (2012) "This new report shows that the cost of inaction over the last decade was 152 million babies born too soon.
translations.reference: Ushirikiano katika sekta zote: Kukuza elimu kupitia mzunguko wa maisha; kusaidia uwekezaji mzuri wa kiuchumi; ufadhili wa pamoja katika sekta zote; kuimarisha majibu ya kukabiliana na hali ya hewa katika kipindi chote cha maisha; na kuendeleza uratibu na uthabiti wa mifumo ya dharura. Uvumbuzi unaoendeshwa ndani ya nchi: Kuwekeza katika uvumbuzi na utafiti unaoongozwa na ndani ili kusaidia uboreshaji wa ubora wa utunzaji na usawa katika ufikiaji. Nukuu: Profesa Joy Lawn, Shule ya London ya usafi na Tiba ya kitropiki Kiongozi mwenza, Alizaliwa hivi karibuni: Muongo wa hatua juu ya kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati (2023) na kuzaliwa hivi karibuni (2012) "Ripoti hii mpya inaonyesha kuwa gharama ya kutochukua hatua katika muongo uliopita ilikuwa watoto milioni 152 walizaliwa mapema sana.
translations.hypothesis: Ushirikiano katika sekta mbalimbali: Kushawishi elimu katika hatua zote za maisha; kusaidia matumizi bora za kiuchumi, kwa ushirikiano katika sekta mbalimbali; kuimarisha majibu ya kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya hali; na kuendeleza ushirikiano na uendelevu wa mifumo ya dharura. Uendelevu wa ndani: Kuwekeza katika uvumbuzi na utafiti unaoongozwa ndani, ili kusaidia kuboresha ubora wa huduma na usawa katika upatikanaji. Maoni: Prof. Joy Lawn, Shule ya Afya na Tiba ya London, Mshiriki mkuu, "Tulazwa mapema: decada ya matendo kuhusu kuzaliwa mapema (2023) na "Tulazwa mapema (2012) "Taarifa hii mpya inaonyesha kwamba gharama ya kutotenda katika miaka ya mwisho ilikuwa watoto 152 milioni waliozaliwa mapema.

translations.source: While some regions are more affected, preterm birth threatens health progress in every country. Greater investment in the care of vulnerable newborns can save millions of families from heartbreak. More work is also needed to prevent preterm birth, which will also improve progress in reducing stillbirths and maternal deaths. Together these twin tracks of preterm prevention and care will produce healthier individuals and societies to deliver on economic and social development. Our next generation depends on us all acting now -- the investment may not be small but the returns on this investment will be major for every country"
translations.reference: Wakati baadhi ya maeneo yameathiriwa zaidi, uzazi wa mapema unatishia maendeleo ya kiafya katika kila nchi. Uwekezaji mkubwa katika utunzaji wa watoto wachanga walio katika mazingira magumu unaweza kuokoa mamilioni ya familia kutokana na huzuni. Pia kazi zaidi inahitajika ili kuzuia kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, ambayo pia itaboresha maendeleo katika kupunguza vifo vya uzazi na vifo vya watoto wachanga. Kwa pamoja kauli mbizi hizi za kuzuia na kutunzaa kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati zitazalisha watu binafsi na jamii zenye afya zaidi ili kuleta maendeleo ya kiuchumi na kijamii. Kizazi chetu kijacho kinatutegemea sisi sote kuchukua hatua sasa -- uwekezaji unaweza usiwe mdogo lakini faida ya uwekezaji huu itakuwa kubwa kwa nchi"
translations.hypothesis: Hata hivyo, baadhi yaeneo zinaathirika zaidi, lakini kuzaliwa mapema kunathwamini maendeleo ya afya katika kila nchi. Uwekezaji zaidi katika utunzaji wa watoto wachanga wanaohitaji huduma, unaweza kuokoa mamilioni ya familia kutoka kwenye majuma. Pia, ni muhimu kufanya kazi zaidi ili kuzuia kuzaliwa mapema, ambayo pia itasaidia kuboresha maendeleo katika kupunguza kuzaliwa bila maisha na vifo vya wanawake. Pamoja, njia hizi mbili za kuzuia kuzaliwa mapema na utunzaji, zitatoa watu na jamii afya zaidi, na hivyo kuleta maendeleo kiuchumi na kijamii. Muundo wetu wa baadaye anategemea sisi sote kuchukua hatua - Uwekezaji si wa kawaida, lakini matumizi ya uwekezaji huu yanaweza kuwa kubwa kwa kila nchi.

translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) “There is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.”
translations.reference: Dk Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon mwandishi mwenza na kiongozi wa kitaifa wa Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) "Sasa hakuna kisingizio cha kunyamaza. Sasa tuna mikononi mwetu vifaa na maarifa ya kubadilisha matokeo kwa watoto wetu wachanga walio katika mazingira magumu zaidi. Najivunia kuona serikali yangu sasa inawekeza na kujitolea utekelezaji hata maeneo ya vijijini. Muongo ujao uanaweza na lazima uwe tofauti kwa wale wanaokabiliwa na kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati hapa na kila mahali"
translations.hypothesis: Dato Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Mwandishi wa "Born Too Soon" na mwenyekiti wa taifa wa "Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360)" "Sasa hakuna sababu ya kuendelea kimya. Sasa tuna vifaa na maarifa ambazo zitatusaidia kubadilisha matokeo kwa watoto wachanga ambao wana hatari kubwa. Natumai sana kuona serikali yangu sasa inatumia rasilimali na imejitolea kutumia teknolojia katika maeneo yote, hata kwenye maeneo mbalimbali. Decadi ijayo inaweza na lazima kuwa tofauti kwa wale wanaozaliwa mapema hapa na kila mahali."

translations.source: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO “Ensuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.” Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF “After every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: Anshu Banerjee, mkurugenzi wa afya ya uzazi, watoto wachanga, watoto na vijana ndani ya WHO "Kuhakikisha huduma bora kwa watoto hawa wadogo zaidi, walio katika mazingira magumu zaidi na familia zao ni muhimu sana kwa kuboresha afya na maisha ya mtoto. Pia maendeleo yanahitajika ili kusaidia kuzuia uzazi kabla ya wakati -- hii inamaana kwamba kila mwanamke lazima aweze kupata huduma bora za afya kabla na wakati wa ujauzito ili kutambua na kudhibiti hatari" Steven Lauwerier, mkurugenzi wa afya (a.i.), UNICEF "Baada ya kila kifo cha mapema ni njia ya kupotez na kuvunjika moyo.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Anshu Banerjee, Mkurugenzi wa Afya ya Mama, Watoto, na Watu Wajawazishi na Uzee katika WHO "Kuhakikisha huduma bora kwa watoto wadogo, ambao ni hatarini, na familia zao ni muhimu sana kwa kuboresha afya ya watoto na kuwakuza. Pia, ni muhimu kufanya juhudi za kuzuia kuzaliwa mapema – hii inamaanisha kuwa kila mama lazima anaweza kupata huduma bora za afya kabla na wakati wa ujauzito ili kutambua na kudhibiti hatari."
