Steven Lauwerier, Mkurugenzi wa Afya (wa muda), UNICEF "Baada ya kila kuzaliwa mapema, kuna hasara na huzuni.

translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. It’s time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.” Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH “Born too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth – the world’s largest cause of death of children under the age of five.
translations.reference: Licha ya maendele mengi ambayo ulimwengu umefanya katika muongo mmoja uliopita, hataujafanya maendeleo yoyote katika kupunguza idadi ya watoto wadogo wanaozaliwa mapema au kuepusha hatari ya kifo chao. Uhuru ni mbaya. Ni wakati wa kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma kwa mama wajawazito na watoto wachanga wanaozaliwa kabla ya wakati na kuhakikisha kila mtoto anapata mwanzo mzuri na kustawi maishani" Helga Fogstad, mkurugenzi mtendaji, PMNCH "Kuzaliwa mapema kunasisitiza kwa nini ni lazima kuongeza uwekezaji na uwajibikaji kwa kuzaliwa kabla ya wakati, sababu kubwa zaidi ya vifo vya watoto chini ya umri wa miaka mitano, Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Licha ya maendeleo mengi ambayo dunia imefanya katika miaka ya hivi majuzi, hatuwezesha kupunguza idadi ya watoto wachanga ambao huja dunia mapema, au kupunguza hatari ya kufariki. Hali hii ni mbaya sana. Ni wakati wa kuboresha ufikiaji wa huduma kwa mama wanaokwenda kujifungua na watoto wachanga, na kuhakikisha kwamba kila mtoto anapata mwanzo wa afya na anaendelea kuishi. – Helga Fogstad, Mkurugenzi Mkuu, PMNCH "Watoto wachanga huonyesha kwa sababu lazima tuweze kuongeza uwekezaji na uwajibikaji katika hatua za awali – ni sababu kubwa zaidi ya vifo vya watoto chini ya umri wa miaka mitano."

translations.source: Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. “By working together in partnership – governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals – we can sound the alarm about this “silent emergency”, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. ”Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of Jalen’s Gift Foundation “Our foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and that’s when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Maendeleo yanadorora kwa afya ya uzazi na watoto wachanga, vilevile kuzuia watoto wanaokufa, na sasa yamerejeshwa nyuma zaidi kupitia mchanganyiko mbaya wa UVIKO_19, mabadiliko ya hewa, migogoro inayoongezeka na kupanda kwa gharama za maisha. "Kwa kufanya kazi pamoja kwa ushirikiano- serikali, wafadhili, sekta binafsi, asasi za kiraia, wazazi, na wataalamu wa afya - tunaweza kupinga kengele kuhusu "Dharura hii ya kimya", na kuleta jitihada za kuzuia na matunzo mbele ya afya ya kitaifa na juhudi za maendeleo, kujenga mtaji wa watu kwa kusaidia familia, jamii na uchumi kila mahali". "Gabriela na Jerome Foster, Las Vegaz, Marekani: wazazi wa Janel Foster, na waanzilishi wa Wakafu wa Jalen Gift. "Wakfu wetu ulianzishwa baada ya kufiwa na mtoto wetu wa kiume, Jalen Foster, ambae alijifungua mtoto Njiti akiwa na wiki 27 kutokana na kutokea kwa Bakteria wanaojulikana kama Streptococcus kundi B. Kumpoteza mtoto wetu wa kiume kulituumiza sana, na hakukuwa na usaidizi katika jamii na ndipo tulipoamua kutoa mahali pa faraja na matumaini kwa familia ambazo zimepoteza mtoto.
translations.hypothesis: Maendeleo katika afya ya mama na watoto wajayo, pamoja na kupunguza vifo vya watoto, yamepungua, na sasa imepungua zaidi kutokana na mchanganyiko mbaya la COVID-19, mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, migogoro inayoonzeka, na gharama za maisha zinazoonzeka. "Kwa kufanya kazi pamoja – vyama vya serikali, washiriki, sekta binafsi, jamii, wazazi, na wataalamu wa afya – tunaweza kuwatazamia "dharura hii isiyojulikana", na kuleta juhudi za kuzuia vifo vya mapema na matibabu katika mwanzo wa juhudi za afya na maendeleo za kitaifa, kwa kujenga rasilimali za binadamu kwa kusaidia familia, jamii, na uchumi kila mahali. "Gabriela na Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, Marekani: wazazi wa Jalen Foster, na wamiliki wa Jalen's Gift Foundation "Tunaanzisha taasisi yetu baada ya kupoteza mwanao, Jalen Foster, ambaye alifariki mapema wakati wa wiki 27, kutokana na kuenea kwa bakteria inayojulikana kama streptococcus ya aina B. Kupoteza mwanao ilikuwa jambo mbaya, na hakuna msaada katika jamii, na ndiyo tuliamua kutoa nafasi ya faraja na matumaini kwa familia ambazo zimepoteza mtoto.

translations.source: We didn’t want other families to feel like we did – alone. So, we started Jalen’s Gift Foundation to help other families going through a loss, to provide multiple free services, such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” ***Download the Born too soon media resources
translations.reference: Hatukutaka familia nyingine zijisikie kama sisi- peke yao. Kwa hiyo, tulianzisha Wakfu wa Jalen Gift ili kusaidia huduma nyingi bila malipo, kama vile picha, usaidizi wa huzuni na usaidizi kuelekea huduma za ukumbusho" *** Pakua Born too Soon rasilimali za media
translations.hypothesis: Hatutaka familia zingine kujisikia sawa na sisi – kuwa peke. Kwa hiyo, tulianzisha Jalen’s Gift Foundation ili kusaidia familia zingine zinazokumbana na hasara, kutoa huduma mbalimbali za bure, kama vile picha, msaada wa majasoro, na msaada kwa sherehe za kumbukumbu. ***Pakua rasilimali za media za "Born too soon"

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict.
translations.reference: UAE na WHO zinapeleka vifaa muhimu vya matibabu nchini sudani Umoja wa falme za kiarabu (UAE) na shirika la afya Duniani zimewasilisha tani 30 za vifaa vya dharura vya matibabu nchini sudani leo. Ndege iliyobeba vifaa vya matibabu ya majeraha, upasuaji wa dharura, dawa muhimu iliwasili katika uwanja wa ndege wa Port sudan mapema leo asubuhi. Shehena hiyo, yenye thamani ya Dola za kimarekani 444,000, ni ya kwanza ambayo WHO imeweza kuwasilisha kwa ndege hadi Sudani tangu kuzuka kwa mzozo huo. WHO ilisambaza vifaa kwa vituo vya afya kabla ya kuongezeka kwa mgogoro.
translations.hypothesis: UAE na WHO hupeleka vifaa muhimu vya matibabu kwa Sudan. United Arab Emirates (UAE) na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) leo wamepeleka mizigo ya vifaa muhimu vya matibabu kwa thamani ya tani 30 kwenda Sudan. ndege iliyo na vifaa vya matibabu, shughuli za dharura, na dawa muhimu ilifika kwenye Uwanja wa Ndege wa Port Sudan mapema leo. Mizigo, zenye thamani ya dola milioni 444, ni za kwanza ambazo WHO zameuwezesha kupeleka kwa ndege kwenda Sudan tangu kuanza mapigano. WHO walitawala vifaa kwenye hospitali kabla ya mapigano kuongezeka.

translations.source: These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAE’s humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.
translations.reference: Viliishiwa baada ya siku chache kutokana idadi ya waliojeruhiwa. Kutumwa kwa ndege hiyo kunakuja kama sehemu ya juhudi za umoja wa falme za kiarabu kuwaunga mkono watu wa Sudani na kuakisi uhusiano wake wa kina na Sudani, hasa kwa kuzingatia hali ya sasa ya nchi hiyo. Pia misaada hiyo ni upanuzi wa maono ya kibinadamu ya UAE na inasisitiza uhusiano wake na nchi nyingie na kulingana na udugu wa kibinadamu na kujitolea kwake kusaidia wengine wakati wa majanga na hali za Dharura. Dk Reem binti Ebrahim Al hashimy, waziri wa nchi na ushirikiano wa kimataifa, alisema kuwa UAE "inaendelea kufanya kazi kwa karibu na shirika la afya Duniani ili kuhakikisha kupelekwa kwa shughuli muhimu za usafirishaji kutuma msaada wa haraka wa matibabu na chakula kusaisaidia kukabiliana na mzozo wa sasa nchini sudani. Sambamba na kutoa wito kwa pande zote za mzozo wa sasa kusitisha mara moja uhasama na kupunguza hali inayosababisha mateso yasiyoelezeka kwa watu wa Sudani, UAE iko imara katika ahadi yake ya kutoa misaada ya usaidizi kwa nchi wakati wa mahitaji.
translations.hypothesis: Hii ilikuwa baada ya siku chache, kutokana na idadi kubwa ya watu waliopata majeraha. Ujumbe wa ndege ni sehemu ya juhudi za soka za UAE katika kusaidia raia wa Sudan, na inaonyesha uhusiano wa kina kati ya UAE na Sudan, haswa katika hali halisi ambayo nchi hiyo inakumbana nayo. Pia, msaada huu ni sehemu ya mtazamo wa kiutu wa UAE, na unaonyesha uhusiano wake na nchi zingine, kulingana na umoja wa binadamu na kujitolea wake katika kusaidia wengine wakati wa majanga na hali hatari. Dkt Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Waziri wa Serikali wa Ushirikiano wa Kimataifa, alisema kwamba "UAE inaendelea kufanya kazi kwa karibu na Shirika la Afya Duniani ili kuhakikisha utekelezaji wa mafanikio wa shughuli muhimu za logistika, ili kutuma msaada wa haraka wa matibabu na chakula ili kusaidia kutatua mgogoro uliopo hivi sasa nchini Sudan. Pamoja na maombi kwa pando zote za mgogoro huu kuacha mapigano mara moja na kupunguza mvutano, UAE ina kujitolea katika kutoa msaada na usaidizi kwa nchi wakati wa mahitaji.

translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict – and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.” The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need.
translations.reference: Umoja wa falme za kiarabu unalenga hasa kutoa mahitaji ya makundi yaliyo hatarini zaidi yaliyoathiriwa na hali nchini Sudani, hususani wagonjwa, watoto, wazee na wanawake ambao wapo katika hatari zaidi kutokana na mzozo unaoendelea - na safari hizi za ndege moja kwa moja zitatua mapengo makubwa zaidi katika utoaji wa matibabu na chakula. Maadili ya kibinadmu yaliyoshikiliwa kwa kina ya UAE yamemaanisha kwamba imehakikisha kuwa imeendelea kuwasiliana na ulimwengu kujitolea kwake kwa nguvu na kwa kudumu katika kuimarisha amani, usalama na utulivu, sio tu kikanda, lakini pia Duniani kote, wakati wa pamoja na washirika wake na jumuia ya kimataifa, nchi imendelea kusaidia watu wa Sudani wakati wa machafuko" vifaa ni pamoja na kiwewe cha kutosha, vifaa vya upasuaji wa Dharura, na dawa muhimu kufikia mara moja watu 165,000 ambao wanahitaji sana msaada wa kibinadamu. Vituo vya afya kote nchini vinaripoti kuwa vimekosa vifaa vya msingi vya afya na kwamba Bohari ya Taifa ya Dawa haifikii tena kutokana na hali ya usalama. Miongoni mwa msaada mwingine, WHO inapeleka wataalamu wawili wa vifaa vya Dharura wanaosafiri na mizigo ili kuhakikisha kwamba vifaa hivi vinasambazwa mara moja kwa vituo vikuu 13 vya afya ili kusaidia wahudumu wa afya na kupanua huduma kwa wale wanaohitaji.
translations.hypothesis: Umoja wa Emirati Arauni (UAE) ina umakini maalum katika kuwasaidia kundi lililokuwa katika hatari kubwa, haswa wagonjwa, watoto, watu wazee, na wanawake ambao wana hatari kubwa kutokana na mgogoro unaoendelea – na safari hizi za msaada zitatoa suluhisho moja kwa moja kwa mapungufu muhimu katika utoaji wa huduma za matibabu na chakula. Miongozo ya kimbinadamu ya UAE, ambazo ni muhimu, ime maana kwamba imehakikisha kuwa inaendelea kuwasiliana na ulimwengu kuhusu kujitolea lake kali na usio na kifani katika kuimarisha amani, usalama na utulivu, sio tu katika eneo, lakini pia ulimwenguni kote, huku ikiwa na washirika na jamii ya kimataifa. Nchi inaendelea kusaidia raia wa Sudan katika wakati wa dharura. Rasilimali za afya ni pamoja na vifaa vya kuzuia majeraha, vifaa muhimu vya upasuaji wa dharura, na dawa muhimu, ambazo zitatoa msaada kwa watu 165,000 ambao wana haja kubwa ya msaada wa kimbinadamu. Kituo za afya katika nchi nzima zina taarifa kuwa wamepoteza rasilimali za msingi za afya, na maduka ya kitaifa ya matibabu si nafuu kutokana na hali ya usalama. Miongoni mwa msaada, Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) limeituma maafisa wawili wa usafirishaji ambao watatoa vifaa, ili kuhakikisha kuwa vifaa hivi vitawafikia mara moja katika vituo 13 muhimu za afya ili kusaidia wafanyakazi wa afya na kutoa huduma kwa wale wanaohitaji.

translations.source: WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, “The WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses – delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: WHO ina tani nyingine 30 za vifaa kwa ajili ya Malaria na magonjwa yasiyoambukiza kama vile Kisukari na Shikinizo la damu, hali ambayo inaweza kuwa mbaya kama haitibiwi. Mifumo hii na takribani 23,000 ya mifuko ya damu inasomwa ndani ya kituo cha vifaa cha kimataifa cha WHO katika jiji la kimataifa la kibinadamu, na WHO kwa sasa inachunguza uwezekano wote wa kuwasilisha vifaa hivi nchini Sudani haraka iwezekanavyo kwa ushirikiano na wizara ya afya ya Sudani. Dk Michael Ryan, mkurugenzi mtendaji, wa mpango wa Dharura ya afya wa WHO, alisema, "kituo cha usafirishaji cha WHO huko UAE kimekuwa kitovu cha muitiko wa haraka wa matukio ya Dharura ulimwenguni. Husaidia zaidi ya nchi 140 katika maeneo yote 6 ya kijografia ya WHO, kitovu hutoa njia ya kuokoa maisha kwa nchi wanachama zinazokabiliwa na Dharura za kiafya zinazotokana na milipuko ya magonjwa, majanga kama vile mafuriko na matetemeko ya ardhi, na athari za migogoro kwenye mifumo ya afya. Msaada unaotolewa na UAE huwezesha WHO kuwa mstari wa mbele katika majibu haya ya Dharura ya afya- kutoa msaada wa matibabu wa kibingwa kwa wale wanaohitaji popote na wakati wowote inapohitajika.
translations.hypothesis: WHO ina mizigo mengine ya 30 طن za vifaa kwa magonjwa ya malaria na magonjwa isiyoambukiza kama ugonjwa wa sukari na shinikizo, ambayo inaweza kuwa hatari ikiwa hayashughulikiwa. Vifaa hivi na vyenye takriban 23,000 vyenye damu, vinaandaishwa katika kituo cha kimataifa cha logistika cha WHO, katika Jiji la Kimataifa la Msaada, na WHO kwa sasa inaangalia uwezekano zote za kupeleka vifaa hivi nchini Sudan kwa haraka iwezekanavyo, kwa ushirikiano na Wizara ya Afya ya Sudan. Dkt. Michael Ryan, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Programu ya Majilifu ya WHO, alisema, "Kituo cha Kimataifa cha Logistika cha WHO katika UAE, kimekuwa kitovu muhimu katika majibu ya haraka ya vifaa katika matukio ya kimataifa. Kituo hiki, ambacho kinatoa msaada kwa zaidi ya 140 mataifa katika eneo la WHO, kinaendeleza mataifa yanayokumbana na majilifu yanayosababishwa na magonjwa, majanga kama mafuriko na ardhi, na athari za vita kwenye mifumo ya afya. Msaada uliopewa na UAE, unawezesha WHO kuwa katika nafasi inayofaa katika majibu haya ya majilifu – kutoa msaada wa matibabu wa kitaalamu kwa wale wanaohitaji, popote na wakati wowote inahitajika.

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the world’s most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.” For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, “The World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies.
translations.reference: Kama sehemu ya juhudi za kuimarisha usanifu wa kimataifa kwa ajili ya maandalizi ya Dharura ya kiafya, muitikio, na ustahimilivu UAE, WHO, na washirika wanafanya kazi bega kwa bega kupeana vifaa ili kuwafikia waliohatarini zaidi Duniani katika wakati wao wa uhitaji mkubwa" Kwa upande wake, Dk Ahmed Al- Mandhari, mkurugenzi wa WHO kanda ya mashariki ya Mediterania, alisema, "shirika la afya Duniani linaendelea kuratibu na mamlaka ya afya ya Sudani kuwasilisha vifaa muhimu vya afya kupitia njia zote zinazopatikana. Kwa sababu ya mzozo, hospitali, maduka ya dawa na vituo vya huduma ya afya ya msingi vimekosa dawa muhimu, Dawa za kuokoa maisha. Kuwasili kwa tani 30 za ziada za vifaa vya kiwewe na upasuaji wa Dharura vilevile dawa muhimu kutawezesha WHO kusaidia vituo vikuu 13 vya afya na kuanzisha upya huduma za afya kwa wale wanaohitajika. Kituo chetu cha usafirishaji cha kimataifa huko Dubai kina jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha usambazaji usiokatizwa wa bidhaa za afya na tunashukuru kwa usaidizi unaotolewa na umoja wa falme za kiarabu kuwezesha safari yetu ya kwanza ya kukodi ya vifaa hivi vinavyohitajika sana.
translations.hypothesis: Kama sehemu ya juhudi za kuimarisha mfumo wa kimataifa wa tayari, majibu, na uendelevu katika masuala ya afya, UAE, WHO, na washiriki wanaishi pamoja ili kuleta vifaa kwa wale ambao ni hatarini zaidi duniani wakati wanahitaji zaidi. Kwa upande wake, Dkt. Ahmed Al-Mandhari, Mkurugenzi wa WHO kwa eneo la Mashariki ya Kati, alisema, "Shirika la Afya la Dunia linaendelea kusimamia na vyombo vya afya vya Sudan ili kuleta vifaa muhimu za afya kupitia njia zote zinazopatikana. Baada ya mgogoro, hospitali, maduka za dawa, na kituo cha huduma za afya zina vifaa muhimu, ambavyo ni muhimu. Tafadhali, tiba za muhimu, itasaidia WHO kusaidia vituo 13 muhimu za afya na kuweka upya huduma za afya kwa wale ambao wanahitaji. Kituo chetu cha kimataifa cha usafirishaji huko Dubai, kinatoa jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha upokeaji wa mara kwa mara wa bidhaa za afya, na tuna shukrani kwa msaada uliotolewa na UAE ili kuwezesha safari yetu ya kwanza ya vifaa hivi muhimu.

translations.source: It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.” The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Ni msaada kama huu ambao unaonyesha kwa vitendo dira yetu ya kikanda ya afya kwa wote, na wote" Misaada ya matibabu iliyotolewa na shirika la afya Duniani kupita UAE ilichangia takribani 55% ya jumla ya vifaa vya matibabu vilivyotolewa kwa Sudani kutoka nje ya nchi mwaka 2022, ikionyesha nafasi ya UAE kama kitovu cha usaidizi wa kimataifa wa kibinadamu.
translations.hypothesis: Msaada kama huu unaonyesha utendaji wa maono yetu wa kikanda kuhusu afya kwa wote, na kwa wote. Msaada wa matibabu uliopewa na Shirika la Afya Duniani kupitia UAE, ulikuwa takriban 55% ya vifaa vyote vya matibabu vilivyotolewa kwa Sudan kutoka nje ya nchi mwaka wa 2022, na inaonyesha nafasi ya UAE kama kitovu muhimu kwa usaidizi wa kimataifa.

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled “What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?” reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others.
translations.reference: Kushirikiana ndani ya nchi ni muhimu kwa maendeleo ya kimataifa kuelekea SDGs zinazohusiana na afya Ripoti mpya ya maendeleo inatolewa kwa pamoja leo na mashirika 13 yaliyotia saini mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa wa maisha ya afya na ustawi kwa wote (SDG3 GAP). Ripoti yenye anuani "Ni nini kilifanya kazi? Nini haikufanya? Nini kinafuata?" inaakisi miaka minne ya kazi ya pamoja ya mashirika makubwa ya kimataifa inayoelezea kile ambacho hakijafanya kazi katika kuimarisha ushirikiano na usaidizi ili kuharakisha maendeleo ya nchi kuelekea malengo ya maendeleo endelevu (SDGs) yanayohusiana na afya. Mwaka huu ni ishara ya nusu ya kuelekea SDGs, lakini Dunia ipo nyuma kufikia malengo ya kimataifa. Tangu kuzinduliwa kwake mwaka 2019, SDG3 GAP iliwezesha kuundwa kwa miundo mipya ya ushirikiano kati ya mashirika yaliyotia saini katika maeneo muhimu kama vile ufadhili endelevu na huduma ya afya ya msingi miongoni mwa mengine.
translations.hypothesis: Ushirikiano katika eneo ni muhimu kwa maendeleo kimondo katika masuala yanayohusiana na afya. Ripoti mpya ya maendeleo inachapishwa pamoja leo na vyombo 13 vya ushiriki katika "Mpango wa Kimondo wa Afya na Afya Bora kwa Wote" (SDG3 GAP). Ripoti, inayoelewa "Nini lilifanya? Nini halifanya? Nini kinachofuata?", inaonyesha miaka minne ya ushirikiano kati ya vyombo kubwa vya kimondo, na inaeleza kile ambacho kilifanikiwa na kile ambacho halifanikiwa katika kuimarisha ushirikiano na usaidizi ili kuharakisha maendeleo ya nchi katika malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu (SDGs) yanayohusiana na afya. Mwaka huu ni hatua ya katikati kuelekea SDGs, lakini dunia bado inakosa kufikia malengo ya kimondo. Tangu kuzinduliwa mnamo 2019, SDG3 GAP ilitoa fursa ya kuunda miundo mpya ya ushirikiano kati ya vyombo vya ushiriki katika masuala muhimu kama vile ufadhili endelevu na huduma ya afya ya msingi, miongoni mwa mengine.

translations.source: At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. “I thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Angalau nchi 67 zimejihusisha kwenye moja au zaidi ya maudhui ya kichochezi ya SDG3 GAP. "Tumipiga hatua muhimu, lakini bado tuna njia ndefu ya kusafiri ili kuboresha jinsi mashirika ya kimataifa yanayofanya kazi pamoja kusaidia nchi. Lazima tusikilize kile ambacho nchi zinatuambia na kuchukua hatua kulingana na muongozo wao", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO na mwenyekiti wa kundi la wakuu wa SDG3 GAP. "Nawashukuru washirika kwa ushirikiano wao na kwa kujitathmini kwa uaminifu uliomo katika ripoti hii. "Ripoti inatoa mapendekezo sita muhimu ili kuhakikisha kuwa nchi zinanufaika kutokana na usaidizi ulioboreshwa zaidi na kutimiza ahadi zilizotolewa katika SDG3 GAP.
translations.hypothesis: Angalau 67 mataifa zimehusika katika moja au zaidi ya mada za SDG3 GAP za msaada. "Tumefanya maendeleo muhimu, lakini bado tuna njia ndefu ya kusafiri ili kuboresha jinsi mashirika ya kimataifa hushirikiana ili kuunga mkono mataifa. Lazima kusikilize kile mataifa wanatuelewa na kutenda kwa mwongozo lao," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO na mwenyekiti wa Kundi la Viongozi wa SDG3 GAP. "Natumai washirika kwa ushirikiano wao na tathmini za kweli zinazo含まれる katika ripoti hii. "Ripoti ina mapendekezo sita muhimu ili kuhakikisha kuwa mataifa yanafaidika na msaada bora, na kufanikisha ahadi zilizotolewa katika SDG3 GAP.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach;
translations.reference: Mapendekezo hayo ni pamoja na Kuendeleza mzunguko wa uboreshaji wa SDG3 GAP kwa afya kwa kutafuta maoni ya nchi wanachama kuhusu jinsi tunavyoshirikiana katika ngazi ya nchi na kujibu mapendekezo yanayohusiana; Kudumisha GAP kama jukwaa la ushirikiano; Kukuza ushirikiano wenye nguvu katika ngazi ya chini kuhusu huduma ya afya ya msingi na kuchunguza mada mpya kama vile mifumo ya afya inayostahimili hali ya hewa. Kutumia kwa pamoja mbinu mpya katika ngazi ya nchi kama vile uwasilishaji kwa mbinu ya athari;
translations.hypothesis: Hizi ni pamoja na: kuendeleza mchakato wa uboreshaji wa SDG3 kwa afya kwa kupata maoni kutoka kwa mataifa kuhusu jinsi tunashirikiana katika viwango vya taifa, na kujibu mapendekezo husika; kudumisha GAP kama jukwaa la ushirikiano; kuendeleza ushirikiano imara katika viwango vya taifa katika huduma ya afya ya msingi, na kuchunguza mada mpya kama mifumo ya afya inayostahimili mabadiliko ya hali; kutumia njia mpya pamoja katika viwango vya taifa, kama vile mbinu ya "kuleta mabadiliko";

translations.source: engage more with civil society; and work with Member States to strengthen incentives for collaboration through political leadership, governance direction and funding to support collaboration. Key findings of the report will feed into discussions of the next United Nations General Assembly SDG Summit and the High-level Meeting on Universal Health Coverage in September 2023. The months leading up to these key events provide an opportunity for a joint push by Member States and multilateral agencies to identify ways on how to implement the recommendations and to prepare the ground to fully leverage stronger collaboration and accelerate progress towards the health-related SDGs in the second half of the SDG timeframe. Note to the editor:
translations.reference: Kujihusisha zaidi na mashirika ya kiraia; na Kufanya kazi na nchi wanachama ili kuimarisha vitisho vya ushirikiano kupitia uongozi wa kisiasa, mwelekeo wa utawala na ufadhili ili kusaidia ushirikiano. Matokeo muhimu ya ripoti hiyo yatajikita katika majadiliano ya mkutano ujao wa baraza kuu la umoja wa mataifa la SDG na mkutano wa ngazi ya juu kuhusu huduma ya afya kwa wote mnamo Septemba 2023. Miezi kabla ya matukio haya muhimu inatoa fursa kwa msukumo wa pamoja na nchi wanachama na mashirika ya kimataifa kutambua njia za jinsi ya kutekeleza mapendekezo na kuandaa msingi wa kuimarisha ushirikiano wenye nguvu zaidi na kuharakisha maendeleo kuelekea SDGs zinazohusia na afya katika nusu ya pili ya muda wa SDG. Maelezo kwa mhariri:
translations.hypothesis: kuendeleza ushirikiano na jamii; na kufanya kazi na mataifa ili kuimarisha motisha kwa ushirikiano kupitia uongozi, uongozi, na fedha za kusaidia ushirikiano. Matokeo muhimu ya ripoti itatumika katika mazungumzo ya Bunge la Umoja wa Mataifa, kwenye Mkutano wa Malengo yaendelezo (SDGs) na Mkutano wa Kulingana katika Septemba 2023. Aina za kipindi kabla ya hafla hizi zinatoa fursa kwa mataifa na vyombo vya kusaidia kuagiza njia za kutekeleza mapendekezo na kupanga mazingira ili kutumia ushirikiano bora na kuendeleza maendeleo katika malengo yaendelezo yanayohusiana na afya katika nusu ya pili ya muda wa malengo yaendelezo. Muhimu kwa mwandishi:

translations.source: The SDG3 GAP describes how the 13 signatory agencies will adopt new ways of working, building on existing successful collaborations, and jointly align their support around national plans and strategies that are country-owned and -led. The signatories to the SDG3 GAP are Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance; Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO);
translations.reference: SDG3 GAP inaeleza jinsi mashirika 13 yaliyotia saini yatatumia njia mpya za kufanya kazi, kuendeleza ushirikiano uliopo kwenye mafanikio, na kuoanisha kwa pamoja msaada wao katika mipango na mikakati ya kitaifa ambayo inamilikiwa na kuongozwa na nchi. Waliotia saini SDG3 GAP ni Gavi, Muungano wa Chanjo; Ufadhili wa kituo cha kimataifa kwa wanawake, watoto na vijana (GFF); Mfuko wa kimataifa wa kupambana na UKIMWI, kifua kikuu na Malaria (mfuko wa kimataifa); Shirika la kazi la kimataifa (ILO);
translations.hypothesis: SDG3 GAP inafafanua jinsi mashirika 13 za washiriki watachukua njia mpya za kufanya kazi, kwa kujenga kwenye ushirikiano ambao tayari umeonekana, na kwa pamoja kuleta msaada kwa mipango na majaribio za kitaifa ambazo ni za serikali na zinaongozi na serikali. Washiriki wa SDG3 GAP ni Gavi, Shirika la Chanjo; Global Financing Facility kwa Wanawake, Watoto na Watu Wazima (GFF); Global Fund kwa Vita vya Ugonjwa wa AIDS, Tuberculo na Malaria (Global Fund); Shirika la Kijamii la Kimataifa (ILO);

translations.source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); United Nations Development Programme (UNDP); United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA); United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF); Unitaid; United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN Women);
translations.reference: Mpango wa pamoja wa umoja wa mataifa kuhusu VVU/UKIMWI (UNAIDS); Mpango wa maendeleo wa umoja wa mataifa (UNDP); Shirika la umoja wa mataifa la idadi ya watu (UNFPA); Shirika la umoja wa mataifa la kuhudumia watoto (UNICEF); Unitaid; Shirika la umoja wa mataifa la usawa wa jinsia na uwezeshaji wa wanawake (UN Women);
translations.hypothesis: Programu ya Jumuiya ya Umoja wa Mataifa kuhusu Ugonjwa wa AIDS (UNAIDS); Programu ya Maendeleo ya Umoja wa Mataifa (UNDP); Mfuko wa Umoja wa Mataifa wa Watoto (UNICEF); Mfuko wa Umoja wa Mataifa wa Watoto (UNICEF); Unitaid; Kitu cha Umoja wa Mataifa kwa Usawa wa Jinsia na Uendelezaji wa Wanawake (UN Women);

translations.source: World Bank Group; World Food Programme (WFP); and World Health Organization (WHO). See full report, What Worked? What’s next?
translations.reference: Kundi la Benki ya Dunia Mpango wa chakula Duniani (WFP); na Shirika la afya Duniani (WHO). Tazama ripoti kamili, Nini kilifanya kazi? Nini kinafuata?
translations.hypothesis: Kundi la Benki ya Dunia; Programu ya Chakula ya Dunia (WFP); na Shirika la Afya cha Dunia (WHO). Angalia ripoti kamili, "Nini lilifanya kazi? Na kesho itakuwa?"

translations.source: New survey results show health systems starting to recover from pandemic After three years of the COVID-19 pandemic, health systems in countries have started showing the first major signs of health system recovery, according to the WHO interim report on the “Fourth round of the global pulse survey on continuity of essential health services during the COVID-19 pandemic: November 2022–January 2023”. By early 2023, countries reported experiencing reduced disruptions in the delivery of routine health services, but highlighted the need to invest in recovery and stronger resilience for the future. Among the 139 countries that responded to the fourth round of WHO’s pulse survey, countries reported continued disruptions in almost one-quarter of services on average. In 84 countries where trend analysis is possible, the percentage of disrupted services declined on average from 56% in July-September 2020 to 23% in November 2022- January 2023.
translations.reference: Matokeo mapya ya uchunguzi yanaonyesha mifano ya afya ikianza kurejeshwa kutokana na janga Baada ya miaka mitatu ya janga la UVIKO-19, mifumo ya afya katika nchi imeanza kuonyesha dalili kuu za kwanza za kuimarika kwa mfumo wa afya kulingana na ripoti ya muda ya WHO juu ya "Duru ya nne ya uchunguzi wa mapigo ya kimataifa juu ya kuendelea kwa huduma muhimu za afya wakati wa janga la UVIKO-19: Novemba 2022 Januari 2023". Ifikapo mapema mwaka 2023, nchi ziliripoti kukabiliwa na usumbufu mdogo katika utoaji wa huduma za afya za kawaida, lakini zilionyesha haja ya kuwekeza katika kurejeshwa na kustahimili nguvu zaidi kwa siku zijazo. Kati ya nchi 139 zilizojibu duru ya nne ya uchunguzi wa mapigo ya moyo wa WHO, nchi ziliripoti kuendelea kukatika kwa karibu robo moja ya huduma kwa wastani. Katika nchi 84 ambapo uchunguzi wa mwenendo unawezekana, asilimia ya huduma zilizokatizwa ilipungua kwa wstani kutoka 56% mwezi Julai - Septemba 2020 hadi 23% mnamo Novemba 2022 - Januari 2023.
translations.hypothesis: Matokeo mapya ya utafiti zinaonyesha kuwa mifumo ya afya zinaanza kupulizwa baada ya janga la COVID-19. Kulingana na ripoti ya makala ya WHO kuhusu "Raundi ya nne ya utafiti wa kimataifa kuhusu kuendeleza huduma muhimu za afya wakati wa janga la COVID-19: Novemba 2022 – Januari 2023", baada ya miaka mitatu ya janga la COVID-19, mifumo ya afya katika nchi zinaanza kuonyesha ishara kubwa za upulizaji. Hadi mwanzoni mwa 2023, nchi zilitangaza kuwa zimepata mgongano wa chini katika utoaji wa huduma za afya za kawaida, lakini ziliweka umakini kwenye uhitaji wa kuwekeza katika upulizaji na uimara zaidi kwa siku zijazo. Miongoni mwa nchi 139 ambazo zilijibu katika raundi ya nne ya utafiti wa WHO, nchi zilitangaza kuwa kuna mgongano katika takribani nusu ya huduma. Katika nchi 84 ambapo inawezekana kufanya uchambuzi wa mwenendo, asilimia ya huduma ambazo ziligongana ilipungua kutoka 56% mnamo Julai-Septemba 2020 hadi 23% mnamo Novemba 2022 – Januari 2023.

translations.source: Persisting disruptions are due to both demand- and supply-side factors, including low levels of health care-seeking in communities as well as limited availability of health workers and other health-care resources such as open clinics or available stocks of medicines and products. “It is welcome news that health systems in the majority of countries are starting to restore essential health services for millions of people who missed them during the pandemic,” said Dr Rudi Eggers, WHO Director for Integrated Health Services. “But we need to ensure that all countries continue to close this gap to recover health services, and apply lessons learnt to build more prepared and resilient health systems for the future”. First notable signs of recovery In this new survey, fewer countries reported intentionally scaling back access across all service delivery platforms and essential public health functions since 2020-2021 reporting, showing an important step to return to pre-pandemic levels of service delivery and broader system functioning.
translations.reference: Usumbufu unaoendelea unaotokana na mahitaji na upande wa ugavi, ikiwa ni pamoja na viwango vya chini vya watu wanaotafuta huduma za afya katika jamii pamoja na upatikanaji mdogo wa wahudumu wa afya na rasilimali nyingine za afya kama vile zahanati huria au akiba inayopatikana ya dawa na bidhaa. Ni habari njema kwamba mifumo ya afya katika nchi nyingi inaanza kurejesha huduma muhimu za afya kwa mamilioni ya watu ambao hawakuzipata wakati wakati wa janga hili", alisema Dk Rudi Eggers, mkurugenzi wa WHO wa huduma za afya jumuishi. "Lakini tunahitaji kuhakikisha kuwa nchi zote zinaendelea kuziba pengo hili ili kurejesha huduma za afya, na kutumia mafunzo tuliyojifunza ili kujenga mifumo ya afya iliyoandaliwa zaidi na thabiti kwa siku zijazo". Ishara mashuhuri za kwanza za kurejeshwa Katika utafiti huu mpya, nchi chache ziliripoti kwa makusudi kupunguza ufikiaji katika majukwaa yote ya utoaji huduma na kazi muhimu za afya ya umma tangu kuripoti 2020-2021, kuonyesha hatua muhimu ya kurejea viwango vya utoaji wa huduma kabla ya janga na utendaji mpana wa mfumo.
translations.hypothesis: Mgomano unaendelea unaunga mkono sababu za ndani na nje, pamoja na viwango vya chini vya utumiaji wa huduma za afya katika jamii, pamoja na idadi ya wadau wa afya na rasilimali zingine za afya kama vile kliniki za wazi au hisa za dawa na bidhaa. "Ni habari nzuri kwamba mifumo ya afya katika nchi nyingi zinaanza kurudisha huduma muhimu kwa mamilioni ya watu walioipoteza wakati wa janga," alisema Dkt Rudi Eggers, Mkurugenzi wa Huduma za Afya za WHO. "Lakini tunahitaji kuhakikisha kwamba nchi zote zinaendelea kuondoa pengo hili ili kurudisha huduma za afya, na kutumia masomo zilizogunduliwa ili kujenga mifumo bora na imara za afya kwa mustakabali". Ishara muhimu za uendelezi Katika uchunguzi huu, nchi kadhaa zimekuripoti kwamba zimepunguza upatikanaji katika kila jukwaa la utoaji huduma na kazi muhimu za afya tangu ripoti ya 2020-2021, ambayo inaonyesha hatua muhimu ya kurudisha kwa viwango vya awali vya utoaji huduma na uendeshaji wa mfumo.

translations.source: By the end of 2022, most countries reported partial signs of service recovery, including in services for sexual, reproductive, maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health; nutrition; immunization; communicable diseases (including malaria, HIV, TB, and other sexually-transmitted infections); neglected tropical diseases; noncommunicable diseases; management of mental, neurological and substance use disorders; care for older people; and traditional and/or complementary care. The number of countries reporting disruption to their national supply chain system reduced from nearly half (29 of 59 responding countries) to about a quarter (18 of 66 responding countries) within the last year. Despite signs of recovery, service disruptions persist across countries in all regions and income levels, and across most service delivery settings and tracer service areas. Countries are also dealing with increasing service backlogs – most frequently in services for screening, diagnosis and treatment of noncommunicable diseases – which can lead to negative consequences as people are delayed access to timely care. Recovering essential health service delivery is critical because disruptions – including to services for health promotion, disease prevention, diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation and palliation – may have even greater adverse health effects at population and individual level than the pandemic itself, especially among vulnerable populations.
translations.reference: Kufikia mwishoni mwa 2022, nchi nyingi ziliripoti dalili za ufufuaji wa huduma, ikiwa ni pamoja katika huduma za afya ya ngono, uzazi, kujifungua, watoto wachanga, watoto na vijana; lishe; chanjo; magonjwa ya kuambukiza (ikijumuisha Malaria, VVU, TB na magonjwa mengine ya zinaa); magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa; magonjwa yasiyoambukiza; udhibiti wa matatizo ya akili, Neva na matumizi ya dutu; utunzaji wa wazee; na huduma za kitamaduni na/au za ziada. Idadi ya nchi zinazoripoti kukatizwa kwa mfumo wao wa kitaifa wa ugavi imepungua kutoka karibu nusu (nchi 29 kati ya 59 zinazojibu) hadi takribani robo (18 kati ya nchi 66 zinazojibu) mwaka jana. Licha ya dalili za kupona, kukatizwa kwa huduma kunaendelea kaika nchi zote katika kanda na viwango vyote vya mapato, na katika mipangilio mingi ya utoaji wa huduma na maeneo ya huduma za ufuatiliaji. Pia nchi zinakabiliana na ongezeko la mlundikano wa huduma - mara nyingi zaidi katika huduma za uchunguzi, utambuzi na matibabu ya magonjwa yasiyoambukiza - ambayo inaweza kusababisha matokeo mabaya kwani watu wanacheleweshwa kupata huduma kwa wakati. Kurejesha utoaji wa huduma muhimu za afya ni muhimu kwa sababu usumbufu- ikiwemo huduma za kukuza afya, kuzuia magonjwa, uchunguzi, matibabu, urekebishaji na kupooza - kunaweza kuwa na athari mbaya zaidi za kiafya kwa idadi ya watu na kiwango cha mtu binafsi kuliko janga lenyewe, hususani miongoni mwa watu walio hatarini.
translations.hypothesis: Kufikia mwisho wa 2022, nchi nyingi ziliiripoti dalili za upunguzaji wa huduma, pamoja na katika huduma za afya ya kijinsia, uzazi, mama, mtoto, watoto, na vijana; lishe; chanjo; magonjwaambukizaji (kwa mfano, malaria, HIV, TB, na magonjwa mengine yanayoenezwa kwa ngono); magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopozwa; magonjwa yasiyoambukizaji; usimamizi wa magonjwa ya akili, neva, na matumizi ya dawa; huduma kwa watu wazee; na huduma za za kisasa na/au za ziada. Idadi ya nchi ambazo ziliiripoti mgomao katika mfumo wao wa utoaji wa bidhaa ilipungua kutoka takriban nusu (29 kati ya nchi 59 ambazo zilijibu) hadi takriban nusu (18 kati ya nchi 66 ambazo zilijibu) katika mwaka wa mwisho. Licha ya dalili za upunguzaji, mgomao katika huduma unaendelea katika nchi katika kila eneo na viwango vya kipato, na katika karibu kila eneo la utoaji wa huduma na eneo la huduma. Nchi pia zinajitahidi na kuongezeka kwa migomao katika huduma – hasa katika huduma za uchunguzi, utambuzi, na matibabu ya magonjwa yasiyoambukizaji – ambazo zinaweza kusababisha matokeo hasi, kwani watu wanapopata huduma kwa wakati. Utoaji wa huduma muhimu za afya ni muhimu, kwani mgomao – pamoja na huduma za kukuza afya, kuzuia magonjwa, utambuzi, matibabu, ahuili, na tiba – inaweza kuwa na athari mbaya zaidi kwa afya katika viwango vya jamii na mtu binafsi kuliko janga hilo, hasa katika jamii dhaifu.

translations.source: Integrating COVID-19 services into essential health services In another important step towards system recovery and transition, most countries have made progress in integrating COVID-19 services into routine health service delivery. About 80-90% of countries have fully integrated COVID-19 vaccination, diagnostic and case management services as well as services for post COVID-19 condition into routine service delivery. Still, most countries (80% of 83 responding countries) reported at least one bottleneck to scaling up access to essential COVID-19 tools (e.g. COVID-19 diagnostics, therapeutics, vaccines and personal protective equipment - PPE), with health workforce issues and lack of funding representing the most common barriers. Further support needed for recovery, resilience and preparedness Most countries have started to apply what they have learnt during the COVID-19 pandemic, including through the institutionalization of a number of innovative service disruption mitigation strategies into routine health service delivery.
translations.reference: Kuunganisha huduma za UVIKO-19 katika huduma muhimu za afya katika hatua nyingine muhimu kuelekea ufufuaji na mabadiliko ya mfumo, nchi nyingi zimepiga hatua katika kuunganisha huduma za UVIkO-19 katika utoaji wa huduma za afya za kawaida. Takribani 80-90% ya nchi zimeunganisha kikamilifu huduma za chanjo ya UVIKO-19, uchunguzi na udhibiti wa kesi vilevile huduma za hali baada ya UVIKO-19 katika utoaji wa huduma za kawaida. Bado, nchi nyingi (80% yanchi 83 zinazojibu) ziliripoti angalau kizuizi kimoja cha kuongeza ufikiaji wa zana muhimu za UVIKO-19 (m.f uchunguzi wa UVIKO-19, matibabu, chanjo na vifaa vya kinga ya kibinafsi- PPE), na masuala ya wahudumu wa afya na ukosefu wa fedha unaowakilisha vikwazo vya kawaida. Msaada zaidi unahitajika kwa ajili ya kurejeshwa, uthabiti na kujitayarisha Nchi nyingi zimeanza kutumia yale ambayo wamejifunza kipindi cha janga la UVIKO-19, ikijumuisha kupitia kuweka mikakati kadhaa bunifu ya kupunguza usumbufu wa huduma katika utoaji wa huduma za afya.
translations.hypothesis: Kuunganisha huduma za COVID-19 katika huduma muhimu za afya. Katika hatua muhimu zaidi kuelekea uimarishaji na mabadiliko, nchi nyingi zimefanya maendeleo katika kuunganisha huduma za COVID-19 katika utoaji wa huduma za afya za kawaida. Kiasi cha 80-90% ya nchi zimeunganisha kikamilifu huduma za chanjo, utambuzi, na usimamizi wa kesi za COVID-19, pamoja na huduma za baada ya COVID-19 katika utoaji wa huduma za kawaida. Hata hivyo, nchi nyingi (80% ya nchi 83 ambazo zilijibu) zimekuruhusu kuwa na angalau tatizo moja katika kuongeza ufikiaji wa vifaa muhimu za COVID-19 (kwa mfano, utambuzi wa COVID-19, tiba, chanjo, na vifaa vya ulinzi wa kibinafsi - PPE), na masuala ya wafanyakazi wa afya na ukosefu wa fedha ni vizuizi vya kawaida. Msaada zaidi unahitajika kwa uimarishaji, uendelevu, na maandalizi. Nchi nyingi zimeanza kutumia teknolojia ambazo zimejifunza wakati wa janga la COVID-19, pamoja na kuweka sera za mitibisho za huduma za kipekee katika utoaji wa huduma za afya za kawaida.

translations.source: These include deployment of telemedicine approaches, promotion of home-based care or self-care interventions, approaches for strengthening health workers availability, capacities and support mechanisms, innovations in procuring and delivering medicines and supplies, more routine community communications, and partnerships with private sector providers. Three quarters of countries reported additional funding allocation towards longer term system recovery, resilience and preparedness. Countries expressed need for WHO support to address remaining challenges in the COVID-19 context and beyond, most frequently related to health workforce strengthening, building the monitoring capacities of health services, designing primary health care -- oriented models of care, governance, policy and planning and financial planning and funding. Note to editors: In the fourth round of WHO’s global pulse survey, 222 countries, territories and areas were invited to respond to a standardized web-based survey between November 2022 and January 2023. The fourth survey followed up on WHO’s previous 2020 and 2021 pulse surveys: Round 1 (May-September 2020), Round 2 (January-March 2021), and Round 3 (November-December 2021) which showed the extent to which the pandemic was affecting the continuity of essential health services and how countries are taking action.
translations.reference: Hizi ni pamoja na kupelekea mbinu za matibabu ya simu, uhamasishaji wa huduma za nyumbani au uingiliaji wa kujitegemea, mbinu za kuimarisha upatikanaji wa wahudumu wa afya, uwezo na mbinu za usaidizi, ubunifu katika ununuzi na usambazaji wa dawa na vifaa, mawasiliano zaidi ya kawaida ya jamii,n na ushirikiano na watoa huduma na sekta binafsi. Robo tatu ya nchi ziliripoti mgao wa ziada wa ufadhili kuelekea ufufuaji wa mfumo wa muda mrefu, ustahimilivu na utayari. Nchi zilieleza haja ya msaada wa WHO ili kushughulikia changamoto zilizosalia katika muktadha wa UVIKO-19 na zaidi, mara nyingi zinazohusiana na uimarishaji wa wahudumu wa afya, kujenga uwezo wa ufuatiliaji wa huduma za afya, kubuni huduma za afya ya msingi --mfano inayolengwa ya utunzaji, utawala, sera na mipango na mipango ya fedha na ufadhili. Maelezo kwa mhariri: Katika duru ya nne ya uchunguzi wa kimataifa wa Pulse wa WHO, nchi 222, wilaya na maeneo walialikwa kujibu uchunguzi sanifu wa msingi wa mtandao kati ya Novemba 2022 na Januari 2023. Uchunguzi wa nne ulifuatia tafiti za awali za WHO za 2020 na 2021: Duru ya 1(Mei - Septemba 2020), Duru ya 2(Januari - Machi 2021) na Duru ya 3 (Novemva - Desemba 2021) ambao ulionyesha kiwango ambacho janga hilo lilikuwa likiathiri muelekeo wa huduma za afya na jinsi nchi zinavyochukua hatua.
translations.hypothesis: Hii ni pamoja na matumizi ya mbinu za telemedicine, kukuza huduma za nyumbani au mbinu za kujitunza, mbinu za kuimarisha idadi, uwezo na mbinu za usaidizi za wataalamu wa afya, ubunifu katika kupata na kuwasilisha dawa na vifaa, mawasiliano zaidi ya kawaida katika jamii, na ushirikiano na watoa huduma wa sekta binafsi. Katika nusu tatu za nchi, ilikumbua kuwa kuna ushirikiano zaidi kwa uendelezaji wa mfumo, uendelezaji, na maandalizi kwa muda mrefu. Nchi zilionyesha haja ya usaidizi wa WHO ili kushughulikia changamoto zilizobaki katika muktadha wa COVID-19 na zaidi, ambazo mara nyingi zinahusiana na kuimarisha idadi ya wataalamu wa afya, kujenga uwezo wa utendishaji wa huduma za afya, kuunda mbinu za huduma za afya za msingi, utawala, sera na mipango, na mipango na ushirikiano wa kifedha. Muhimu kwa waandishi: Katika safu ya nne ya suruhai ya kimataifa ya WHO, nchi 222, eneo na maeneo walitajwa kushiriki katika suruhai iliyoundwa kwa mtandaoni kati ya Novemba 2022 na Januari 2023. Suruhai ya nne ilifuata suruhai za awali za WHO za 2020 na 2021: Safu ya 1 (Mei-Septemba 2020), Safu ya 2 (Januari-Mach 2021), na Safu ya 3 (Novemba-Desemba 2021) ambazo zilionyesha kiwango ambacho janga lilikuwa linathibitisha, na jinsi nchi zinachukua hatua.

translations.source: While pulse surveys have limitations such as reporting bias and representativeness, the strength of this effort is that it is comprehensive and delivers information rapidly. The term “country” should be understood to include all countries, territories and areas. Trend analyses was completed based on responses from 84 countries, territories, or areas that responded to at least one survey section in all four pulse survey rounds.
translations.reference: Ilhali tafiti za Pulse zina vikwazo kama vile kuripoti upendeleo na uwakilishi, nguvu ya juhudi hii ni ya kina na inatoa taarifa kwa haraka. Neno "nchi" linapaswa kueleweka kujumuisha nchi, wilaya na maeneo yote. Uchunguzi wa mienendo ulikamilishwa kulingana na majibu kutoka nchi, wilaya au maeneo 84 ambayo yalijibu angalau sehemu moja ya utafiti katika duru zote nne za uchunguzi wa Pulse.
translations.hypothesis: Ingawa uchunguzi wa upinzani una upunguzwa, kama vile ukiishia, na ushahiri, nguvu ya juhudi hii ni kwamba ni kamili na inatoa habari haraka. Maana "nchi" inapaswa kufahamika ikiwa ni pamoja na nchi zote, eneo na maeneo. Uchambuzi wa mwenendo ulifanyika kwa kuzingatia majibu kutoka nchi 84, eneo au maeneo ambazo zilijibu kwa angalau sehemu moja katika michunguzi minne ya upinzani.

translations.source: Statement of celebration for HRP’s 50th anniversary: Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland To capture the spirit of Policy and Coordination Committee (PCC) members celebrating HRP’s 50th anniversary and its numerous achievements, Sweden and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland read the following note of appreciation and congratulations at the 36th meeting of the HRP PCC. Our generation has seen more progress in science and technology than all preceding generations together and witnessed several intellectual, technological, medical and social transformation spearheaded by the contraceptive revolution and followed by advances in reproductive health, health innovations as well as rights and gender equality. However, considerable challenges in the field of SRHR continue, and, arguably, some advances are in question again today. We applaud HRP-staff, partners and supporters on the numerous achievements to date and recognise the enormous strides accomplished during half a century in producing the evidence that supports full and equal access to sexual and reproductive health and rights.
translations.reference: Taarifa ya kusherehekea maadhimisho ya miaka 50 ya HRP: Swideni na Uingereza na Ireland kaskazini Ili kukamata ari ya wajumbe wa Kamati ya Sera na Uratibu (PCC) wanaosherehekea miaka 50 ya HRP na mafanikio yake mengi, Sweden na Uingereza na Ireland Kaskazini walisoma maelezo yafuatayo ya shukurani na pongezi katika mkutano wa 36 wa HRP PCC. Kizazi chetu kimeshuhudia maendeleo zaidi katika sayansi na teknolojia kuliko vizazi vyote vilivyotangulia kwa pamoja na kushuhudia mabadiliko kadhaa ya kiakili, kiteknolojia, kiafya na kijamii yakiongozwa na mapinduzi ya uzazi wa mpango na kufuatiwa na maendeleo ya afya ya uzazi,ubunifu wa afya vilevile haki na usawa wa kijinsia. Hata hivyo, changamoto kubwa katika uga wa SRHR zinaendelea, na, bilashaka, baadhi ya maendeleo leo yanahojiwa tena. Tunawapongeza wafanyakazi wa HRP, washirika na waungaji mkono kwa mafanikio mengi hadi sasa na kutambua hatua kubwa zilizofikiwa katika nusu karne katika kutoa ushahidi unaounga mkono upatikanaji kamili wa usawa wa afya na haki za ngono na uzazi.
translations.hypothesis: Taarifa ya sherehe za maadhimisho ya 50 ya HRP: Usweden na Uingereza. Ili kukumbusha roho ya wanachama wa Kamati ya Sera na Ushirikishwano (PCC) katika maadhimisho ya 50 ya HRP na mafanikio yake mengi, Usweden na Uingereza, zimepata taarifa hii ya shukrani na wito wa furaha katika mkutano wa 36 wa PCC ya HRP. Kizazi chetu kinaona maendeleo zaidi katika sayansi na teknolojia kuliko vizazi vyote vya awali, na tumewataja mabadiliko kadhaa za akili, za kiufundi, za matibabu na kijamii, ambazo zimezinduliwa na mapinduzi ya usamba na zimefuatwa na matumizi bora za afya, ubunifu wa afya, na haki na usawa wa kijinsia. Hata hivyo, changamoto kubwa katika eneo la afya ya mtu, bado zinaendelea, na, kwa hakika, baadhi ya matumizi bado yana shaka. Tunashukuru wafanyakazi, washirika na wadhamini wa HRP kwa mafanikio mengi hadi sasa, na tunagawishi juhudi kubwa ambazo zimepatikana katika kipindi cha nusu karne, katika kutoa ushahidi wa ufikiaji kamili na sawa wa afya na haki za kiafya.

translations.source: We would like to outline three major categories of achievements: Firstly, the high-quality research by HRP has had tangible impact on public health policy, standards, and practice worldwide addressing the evolving needs of diverse populations. Secondly, HRP, notably through the HRP Alliance, has strengthened research institutions locally and globally, and, enabled numerous researchers to acquire the research skills that ensure that high-quality SRHR research can continue, and indeed increase, into the future. Thirdly, in a world beset by crisis, conflict and increasing resistance to gender equality, HRP has facilitated the upholding of the basic rights of women and girls and vulnerable populations. HRP remains the main instrument within the United Nations system for research in human reproduction and continues to be an exceptional leader in global sexual and reproductive health.
translations.reference: Tungependa kutaja makundi makuu matatu ya mafanikio: Kwanza, utafiti wa ubora wa juu wa HRP umekuwa na athari inayoonekana kwenye sera ya afya ya umma, viwango, na mazoezi Dunianikote kushughulikia mahitaji yanayoendelea ya watu mbalimbali. Pili,HRP, hasa kupitia muungano wa HRP, imeimarisha taasisi za utafii ndani na nje ya nchi, na imewezesha watafiti wengi kupata ujuzi wa utafiti ambao unahakikisha kwamba utafiti wa ubora wa juu wa SRHR unaweza kuendelea, na kwa hakika kuongezeka, katika siku zijazo. Tatu, katika Dunia iliyokumbwa na matatizo, migogoro na kuongezeka upinzani dhidi ya usawa wa kijinsia, HRP imewezesha uzingatiaji wa haki za kimataifa za wanawake na wasichana na watu walio katika mazingira magumu. HRP inasalia kuwa chombo kikuu ndani ya mfumo wa umoja wa mataifa kwa ajili utafiti katika uzazi wa Binadamu na inaendelea kuwa kiongozi wa kipekee katika afya ya ngono na uzazi Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Tungependa kuzingatia aina tatu kubwa za mafanikio: Kwanza, utafiti wa hali ya juu wa HRP umewawezesha katika sera, viwango, na utumiaji wa afya ya umma duniani kote, na kushughulikia mahitaji yanayoendelea ya jamii mbalimbali. Pili, HRP, haswa kupitia Umoja wa HRP, imefanya kuwa imara taasisi za utafiti nchini na kimataifa, na imewezesha watafiti wengi kupata ujuzi wa utafiti ambao unawezesha utafiti wa hali ya juu wa afya ya mtu, na hata kuendeleza zaidi. Tatu, katika ulimwengu ulio na changamoto, migogoro, na upinzani wa ukuaji wa haki za kijinsia, HRP imeweza kuwezesha utumiaji wa haki za msingi za wanawake na wasichana, na jamii dhaifu. HRP bado ni chombo kuu ndani ya mfumo wa Umoja wa Mataifa kwa utafiti wa uzazi, na bado ni kiongozi wa kipekee katika afya ya kimapato na uzazi duniani.

translations.source: HRP and its partners have brought us closer to the promise of the 1994 International Conference on Population and Development and its call to put the rights of individuals, especially women and girls, at the heart of sustainable development. We want to express our appreciation and gratitude to the HRP secretariat, its partners, co-sponsors and the global network of collaborating centres and experts helping to ensure its efforts contribute to making a difference to the women, men, children, adolescents and various communities HRP is committed to serve. On behalf of PCC members, allow us to reaffirm our partnership with you to support the achievements of HRP, upon which the success of the 2030 Agenda depends.
translations.reference: HRP na washirika wake wametuleta karibu na ahadi ya mkutano wa kimataifa wa idadi ya watu na maendeleo wa 1994 na wito wake wa kuweka hali za watu binafsi, hususani wanawake na wasichana, katika mhimili wa maendeleo endelevu. Tunataka kutoa pongezi na shukurani zetu kwa sekretarieti ya HRP, washirika wake, wafadhili wenza na mtandao wa kimataifa wa vituo shirikishi na wataalamu kusaidia kuhakikisha juhudi zake zinachangia kuleta mabadiliko kwa wanawake, wanaume, watoto, vijana na jamii mbalimabali HRP imejitolea kuhudumia. Kwa niaba ya wanachama wa PCC, turuhusu kuthibitisha ushirikiano wetu nanyi ili kuunga mkono mafanikio ya HRP, ambayo mafanikio ya ajenda ya 2030 inategemea.
translations.hypothesis: HRP na washirika zao wamekuza uhusiano wetu na ahadi ya Kongamano la Kimataifa la 1994 kuhusu Ugonjwa na Maendeleo, na wito wa kuweka haki za watu, haswa wanawake na wasichana, katika ubora wa maendeleo. Tunataka kutoa shukrani na matumaini kwa ofisi ya HRP, washirika, washiriki, na mtandao wa kimataifa wa vituo na wataalamu wanaosaidia kuhakikisha juhudi zao zinaunga mkono maendeleo ya wanawake, wanaume, watoto, vijana, na jamii mbalimbali ambazo HRP inazoeza. Kwa niaba ya wanachama wa PCC, toleni kwamba tunaendelea na ushirikiano wetu na wewe ili kuunga mkono mafanikio ya HRP, ambayo ni msingi wa mafanikio ya Agenda ya 2030.

translations.source: WHO launches new initiative to improve pandemic preparedness To help countries better prepare for future pandemics, WHO launched a new initiative today that provides guidance on integrated planning for responding to any respiratory pathogen such as influenza or coronaviruses. The new Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats Initiative, or PRET, incorporates the latest tools and approaches for shared learning and collective action established during the COVID-19 pandemic and other recent public health emergencies. Through the initiative, WHO will use a mode of transmission approach to guide countries in pandemic planning, given that many capacities and capabilities are common among groups of pathogens. PRET answers the call for technical guidance and support for promoting and strengthening integrated preparedness and response, as outlined in World Health Assembly resolutions.
translations.reference: WHO inazindua mpango mpya wa kuboresha utayari wa janga Ili kusaidia nchi kujiandaa vyema kwa magonjwa ya mlipuko ya siku sijazo, WHO imezindua mpango mpya leo ambao unatoa muongozo kuhusu upangaji jumuishi wa kukabiliana na vimelea vyovyote vya upumuaji kama vile mafua au virusi vya Korona. Mpango mpya wa kujitayarisha na ustahimilivu kwa mpango wa vitisho vinavyoibuka, au PRET, inajmuisha zana na mbinu za hivi punde zaidi za kujifunza pamoja na kuchukua hatua za pamoja zilizoainishwa wakati wa janga la UVIKO-19 na dharura nyingine za hivi karibuni za afya ya Umma. Kupitia mpango huo, WHO itatumia mbinu ya maambukizi kuziongoza nchi katika upangaji wa janga hilo, ikizingatiwa kwamba nafasi na uwezo mkubwa ni wa wakaida miongoni mwa makundi ya vimelea vya magonjwa. PRET inajibu mwito wa muongozo za kiufundi na usaidizi kwa ajili ya kukuza na kuimarisha utayari jumuishi na muitikio, kama ilivyoainishwa katika maazimio ya baraza la afya ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: WHO inaanzisha mpango mpya wa kuboresha tayari dhidi ya magonjwa WHO, leo, imezindua mpango mpya ambao una kutoa mwongozo kuhusu mipango iliyounganishwa kwa ajili ya kujibu magonjwa yoyote, kama vile ugonjwa wa homa au virusi vya korona. Mpango mpya wa Tayari na Uendelezi kwa Mabaya, au PRET, unaingiza zana na njia za hivi punde za kujifunza pamoja na hatua za pamoja, ambazo ziliwekwa wakati wa janga la COVID-19 na majanga mengine ya afya ya umma. Kwa njia hii, WHO itatumia mbinu ya usambazaji wa taarifa ili kuongoza nchi katika mipango ya magonjwa, kwani uwezo na uwezo mengi ni sawa katika makundi ya magonjwa. PRET inaagiza ombi la ushauri na msaada wa kiufundi ili kukuza na kuimarisha tayari na majibu iliyochambuliwa katika azma za Kamati ya Afya ya Dunia.

translations.source: The COVID-19 pandemic and other health emergencies have shown that countries need to be operationally ready to respond to infectious disease threats, with tailored preparedness plans in hand and better coordination and collaboration with other sectors such as agriculture. “Preparedness, prevention, and response activities must not be the province of the health sector alone,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Just as health emergencies have impacts across many sectors, so must our preparedness and response efforts span sectors, disciplines and pathogens. It is critical, too, that community engagement and equity are the centre of our efforts, especially for those populations that are marginalized and most at risk.” PRET is an evolution in WHO’s approach to pandemic preparedness through the application of a mode of transmission lens, rather than a focus on specific diseases.
translations.reference: Janga la UVIKO-19 na dharura nyingine za kiafya zimeonyesha kuwa nchi zinahitaji kuwa tayari kukabiliana na matishio ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza, na mipango mahususi ya kujitayarisha mikononi na uratibu bora na ushirikiano na sekta nyingine kama vile kilimo. "Shughuli za kujitayarisha, kuzuia, na kukabiliana hazipaswi kuwa eneo la sekta ya afya pekee", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Kama vile hali za dharura za kiafya zinavyoathiri katika sekta nyingi, ndivyo pia juhudi zetu za kujitayarisha na kukabiliana nazo zienee katika sekta, taaluma na viini vya magonjwa. Pia ni muhimu kwamba ushirikishwaji wa jamii na usawa ni kitovu cha jamii zetu, hususani kwa wale watu waliotengwa na walio hatarini zaidi". PRET ni mageuzi katika mkabala wa WHO wa kujitayarisha kwa janga kupitia utumiaji wa lenzi ya maambukizi, badala ya kuzingatia magonjwa mahususi.
translations.hypothesis: Janga la COVID-19 na matukio mengine ya afya zinaonyesha kwamba nchi zinahitaji kuwa tayari kusaidia katika majibu ya hatari za magonjwaambukizaji, na kupanga mipango iliyoundwa kwa mahitaji, pamoja na ushirikiano bora na sekta zingine kama vile kilimo. "Michakato ya tathmini, kuzuia, na majibu si lazima iwe chumba cha sekta ya afya pekee," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO. "Kama matukio ya afya yana athari katika sekta nyingi, hivyo pia juhudi zetu za tathmini na majibu lazima zijuwe sekta, fani, na vijini. Pia ni muhimu kwamba ushirikiano na uwiano wa jamii ni muhimu, hasa kwa jamii ambazo hazina haki na ambazo zina hatari kubwa." PRET ni mabadiliko katika mbinu ya WHO katika tathmini ya janga, kupitia matumizi ya mtazamo wa njia za usambazaji, badala ya kuzingatia magonjwa maalum.

translations.source: WHO will continue to develop and disseminate guidance on specific diseases as needed. The launch of the initiative is taking place on the last day of meetings with over 120 individuals representing Member States, partners, and the WHO secretariat, to define the path forward for PRET, including the development of a global implementation roadmap for respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. The PRET Initiative’s first module focuses on respiratory pathogens, including influenza, coronaviruses, and respiratory syncytial virus. Given the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and the possible threat of avian influenza, this module will enable countries to critically review, test, and update their respiratory pandemic planning efforts to ensure they have the functional capacities and capabilities in place. A process is underway to identify the next group of pathogens, such as arboviruses, to be addressed under this initiative.
translations.reference: WHO itaendelea kuandaa na kusambaza muongozo kuhusu magonjwa maalumu inapohitajika. Uzinduzi wa mpango huo unafanyika katika siku ya mwisho ya mikutano na zaidi ya watu 120 wanaowakilisha nchi wanachama, washirika na sekretarieti ya WHO, kufafanua mustakabali ujao wa PRET, ikijumuisha maendeleo ya mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa kwa ajili ya maandalizi ya janga la vimelea. Sehemu ya kwanza ya mpango wa PRET inaangazia vimelea vya magonjwa ya kupumua, ikiwa ni pamojana mafua, virusi vya Korona, virusi vya kupumua vya syncytial. Kwa kuzingatia janga la UVIKO-19 linaloendelea na tishio linalowezekana la mafua ya ndege, sehemu hii itawezesha nchi kukagua, kupima na kusasisha juhudi zao za kupanga janga la kupumua ili kuhakikisha kuwa zina nafasi na uwezo wa kufanya kazi. Mchakato unaendelea ili kutambua kundi la linalofuata la vimelea vya magonjwa, kama vile Arboviruses, kushughulikiwa chini ya mpango huu.
translations.hypothesis: WHO itaendelea kuendeleza na kueneza miongozo kuhusu magonjwa maalum wakati inahitajika. Mwanzo wa kampeni hii unaendelea siku ya mwisho ya mashauriano na zaidi ya 120 watu wanaowaakilisha mataifa wanachama, washiriki, na ofisi ya WHO, ili kuweka njia ya maendeleo kwa PRET, pamoja na kuandaa mpango wa kimataifa wa maandalizi ya janga la magonjwa ya mfumo wa upumuaji. Moduli ya kwanza ya Kampeni ya PRET inazingatia magonjwa ya mfumo wa upumuaji, pamoja na ugonjwa wa homa, virusi vya korona, na virusi vya respiratory syncytial. Kwa kuzingatia janga la sasa la COVID-19 na hatari inayowezekana ya ugonjwa wa homa, moduli hii itasaidia nchi kukagua, kutumia, na kuboresha juhudi zao za kupanga kwa janga la mfumo wa upumuaji, ili kuhakikisha kuwa wana uwezo na uimara. Inapokuwa, kuna mchakato wa kutambua makundi ya magonjwa yanayofuata, kama vile magonjwa ya arbovirus, ambayo itatumika katika kampeni hii.

translations.source: This will follow priorities identified through the ten proposals to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience (HEPR). The PRET Initiative ushers in a new era for pandemic preparedness and represents an evolution of WHO’s core activities to support all Member States in strengthening health emergency preparedness, prevention, and response capacities and capabilities. The initiative can also serve to operationalize the objectives and provisions of the Pandemic Accord, which is currently being negotiated by WHO Member States. Following inputs and discussions among meeting participants, WHO invites stakeholders to this global call to action to advance respiratory pathogen pandemic preparedness. Call to Action
translations.reference: Hii itafuata vipaumbele vilivyoainishwa kupitia mapendekezo kumi ya kuimarisha usanifu wa kimataifa kwa ajili ya maandalizi ya dharura ya afya, majibu, na ustahimilivu (HEPR). Mpango wa PRET unaoleta enzi mpya ya kujitayarisha kwa janga na inawakilisha mageuzi ya shughuli za msingi za WHO ili kusaidia nchi wanachama wote katika kuimarisha utayari wa dharura wa afya, kuzuia, na kukabiliana na nafasi na uwezo. Pia mpango huo unaweza kutumika kutekeleza malengo na masharti ya makubaliano ya janga la ugonjwa ambao kwa sasa unajadiliwa na nchi wanachama wa WHO. Kufuatia mijadala na mazungumzo miongoni mwa washiriki wa mkutano, WHO inawaalika washikadau kwenye wito huu wa kimataifa kuchukua hatua ili kuendeleza utyarishaji wa vimelea vya magonjwa ya kupumua. Wito kwa hatua.
translations.hypothesis: Hii itafuata kipaumbele zilizotengwa kupitia proposals kumi za kuimarisha mfumo wa kimataifa wa tayari, majibu, na uendelevu katika dharura za afya (HEPR). Mpango wa PRET unaanzisha enzi mpya kwa tayari ya magonjwa, na inaashiria maendeleo katika shughuli kuu za WHO za kusaidia mataifa yote katika kuimarisha uwezo wa tayari, kuzuia, na majibu ya dharura za afya. Mpango huu pia unaweza kutumika kwa utekelezaji wa malengo na kanuni za Mkataba wa Magonjwa, ambapo mataifa ya WHO wanaendelea kuufanya. Baada ya maoni na majadiliano kati ya washiriki, WHO inaitwa wadau kuhudhuria wito huu wa kimataifa ili kuendeleza tayari ya magonjwa yanayohusisha njia za kupumua. Wito wa Kufanya

translations.source: WHO, Member States, and partners are working together to identify and implement priority actions to strengthen national, regional, and global preparedness for pandemics and emerging infectious disease threats. We recognize the role of communities and all sectors, and the need for harmonized and sustained momentum to end the cycle of panic and neglect that is all too common in pandemic preparedness and response. We recall lessons from previous epidemics and pandemics, especially those caused by respiratory pathogens. These pathogens have and will continue to pose a significant global threat with the potential to cause tremendous morbidity and mortality, overwhelm health systems, de-stabilize the global economy, and exacerbate inequities, which exist in the access to both the tools to prevent pandemics and health care for all people. This is a Call to Action to accelerate preparedness for pandemics and emerging threats globally.
translations.reference: WHO, nchi wanachama, na washirika wanafanya kazi pamoja kutambua na kutekeleza hatua za kipaumbele ili kuimarisha utayari wa kitaifa, kikanda na kimataifa kwa magonjwa ya milipuko na matishio yanayoibuka ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza. Tunatambua jukumu la jamii na sekta zote, na haja ya kuimarishwa na kuendelea kwa kasi ili kumaliza mzunguko wa hofu na kutekelezwa ambao ni wa kawaida sana katika kujiandaa na kukabiliana na janga. Tunakumbuka mafunzo kutoka kwa majanga na magonjwa ya milipuko ya hapo awali, hususani yale yanayosababishwa na magonjwa ya kupumua. Vimelea hivi vina na vitaendelea kuwa tishio kubwa la kimataifa lenye uwezekano wa kusababisha magonjwa na vifo vingi, kuelemea mifumo ya afya, na kudhoofisha uchumi wa Dunia, na kuzidisha ukosefu wa usawa, ambao upo katika upatikanaji wa zana zote mbili za kuzuia magonjwa ya mlipuko na huduma za afya kwa watu wote. Huu ni wito wa kuchukua hatua ili kuharakisha kujitayarisha kwa magonjwa ya mlipuko na vitisho vinavyoibuka Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: WHO, mataifa, na washiriki wanaenda pamoja ili kutambua na kutekeleza hatua muhimu za kuimarisha maandalizi za kitaifa, za eneo, na za kimataifa kwa ajili ya magonjwa ya hatari na magonjwa mapya. Tunagawishi umuhimu wa jamii na sekta zote, na uhitaji wa mzozo na jitihada endelevu ili kukomesha safu ya hofu na kukosa umakini ambayo ni ya kawaida katika maandalizi na majibu ya magonjwa. Tunaelewa kutoka kwa magonjwa na magonjwa ya awali, hasa yale yaliyosababishwa na viumbe vya njia ya kupumua. Viumbe hivi, na pia itakomea, zinaweza kuwa hatari kubwa kwa kimataifa, na inaweza kusababisha magonjwa na vifo vingi, kuathiri mifumo ya afya, kuathiri uchumi wa kimataifa, na kuongeza tofauti, ambazo ziko katika upatikanaji wa vifaa vya kuzuia magonjwa na huduma za afya kwa watu wote. Hii ni wito wa hatua ili kuharakisha maandalizi kwa magonjwa na hatari mapya kimataifa.

translations.source: Effective preparedness relies on robust planning and coordinated action. A collective commitment on the following actions will see progress achieved by December 2025 as will be described in the (Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET) monitoring framework: Update preparedness plans that affirm priority actions and that have considered learnings from past events. Recognizing the risk posed by respiratory pathogens, planning for a respiratory pathogen pandemic based on the themes identified in the PRET Module #1: Planning for Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics is a priority
translations.reference: Kujiandaa kwa ufanisi kunategemea mipango thabiti na hatua zilizoratibiwa. Ahadi ya pamoja ya hatua zifuatazo itaona maendeleo yaliyofikiwa ifikapo Desemba 2025 kama yatakavyo fafanuliwa katika mfumo wa ufuatiliaji wa (kujiandaa na ustahimilivu kwa vitisho vinavyojitokeza (PRET): Kusasisha mipango ya kujitayarisha ambayo inathibitisha vitendo vya kipaumbele na ambavyo imezingatia mafunzo kutoka kwa matukio ya zamani. Kutambua hatari inayoletwa na vimelea vya magonjwa ya kupumua, kupanga janga la vimelea vya upumuaji kwa kuzingatia mada zilizoainishwa katika Moduli ya PRET #1. Kupanga kipaumbele kwa magonjwa ya vimelea vya upumuaji
translations.hypothesis: Maandalizi bora niajibika kwa mipango thabiti na hatua iliyojumuishwa. Ahadi za pamoja katika hatua zifuatazo zitasaidia kufikia matokeo kwa December 2025, kama ilivyoelekezwa katika (mfumo wawachungaji wa Maandalizi na Uendelezi kwa Hatari Zinazotokea (PRET)): Andika mipango ya maandalizi ambayo yanaangazia hatua muhimu na ambayo zinaangazia masomo kutoka kwenye matukio ya kale. Kutambua hatari iliyo na vijini, kupanga kwa ajili ya janga la vijini kulingana na mada zilizotambuliwa katika Moduli ya #1 ya PRET: Kupanga kwa Jangamla la Vijini ni muhimu.

translations.source: Increase connectivity among stakeholders in pandemic preparedness planning through systematic coordination and cooperation. This includes building equitable systems; conducting joint exercises; and sharing information on good practices, challenges, and opportunities. Dedicate sustained investments, financing and monitoring of pandemic preparedness with a particular focus on addressing the gaps identified during past pandemics and epidemics. The COVID-19 pandemic response has demonstrated what can be achieved with political commitment, community engagement and funding.
translations.reference: Kuongeza muunganisho kati ya washikadau katika upangaji maandalizi ya janga kupitia uratibu na ushirikiano wa kimfumo. Hii inajumuisha kujenga mifumo yenye usawa; kufanya mazoezi ya viungo; Na kushiriki taarifa kuhusu mazoea mazuri, changamoto na fursa. Kujitolea kwa uwekezaji endelevu, ufadhili na ufuatiliaji wa utayari wa janga kwa kuzingatia mapengo yaliyo ainishwa wakati w magonjwa ya mlipuko na milipuko iliyopita. Muitikio wa janga la UVIKO-19 umeonyesha kile kinachoweza kufikiwa kwa kujitolea kisiasa, ushirikishwaji wa jamii na ufadhili.
translations.hypothesis: Kuendeleza ushirikiano kati ya washiriki katika mipango ya maandalizi ya janga kupitia ushirikiano na utoaji wa umbo. Hii ni pamoja na kujenga mifumo sawa; kufanya mazoezi pamoja; na ushiriki maelezo kuhusu mbinu nzuri, changamoto, na fursa. Kuwekeza fedha, kutoa rasilimali, na kutumia utayarishaji wa mipango ya maandalizi ya janga, na umwezi wa umuhimu katika kushughulikia mapungufu iliyopatikana katika janga na magonjwa ya zamani. Majibu ya janga la COVID-19 yameonyesha uwezo wa kufanikisha matarajio kwa kujitolea, ushirikiano wa jamii, na fedha.

translations.source: At the heart of this work is to ensure equity to be ready for the next pandemic together. Whole-of-society action is needed to make the progress outlined in this Call to Action. Implementation should therefore strengthen the resilience of communities; maintain, sustain, and build on routine systems; and leverage broader capacities for emergency preparedness and response. This Call to Action was released at the Preparedness and Resilience for Emerging Threats (PRET): Global Meeting for Future Respiratory Pathogen Pandemics held on 24-26 April 2023 in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Kiini cha kazi hii ni kuhakikisha usawa kuwa tayari kwa janga lijalo pamoja. Hatua ya jamuii nzima inahitajika ili kufanya maendeleo yaliyoainishwa katika wito huu wa hatua. Utekelezaji unapaswa kuimarisha uimara wa jamii, kudumisha , kuendeleza, na kujenga juu ya mifumo ya kawaida; na kuongeza uwezo mpana zaidi wa kujiandaa na kukabiliana na Dharura. Wito huu wa kuchukua hatua ulitolewa katika maandalizi na ustahimilivu kwa vitisho vinavyoibuka (PRET): mkutano wa kimataifa wa magonjwa ya vimelea vya upumuaji ya baadae uliofanyika tarehe 24-26 Aprili 2023 huko Jeniva, Uswisi.
translations.hypothesis: Kikwazo hiki ni kuhakikisha usawa ili kuwa tayari kwa janga linalofuata pamoja. Ni muhimu kwamba jamii yote wajenge pamoja ili kufanikisha maendeleo zilizotajwa katika wito huu.
