Kwa hiyo, matumizi ya sheria lazima kuimarisha uwezo wa jamii; kudumisha, kudumisha, na kuendeleza mifumo ya kawaida; na kutumia uwezo wa kisa, kwa maandalizi na majibu ya dharura. Wito huu ulitolewa katika Mkutano wa Kimataifa kuhusu Maandalizi na Uendelezi kwa Hatari Zinazotokea (PRET): kwa ajili ya Janga la Ugonjwa wa Pneuma, lililofanyika mnamo 24-26 Aprili 2023 huko Geneva, Uswisi.

translations.source: WHO urges increased implementation of recommended tools to combat malaria Marking World Malaria Day, the World Health Organization (WHO) is issuing a call for increased implementation of new and existing interventions to save lives from malaria. Nearly 1.5 million children at high risk of illness and death from malaria in Ghana, Kenya and Malawi have now received their first dose of the first malaria vaccine, RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S), thanks to an ongoing pilot programme coordinated by WHO. The malaria vaccine pilots, launched in 2019, are increasing equity in access to malaria prevention for the most vulnerable and are saving lives. If implemented broadly, WHO estimates that malaria vaccines could save the lives of tens of thousands of children each year.
translations.reference: WHO inapendekeza kuongezeka kwa utekelezaji wa zana zinazopendekezwa za kukabiliana na Malaria Kuadhimisha siku ya Malaria Duniani, shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) linatoa wito wa kuongezwa kwa utekelezaji wa afua mpya na zilizopo ili kuokoa misha kutokana na Malaria. Karibu watoto milioni 1.5 walio katika hatari kubwa ya ugonjwa na kifo kutokana na Malaria nchini Ghana, Kenya na Malawi sasa wamepokea dozi yao ya kwanza ya chanjo ya kwanza ya Malaria, RTS,S/AS 01 (RTS,S), shukrani kwa mpango unaoendelea wa majaribio unaoratibiwa na WHO. Majaribio ya chanjo ya Malaria, ilyozinduliwa mwaka 2019, inaongeza usawa katika ufikiaji wa kuzuia Malaria kwa walio hatarini zaidi na wanaookoa maisha. Kama itatekelezwa kwa mapana, WHO inakadiria kuwa chanjo ya Malaria inaweza kuokoa maisha ya makumi kwa maelfu ya watoto kila mwaka.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la Afya ya Dunia (WHO) inatoa wito wa kuimarisha matumizi ya zana za kusaidia kupunguza magonjwa ya malaria. Wakati wa Siku ya Dunia ya Malaria, Shirika la Afya ya Dunia (WHO) linatoa wito wa kuimarisha matumizi ya tiba mpya na za soko ili kuokoa maisha kutoka kwa magonjwa ya malaria. Kwenye Ghana, Kenya na Malawi, karibu milioni 1.5 ya watoto wana hatari kubwa ya magonjwa na vifo kutokana na malaria, na sasa wamepokea doza yao ya kwanza ya chanjo ya malaria, RTS,S/AS01 (RTS,S), shukrani kwa programu ya majaribio inayofanyika na WHO. Programu za majaribio za chanjo ya malaria, ambazo zilianzishwa mwaka wa 2019, zinaongeza usawa katika upatikanaji wa tiba za kupunguza magonjwa ya malaria kwa wale wana hatari kubwa, na zinaokoa maisha. Ikiwa itatumika kwa upana, WHO ina makadirio kwamba chanjo za malaria zinaweza kuokoa maisha ya maelfu ya watoto kila mwaka.

translations.source: “We have the tools to drive down malaria, a package of interventions that includes vector control, preventive medicines, testing, and treatment,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General of WHO. “These are joined by a safe and effective malaria vaccine, which could save the lives of tens of thousands children every year. With sustained investment and scaled-up efforts to reach those most at risk, malaria elimination in many countries is in reach. "World Malaria Day 2023 is being marked under the theme “Time to deliver zero malaria: invest, innovate, implement”. Within this theme, WHO is urging more effective implementation of available tools and strategies to prevent, diagnose and treat malaria, particularly among marginalized populations.
translations.reference: "Tunazo zana za kukabiliana na ugonjwa wa Malaria, kifurushi cha afua ambacho kinajumuisha udhibiti wa Vekta, Dawa za kuzuia, upimaji na matibabu", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Hawa wameunganishwa na chanjo salama na yenye ufanisi ya Malaria, ambayo, inaweza kuokoa maisha ya makumi ya maelfu ya watoto kila mwaka. Kwa uwekezaji endelevu na juhudi zilizoongezwa kufikia walio hatarini zaidi, kutokomeza Malaria katika nchi nyingi kunawezekana. "Siku ya Malaria Duniani 2023 inaadhimisha chini ya kauli mbiu "wakati wa kutokomeza Malaria: Wekeza, Vumbua, tekeleza". Ndani ya Mada hii, WHO inahimiza utekelezaji bora zaidi wa zana na mikakati iliyopo ya kuzuia, kuchunguza na kutibu Malaria, hasa miongoni mwa watu waliotengwa.
translations.hypothesis: “Tuna zana ambazo tunaweza kutumia kupunguza magonjwa ya malaria, ambayo ni pamoja na udhibiti wa nyuki, dawa za kuzuia, upimaji, na matibabu,” alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Katibu Mkuu wa WHO. “Hii pamoja na chanjo salama na yenye ufanisi ya malaria, ambayo inaweza kuokoa maisha ya watoto elfu nyingi kila mwaka. Pamoja na uwekezaji endelevu na juhudi za kuongezeka, kuondoa magonjwa ya malaria katika nchi nyingi ni inawezekana.” "Siku ya Dunia ya Malaria 2023 inaelezwa chini ya mada "Ni wakati wa kufikia malaria zero: wekeze, ubuni, utumie". Katika mada hii, WHO inaomba utumiaji bora zaidi wa zana na mikakati zinazopatikana, hasa katika kuzuia, kutambua, na kutibu magonjwa ya malaria, hasa katika jamii zinazostahili.

translations.source: According to the latest World malaria report, published in December 2022, there were an estimated 247 million new cases of malaria in 2021. The WHO African Region continues to shoulder the heaviest burden of the disease – accounting for an estimated 95% of all malaria cases (234 million) and 96% of all deaths (593 000) in 2021. Nearly 80% of malaria deaths in the African Region were among children under the age of five. New strategies and tools Countries have made some progress in expanding access to malaria services for most-at-risk populations.
translations.reference: Kulingana na ripoti ya hivi karibuni ya ugonjwa wa Malaria Duniani, iliyochapishwa mnamo Desemba 2022, kulikuwa na visa vipya milioni 247 vya Malaria mwaka 2021. WHO kanda ya Afrika inaendelea kubeba mzigo mzito zaidi wa ugonjwa huo ikichukua wastani wa 95% ya visa vyote vya Malaria (milioni 234) na 96% ya vifo vote (593,000) mnamo 2021. Karibu 80% ya vifo vya Malaria katika kanda ya Afrika vilikuwa miongoni mwa watoto chini ya umri wa miaka mitano. Mikakati na zana mpya Nchi zimepiga hatua katika kupanua upatikanaji wa huduma za Malaria kwa watu walio katika hatari zaidi.
translations.hypothesis: Kulingana na ripoti ya hivi karibuni kuhusu malaria, iliyotolewa mnamo Disemba 2022, kuna takriban kesi milioni 247 za malaria mwaka wa 2021. Eneo la Afrika la WHO bado lina wigo kubwa zaidi wa ugonjwa – likiathiri takriban 95% ya kesi zote za malaria (milioni 234) na 96% ya vifo vyote (milioni 593 mwaka wa 2021). Kiasi cha 80% cha vifo vya malaria katika Eneo la Afrika vilitokana na watoto chini ya umri wa miaka mitano. Стратегии na zana mpya Nchi zimefanya maendeleo katika kupanua upatikanaji wa huduma za kupunguza malaria kwa idadi kubwa ya watu walio hatarini.

translations.source: Despite some progress, many people at high risk of malaria still lack access to services that can prevent, detect and treat the disease. Challenges in expanding access to malaria services have been compounded, particularly in sub-Saharan Africa, by the COVID-19 pandemic, converging humanitarian crises, restricted funding, weak surveillance systems, and declines in the effectiveness of core malaria-fighting tools. To address these threats and support countries in building more resilient malaria programmes, WHO recently published new strategies and frameworks, including: a new strategy to contain antimalarial drug resistance in Africa; a new initiative to stop the spread of Anopheles stephensi in urban environments;
translations.reference: Licha ya mafanikio fulani, watu wengi walio katika hatari kubwa ya Malaria bado wanakosa huduma zinazoweza kuzuia, kugundua na kutibu ugonjwa huo. Changamoto katika kupanua upatikanaji wa huduma za Malaria zimeongezeka, hususani huko Afrika kusini mwa jangwa la Sahara, janga la UVIKO-19, kuunganisha migogoro ya kibinadamu, vikwazo vya fedha, mifumo dhaifu ya ufuatiliaji, na kupungua kwa ufanisi wa zana kuu za kupambana na malaria. Kushughulikia matishio haya na kusaidia nchi katika kujenga programu zinazostahimili ugonjwa wa Malaria, WHO hivi karibuni ilichapisha mikakati na mifumo mipya, ikijumuisha: Mkakati mpya wa kudhibiti ukinzani wa dawa za Malaria barani Afrika; Mpango mpya wa kukomesha kuenea kwa Anopheles stephensi katika mazingira ya mijini;
translations.hypothesis: Licha ya maendeleo fulani, watu wengi wenye hatari kubwa ya malaria bado hawapati huduma ambazo zinaweza kuzuia, kugundua, na kutibu ugonjwa huo. Changamoto za kupanua upatikanaji wa huduma za malaria zimeongezeka, hasa katika Afrika Kusini, kwa sababu ya janga la COVID-19, vishawishi wa kiutu, ufadhili mdogo, mifumo dhaifu yawachungaji, na kushuka kwa ufanisi wa zana kuu za kupigana na malaria. Ili kushughulikia hatari hizi na kusaidia nchi kujenga programu bora za kupigana na malaria, WHO hivi majuzi imachapisha mikakati na mbinu mpya, pamoja na: mkakati mpya wa kudhibiti uresha wa dawa za kupigana na malaria katika Afrika; kampeni mpya ya kuacha kuenea kwa Anopheles stephensi katika mazingira ya mijini;

translations.source: a new framework, developed jointly by WHO and UN-Habitat, to guide city leaders in urban malaria control. a new toolkit to help countries assess their malaria surveillance systems and identify areas for investment WHO has also increased the transparency, flexibility and access to its malaria recommendations. The consolidated WHO Guidelines for malaria are now available through two digital platforms: MAGICapp and the “Malaria Toolkit” app. WHO encourages countries to tailor the recommendations to local disease settings for maximum impact.
translations.reference: Mfumo mpya, ulioandaliwa kwa pamoja na WHO na UN-Habitat, ili kuwaongoza viongozi wa majiji katika udhibiti wa Malaria mijini. Zana mpya za kusaisdia nchi kutathmini mifumo yao ya uchunguzi wa Malaria na kutambua maeneo ya uwekezaji Pia WHO imeongeza uwazi, kubadilika na kufikia mapendekezo yake ya Malaria. Miongozo iliyounganishwa na WHO kuhusu Malaria sasa inapatikana kupitia majukwaa mawili ya kidijitaali: MAGICapp na programu ya "Malaria Toolkit". WHO inazihimiza nchi kurekebisha mapendekezo kulingana na mipangilio ya magonjwa ya eneo hilo kwa athari kubwa zaidi.
translations.hypothesis: mfumo mpya, ulioanzishwa pamoja na WHO na UN-Habitat, ili kuongoza viongozi wa miji katika kudhibiti malaria. seti mpya ya zana ili kusaidia nchi kutathmini mifumo yao ya utambuzi wa malaria na kupata maeneo ambapo unaweza kuwekeza. WHO pia imechukua hatua za kuongeza uwazi, urahisi na ufikiaji kwa mapendekezo yake kuhusu malaria. Mwongozo wa WHO wa pamoja kuhusu malaria sasa unaweza kupatikana kupitia platformi mbili za kidijitali: MAGICapp na programu "Malaria Toolkit". WHO inashauri nchi kurekebisha mapendekezo kwa hali za magonjwa za eneo ili kuwa na athari kubwa.

translations.source: Prospects for new interventions Continued investment in the development and deployment of new malaria vaccines and next-generation tools will be key to achieving the 2030 global malaria targets. A second malaria vaccine, the R21/Matrix-M (R21) vaccine, if approved, could help close the sizable gap between supply and demand and further reduce child illness and death from malaria. It is a priority for WHO to continue the thorough and efficient expert review of the R21 malaria vaccine once additional key safety and efficacy data from the ongoing R21 phase 3 trial are available and provided to WHO. Phased introductions of the RTS,S malaria vaccine in additional countries in Africa are expected to begin in early 2024.
translations.reference: Matarajio kwa afua mpya Kuendelea kwa uwekezaji katika maendeleo ya usambazaji wa chanjo mpya za Malaria na zana za kizazi kijacho itakuwa muhimu katika kufikia malengo ya kimataifa ya 2030 ya Malaria. Chanjo ya pili ya Malaria, chanjo ya R21/matrix-M (R21), kama itaidhinishwa, inaweza kusaidia kuziba pengo kubwa kati ya usambazaji na mahitaji na kupunguza zaidi ugonjwa wa watoto na kifo kutokana na Malaria. Ni kipaumbele kwa WHO kuendeleza na mapitio ya kina na madhubuti ya kitaalamu ya chanjo ya Malaria ya R21 mara Data muhimu za ziada za usalama na ufanisi kutoka kwa majaribio yanayoendelea ya awamu ya 3 ya R21 zitakazopatikana na kutolewa kwa WHO. Utangulizi wa hatua kwa hatua wa chanjo ya Malaria ya RTS,S katika nchi za ziada barani Afrika unatarajiwa kuanza mapema 2024.
translations.hypothesis: Fursa za matibabu mpya: Uwekezaji endelevu katika maendeleo na matumizi ya chanjo mpya za malaria, pamoja na zana za kizazi kipya, itakuwa muhimu katika kufikia malengo ya kimataifa ya kupunguza malaria hadi mwaka wa 2030. Chanjo ya pili ya malaria, R21/Matrix-M (R21), ikiidhinishwa, inaweza kusaidia kupunguza pengo kubwa kati ya uzalishaji na mahitaji, na pia kupunguza ugonjwa na vifo vya watoto kutokana na malaria. Ni jukumu muhimu kwa WHO kuendelea na tathimingi kamili na yenye ufanisi ya chanjo ya R21 ya malaria, mara tu data muhimu zaidi kuhusu usalama na ufanisi kutoka kwa jaribio la hatua ya 3 zinapatikana na zinatozwa kwa WHO. Inatarajiwa kuwa utangulizi wa chanjo ya RTS,S ya malaria katika nchi zingine zaidi katika Afrika, itaanza mapema mwaka wa 2024.

translations.source: In the vector control space, there are 28 new products in the R&D pipeline. Tools under evaluation include, for example, new types of insecticide-treated nets, targeted baits that attract mosquitoes, spatial repellents, lethal house lures (eaves tubes) and genetic engineering of mosquitoes. Researchers are prioritizing the development of non-ACT treatments in the field of antimalarial medicines due to the emergence and spread of partial artemisinin resistance. The development of next-generation medicines, such as "triple ACTs," which use a combination of artemisinin and two partner drugs, is underway to reduce the risk of drug resistance. Notes to the editor:For more information on the WHO World Malaria Day campaign, visit: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023
translations.reference: Katika nafasi ya kudhibiti Vekta, kuna bidhaa 28 mpya katika bomba la R&D. Zana zinazofanyiwa tathmini hujumuisha, kwa mfano, aina mpya za vyandarua vilivyotiwa dawa, chambo lengwa ambacho huvutia mbu, dawa za kuua mbu, viambata vya kuu vya nyumbani (mirija ya michirizi) na uhandisi jeni wa mbu. Watafiti wanatanguliza uendelezaji wa matibabu yasiyo ya ACT katika uwanja wa Dawa za Malaria kutokana na kuibuka na kuenea kwa ukinzani kwa sehemu ya artemisinin. Uundaji wa Dawa za kizazi kijacho, kama vile "ACT tatu", ambazo hutumia mchanganyiko wa Artemisinin na dawa mbili za washirika, unaendelea ili kupunguza hatari ya ukinzani wa Dawa. Maelezo kwa mhariri: Kwa taarifa zaidi kuhusu kampeni ya siku ya Malaria Duniani ya WHO, tembelea: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day-/2023.
translations.hypothesis: Katika eneo la udhibiti wa vector, kuna bidhaa 28 mpya katika hatua ya utafiti na maendeleo. Zana zinazochunguliwa ni pamoja na, kwa mfano, mwavuli mpya wa insecticide, mwavuli maalum ambazo huwavutia nyoka, njia za kupunguza nyoka, mwavuli hatari (pamba), na uboreshaji wa kiwanda wa nyoka. Watafiti wanachagua kuendeleza matibabu ambayo si ACT, katika eneo la dawa za kupambana na malaria, kwa sababu ya kuenea na kuenea kwa upinzani wa sehemu kwa dawa za artemisinin. Maendeleo ya dawa za kizazi kipya, kama vile "triple ACTs," ambazo hutumia mchanganyiko wa artemisinin na dawa mbili, zinaendelea ili kupunguza hatari ya upinzani wa dawa. Muhimu kwa mwandishi: Kwa habari zaidi kuhusu kampeni ya Siku ya Dunia ya Malaria ya WHO, tembelea: https://www.who.int/campaigns/world-malaria-day/2023

translations.source: mRNA Technology Transfer Programme moves to the next phase of its development Inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen, South Africa. Partners gather in Cape Town to discuss the next phase of the mRNA vaccine development and knowledge sharing. Over 200 international participants working with the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme met in Cape Town this week for their first face-to-face meeting. Joined by World Health Organization (WHO) Director General, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus and Dr. Joe Phaahla, Minister of Health and Minister of Trade and Industry, Mr. Ebrahim Patel of South Africa together with high-level officials from funding countries, this unique meeting reviewed the progress since WHO and Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) launched it in June 2021.
translations.reference: Mpango wa uhawilishaji wa teknolojia ya mRNA unasonga hadi hatua ijayo maendeleo yake Uzinduzi wa kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA Hub huko Afrige, Afrika kusini. Washirika wanakusanyika Cape Town kujadili awamu inayofuata ya ukuzaji wa chanjo ya mRNA na kubadilishana maarifa. Zaidi ya washirika 200 wa kimaifa wanaofanya kazi na mpango wa uhawilishaji wa mRNA walikutana jijini Cape Town wiki hii kwa mkutano wao wa kwanza wa ana kwa ana. Akijumuika na mkurugenzi mkuu wa shirika la afya Duniani (WHO), Dk.Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus na Dk. Joel Phaahla, waziri wa afya na waziri wa biashara na viwanda, Bw. Ebrahim Patel wa Afrika Kusini pamoja na maafisa wa ngazi za juu kutoka nchi zinazofadhili mkutano wa kipekee ulikagua maendeleo tangu WHO na Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) ilipozinduliwa mwezi Juni 2021.
translations.hypothesis: Programu ya Uhamishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA imepanda hatua inayofuata katika maendeleo. Uanzishaji wa kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA katika Afrigen, Afrika Kusini. Washiriki wanajitokeza katika Cape Town ili kujadili hatua inayofuata katika maendeleo ya chanjo ya mRNA na uzao wa maarifa. Zaidi ya 200 washiriki wa kimataifa wanaoshiriki katika Programu ya Uhamishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA walikutana katika Cape Town wiki hii kwa ajili ya mkutano wao wa kwanza. Washiriki hao, pamoja na Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus na Dkt. Joe Phaahla, Mwinjilishi wa Afya na Mwinjilishi wa Biashara na Viwanda, Dkt. Ebrahim Patel kutoka Afrika Kusini, pamoja na viongozi wa kiwango cha juu kutoka nchi zinazotoa fedha, walishiriki katika mkutano huu wa kipekee ambao ulifuata maendeleo tangu WHO na Shirika la Haki za Dawa (MPP) zilianzisha programu hiyo mnamo Juni 2021.

translations.source: “I am delighted to be here in Cape Town with our partners to support a sustainable model for mRNA technology transfer to give low- and middle-income countries equitable access to vaccines and other lifesaving health products,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “I am immensely proud of the achievement of all those involved in this project; in less than two years we have shown that when we work collaboratively, we succeed collectively.” The meeting participants include biomanufacturing partners from 15 countries in the Programme, leading experts, industry, civil society representatives, and funders. During the five-day meeting, participants will share progress and discuss critical enablers for the sustainability of the Programme such as intellectual property issues and regulatory aspects, as well as the science of mRNA technologies and key applications relevant to LMICs in other disease areas such as HIV and tuberculosis. The COVID-19 pandemic has underscored that gross inequity exists in access to health products, especially vaccines.
translations.reference: Nina furaha kuwa hapa Cape Town na washirika wetu kusaidia mtindo endelevu wa uhamishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA ili kuzipa nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati fursa sawa ya kupata chanjo na bidhaaa nyingine za kuokoa maisha", alisema mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Ninajivunia sana mafanikio ya wale wote waliohusika katika mradi huu; kwa chini ya miaka miwili tumeonyesha kuwa tunapofanya kazi kwa ushirikiano, tunafanikiwa kwa pamoja" Washiriki wa mkutano ni pamoja na washirika wa utengenezaji wa viumbe hai kutoka nchi 15 katika mpango, wataalamu wakuu, viwanda, wawakilishi wa mashirika ya kiraia, na wafadhili. Wakati wa mkutano wa siku tano, washiriki watashiriki maendeleo na kujadili viwezeshaji muhimu vya uendelevu wa mpango kama vile masuala ya mali miliki na vipengele vya udhibiti, vilevile sayansi ya teknolojia ya mRNA na matumizi muhimu yanayohusiana na LMICs katika maeneo mengine ya ugonjwa kama vile VVU na kifua kikuu. Janga la UVIKo-19 limesisitiza kuwa ukosefu wa usawa upo katika upatikanaji wa bidha za afya, hususani chanjo.
translations.hypothesis: “Natumai kuwa hapa mjini Cape Town na washiriki wetu ili kuunga mkono mfumo endelevu wa uhamishaji wa teknolojia ya mRNA, ili kuwapa nchi za chini na katikati faida sawa katika tiba na bidhaa zingine muhimu za afya,” alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Natumai sana matabatha yote yaliyofanikishwa katika mradi huu; katika chini ya miaka miwili, tumeonyesha kwamba, tunapofanya kazi pamoja, tuna mafanikio. Washiriki katika mkutano ni washiriki kutoka sekta ya uzalishaji wa biolojia kutoka nchi 15 katika mpango, wataalamu, wakombe wa sekta, waandishi wa kijamii, na wadau. Katika mkutano wa siku tano, washiriki watashiriki maendeleo na kujadili mambo muhimu yanayosaidia utumiaji endelevu wa mpango, kama vile masuala ya haki za akili na masuala ya sheria, pamoja na sayansi ya teknolojia za mRNA na matumizi muhimu zinazohusiana na nchi za chini na katikati katika masuala mengine ya ugonjwa, kama vile ugonjwa wa HIV na kuhoma. Janga la COVID-19 limeonyesha kwamba kuna usawa mkubwa katika upatikanaji wa bidhaa za afya, haswa tiba.

translations.source: As of March 2023, more than three years after WHO declared COVID-19 a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC), 69.7% of the global population had received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. Notably, this proportion still remains below 30% in low-income countries (LICs) . This Programme aims to contribute to equitable access to mRNA vaccines by increasing the distribution of sustainable manufacturing capacity across LMICs, enhancing regional and inter-regional collaborations, and developing and empowering a local workforce through tailored and inclusive training and expert support. What is unique in the mRNA Technology Transfer model is the multilateral process that allows sharing of technologies to multiple recipients so that through local and regional production those in need can be reached rapidly. Dr Phaahla, Minister of Health South Africa, said: “What we see here today, is a moment in history, a Programme that is aimed at empowering LMICs through a global collaborative network.
translations.reference: Kufikia Machi 2023, zaidi ya miaka mitatu baada ya WHO kutangaza UVIKO-19 kwa dharura ya afya ya umma ya wasiwasi wa kimataifa (PHEIC), 69.7% ya watu Duniani walikuwa wamepokea angalau Dozi moja ya chanjo ya UVIKo-19. Hasa, sehemu hii bado inasalia chini ya 30% katika nchi zenye kipato cha chini (LICs). Mpango huu unalenga kuchangia upatikanaji sawa wa chanjo za mRNA kwa kuongeza usambazaji wa uwezo endelevu wa utengenezaji katika LMICs, kuimarisha ushirikiano wa kikanda na baina ya kanda, na kuendeleza na kuwezesha wafanyakazi wa ndani kupitia mafunzo yaliyowekwa na kuja kujumuisha na usaidizi wa kitaalamu. Kipi cha kipekee katika kielelezo cha uhamisho wa Teknolojia ya mRNA ni mchakato wa kimataifa unaoruhusu ugavi wa Teknolojia kwa wapokeaji wengi ili kupitia uzalishaji wa ndani na kikanda wale wanaohiotaji waweze kufikiwa kwa haraka. Dk Phaahla, waziri wa afya wa Afrika Kusini, alisema : "Tunachokiona hapa leo, ni wakati katika historia, mpango ambao unalenga kuwezesha LMICs kupitia mtandao wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Kuanzia mwezi Machi 2023, baada ya zaidi ya miaka mitatu tangu WHO ilipanga COVID-19 kuwa Mfanya Hatari ya Afya ya Umma ya Kimataifa (PHEIC), zaidi ya asilimia 69.7 ya idadi ya watu duniani walikuwa wamepokea angalau doza moja ya chanjo ya COVID-19. Pia, asilimia hii bado ni chini ya 30% katika nchi zilizo na uchumi mdogo (LICs). Programu hii ina lengo la kusaidia upatikanaji sawa wa chanjo za mRNA kwa kuongeza uwezo wa uzalishaji endelevu katika nchi zilizo na uchumi mdogo, kuimarisha ushirikiano katika eneo na kati ya maeneo, na kuendeleza na kuwezesha wafanyakazi wa eneo kupitia mafunzo na usaidizi wa kitaalamu. Kitendo cha mfumo wa uhamishaji wa teknolojia za mRNA ni mchakato wa kimataifa ambao unawezesha ushirikishwaji wa teknolojia kwa watoa huduma wengi, ili kupata watu wanaohitaji haraka kupitia uzalishaji wa eneo na wa maeneo. Dkt. Phaahla, Waziri wa Afya wa Afrika Kusini, alisema: "Kile tunachotazama leo, ni wakati wa kihistoria, programu ambayo ina lengo la kuwezesha nchi zilizo na uchumi mdogo kupitia mtandao wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa.

translations.source: I am thrilled to see the progress made in such a relatively short time and welcome the support from so many different countries - countries like South Africa that have a strong vibrant biomanufacturing capacity and that are willing to work together, learn from and share with each other.” Minister Blade Nzimande of Higher Education and Science, said: “Ours is the vision of the mRNA Technology Transfer Hub beyond just COVID-19. The capabilities we are building are looking to empower us to deal with other future pandemics whose vaccines could use the same mRNA technology platform. It is a vision that has set its eyes on diseases that are prevalent in our environments such as Malaria, Tuberculosis and HIV and AIDS.” This occasion also marks an important milestone for the Programme with the inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen in Cape Town in the presence of Dr. Tedros and Dr. Matshidiso Moeti WHO Regional Director for Africa, Charles Gore Executive Director of MPP and the Honorable Ministers who took part in a ribbon cutting ceremony at Afrigen.
translations.reference: Nimefurahi kuona maendeleo yaliyofikiwa kwa muda mfupi na nakaribisha msaada kutoka kwa nchi nyingi tofauti- nchi kama Afrika Kusini ambazo zina uwezo mkubwa wa kutengeneza viumbe na ambazo ziko tayari kufanya kazi pamoja, kujifunza kutoka na kushiriki na kila mmoja". Waziri Blade Nzimande wa Elimu ya juu na Sayansi, alisema: "Letu ni dira ya mRNA Technology Transfer Hub zaidi ya UVIKo-19. Uwezo tunaojenga unatazamia kutupa ili kukabiliana na magonjwa mengine baadae ambayo chanjo zake zinaweza kutumia jukwaa la Teknolojia la mRNA. Ni Dira ambayo imeweka macho yake kuhusu magonjwa ambayo yameenea katika mazingira yetu kama vile Malaria, kifua kikuu na VVU na UKIMWI" Hafla hii pia inaashiria hatua muhimu kwa mpango kwa kuzinduliwa kwa kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA Hub huko Afrigen huko Cap Town mbele ya Dk. Tedros na Dk. Matshidiso Moeti Mkurugenzi wa WHO kanda ya Afrika, Charles Gore Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa MPP na Waheshimiwa Mawaziri walishiriki katika hafla ya kukata utepe huko Afrigen.
translations.hypothesis: "Nimefurahi sana kuona maendeleo zilizopatikana katika kipindi kifupi, na ninakumbatia usaidizi kutoka nchi nyingi – nchi kama vile Afrika Kusini ambazo zina uwezo imara wa uzalishaji wa biolojia na ambazo wanatarajia kufanya kazi pamoja, kujifunza kutoka kwao, na kushiriki nao." Mheshimiwa Blade Nzimande, kutoka Wizara ya Elimu na Sayansi, alisema: "Lengo letu ni Kitovu cha Uhamishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA, zaidi ya COVID-19. Uwezo ambao tunaendelea kuitengeneza, una lengo la kuwezesha sisi kukabiliana na magonjwa mengine ya siku zijazo, ambayo tiba zao zinaweza kutumia teknolojia sawa ya mRNA. Hii ni lengo ambalo limefokuswa kwenye magonjwa ambayo ni ya kawaida katika mazingira yetu, kama vile Malaria, Tuberculo, na Ugonjwa wa AIDS." Hii pia ni hatua muhimu kwa Mpango, kwa uanzishaji wa kitengo cha teknolojia ya mRNA katika Afrigen huko Cape Town, katika uwepo wa Dkt. Tedros na Dkt. Matshidiso Moeti, Mkurugenzi wa Kanda ya WHO kwa Afrika, Charles Gore, Mkurugenzi wa MPP, na wajumbe wengine wa serikali waliwashiriki katika sherehe ya kukata kamba katika Afrigen.

translations.source: Professor Petro Terblanche, Executive Director of Afrigen said: “The entire Afrigen team are thrilled to reach this important milestone with the completion of the mRNA technology platform. This platform is housed within the end-to-end mRNA vaccine development and production facility where the mRNA Hub Covid 19 vaccine candidate AfriVac 2121 is currently in scale-up phase. Over the last 18 months, Afrigen has undergone an incredible transformation with the support of a network of partners and mentors enabled by this Programme. We have grown our capability and capacity to meet the highest quality standards of mRNA vaccine development, serving the objective to build sustainable capacity in LMICs to produce mRNA vaccines”. Afrigen has successfully established a COVID-19 vaccine manufacturing process at a laboratory scale and is currently scaling up that process to a level suitable for manufacturing vaccine batches to be used in Phase I/ II clinical trials to GMP standards.
translations.reference: Profesa Petro Terblanche, mkurugenzi mtendaji wa Afrigen alisema: "Timu nzima ya Afrigen ina furaha kufikia hatua hii muhimu kwa kukamilika kwa jukwaa la Teknolojia ya mRNA. Jukwaa hili liko ndani ya kituo cha kutengeneza chanjo ya mwisho hadi mwisho ya mRNA ambapo mtahiniwa wa chanjo ya mRNA Hub Covid 19 AfriVac 2121 kwa sasa yuko katika hatua ya kuongeza. Katika kipindi cha miezi 18 iliyopita, Afrigen imepitia mabadiliko ya ajabu kwa usaidizi wa mtandao wa washirika na washauri wanaowezeshwa na mpango huu. Tumekuza uwezo wetu na uwezo wa kufikia viwango vya ubora wa juu zaidi vya ukuzaji wa chanjo ya mRNA, ikitumikia lengo la kujenga uwezo endelevu katika LMICs kuzalisha chanjo za mRNA". Afrigen imefanikiwa kuimarisha mchakato wa kutengeneza chanjo ya UVIKO-19 kwa kiwango cha maabara na kwa sasa inaongeza mchakato huo hadi kufikia kiwango kinachofaa kwa utengenezaji makundi ya chanjo zitakazo tumika katika majaribio ya matibabu ya awamu ya I/II.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Petro Terblanche, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Afrigen, alisema: "Timu nzima ya Afrigen ina furaha kwa kufikia hatua muhimu hii, baada ya kukamilisha jukwaa la teknolojia la mRNA. Jukwaa hili lina makao katika kitengo cha utayarishaji na uzalishaji wa chanjo za mRNA, ambapo chanjo ya COVID-19 ya AfriVac 2121, ambayo ni mshangilio wa mRNA, iko katika hatua ya kuongeza wingi. Katika miezi 18 iliyopita, Afrigen imepitia mabadiliko kubwa, kwa usaidizi wa mtandao wa washiriki na walimu, iliyowezeshwa na programu hii. Tumekua katika uwezo na uwezo wa kufikia viwango vya juu vya utayarishaji wa chanjo za mRNA, na lengo letu ni kujenga uwezo endelevu katika nchi za Afrika Mashariki na Kaskazini ili kuzalisha chanjo za mRNA". Afrigen imestaanzisha kwa mafanikio mchakato wa utayarishaji wa chanjo ya COVID-19 katika viwango vya laboratoryo, na kwa sasa inaongeza mchakato huo hadi kiwango kinachofaa kwa utayarishaji wa vikundi vya chanjo ambazo zitatumika katika majaribio ya kliniki ya hatua I/II kwa viwango vya GMP.

translations.source: In a parallel process, Afrigen will continue to carry out training and technology transfer to the network partners. The funders play a crucial role in supporting the Programme with total funding to date at US$ 117 million and France being the first to fund the mRNA technology transfer work. Present at the meeting were representatives from the European Commission, Belgium, Germany, as well as Norway, Canada, African Union, South Africa, and the ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, GlobalAffairs Canada’s Director General for Southern and Eastern Africa said: “Canada reaffirms its continued support of the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme and we are delighted to announce a further contribution of 15 million Canadian dollars at the meeting today. This brings Canada’s total contribution to the Programme up to 45 million Canadian dollars.
translations.reference: Katika mchakato sambamba, Afrigen itaendelea kutekeleza mafunzo na uhamisho wa Teknolojia kwa washirika wa mtandao. Wafadhili wanajua jukumu muhimu katika kusaidia mpango wa ufadhili wa jumla hadi sasa wa Dola za kimarekani milioni 117 na Ufaransa ikiwa ya kwanza kufadhili kazi ya uhamishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA. Waliohudhuria mkutano huo ni wawakilishi kutoka Tume ya Ulaya, Ubelgiji, Ujerumani, vilevile Norway, Kanada, Umoja wa Afrika, Afrika Kusini, na wakfu wa ELMA. Caroline Delany, mkurugenzi mkuu wa Global Affairs Kanada kusini na mashariki mwa Afrika alisema: "Kanada inathibitisha kuendelea kuunga mkono mpango wa uhawilishaji Teknolojia wa mRNA na tuna furaha kutangaza mchango zaidi wa Dola milioni 15 za Kanada katika mkutano wa leo. Hii inaleta jumla ya mchango wa Kanada kwenye mpango hadi Dola milioni 45 za kikanada.
translations.hypothesis: Katika mchakato mwingine, Afrigen itaendelea na mafunzo na ubadilishaji wa teknolojia kwa washirika wa mtandao. Wadhamini wana jukumu muhimu katika usaidia kwa programu, na hadi sasa, jumla ya fedha ni dola milioni 117, na Ufaransa ni kwanza kutoa fedha kwa kazi ya ubadilishaji wa teknolojia ya mRNA. Wakati wa mikutano, kulikuwa na viongozi kutoka kwa Baraza la Ulaya, Belgium, Ujerumani, pamoja na Norway, Kanada, Umoja wa Afrika, Afrika Kusini, na Mfuko la ELMA. Caroline Delany, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa GlobalAffairs Canada kwa Afrika Kusini na Mashariki, alisema: "Kanada inaendelea kutoa usaidizi kwa Programu ya Ubadilishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA, na tuna furaha kutangaza michango ya ziada ya dola milioni 15 katika mikutano hii leo. Hii inazima michango ya jumla ya Kanada kwa programu hadi dola milioni 45.

translations.source: These funds support the running of the Hub in South Africa as well as network partners around the world. We firmly believe in the importance of building capacity at local and regional level”. Mr Martin Seychell, Deputy Executive Director European Commission, said. “The EC has already contributed €40 million to the establishment of the mRNA technology transfer Hub and has recently signed another grant with the EIB for €15,5 million to facilitate the expansion of vaccines manufacturing capacity. This is part of the overall investment under the EU Global Gateway strategy, where more than €1 Billion have been mobilised under the Team Europe Initiative on Manufacturing health products. It is now particularly important to also address possible regulatory and demand bottlenecks, to ensure not only production of vaccines of the highest standard in all regions of the world, but also rapid and equitable access to those vaccines.”
translations.reference: Fedha hizi zinasaidia uendeshaji wa Hub nchini Afrika Kusini vilevile washirika wa mtandao Duniani kote. Tunaamini kwa dhati umuhimu wa kujenga uwezo katika ngazi ya nchi na kikanda", alisema Bw Martin Seychell, Naibu mkurugenzi mtendaji tume ya ulaya. "EC tayari imechangia yuro milioni 40 katika uanzishwaji wa kituo cha uhawilishaji wa Teknolojia ya mRNA na hivi karibuni imetia saini ruzuku nyingine na EIB kwa yuro milioni 15.5 kuwezesha upanuzi wa uwezo wa kutengeneza chanjo. Hii ni sehemu ya uwekezaji wa jumla ya mkakati wa EU Global Gatway, ambapo zaidi ya yuro Bilioni 1 zimekusanyw chini ya mpango wa timu ya Ulaya juu ya utengenezaji wa bidhaa za afya. Kwa sasa ni muhimu hasa kushughulikia vikwazo vinavyowezekana vya udhibiti na mahitaji, ili kuhakikisha sio tu uzalishaji wa chanjo za kiwango cha juu katika maeneo yote Duniani, lakini pia upatikanaji wa haraka na sawa wa chanjo hizo"
translations.hypothesis: Mali hizi zinasaidia operesheni ya "Hub" nchini Afrika Kusini, pamoja na washirika wa mtandao kote ulimwenguni. Tunaamini sana kuhusu umuhimu wa kujenga uwezo katika viwango vya ndani na za eneo. "Bwana Martin Seychell, Mkurugenzi wa Kwanza wa Kamishna ya Ulaya, alisema. "Kamishna ya Ulaya tayari imetoa €40 milioni kwa usimamizi wa "Hub" ya teknolojia ya mRNA, na hivi majuzi imesaini mkataba mwingine na EIB wa €15,5 milioni ili kuwezesha upanuzi wa uwezo wa utengenezaji wa chanjo. Hii ni sehemu ya uwekezaji kikuu chini ya mkakati wa EU Global Gateway, ambapo zaidi ya €1 مليار zimeharakishwa chini ya Mpango wa Team Europe kuhusu utengenezaji wa bidhaa za afya. Ni muhimu sana pia kushughulikia vikwazo vyote, ili kuhakikisha si tu utengenezaji wa chanjo za kiwango cha juu katika kila eneo duniani, bali pia upatikanaji wa haraka na sawa wa chanjo hizo."

translations.source: Key leadership appointments made to drive WHO strategic direction and initiatives The World Health Organization (WHO) has appointed five new senior figures to its headquarters leadership team in Geneva. The new appointments follow the reappointment of Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus to his second five-year term as Director-General. The overall leadership team has been consolidated to align with the Organization’s priorities for the next five years and will work closely with the Director-General to drive forward these priorities and WHO’s ambitious transformation agenda. To accelerate progress on implementation of WHO’s 13th General Programme of Work (GPW13), and achievement of its “triple billion” targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals, WHO’s work for the coming five years is focused on five priorities:
translations.reference: Uteuzi muhimu wa uongozi ulifanywa ili kusimamia muelekeo na mipango ya kimkakati ya WHO Shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) limeteua vigogo watano wapya kwa tume yake ya uongozi ya makao makuu mjini Jeniva. Uteuzi huo mpya unafuatia kuteuliwa tena kwa Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghereyesus katika muhula wake wa pili wa miaka mitano kama mkurugenzi mkuu. Timu ya jumla ya uongozi imeunganishwa ili kuendana na vipaumbele vya shirika kwa miaka mitano ijayo na itafanya kazi kwa karibu na mkurugenzi mkuu ili kuendeleza vipaumbele hivi na ajenda ya mabadiliko ya WHO. Ili kuharakisha maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa mpango mkuu wa 13 wa kazi za WHO (GPW13), kufikia malengo yake ya "Bilioni tatu" na malengo ya maendeleo endelevu yanayousiana na afya, kazi ya WHO kwa miaka mitano ijayo inazingatia vipaumbele vitano:
translations.hypothesis: Uaguzi wa viongozi muhimu ulifanyika ili kuendesha dira na mashinani za WHO. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) amemuajiri viongozi sita wapya katika timu yake ya viongozi katika ofisi yake mjini Geneva. Uaguzi huu unafuata uamuzi wa kumua Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus katika mandati yake ya pili ya miaka mitano kama Mkurugenzi Mkuu. Timu kuu ya viongozi imejumuishwa ili kuendana na kipaumbele cha Shirika kwa miaka mitano ijayo, na itafanya kazi kwa karibu na Mkurugenzi Mkuu ili kuendesha kipaumbele hicho na mpango wa ubunifu wa WHO. Ili kuharakisha maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa Mpango wa 13 wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (GPW13), na kufikia malengo yake ya "tripl billion" na malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya, kazi ya WHO kwa miaka mitano ijayo inakusudia:

translations.source: making a paradigm shift towards promoting health and preventing disease by addressing its root causes; radically reorienting health systems towards primary health care; strengthening the systems for health emergency preparedness and response; harnessing the power of science, innovation, data and technologies to advance health; and strengthening WHO as the leading authority on global health and to achieve impact in countries.
translations.reference: Kufanya mabadiliko ya mtazamo kuelekea kukuza afya na kuzuia magonjwa kwa kushughulikia vyanzo vyake; Kuelekeza upya mifumo ya afya kuelekea huduma ya afya ya msingi Kuimarisha mifumo ya maandalizi na majibu ya dharura ya afya; Kutumia nguvu ya sayansi, uvumbuzi , Data na teknolojia ili kuendeleza afya; na Kuimarisha WHO kama mamlaka inayoongoza kwa afya Duniani na kufikia athari katika nchi.
translations.hypothesis: kuendesha mabadiliko kuelekea uendelezaji afya na kuzuia magonjwa kwa kutambua sababu za msingi; kubadilisha mifumo ya afya kuelekea huduma ya afya ya msingi; kuimarisha mifumo ya maandalizi na majibu ya dharura za afya; kutumia nguvu za sayansi, ubunifu, data na teknolojia ili kuendeleza afya; na kuimarisha WHO kama taasisi kuu katika afya ya kimataifa na kufikia matokeo katika nchi.

translations.source: The headquarters leadership team, comprising equal numbers of women and men, will work jointly with WHO regional and country offices. New members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Jeremy Farrar will become WHO’s Chief Scientist as of 8 May 2023. The appointment of Dr Farrar was previously announced in December 2022. In this role Dr Farrar will oversee the Science Division, bringing together the best experts and networks in science and innovation from around the world to guide, develop and deliver high quality health policies and services to the people who need them most. Prior to joining WHO Dr Farrar was Director of the Wellcome Trust.
translations.reference: Timu ya uongozi ya makao makuu, inayojumuisha idadi sawa ya wanawake na wanaume, itafanya kazi kwa pamoja na ofisi za WHO za kikanda na nchi. Wanachama wapya wa timu ya uongozi ya makao makuu: Dk Jeremy Farrar atakuwa mwanasayansi mkuu wa WHO kuanzia tarehe 8 Mei 2023. Uteuzi wa Dk Farrar ulitangazwa hapo awali mwezi Desemba 2022. Katika jukumu hili Dk Farrar atasimamia kitengo cha sayansi, akiwaleta pamoja watalaamu wobobezi na mitandao katika sayansi na uvumbuzi kutoka Duniani kote ili kuongoza, kuendeleza na kutoa sera na huduma za afya za ubora wa juu kwa watu wanaohitaji zaidi. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO Dk Farrar alikuwa mkurugenzi wa Wellcome Trust.
translations.hypothesis: Timu ya uongozi ya makao makuu, ambayo ina idadi sawa ya wanawake na wanaume, itafanya kazi pamoja na ofisi za WHO za eneo na nchi. Mwanachama wapya wa timu ya uongozi ya makao makuu: Dkt. Jeremy Farrar atakuwa Mshiriki Mkuu wa Sayansi wa WHO, kuanzia Mei 8, 2023. Uteuzi wa Dkt. Farrar, awali, ilitangazwa mnamo Desemba 2022. Katika jukumu hili, Dkt. Farrar atangazia Idara ya Sayansi, na kuleta wataalamu na mitandao bora katika sayansi na ubunifu kutoka kote ulimwenguni ili kuongoza, kuendeleza na kutoa sera na huduma bora za afya kwa watu ambao wanahitaji zaidi. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO, Dkt. Farrar alikuwa Mkurugenzi wa Trust ya Wellcome.

translations.source: Before joining Wellcome in 2013 Dr Farrar spent 17 years as Director of the Clinical Research Unit at the Hospital for Tropical Diseases in Vietnam where his research interests were in global health with a focus on emerging infectious diseases. Dr Farrar is a clinician researcher with a medical degree and a PhD. Dr Ailan Li will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Healthier Populations as of 8 May 2023. In this role Dr Li will oversee the Organization’s efforts to promote better health and well-being through interventions relating to the environmental, social, and economic determinants of health, including climate change, tobacco control, chemical safety, road safety, food systems and nutrition, physical activity, air pollution and radiation, through a One Health approach. Dr Li has been serving as the WHO Representative to the Kingdom of Cambodia since 15 July 2019.
translations.reference: Kabla ya kujiunga na Wellcome mwaka 2013 Dk Farrar alitumia miaka 17 kama mkurugenzi wa kitengo cha utafiti wa Kliniki katika hospitali ya magonjwa ya kitropiki nchini Vietnamu ambapo maslahi yake ya utafiti yalikuwa katika afya ya kiamataifa kwa kuzingatia magonjwa ya kuambukiza yanajitokeza. Dk Farrar ni mtafiti wa kliniki mwenye shahada ya matibabu na shahada ya Uzamivu. Dkt Alian Li atakuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa huduma ya afya kwa wote, idadi ya watu wenye afya bora kuanzia tarehe 8 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili Dk Li atasimamia juhudu za shirika za kukuza afya bora na ustawi kupitia afua zinazohusu viashiria vya afya kimazingira, kijamii na kiuchumi, ikijumuisha maadiliko ya Tabianchi, udhibiti wa Tumbaku, usalama wa kemikali, usalama wa barabarani, mifumo ya chakula na lishe, shughuli za kawaida, uchafuzi wa hewa na mionzi, kupitia mbinuya Afya ya Pamoja. Dk Li amekuwa akihudumu kama mwakilishi wa WHO katika Ulaflme wa Kambodia tangu 15 julai 2019.
translations.hypothesis: Kabla ya kujiunga na Wellcome mwaka wa 2013, Dkt. Farrar alitumia 17 miaka kama Mkurugenzi wa Kitengo cha Utafiti Kliniki katika Hospitali ya Magonjwa ya Kiafya katika Vietnam, ambapo maslahi yake ya utafiti yalikuwa katika afya ya kimataifa, na umfokus wa magonjwa mapya. Dkt. Farrar ni mtafiti wa kliniki na ana digiri ya tiba na PhD. Dkt. Ailan Li atakuwa Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Jumla kwa Afya, Jumuiya Afya, kuanzia Mei 8, 2023. Katika jukumu hili, Dkt. Li atangazia juhudi za Shirika za kuendeleza afya na ustawi kupitia hatua zinazohusiana na mambo ya kiambatisho, kijamii, na kiuchumi, pamoja na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, udhibiti wa sigara, usalama wa kemikali, usalama wa barabara, mifumo ya chakula na lishe, shughuli za kimwili, mchafuzi wa hewa na nyuklia, kupitia mbinu ya "Afya Yote". Dkt. Li amekuwa kama Mwakilishi wa WHO katika Ukingo wa Cambodia tangu Julai 15, 2019.

translations.source: Prior to this role, Dr Li served as Regional Emergency Director for the WHO Health Emergencies Programme in the WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific. Dr Li holds a medical degree and degree in health social sciences. Dr Yukiko Nakatani will become Assistant Director-General for Access to Medicines and Health Products as of 2 May 2023. In this role Dr Nakatani will oversee the development and implementation of WHO’s norms and policies to ensure equitable access to quality medicines, vaccines and diagnostics for all populations everywhere, including for preventing and responding to epidemics. Dr Nakatani has been serving as the Director of the Cancer and Disease Control Division of the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare and as the Technical Advisor to the Minister of State for the COVID-19 Vaccination Task Force in Japan.
translations.reference: Kabla ya jukumu hili, Dk Li aliwahi kuwa mkurugenzi wa Dharura wa kanda wa mpango wa dhrura wa afya wa WHO katika ofisi ya kanda ya WHO ya Pasifiki Magharibi. Dk Li ana shahada ya matibabu na shahada katika Sayansi ya afya ya kijamii. Dkt Yukiko Nakatani atakuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya kuanzia tarehe 2 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili Dk Nakatani atasimamaia maendeleo na utekelezaji wa kanuni na sera za WHO ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji sawa wa dawa bora, chanjo na uchunguzi kwa watu wote kila mahali, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzuia na kukabiliana na magonjwa ya mlipuko. Dkt Nakatani amekuwa mkurugenzi wa kitengo cha kudhibiti saratani na magonjwa cha wizara ya afya, kazi na ustawi wa Japani na kama mshauri wa kiufundi wa waziri wa nchi wa kikosi kazi cha chanjo ya UVIKO-19 nchini Japani.
translations.hypothesis: Kabla ya nafasi hii, Dkt. Li alihudumu kama Mkurugenzi wa Kanda wa Programu ya Majilifu ya WHO katika Ofisi ya Kanda ya WHO kwa Umoja wa Pasifiki. Dkt. Li ana digiri ya tiba na digiri katika sayansi ya afya. Dkt. Yukiko Nakatani atakuwa Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Upatikanaji wa Madawa na Bidhaa za Afya, kuanzia tarehe 2 Mei 2023. Katika nafasi hii, Dkt. Nakatani atawajibika katika uendelezaji na utekelezaji wa kanuni na sera za WHO, ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji sawa wa dawa, chanjo na utambuzi kwa idadi kubwa ya watu duniani, pamoja na kupunguza na kukabiliana na magonjwa. Dkt. Nakatani amehudumu kama Mkurugenzi wa Idara ya Udhibiti wa Saratani na Magonjwa katika Wizara ya Afya, Ajira na Utulivu ya Japani, na pia kama Mshauri wa Teknolojia kwa Waziri wa Serikali katika Timu ya COVID-19 ya Uanzia katika Japani.

translations.source: Dr Nakatani holds a medical degree and a PhD in public health. Dr Razia Pendse will become the Chef de Cabinet as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Pendse will head the Director-General’s Office, helping to drive the Organization’s priorities and initiatives, and will ensure alignment within the WHO leadership team and across the three levels of WHO. Dr Pendse has been serving as the Director of Healthier Populations and Noncommunicable Diseases in the WHO Regional Office for South-East Asia and was previously the WHO Representative to Sri Lanka. Dr Pendse holds a medical degree and master's degree in public health.
translations.reference: Dk Nakatani ana shahada ya matibabu na shahada ya Uzamivu katiak afya ya umma. Dkt Razia Pendse atakuwa mkuu wa Baraza la mawaziri kuanzia tarehe 4 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili Dk Pendse ataongoza ofisi ya mkurugenzi mkuu, akisaidia kuendeleza vipaumbele na mipango ya shirika, atahakikisha uwiano ndani ya timu ya uongozi ya WHO na katika ngazi tatu za WHO. Dk Pendse amekuwa mkurugenzi wa idadi ya watu wenye afya bora na magonjwa yasiyoamukiza katika ofisi ya kanda ya WHO ya Kusini Mashsriki mwa Asia na hapo awali alikuwa mwakilishi wa WHO nchini Sri Lanka. Dk Pendse ana shahada ya matibabu na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Nakatani ana digiri ya tiba na PhD katika afya ya umma. Dkt. Razia Pendse atakuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu, kuanzia tarehe 4 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili, Dkt. Pendse atiendelea Ofisi ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu, na kuunga mkono kuanzisha malengo na mipango ya Shirika, na kuhakikisha ushirikiano ndani ya timu ya uongozi ya WHO na katika viwango tatu za WHO. Dkt. Pendse amekuwa mkurugenzi wa "Populasioni na Magonjwa Isiyoambukiza" katika Ofisi ya Kanda ya WHO kwa Asia Mashariki na zamani alikuwa Mwakilishi wa WHO nchini Sri Lanka. Dkt. Pendse ana digiri ya tiba na digiri ya uzamili katika afya ya umma.

translations.source: Dr Jérôme Salomon will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Communicable and Noncommunicable Diseases as of 17 April 2023. In this role Dr Salomon will oversee a broad portfolio of technical programmes covering HIV, viral hepatitis, sexually-transmitted infections, tuberculosis, malaria, neglected tropical diseases, mental health, substance use disorders, and noncommunicable diseases such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, chronic respiratory diseases and cancer. Dr Salomon has been serving as the Director-General for Health at the Ministry of Health and Prevention of France. He was a Member of the WHO Executive Board prior to his appointment and has extensive experience in health systems management, communicable diseases and international public health. Dr Salomon holds a medical degree, a master’s degree in public health and a PhD in epidemiology.
translations.reference: Dkt Jerome Solomon atakuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa huduma ya afya kwa wote, magonjwa yanayoambukiza na yasiyoamukiza kuanzia tarehe 17 Aprili 2023. Katika jukumu hili Dk Solomon atasimamia sehemu kubwa ya Programuza kiufundi zinaohusu VVU, homa ya Ini, Magonjwa ya Zinaa, kifua kikuu, Malaria, magonjwa kitropiki yaliyosahaulika, afya ya akili, matatizo ya matumizi ya dawa na magonjwa yasiyoambukiza kama vile magonjwa ya moyo na mishipa, kisukari, magonjwa sugu ya kupumua na Saratani. Dk Solomon amekuwa akihudumu kama mkurugenzi mkuu wa afya katika wizara ya afya na kinga ya Ufaransa. Alikuwa mjumbe wa Halmashauri kuu ya WHO kabla ya kuteuliwa na ana uzoefu mkubwa katika usimamizi wa mifumo ya afya, magonjwa ya kuambukiza na afya ya kimataifa ya umma. Dk Solomon ana shahada ya matibabu, shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma na shahada ya uzamivu katika magonjwa.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Jérôme Salomon atakuwa Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Utoaji Huduma za Afya, Ugonjwa waambukizo na ugonjwa usioambukiza, kuanzia Aprili 17, 2023. Katika jukumu hili, D. Salomon atanguliza programu za kiufundi za kina, zinazojumuisha ugonjwa wa HIV, hepatitis, magonjwa yanayosambazwa kupitia ngono, kuhama, malaria, magonjwa ya kipekee, afya ya akili, matatizo ya matumizi ya dawa, na magonjwa usioambukizo kama vile magonjwa ya moyo, ugonjwa wa kisukari, magonjwa ya kupumua, na saratani. D. Salomon amekuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Afya katika Wizara ya Afya na Ulinzi ya Ufaransa. Alikuwa Mwanachama wa Bodi ya Uaguzi ya WHO kabla ya jukumu lake, na ana uzoefu mkubwa katika usimamizi wa mifumo ya afya, magonjwa yanayosambazwa, na afya ya umma ya kimataifa. D. Salomon ana digiri ya tiba, digiri ya uzamili katika afya ya umma, na PhD katika ugonjwa.

translations.source: The portfolios of existing members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Samira Asma will continue as the Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact. Dr Asma oversees a portfolio which ensures that health data are reliable and accessible, and are used to improve health outcomes worldwide, including tracking and accelerating progress towards the triple billion targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals. Prior to joining WHO in 2018, Dr Asma held leadership positions at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) for over two decades. She holds a doctorate degree in dental surgery and a master's degree in public health. Dr Bruce Aylward has been appointed Assistant Director-General of the Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division as of 4 May 2023.
translations.reference: Nyadhifa za wanachama waliopo wa timu ya uongozi ya makao makuu: Dk Samira Asma ataendelea kuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa Takwimu, uchanganuzi na uwasilishaji wa Athari. Dkt Asma anasimamia idara ambayo inahakikisha kwamba Data ya afya ni ya kuaminika na inapatikana, na inatumiwa kuboresha matokeo ya afya Duniani kote, ikiwa ni pamoja na kufuatilia na kuharakisha maendeleo kuelekea malengo ya Bilioni tatu na malengo ya maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na Afya. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO mwaka 2018, Dk Asma alishikilia nyadhifa za uongozi katika vituo vya Marekani vya kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa (CDC) kwa zaidi ya miongo miwili. Ana shahada ya udaktari katika upasuaji wa meno na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Dkt Bruce Aylward ameteuliwa kuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa huduma ya afya kwa wote, idara ya kozi ya maisha kuanzia tarehe 4 Mei 2023.
translations.hypothesis: مotto za wanachama wa timu ya uongozi ya kanda: Dkt. Samira Asma, atendelea kama Msaidizi Mkuu wa Data, Utafiti na Utendaji kwa ajili ya athari. Dkt. Asma huendesha shughuli katika portfolio ambayo huwajaribu data za afya kuwa na uhakika na kuwa naweza, na kutumiwa kuboresha matokeo za afya duniani kote, pamoja na kufuatilia na kuendesha maendeleo kuelekea malengo ya mara tatu bilioni na malengo ya Maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO mwaka wa 2018, Dkt. Asma alikuwa na nafasi za uongozi katika Kituo cha Taasisi za Afya za Marekani (CDC) kwa zaidi ya miaka mitano. Ana shahada ya uzalishaji wa meno na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Dkt. Bruce Aylward, ametumaiwa kama Msaidizi Mkuu wa Idara ya Utoaji wa Afya Kamili, kwa tarehe 4 Mei 2023.

translations.source: Dr Aylward has been leading WHO’s Transformation Agenda and the Organization’s work on the multi-agency Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator (ACT-A) Hub. In his new role, Dr Aylward will drive the Organization’s agenda to transform primary health care as central to universal health coverage, as well as overseeing WHO’s work on health systems, immunization and reproductive, maternal and child health. Dr Aylward holds a medical degree and a master’s degree in public health.Dr Hanan Balkhy will continue as Assistant Director-General for Antimicrobial Resistance. Dr Balkhy provides technical and political leadership to curb the health and economic burdens of drug resistance, including through multi-sectoral collaboration with the Food and Agriculture Organization, the World Organization for Animal Health, and the United Nations Environment Programme. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Balkhy was Executive Director for Infection Prevention and Control at Saudi Arabia’s Ministry of National Guard.
translations.reference: Dk Aylward amekuwa akiongoza ajenda ya mabadiliko ya WHO na kazi ya shirika kwenye kitovu cha wakala mbalimbali cha ufikiaji wa vifaa vya kuharakisha zana za UVIKO-19 (ACT-A). Ktika jukumu lake jipya, Dk Aylward ataendesha ajenda ya shirika la kubadilisha huduma ya afya ya msingi kama msingi wa huduma ya afya kwa wote, vilevile kusimamia kazi ya WHO kuhusu mifumo ya afya, chanjo na afya ya uzazi, uzazi na mtoto. Dkt Aylward ana shahada ya udaktari na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Dk Balky ataendelea kuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa upinzani wa Antimikrobia. Dk Balkhy hutoa uongozi wa kiufundi na kisiasa ili kupunguza mizigo ya kiafya na kiuchumi ya ukinzani wa Dawa, ikijumuisha kupitia ushirikiano wa sekta mbalimbali na shirika la chakula na kilimo, shirika la afya ya wanyama Duniani, na mpango wa mazingira wa umoja wa mataifa. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO, Dk Balkhy alikuwa mkurugenzi mtendaji wa kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi katika wizara ya walinzi wa kitaifa ya Saudi Arabia.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Aylward amekuwa mwenyekiti wa Agenda ya Mabadiliko ya WHO na kazi ya Shirika katika Kituo cha Msaada wa Rasilimali za COVID-19 (ACT-A). Katika jukumu lake jipya, D. Aylward atawashirikisha Shirika katika mradi wa kubadilisha huduma za afya za msingi kuwa muhimu katika utetezi wa afya wa kila mtu, pamoja na kuendesha kazi ya WHO katika mifumo ya afya, chanjo, na afya ya mama, watoto, na familia. D. Aylward ana shahada ya tiba na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. D. Hanan Balkhy atendelea kama Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Jimbo. D. Balkhy anatoa uongozi wa kiufundi na kiutawala ili kupunguza athari za matumizi ya dawa, pamoja na ushirikiano wa sekta mbalimbali na Shirika la Chakula na Kilimo, Shirika la Kimataifa la Afya ya Wanyama, na Programu ya Kimataifa ya Mazingira. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO, D. Balkhy alikuwa Mkurugenzi wa Uendeshaji wa Vipawa na Udhibiti katika Wizara ya Jeshi ya Saudi Arabia.

translations.source: Dr Balkhy holds a medical degree with specialization in paediatric infectious diseases. Dr Catharina Boehme will become Assistant Director-General, External Relations and Governance as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Boehme will lead WHO’s strategic engagement in the areas of governance, resource mobilization and partner relations. Her portfolio will include critical Member States processes, such as their negotiation of a pandemic accord, the reform of WHO’s governance and the implementation of recommendations on sustainable financing. Dr Boehme has been serving as the Director-General’s Chef de Cabinet during which time she drove the leadership’s strategic vision, ensuring alignment across the Organization and with Member States and partners.
translations.reference: Dk Balkhy ana shahada ya matibabu na utaalamu wa magonjwa ya kuambukiza kwa watoto. Dk Catharina Boehme atakuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi, mahusiano ya kimataifa na utawala kuanzia tarehe 4 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili Dk Boehme ataongoza ushiriki wa kimkakati wa WHO katika maeneo ya utawala, uhamishaji wa rasilimali na uhusiano wa washirika. Jarada lake litajumuisha michakato muhimu ya nchi wanachama, kama vile mazungumzo yao ya makubaliano ya janga, mageuzi ya utawala wa WHO na utekelezaji wa mapendekezo juu ya ufadhili endelevu. Dk Boehme amekuwa akihudumu kama mkuu wa Baraza la mawaziri la mkurugenzi mkuu wakati ambapo aliongoza maono ya kimkakati ya uongozi, kuhakikisha uwiano katika shirika na nchi wanachama na washirika.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Balkhy ana digiri ya tiba na uspeshalizaji katika magonjwa ya watoto. Dkt. Catharina Boehme atakuwa Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Masuala ya nje na Uongozi, kuanzia tarehe 4 Mei 2023. Katika jukumu hili, Dkt. Boehme atashughulikia ushiriki wa kimkakati wa WHO katika masuala ya uongozi, kupata rasilimali, na uhusiano na washiriki. Jukumu lake litajumuisha mchakato muhimu wa mataifa wanachama, kama vile mzozo wao kuhusu makubaliano ya janga, uimarishaji wa uongozi wa WHO, na utekelezaji wa mapendekezo kuhusu ufadhili endelevu. Dkt. Boehme amekuwa kama Mkurugenzi Mkuu, ambapo alishughulikia mtazamo wa kimkakati wa uongozi, kuhakikisha umeshirikana katika taasisi na mataifa wanachama na washiriki.

translations.source: She joined WHO in 2021, having been the Chief Executive Officer of FIND, the international alliance for diagnostics. Dr Boehme holds a medical degree and diplomas in public health and management. Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu will continue as Assistant Director-General for the Division of Health Emergency Intelligence and Surveillance Systems in the Emergencies Programme. As part of his portfolio, Dr Ihekweazu leads the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, bringing together partners to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, analytical capacities, and tools for decision-making. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Ihekweazu was the first Director General of the Nigeria Centre for Disease Control (NCDC), from 2016 to 2021.
translations.reference: Alijiunga na WHO mnamo 2021, akiwa Afisa mkuu mtendaji wa FIND, muungano wa kimataifa wa uchunguzi. Dk Boehme ana shahada ya matibabu na Stashahada katika afya ya umma na usimamizi. Dk Chikwe Ihekweazu ataendelea kuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa kitengo cha mifumo ya upelelzi wa dharura ya kiafya na ufuatiliaji katika mpango wa dharura. Kama sehemu ya jalada lake, Dk Ihekweazu anaongoza kitovu cha WHO cha ujasusi wa ugonjwa wa mlipuko na milipuko, akiwaleta pamoja washirika kushughulikia hatari za janga na magonjwa ya siku siku zijazo na ufikiaji bora wa Data, uwezo wa uchambuzi, na zana za kufanya maamuzi. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO, Dk Ihekweazu alikuwa mkurugenzi mkuu wa kwanza wa kituo cha kudhibiti magonjwa cha Nigeria (NCDC), kuanzia 2016 hadi 2021.
translations.hypothesis: Alijiunga na WHO mwaka wa 2021, baada ya kuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa FIND, chama cha kimataifa kwa utambuzi. Dkt. Boehme ana digiri ya tiba na vyenzi katika afya ya umma na usimamizi. Dkt. Chikwe Ihekweazu atendelea kama Mshiriki Mkuu katika Idara ya Taarifa na Ufuatiliaji wa Dawa katika Programu ya Majeruhi. Kwenye jukumu lake, Dkt. Ihekweazu inaongoza Kitengo cha WHO kwa Taarifa na Ufuatiliaji wa Dawa, ambapo pamoja na washiriki, wanaendelea kushughulikia hatari za siku zijazo za magonjwa, kwa kupata taarifa, uwezo wa uchambuzi, na zana za uamuzi. Kabla ya kujiunga na WHO, Dkt. Ihekweazu alikuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Kituo cha Taarifa na Ufuatiliaji wa Magonjwa la Nigeria (NCDC), kutoka mwaka wa 2016 hadi 2021.

translations.source: Dr Ihekweazu holds a medical degree, with specialization as an infectious disease epidemiologist, and a master’s degree in public health. Dr Michael Ryan will continue as Executive Director of WHO’s Health Emergencies Programme. Dr Ryan has been managing health emergencies in WHO for the past 25 years and most recently led WHO’s emergency response to the COVID-19 pandemic. He leads WHO’s response to disease outbreaks, humanitarian crises and other public health emergencies. Dr Ryan is a founding member of the Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), which has aided the response to hundreds of disease outbreaks around the world.
translations.reference: Dk Ihekweazu ana shshada ya matibabu, na utaalamu kama mtaalamu wa magonjwa ya kuambukiza, na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Dtk Michael Ryan ataendelea kama mkurugenzi mtendaji wa mpango wa dharura wa afya wa WHO. Dk Ryan amekuwa akisimamia dharura za kiafya katika WHO kwa miaka 25 iliyopita na hivi karibuni aliongoza makabiliano ya dharura ya WHO kwa janga la UVIKO-19. Anaongoza muitikio wa WHO kwa milipuko ya magonjwa, majanga ya kibinadamu na dharura nyingine za afya ya umma. Dk Ryan mwanachama mwanzilishi wa mtandao wa tahadhari na makabiliano ya mlipuko wa ulimwenguni (GOARN), ambao umesaidia kukabiliana na mamia ya milipuko ya magonjwa kote ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: Dato Ihekweazu ana digiri ya tiba, na uspecialization katika sayansi ya epidemiolojia ya magonjwa, na digiri ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Dk Michael Ryan atendelea kama Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Programu ya Majilifu ya WHO. Dk Ryan amewasilisha majilifu katika WHO kwa zaidi ya miaka 25, na hivi majuzi amewezaongoza majilifu ya WHO kwa janga la COVID-19. Yeye inaongoza majilifu ya WHO kwa mgongano wa magonjwa, majilifu ya kiraia, na majilifu mengine ya afya ya umma. Dk Ryan ni mwanasiasa wa kikundi cha Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), ambacho amesaidia katika majilifu mengi ya magonjwa kote ulimwenguni.

translations.source: Dr Ryan holds a degree in medicine and a master’s degree in public health. Mr Raul Thomas will continue as Assistant Director-General for Business Operations. Mr Thomas has overall responsibility for WHO’s business functions, including budget, finance, human resources, administration, audit, risk management, accountability and compliance, and general management. He is responsible for implementing many of the initiatives under the Organization’s transformation agenda and creating a respectful, inclusive workplace. During his 20 years of employment with WHO, Mr Thomas has served in the regions of Africa, the Americas, the Eastern Mediterranean and the Western Pacific, as well as with the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC).
translations.reference: Dk Ryan ana shahada ya udaktari na shahada ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Bw Raul Thomas ataendelea kuwa mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa uendeshaji Biashara. Bw. Thomas ana wajibu wa jumla wa kazi biashara za WHO, ikiwa ni pamoja na bajeti, fedha, rasilimali watu, utawala, ukaguzi, usimamizi wa hatari, uwajibikaji na utii, na usimamizi wa jumla. Ana jukumu la kutekeleza mipango mingi chini ya ajenda ya mabadiliko ya shirika na kuunda mahali pakazi pa heshima na jumuishi. Katika miaka yake 20 ya ajira na WHO, Bw Thomas amehudumu katika kanda za Afrika, Mashariki ya Mediterania na Pasifiki Magharibi, vilevile shirika la kimataifa la utafiti wa saratani (IARC).
translations.hypothesis: Dato Ryan ana digiri ya tiba na digiri ya uzamili katika afya ya umma. Mwalimu Raul Thomas atendelea kama Mkurugenzi Msaidizi wa Shughuli za Kibiashara. Mwalimu Thomas ana jukumu rasmi katika shughuli za WHO, pamoja na bajeti, fedha, rasilimali za binadamu, usimamizi, ukaguzi, utoaji, uhakikisho, na usimamizi wa jumla. Yeye ni jukumu la kutekeleza shughuli nyingi chini ya agenda ya mageuzi ya Shirika, na kuunda eneo la kazi lenye heshima na uwiano. Katika miaka 20 yake ya kazi katika WHO, Mwalimu Thomas amewahi katika maeneo ya Afrika, Amerika, Mashariki ya Kati, na Pasifiki Magharibi, pamoja na na Shirika la Kimataifa la Utafiti wa Saratani (IARC).

translations.source: Mr Thomas holds a master’s degree in organizational management and a bachelor’s degree in business administration.
translations.reference: Bw. Thomas ana shahada ya uzamili katika usimamizi wa shirika na shahada ya awali katika usimamizi wa Biashara.
translations.hypothesis: Me Thomas ana digiri ya uzamili katika usimamizi wa taasisi, na digiri ya kwanza katika usimamizi wa biashara.

translations.source: Report of the meeting of the WHO Technical Advisory Group on COVID-19 Vaccine Composition (TAG-CO-VAC) held on 16-17 March 2023 In June 2022, the TAG-CO-VAC published an interim statement highlighting that index virus-based vaccines continued to confer high levels of protection against severe disease caused by all SARS-CoV-2 Variants of Concern (VOCs), including Omicron. However, given the antigenic distance and uncertainties of further viral evolution, the TAG-CO-VAC recognized that it was likely that the effectiveness of vaccines based on the index virus would reduce over time. The TAG-CO-VAC therefore advised vaccine manufacturers and regulatory authorities to consider an update of vaccine antigen composition by including Omicron, as the most antigenically distinct SARS-CoV-2 variant thus far, for administration as a booster dose. Multiple vaccine manufacturers have developed COVID-19 vaccines with an updated antigenic composition; this includes several bivalent mRNA-based vaccines containing earlier Omicron descendent lineages, in addition to the index virus (i.e., index virus + BA.1 or BA.4/5), which have been authorized for emergency use by regulatory authorities.
translations.reference: Ripoti ya mkutano wa kikundi cha ushauri wa kiufundi cha WHO kuhusu muundo wa chanjo ya UVIKO-19 (TAG-CO-VAC) uliofanyika tarehe 16-17 Machi 2023. Mnamo Juni 2022, TAG-CO-VAC ilichapisha taarifa ya muda inayoangazia kwamba Chanjo zinazotegemea virusi ziliendelea kutoa viwango vya juu vya ulinzi dhidi ya ugonjwa mbaya unaosababishwa na aina zote za kujali za SARS-CoV-2 (VOCs), pamoja na Omicron. Hata hivyo, kwa kuzingatia umbali wa Antijeni na kutokuwa na uhakika wa mageuzi zaidi ya Virusi, TAG-CO-VAC ilitambua kuwa kuna uwezekano kwamba ufanisi wa chanjo kulingana na virusi vya index ungepungua kwa muda. Hivyo TAG-CO-VAC iliwashauri watengenezaji chanjo na mamlaka za udhibiti kuzingatia sasisho la muundo wa chanjo ya Antijeni kwa kujumuisha Omicron, kama kibadala tofauti kabisa cha SARS-CoV-2 kufikia sasa, kwa matumizi kama Dozi ya nyongeza. Watengenezaji wengi wa chanjo wametengeneza chanjo za UVIKO-19 zilizo na muundo mpya wa Antijeni; hii hujumuisha chanjo kadhaa zenye msingi wa mRNA zenye nasaba za awali za kizazi cha Omicron, pamoja na virusi vya index (yaani; virusi vya index + BA.1 au BA. 4/5, ambazo zimeidhinishwa kwa matumizi ya dharura na mamlaka ya udhibiti.
translations.hypothesis: Taarifa ya kikao cha Kundi la Ushauri la Kimbinani la WHO kuhusu Mchanganyiko wa Chanjo ya COVID-19 (TAG-CO-VAC) lililofanyika mnamo 16-17 Machi 2023. Mnamo Juni 2022, TAG-CO-VAC ilitoka taarifa ya makala ambayo ilionyesha kwamba chanjo za msingi, ambazo zimetumia virusi, zinaendelea kutoa kinga kubwa dhidi ya magonjwa hatari yanayosababishwa na wote wa aina za SARS-CoV-2 zinazotishia, pamoja na Omicron. Hata hivyo, kutokana na umbali wa antigenic na ushahasia wa maendeleo ya virusi zaidi, TAG-CO-VAC iligundua kwamba inawezekana kwamba ufanisi wa chanjo za msingi utapungua kwa muda. Kwa hiyo, TAG-CO-VAC ilitaka watengenezaji wa chanjo na vyombo vya uthibitishaji kuchukua nafasi ya mchanganyiko wa antigeni wa chanjo, ikiwa pamoja na Omicron, kama aina ya SARS-CoV-2 inayotofautiana zaidi, kwa matumizi kama chanjo ya ziada. Watengenezaji kadhaa wa chanjo wameunda chanjo za COVID-19 na mchanganyiko wa antigenic uliobadilishwa; hii ni pamoja na chanjo kadhaa za mRNA ambazo zina matumizi ya awali za matawi ya Omicron, pamoja na virusi msingi (yani, virusi msingi + BA.1 au BA.4/5), ambazo zimeidhinishwa kwa matumizi ya dharura na vyombo vya uthibitishaji.

translations.source: On 16-17 March 2023, the TAG-CO-VAC reconvened in Muscat, Oman. The purpose of the meeting was two-fold: to review the evidence on the performance of updated COVID-19 vaccines that incorporate descendent lineages of Omicron as a booster dose; and to establish timelines for COVID-19 vaccine composition recommendations in 2023. The evidence reviewed by the TAG-CO-VAC to assess the performance of updated COVID-19 vaccines that incorporated descendent lineages of Omicron included:
translations.reference: Tarehe 16-17 Machi 2023, TAG-CO-VAC ilikutana tena huko Maskati, Omani. Madhumuni ya mkutano yalikuwa mawili: Kukagua ushahidi kuhusu utendaji kazi wa chanjo zilizosasishwa za UVIKO-19 ambazo zinajumuisha ukoo wa Omicron kama Dozi ya nyongeza; na Ili kuweka ratiba za mapendekezo ya muundo wa chanjo ya UVIKO-19 mwaka 2023. Ushahidi ulikaguliwa na TAG-CO-VAC ili kutathmini utendaji kazi kwa chanjo zilizosasishwa za UVIKO-19 ambazo zilijumuisha ukoo wa Omikroni pamoja na;
translations.hypothesis: Mnamo 16-17 Mach 2023, kikao cha TAG-CO-VAC kilianzishwa tena katika Muscat, Omani. Lengo la kikao hili lilikuwa mbili: kuanzisha uthibitisho kuhusu ufanisi wa chanjo mpya za COVID-19 ambazo zina jumla za za Omicron kama chanjo ya ziada; na kuweka ratiba kwa mapendekezo ya muundo wa chanjo za COVID-19 mwaka wa 2023. Uthibitisho ambao kikao cha TAG-CO-VAC kilichochunguza ili kutathmini ufanisi wa chanjo mpya za COVID-19 ambazo zina jumla za za Omicron, lina pamoja na:

translations.source: (1) published observational epidemiological studies of estimates of absolute and relative vaccine effectiveness of BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines used as a booster dose against symptomatic and severe disease; (2) laboratory-based data on the magnitude and breadth of cross-reactive immune responses against previous and circulating SARS-CoV-2 variants induced by BA.1- or BA.4/5- containing mRNA vaccines, as compared to index virus-based vaccines, used as a booster dose; and (3) laboratory-based studies and observational data on immune memory responses to evaluate the impact of repeated antigen exposure on vaccine-induced immunity and protection. Further details on the evidence reviewed by the TAG-CO-VAC can be found in the accompanying annex. Based on the review of the data described above, the TAG-CO-VAC concludes:
translations.reference: (1)ilichapisha uchunguzi wa uchunguzi wa magonjwa ya makadirio ya ufanisi kamili na jamaa wa chanjo za BA.1 - au BA. 4/5 - zenye mRNA yenye bivalent zinazotumiwa kama kipimo cha nyongeza dhidi ya ugonjwa wa Symptomatic na kali; (2) Data inayotokana maabara juu ya ukubwa na upana wa mwitikio wa kinga dhidi ya vibadala vya awali na vinavyozunguka vya SARS-CoV-2 vilivyochochewa na chanjo za BA.1- au BA. 4/5- zenye mRNA, ikilinganishwa na chanjo zenye w virusi, kutumika kama kipimo cha nyongeza; na (3) Tafiti zinazotegemea maabara na Data ya uchunguzi kuhusu majibu ya kumbukumbu ya kinga ili kutathmini athari ya kukabiliwa na Antijeni mara kwa mara kwenye kinga na ulinzi unaotokana na chanjo. Maelezo zaidi juu ya ushahidi uliopitiwa na TAG-CO-VAC yanaweza kupatikana katika kiambatisho kinachoambatana. Kulingana na ukaguzi wa Data iliyoelezewa hapo juu, TAG-CO-VAC inahitimisha:
translations.hypothesis: (1) Tafiti za uscio za epidemiolojia ambazo zimechapishwa, zinazoelezea ufanisi wa chanjo za mRNA ambazo zina BA.1- au BA.4/5, kama chanjo ya ziada dhidi ya magonjwa yenye dalili na hatari; (2) data kutoka katika лаборатория kuhusu ukubwa na urefu wa majibu ya kinga dhidi ya aina za zamani na zinazotoka za SARS-CoV-2 ambazo zimevutia kwa chanjo za mRNA zinazo ndani ya BA.1- au BA.4/5, ikilinganishwa na chanjo za msingi, kama chanjo ya ziada; na (3) tafiti za лаборатория na data za uscio kuhusu majibu ya kinga, ili kutathmini athari za mara kwa mara ya mfiduo wa virusa kwenye kinga na ulinzi ulioanzishwa na chanjo. Maelezo zaidi kuhusu ushahidi uliothaminiwa na TAG-CO-VAC yanaweza kupatikana katika hati iliyoambatana. Kulingana na utathmini wa data iliyoonyeshwa hapo juu, TAG-CO-VAC inaangalilia:

translations.source: Booster doses of index virus-based vaccines continue to confer high levels of protection against severe disease and death caused by all SARS-CoV-2 variants, including contemporary Omicron descendent lineages. Protection from severe disease and symptomatic infection induced by index virus-based vaccines and BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines declines over time. However, protection from severe disease is maintained longer than protection from symptomatic infection. As compared to index virus-based vaccines, booster doses of BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines may modestly increase vaccine effectiveness against symptomatic disease, while the small number of studies assessing severe outcomes show similar estimates of vaccine effectiveness. Both BA.1- and BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines enhance the magnitude and elicit greater breadth of cross-reactive immune responses to SARS-CoV-2 variants when used as a booster dose, as compared to the index virus-based vaccines.
translations.reference: Dozi ya nyongeza na chanjo zenye msingi wa virusi vya index zinaendelea kutoa viwango vya juu vya ulinzi dhidi ya ugonjwa mbaya na kifo kinachosababishwa na anuwai zote za SARS-CoV-2, ikijumuisha nasaba za kizazi za kisasa za Omicron. Ulinzi dhidi ya ugonjwa mkali na maambukizi ya Symptomatic yanayotokana na chanjo za virusi vya index na BA.1- au BA. 4/5- zenye bivalent mRNA chanjo hupungua baada ya muda. Hata hivyo, ulinzi kutoka kwa ugonjwa mbaya hudumishwa kwa muda mrefu kuliko ulinzi kutoka kwa maambukizi ya Symptomatic. ikilinganishwa na chanjo zenye msingi wa virusi vya index, Dozi za nyongeza za chanjo za BA.1- au BA. 4/5- zenye mRNA zenye bivalent zinaweza kuongeza ufanisi wa chanjo dhidi ya ugonjwa wa Symptomatic, huku idadi ndogo ya tafiti zinazotathmini matokeo makali zinaonyesha makadirio sawa ya ufanisi wa chanjo. Chanjo za BA.1 - na BA. 4/5- zenye mRNA zenye bivalent huongeza ukubwa na kutoa upana zaidi wa mwitikio wa kinga dhidi ya vibadala vya SARS-CoV-2 vinapotumiwa kama kipim cha nyongeza, ikilinganishwa na virusi vya index - chanjo za msingi.
translations.hypothesis: Dosis za ziada za chanjo za aina ya virusi, zinaendelea kutoa kinga kubwa dhidi ya magonjwa na vifo vyenye hatari vyosababishwa na wote wa aina za SARS-CoV-2, pamoja na hatua za hivi sasa za Omicron. Kinga dhidi ya magonjwa na maumoni yanayosababishwa na chanjo za aina ya virusi na chanjo za mRNA mbili zinazoandamana na BA.1- au BA.4/5, zinapungua kwa muda. Hata hivyo, kinga dhidi ya magonjwa hatari inabaki kwa muda mrefu kuliko kinga dhidi ya maumoni. Ikilinganishwa na chanjo za aina ya virusi, dosis za ziada za chanjo za mRNA mbili zinazoandamana na BA.1- au BA.4/5, zinaweza kuongeza ufanisi wa chanjo dhidi ya magonjwa yanayosababisha maumoni, wakati utafiti mdogo unaoangalia matokeo hatari unaonyesha takwima sawa za ufanisi wa chanjo. Chanjo za mRNA mbili zinazoandamana na BA.1- au BA.4/5, zinaimarisha kiwango na kutoa majibu zaidi ya kinga inayohusisha zaidi kwa aina za SARS-CoV-2, ikilinganishwa na chanjo za aina ya virusi.

translations.source: BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines induced higher neutralizing antibody titres against recent descendent lineages of Omicron (BQ.1, XBB.1) as compared to BA.1-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines, when used as a booster dose.
translations.reference: Chanjo za mRNA zenye BA. 4/5 zenye bivalent zilichochea tita za kingamwili zinazopunguza nguvu zaidi ya kizazi cha hivi majui cha Omicron (BQ.1, XBB.1) ikilinganishwa na chanjo za mRNA zenye BA.1 zenye bivalent, zinapotumiwa kama kipimo cha nyongeza.
translations.hypothesis: Vifaa vya mRNA vya aina mbili ambazo zina BA.4/5, ziliunda viwango vya juu vya antibodies za kupunguza athari dhidi ya hatua za hivi majuzi za Omicron (BQ.1, XBB.1), ikilinganishwa na vifaa vya mRNA vya aina mbili ambazo zina BA.1, wakati zilisitumika kama tiba ya ziada.
